title: RED: Adaptive Real-Time DAG Scheduling for Robotic Inference under Environmental Dynamics
summary: Robots deployed in dynamic environments must contend with environment-driven changes that reshape computation at runtime: new tasks may appear, precedence relations can shift, and overall workload structure evolves, all of which degrade performance, especially when multi-task inference is required under tight resource and real-time budgets. We present RED, a real-time scheduling framework for multi-task deep neural network workloads on resource-constrained robotic platforms that adapts to Robotic Environmental Dynamics (RED) while preserving end-to-end timing guarantees under modeling assumptions. The core of RED is a deadline-aware scheduler that assigns intermediate sub-deadlines, allowing it to accommodate evolving computation graphs and asynchronous inference induced by unpredictable conditions. The framework also supports flexible deployment of MIMONet (multi-input multi-output neural networks), commonly used in multi-tasking robots to alleviate memory pressure through weight sharing. RED explicitly leverages this shared-parameter property via a workload refinement and graph-reconstruction procedure that aligns MIMONet structure with schedulability requirements, improving compatibility and efficiency. We implement RED on NVIDIA Jetson family platforms and on an Apple M-series MacBook and evaluate it on navigation-oriented workloads representative of real robotic scenarios. Experiments show consistent gains over existing methods in throughput, deadline satisfaction, robustness to interference, adaptability, and runtime overhead.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RED框架，一种适应动态环境变化、实时调度多任务深度神经网络推理的系统，有效提升在资源受限条件下的机器人推理表现。
AI.motivation: 动态环境下机器人需要应对任务变化、任务优先级变动和工作负载结构演化等挑战，现有方法难以同时满足多任务推理的时序和资源限制，影响性能和实时性。
AI.method: RED框架以截止时间感知的调度器为核心，为每个任务分配中间子截止时间，从而适应不断变化的计算图和异步推理。它还支持MIMONet（多输入多输出神经网络）的灵活部署，通过显式利用参数共享特性，并进行工作负载细化与计算图重构，使MIMONet结构适配可调度性要求。
AI.result: 在NVIDIA Jetson和Apple M系列平台对导航类机器人任务实验，RED在吞吐量、截止时间满足率、鲁棒性、适应性和运行开销等各项指标上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: RED能在动态环境下有效提升多任务神经网络调度能力，增强机器人系统的实时性、效率及资源利用率，对实际机器人任务具有实用价值。

title: MASt3R-Nav: WayPixel Navigation in Relative 3D Maps
comment: 2026 IEEE International Conference on Robotics & Automation (ICRA)
summary: Visual navigation ability is strongly tied to its underlying representation of the world. Unlike classical 3D maps that require globally-consistent geometry, image- or object-relative topological graphs almost entirely do away with geometric understanding. But, this comes at the cost of navigation capability, often limiting it to merely teach-and-repeat. In this work, we propose a novel map representation in the form of pixel-relative connectivity, which is geometrically accurate but does not require global geometric consistency. Inspired by recent progress in 3D grounded image matching, we construct a map from an image sequence through inter-image connectivity based on pixel correspondences in the relative 3D coordinate systems of individual image pairs. We then use this pixel-level graph to perform global path planning by approximating and sparsifying intra-image pixel connectivity. Through this, we derive a ''WayPixel Costmap'' representation and train a controller conditioned on it to predict a trajectory rollout. We show that this dense pixel-level costmap based on relative geometry is a more accurate conditioning variable for control prediction than its image- and object-level counterparts. This enables a highly capable navigation system, as validated on four types of navigation tasks in the simulator and through real world demonstrations.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于像素相对连通性的视觉导航地图表示方法，不依赖全局一致的几何信息，却能实现精确的导航路径规划和控制预测，优于传统的图像级或目标级方法。
AI.motivation: 当前导航方法，不是需要严格的3D全球地图（实现成本高、敏感度高），就是放弃几何信息导致导航能力被限制（如仅可按照演示路线重复移动）。作者希望在不需要全局一致几何的前提下，提升导航能力。
AI.method: 受3D配准进展启发，从图像序列中，通过每对图片间像素级三维坐标匹配，构建像素级连通图。在该图上通过稀疏化和近似内部像素连通性，实现全局路径规划，并推导出WayPixel Costmap，训练基于该Costmap的控制器预测导航轨迹。
AI.result: 这种像素级的相对几何Costmap，在模拟器和真实机器人平台上四种导航任务中，表现优于基于图像级或目标级特征的方法，预测控制更准确。
AI.conclusion: 提出的像素相对几何连通表示，有效提升了导航系统的灵活性和准确性，摆脱了对全局一致三维地图的依赖，拓宽了视觉导航的实际应用范围。

title: Anisotropic Diffusion-Driven Ergodic Coverage in Multi-Robot Systems
summary: We consider the problem of combining potential field and ergodic search on multi-robot systems. Traditional ergodic search algorithms use metrics for ergodicity that account for the desired distribution at different scales. Recently, a heat equation-driven ergodic approach was proposed, which adds flexibility to the smoothing of the ergodic metric. However, such an approach, as it is an isotropic diffusion, propagates the error uniformly in all directions, regardless of changes in the desired distribution. We introduce a general class of anisotropic diffusion formulation of the ergodicity problem, which generates a potential field for the ergodic search. We demonstrate that this approach generalizes previous results, which consider radial basis functions and the solution of the heat equation to represent the difference between the goal density distribution and the covered trajectories. In our solution, the agent movement is directed using the gradient of the solution of the Perona-Malik diffusion, and our formulation includes the heat equation as a special case. We demonstrate the methodology with a series of simulations in different scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种各向异性扩散的遍历性搜索方法，用于多机器人系统，并通过一系列仿真实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统遍历性搜索方法在处理目标分布时存在局限，特别是热方程驱动的遍历算法虽然灵活但扩散各向同性，无法根据目标分布的变化灵活传播误差。为了解决该问题，作者引入一类各向异性扩散方法。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种通用的各向异性扩散遍历性搜索框架，用于生成多机器人系统的势场。该方法以Perona-Malik扩散方程为核心，通过求解其梯度引导机器人运动，同时包含热方程方法作为特例。
AI.result: 通过一系列仿真实验，作者验证了所提方法在不同场景下的有效性，并表明其能够推广传统的径向基函数和热方程方法。
AI.conclusion: 各向异性扩散方法为多机器人遍历性搜索带来了更大灵活性，能更好地适应目标分布的变化，是对现有方法的重要推广。

title: Investigating the Effect of a Series Elastic Actuation Retrofit to Black-Box Actuators
summary:
In robotic applications, actuators are typically designed to be stiff with minimal backlash to ensure precision and repeatability. However, this limits compliance, leading to potential damage and poor force control in uncertain environments. Series Elastic Actuation (SEA) introduces compliance to enhance disturbance rejection and enable force measurement via Hooke's Law but reduces system bandwidth.
  A custom Series Elastic (SE) element was retrofitted to a black-box actuator to mitigate non-linearities like backlash and static friction. Integrating the SE element enabled high-fidelity force measurements, improving force control bandwidth and performance.
  A torsional SE element was designed through Finite Element (FE) analysis, yielding a stiffness of 2155.4 Nm/rad. Open-loop force control bandwidth was measured for the original motor and the SEA-integrated configuration, while closed-loop bandwidth was assessed using feedback from the SEA and a commercial force sensor. The SEA module increased bandwidth from 10.32 Hz to 30.32 Hz, a 2.93X improvement. Additionally, it outperformed the commercial sensor by 7.63% despite costing 25 GBP, a fraction of the price.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过为传统伺服电机引入串联弹性元件，实现了对非线性因素（如间隙和静摩擦）的补偿，显著提升了力控制带宽及性能，且成本远低于商业传感器。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人执行器通常为刚性设计，精确但缺乏柔顺性，容易受环境不确定性影响导致损坏和力控制不佳。串联弹性驱动（SEA）可提升系统对扰动的适应能力并支持高精度力测量，因此被引入以改善系统性能。
AI.method: 作者通过有限元分析，设计了一种扭转型串联弹性元件，并将其集成在一个黑盒电机上，对系统的力控制带宽进行开环与闭环测试，比较了原电机、集成SEA后的电机及商业传感器的表现。
AI.result: SEA模块将原系统的带宽从10.32 Hz提升到30.32 Hz，提升了2.93倍。在相同测试中，SEA模块的性能比商业力传感器高出7.63%，而成本仅为25英镑，远低于商业产品。
AI.conclusion: 定制的SEA元件能有效补偿传统伺服系统中的非线性因素，实现高精度、低成本的力控制，对工业机器人及力控场景具有重要意义。

title: A World Model of Radiologist Reading for Medical Image Representation Learning
summary: Radiologist eye-tracking data provide a rich record of how experts search, compare, and accumulate evidence during image reading; yet, existing methods exploit this signal only partially, either as a static spatial prior or as an auxiliary prediction target decoupled from diagnosis. We propose GazeWorld, a medical imaging world model that treats the image as the world and the radiologist's fixation sequence as a trajectory through it. GazeWorld autoregressively predicts the latent representation of the next fixated patch from all previously visited ones, while a spatial-completion branch covers unvisited regions. At inference, GazeWorld generates a sequence of patch representations from the image alone without requiring real gaze data. Frozen GazeWorld features achieve state-of-the-art diagnostic accuracy across all nine supervised settings on CheXpert, RSNA Pneumonia, and SIIM-ACR Pneumothorax, as well as the highest zero-shot accuracy on all three benchmarks. On the GazeSearch benchmark, a generic decoder trained on the same frozen features outperforms the purpose-built LogitGaze-Med by over 16\% in ScanMatch and 22\% in SED, despite not being explicitly trained to predict gaze. GazeWorld demonstrates that modeling how experts read, not just what they conclude, offers a promising pretraining paradigm for medical imaging AI.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出GazeWorld，将放射科医生的视线轨迹作为专家在医学影像中“探索世界”的过程，证明通过模拟专家的阅读方式能提升医学影像AI的表现。
AI.motivation: 传统利用眼动追踪数据的方法仅将其作为静态空间先验或诊断任务的辅助目标，并未充分挖掘专家阅片过程中蕴含的丰富信息，因此需开发更有效的利用方式。
AI.method: GazeWorld模型将医学影像视为“世界”，医生注视序列视为世界中的“轨迹”，通过自回归预测专家下一个注视区域的特征，并引入空间补全分支以覆盖未注视区域。推理阶段仅凭影像生成注视路径特征，无需真实注视数据。
AI.result: GazeWorld在CheXpert、RSNA Pneumonia和SIIM-ACR Pneumothorax三个数据集的九种监督任务中诊断准确率均达最新水平，并在零样本测试和GazeSearch基准任务超越特定目的模型，ScanMatch和SED指标分别提升超过16%和22%。
AI.conclusion: 不仅仅关注专家结论，更要建模专家如何读片，GazeWorld证明了以专家阅读过程为核心的预训练范式可显著提升医学影像AI，具有很大应用前景。

title: Document Classification Pattern Recognition via Information Fusion: A Systematic Review of Multimodal and Multiview Representation Approaches
summary: Information fusion is used widely to improve document classification by the integration of multiple data sources (multimodal) or representations (multiview). However, the field lacks a unified framework, a quantitative synthesis of its effectiveness, and clear guidance for practitioners. This systematic review addresses these gaps by analysing 139 primary studies. It introduces a formal framework to structure the field, presents the results of a qualitative analysis to identify key trends, and performs a random-effects meta-analysis (to our knowledge, the first focused on document classification) to quantify performance gains. Our meta-analysis reveals that multimodal fusion improves accuracy (mean gain of +5.28 percentage points, $p=0.0016$) significantly -- the F1-score effect is directionally positive but statistically non-significant in our primary model. Multiview fusion provides consistent but modest gains for accuracy (+4.67\%), F1-score (+3.08\%), and recall (all $p<0.05$). Critically, our qualitative synthesis uncovers challenges in reproducibility in methodological rigour: only 11.8\% (multimodal) and 23.3\% (multiview) of the studies use statistical tests to validate their findings, which undermines the reliability of many of their results. This review's primary contributions are a unifying framework, the first quantitative evidence base, and data-driven guidelines. This review concludes that successful information fusion depends not on algorithmic complexity, but on the strategic alignment of the fusion method with the task context and a commitment to more rigorous validation.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性回顾了文档分类领域中信息融合方法的应用效果，包括多模态和多视图融合，并通过定量元分析首次系统量化了其性能增益，同时指出了当前研究在方法严谨性和可复现性方面的挑战。
AI.motivation: 尽管多模态或多视图的信息融合在文档分类中应用广泛，但该领域缺乏统一的理论框架、系统的效果定量综述及对实践者明确的指导。因此，作者希望梳理现有研究，给出系统分析和有效方法建议。
AI.method: 分析了139篇相关文献，并引入了正式的理论框架。采用定性分析识别领域趋势，并进行随机效应的meta分析来定量测评信息融合带来的性能提升，是文档分类方向首个专注于此的meta分析。
AI.result: 元分析表明，多模态融合在准确率上平均提升5.28个百分点（统计显著），F1分数正向但不显著；多视图融合在准确率、F1和召回上均有小幅但稳定提升（均统计显著）。但大多数文献未采用统计学检验，导致结果可信度有限。
AI.conclusion: 提出了统一理论框架和首个定量证据，主张信息融合成功与否关键在于方法与任务场景的契合及更严谨的验证流程，而非算法复杂度。行业应关注融合策略与任务的战略匹配，并提升研究的可验证性和规范性。

title: Afford-VLA: Action-Aligned Visual Planning via Internalized Affordance
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have shown strong potential for generalist robot manipulation, yet they remain limited by insufficient spatial reasoning, particularly in determining where to interact in complex visual scenes. While recent efforts introduce various forms of visual planning to address this issue, existing approaches either rely on global geometric cues, symbolic intermediate representations, or externally generated visual signals, which are often weakly coupled with downstream action prediction. In this work, we revisit visual planning in VLA systems and argue that effective planning should be local, visually grounded, internally generated, and directly aligned with action. Based on this insight, we propose Afford-VLA, a unified framework that internalizes task-conditioned affordance as an explicit visual planning interface within VLA models. Concretely, we introduce learnable <AFF> tokens to query task-relevant interaction regions, decode affordance masks from multimodal features, and convert them into compact embeddings that directly condition action generation. This design enables affordance to be both generated and utilized within the VLA, forming a tightly coupled perception-action pathway. To further support this integration, we adopt a training strategy that allows the affordance pathway to be jointly optimized with action prediction, improving its effectiveness for downstream control. We evaluate our method on multiple simulation benchmarks, including LIBERO, LIBERO-Plus, and SimplerEnv, achieving consistent state-of-the-art performance, along with strong real-world results. These findings demonstrate that internalizing affordance as action-aligned visual planning provides a powerful paradigm for improving VLA systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将可供性（affordance）作为显式视觉规划接口集成到视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型中的方法，显著提升了机器人多任务操作的空间推理与执行效果。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型在机器人通用操作任务上表现优异，但其空间推理能力有限，难以在复杂视觉场景中精确定位交互区域。已有的视觉规划方法往往与动作预测耦合不紧，无法高效指导机器人操作行为。
AI.method: 提出Afford-VLA框架，将任务相关的可供性作为一种显式特征集成进VLA模型。具体方法为引入可学习的<AFF>标记，用于查询与任务高度相关的交互区域，从多模态特征中解码可供性掩码，并转化为紧凑嵌入，直接参与动作生成。同时，采用联合优化策略，使可供性通路和动作预测同步优化。
AI.result: 在LIBERO、LIBERO-Plus、SimplerEnv等仿真平台和真实场景实验中，该方法均取得了当前最优性能，效果优于传统视觉规划方法。
AI.conclusion: 将任务相关可供性内化为VLA系统的动作驱动视觉规划接口，是提升通用机器人操作能力的有效途径。Afford-VLA为VLA模型设计和视觉规划提供了新的强有力思路。

title: Nano World Models: A Minimalist Implementation of Future Video Prediction
summary: World models have become a central paradigm for learning predictive simulators that support generation, planning, and decision-making. Yet, despite rapid progress in industry-scale interactive video generation, the broader research community still lacks compact, reproducible, and easily extensible implementations for studying the design choices underlying modern world models. We introduce Nano World Models, a minimalist codebase for future video prediction centered around diffusion forcing. Nano World Models provides a unified interface for generative objectives, model scales, action-conditioning mechanisms, latent observation spaces, datasets, evaluation protocols, and long-horizon rollout procedures. This design enables controlled studies of world-modeling components that are often entangled across separate implementations. Through experiments across simple control environments, game simulation, and real-robot data, we examine how prediction parameterization, architecture scale, action injection, sampling budget, and domain complexity affect video prediction quality and autoregressive rollout behavior. By releasing code, configurations, evaluation scripts, and pretrained checkpoints, Nano World Models aims to provide a compact yet extensible experimental substrate for open, reproducible, and scientific world-model research.

AI.tldr: 提出了一套名为Nano World Models的极简世界模型代码库，为视频预测和生成等任务提供统一、易扩展的研究平台。
AI.motivation: 尽管世界模型在业界取得了快速进展，但业界缺乏紧凑、可复现且易于扩展的开源实现，这限制了学术研究者对现代世界模型设计选择的系统性探索。
AI.method: 开发了Nano World Models代码库，围绕diffusion forcing技术，提供生成目标、模型规模、动作条件、潜在观测空间、数据集、评测流程、长时序推理等统一接口，便于不同世界模型组件的可控实验对比。
AI.result: 通过在控制环境、游戏仿真和机器人数据上实验，作者系统性分析了预测参数化、架构规模、动作注入、采样预算及领域复杂性等对视频质量与自回归推理表现的影响。
AI.conclusion: Nano World Models为开放、可复现的世界模型研究提供了基础设施，助力社区科学地比较和改进世界模型方法，并已开放全部代码、配置和预训练模型。

title: Raon-Speech Technical Report
summary: We present Raon-Speech, a top-performing 9B-parameter speech language model (SpeechLM) for English and Korean speech understanding, answering, and generation, and Raon-SpeechChat, a high-performing full-duplex extension for natural real-time conversation. Raon-Speech successfully transforms a pre-trained LLM into a SpeechLM that both understands and generates speech while preserving strong text capabilities. It trains on 1.38M hours of highly curated English and Korean speech and text datasets with the following training stages: (1) speech modules alignment, (2) end-to-end SpeechLM pre-training with knowledge distillation, and (3) multi-task preference optimization-based post-training. Across 42 English and Korean speech and text benchmarks, Raon-Speech establishes the strongest overall profile on speech-centric tasks in our comparison against eight similarly sized recent audio foundation models, including Qwen2.5-Omni and Fun-Audio-Chat, while preserving strong text question answering performance. Building upon it, Raon-SpeechChat enables natural full-duplex conversation by continual training on 119K hours of time-aligned real and synthetic dialogue data. It proceeds through three complementary training stages: (1) causal encoder adaptation, (2) full-duplex pre-training, (3) full-duplex fine-tuning for voice and role-control. On multiple full-duplex benchmarks, Raon-SpeechChat shows its clearest strengths on the turn-taking and interruption-sensitive behaviors covered by FDB v1.0, and remains competitive across the broader full-duplex evaluation suite. We open-source all model checkpoints, the training and inference pipeline, and an interactive demo.

AI.tldr: Raon-Speech是一个9B参数、面向英韩语的高性能语音大模型，兼具语音理解、问答和生成能力，并推出了支持自然实时全双工对话的Raon-SpeechChat，两者在多项英韩语音任务中表现领先，全部开源。
AI.motivation: 随着多语种、多模态交互需求增长，现有的语音-语言大模型（如Qwen2.5-Omni）在英、韩等主要语种的语音理解和生成及人机自然对话上的能力仍有限。该工作旨在打造效果更优、能真正支持全双工自然对话的语音大模型。
AI.method: Raon-Speech从大参数LLM出发，通过三阶段（语音模块对齐、端到端SpeechLM蒸馏预训练、多任务偏好优化微调）训练，融合1.38M小时英韩语音及文本。Raon-SpeechChat以Raon-Speech为基础，结合119K小时真实/合成对话，再经历因果编码器适配、全双工预训练和全双工语音角色微调三步，强化自然交互和对话控制能力。
AI.result: 在42个英、韩语音和文本任务基准上，Raon-Speech总体表现优于8个同级别音频基础模型，如Qwen2.5-Omni和Fun-Audio-Chat，且问答能力不弱。Raon-SpeechChat在多项全双工评测中，特别是在对转接、打断敏感的FDB v1.0上表现最佳，在整体全双工评测中亦具竞争力。
AI.conclusion: Raon-Speech与Raon-SpeechChat实现了语音理解、生成和自然全双工对话的卓越水平，有望推动多语种、多模态人机交互技术发展，且开源有助于相关领域的研究进步。

title: ECo-MoE: Embodiment-Conditioned Mixture of Experts Increases the Evolvability of Robots
summary: In this paper, we introduce a model of evolution and learning in robots that co-optimizes a distribution of latent design vectors (genotypes) and a mixture of control experts (neural modules), which are gated by the latent coordinates of each decoded design (phenotype). This provides a scalable alternative to co-design algorithms that either train an individual policy for every robot, which is inefficient, or a monolithic universal controller for all robots, which results in overly conservative structures and behaviors. Our approach lies somewhere between these two extremes, preserving ancestral knowledge in a unified yet modular framework in which different body plans activate and deactivate different combinations of learned sensorimotor circuits for goal-directed behavior. This allows one part of the controller to be overhauled to better suit new species of designs as they emerge without disrupting the hard-earned knowledge contained within other expert modules. It also allows pretrained expert policies to be directly plugged into the mixture, which can steer evolution into otherwise unexplored areas of latent space containing desired morphological traits. We refer to this process as "evo by demo" and explore how it may be used to guide freeform evolution toward canonical structures defined by the pretrained model. Videos and code can be found at: https://eco-moe.github.io.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新颖的机器人进化与学习模型，联合优化机器人结构的潜在设计向量和混合式控制专家（神经模块），使不同机器人可激活不同感知-运动电路以实现高效和多样化的协同进化。
AI.motivation: 现有的机器人协同设计方法不是为每个机器人单独训练策略，效率低下，就是采用统一控制器，导致性能保守。作者希望找到一种可以兼顾高效与适应性的方法。
AI.method: 作者提出将每个机器人的结构设计（基因型）与一组神经模块（控制专家）联合优化，并由设计的潜在向量门控激活相应的专家模块，从而各机器人按需组合专家，实现模块化控制和知识继承。并引入“evo by demo”，用预训练专家引导进化搜索空间。
AI.result: 该框架能够在统一的模块化体系下，不同机器人体态激活不同神经模块，部分控制器可针对新设计进行重塑，其他专家模块的知识得以保留。还能直接引入预训练策略，引导机器人向目标结构进化。
AI.conclusion: 作者证明了新方法兼具高效性、适应性以及知识可继承性，通过Evo by Demo等机制可灵活指引机器人进化到预期性能与结构，优于传统极端策略。

title: RAW: Robust Avatar Watermarking -- Benchmarking and Baseline
summary: Digital avatar watermarking presents unique challenges: avatars are routinely post-processed with background replacement, reframing, and format conversion before deployment. We introduce \textbf{RAW} (Robust Avatar Watermarking), a benchmark comprising 50 synthetic avatar videos from 5 commercial providers and 6 attacks simulating real-world avatar workflows. Evaluating 7 existing methods reveals that avatar-specific attacks such as background removal significantly degrade watermark recovery. We propose \textbf{WALT} (Watermarking Avatars with Learned Textures), which embeds watermarks in UV texture space via 3D face reconstruction. WALT achieves the highest robustness to zoom attacks (92.4\%) while maintaining strong performance on background removal (95.6\%). We release our benchmark to facilitate research into avatar-specific watermarking.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了专用于数字虚拟人头像水印的基准RAW，并提出了WALT方法，显著提升了头像特有攻击下的水印鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 随着数字虚拟人（avatar）的广泛应用，对其内容实现版权追溯和防伪需求提升。然而，虚拟人头像在实际部署中常被后处理，如背景替换、裁剪、格式转换，导致现有水印技术的鲁棒性不足。因此亟需专门提升针对虚拟人头像应用场景下的水印技术。
AI.method: 作者建立了专门面向虚拟人头像的水印攻击基准RAW，覆盖5家商业虚拟人生成的数据和6种模拟真实工作流的攻击，并评测了市面上7种水印方法。基于分析，提出了WALT：通过3D人脸重建，把水印嵌入UV纹理空间，提高在头像特有攻击下的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验显示现有水印方法在背景移除等头像特有攻击下恢复率明显下降。WALT方法在缩放攻击下鲁棒率达到92.4%，背景移除下恢复率也达95.6%，显著优于其它方案。
AI.conclusion: 专为虚拟人头像设计的水印嵌入方法能大幅提升在复杂、真实场景下的鲁棒性。公开基准RAW数据集，将推动业界进一步研究和发展该方向。

title: Multi-Persona Debate System for Automated Scientific Hypothesis Generation
comment: 31 pages with 7 main figures, 4 supplementary figures and 1 supplementary table
summary: Modern scientific discovery is bottlenecked not by data scarcity, but by the inability to synthesize fragmented knowledge into actionable hypotheses. This challenge is especially acute in battery materials research, where electrochemical performance, interfacial behavior, and manufacturing feasibility must be optimized simultaneously. Here, we present the Multi-Persona Debate System (MPDS), a literature-grounded framework for automated scientific hypothesis generation that combines literature retrieval, long-context large language model reasoning, corpus-driven persona induction, and structured multi-agent debate. MPDS constructs literature snapshots of up to 500 papers, grounds agents in role-specific evidence pools, and conducts a three-round citation-aware debate followed by moderator synthesis, enabling negotiation between personas while preserving evidence traceability. We evaluate MPDS using a temporally controlled protocol excluding direct access to target papers, including two held-out battery-materials case studies and a blinded comparison across 30 matched cases. In sodium-ion anode and all-solid-state battery cathode design tasks, MPDS recovered design logics aligned with experimentally validated solution spaces and generated more mechanistically explicit, process-aware proposals than simpler baselines. To assess the impact of personas and debate, we introduce Integrative Hypothesis Quality scoring. In ablation studies, MPDS achieved the highest mean score among five conditions, with its largest advantage in cross-perspective integration. A laboratory follow-up suggests utility as a diagnostic aid for identifying practical bottlenecks in workflows. These results indicate that structured debate over literature snapshots improves hypothesis formation under coupled engineering constraints and provides a reusable workflow for text-intensive scientific discovery.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多角色辩论系统（MPDS），利用结构化多智能体辩论和大语言模型，在电池材料等领域实现了更有效的自动科学假设生成。实验证明，该系统能生成更具机制性和流程感知的研究假设，并促进观点整合和证据可追溯性。
AI.motivation: 科学发现面临的主要瓶颈已从数据稀缺转向知识碎片化，特别是在需要兼顾多重工程约束的电池材料研究中，如何整合文献知识、产生可检验假设成为核心挑战。
AI.method: MPDS系统结合文献检索、长上下文大语言模型推理、基于文献语料库的角色归纳和多智能体结构化辩论。通过为多角色代理分配特定证据池，在约500篇文献范围内开展三轮引文感知辩论，并由主持人综合，保证证据的完整链路。此外采用时序控制协议和盲测实验对系统效能进行评测。
AI.result: 在钠离子负极和全固态电池正极设计案例中，MPDS生成的方案与已验证实验结果高度一致，提出的假设更具机理阐释性。盲测对比及消融实验表明，MPDS在整合多视角、提升假设质量方面优于对照基线。实验室应用则展现其识别实际流程瓶颈的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 结构化的多角色辩论系统能显著提升基于大量文献的科学假设生成能力，为解决复杂工程耦合问题提供了通用的文本驱动工作流，有助于推动文本密集型领域的科学发现。

title: AcroRL: Learning Aggressive Quadrotor Inversion using Bidirectional Thrust
summary: Bidirectional thrust grants quadrotors a second equilibrium condition and increased control authority, expanding the envelope of possible aggressive maneuvers and enabling inverted flight, perching, and sensing. Prior geometric control approaches extend differential flatness through Hopf fibration-based attitude representations to support bidirectional thrust, but struggle with actuator saturation and motor reversal delay during inversions, requiring heuristic thrust posture scheduling and waypoint tuning. We propose a learning-based framework that modulates a constant reference trajectory to perform compact, position-constrained quadrotor inversions while remaining compatible with traditional trajectory generation and tracking across flight regimes. Separate policies are trained via reinforcement learning for nominal-to-inverted and inverted-to-nominal transitions. In JAX-based simulation, the proposed method achieves the lowest position deviation and settling time across all evaluated baselines, reducing position root mean square error (RMSE) by 32% and settling time by 57% relative to the strongest optimization-based baseline. Hardware experiments demonstrate successful inversion across multiple yaw configurations with position RMSE below 0.35m, and compatibility with downstream trajectory generation and control through circular flight in both regimes. Additionally, we provide an open-source implementation of the proposed framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于学习的方法，使四旋翼能够稳定可靠地进行紧凑、受位姿约束的倒置飞行转换，并在仿真和实物实验中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 传统的几何控制方法在支持四旋翼双向推力、倒置飞行时，遇到执行器饱和和电机反转延迟的问题，需要繁琐的启发式调度与轨迹微调，难以高效且稳定地实现激进机动。
AI.method: 作者提出了一个基于强化学习的框架，针对正向飞行到倒置和倒置到正向飞行分别训练不同策略，通过调整参考轨迹以兼容传统轨迹生成和跟踪，避免传统方法关于模型和调度的局限性，并在JAX仿真中进行评估。
AI.result: 结果显示，该方法在所有基线中表现最优，位置均方根误差RMSE减少了32%，收敛时间降低57%。实物实验中，在多个偏航角下均可成功实现倒置，位置RMSE小于0.35m，并与下游轨迹控制兼容。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的学习方法有效提升了四旋翼倒置转换的精度和鲁棒性，克服了传统几何控制的局限，具有实际工程应用潜力，并开放源码以促进后续研究。

title: Task-Aligned Self-Supervised Learning for Medical Image Analysis: A Systematic Review and Practical Design Guidelines
comment: This manuscript is 31 pages with 4 tables and 3 figures
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has emerged as a promising paradigm for addressing the annotation bottleneck in medical imaging by learning representations from unlabeled data. However, its effectiveness depends heavily on the design of the pretext task and its alignment with the downstream clinical objective. We present a systematic, task-oriented review of SSL in medical imaging, examining how different pretext-task formulations influence performance across classification, segmentation, detection, and other tasks. Following PRISMA guidelines, we analyze 75 studies published between 2017 and 2025 and organize them into four paradigms: contrastive, non-contrastive and predictive, generative and reconstruction-based, and hybrid learning. Rather than cataloguing methods by architecture, we map each paradigm to the downstream objectives it best supports. Our analysis shows there is no universally optimal SSL strategy; instead, performance is governed by the alignment between the pretext task, the imaging modality, and the target task. Contrastive methods learn global discriminative features and align well with classification, but may overlook subtle pathological patterns. Generative and spatial prediction-based approaches better preserve local anatomical structure, making them more suitable for segmentation and other dense prediction tasks, while hybrid methods offer the most balanced performance. We further show that modality-specific design is critical and that SSL provides its greatest benefit in low-label and few-shot regimes. Finally, we distill these findings into practical design guidelines and outline open challenges, including pathology-aware pretext task design, resource-efficient training for high-dimensional data, and standardized evaluation protocols. This work offers practical guidance for designing more effective and clinically relevant SSL frameworks in medical imaging.

AI.tldr: 该综述系统分析了自监督学习（SSL）在医学影像中的应用，探讨了不同预训练任务与下游任务间的适配及性能影响，总结出没有万能的SSL策略，提供了设计建议并指出了未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 医学影像标注成本高，限制了深度学习模型的应用。自监督学习通过利用无标注数据学习表征，有望缓解这一瓶颈，但其效果高度依赖于预训练任务与实际临床目标的匹配程度。本文旨在系统总结并分析SSL在医学影像中的不同设计方式及其对下游任务的影响。
AI.method: 作者遵循PRISMA规范，综述和分析了2017到2025年间75篇相关论文。将SSL方法分为四类：对比学习、非对比/预测式、生成与重建式以及混合式，并将每类方法与最适合的下游目标进行了关联分析，而非仅按模型架构分类。
AI.result: 研究发现，没有单一SSL策略能在所有任务中表现最佳。对比学习适合分类任务，能捕捉全局判别特征，但对细微病灶不敏感。生成与空间预测类方法更能保留局部结构，适合分割等密集预测任务。混合方法在多任务间表现更均衡。此外，SSL在有标签数据较少的情况下表现尤为突出，且预训练任务应结合具体影像模态进行设计。
AI.conclusion: SSL在医学影像低标注场景中能显著提升表现，但需关注任务和模态的匹配。本文总结了实际设计建议，并提出未来需解决病理感知预训练、资源高效训练和标准化评测等挑战。

title: Improving the Completeness and Comparability of Segment Disclosures: A Large Language Model Approach
comment: 39 pages, 4 figures, submitted to Accounting Horizons
summary: Segment-level disclosures are a central component of financial reporting, providing insight into firms' internal organization and the allocation of economic activities across operating units. However, segment information is often presented in both qualitative and quantitative forms, dispersed across tables and narrative sections of Form 10-K filings. Empirical research relying on structured databases faces both completeness and comparability challenges, as some firm-year observations may be missing, nested segment disclosures are not captured, and support for longitudinal and cross-firm comparability is limited. This study develops a large language model-based framework to extract segment disclosures directly from Form 10-K filings and to preserve both reportable and nested segment information. We further design a retrieval augmented system that incorporates information across multiple filings to support comparability. We use two representative settings to demonstrate its application: longitudinal analysis within a firm to interpret segment changes over time, and cross firm alignment of geographic segments across firms with different reporting structures. The results indicate that the artifact accurately extracts segment-level information and effectively addresses questions that require cross-period knowledge, demonstrating the potential of LLM-based approaches to enhance the measurement and interpretation of segment disclosures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个基于大语言模型（LLM）的系统，可以直接从10-K文件中提取细分披露信息，同时保留报告及嵌套的细分数据信息。系统还设计了基于检索增强的功能，提升了跨时间和跨公司的可比性。实验证明该系统能够准确提取信息，并有效解决需要跨期知识的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有学术研究在利用结构化数据库分析企业细分信息时，数据完整性和可比性不足，难以捕捉嵌套细分及辅助纵向、横向比较。作者希望通过改进信息提取方式，提升财报细分数据的可用性与质量。
AI.method: 作者开发了一个基于LLM的自动化提取框架，能够直接从10-K文本中抽取结构化的细分披露信息，包括报告和嵌套细分。系统还结合检索增强方法，从多份文件中提取和整合信息，提升分析的准确性和可比性。
AI.result: 经在公司纵向细分变化追踪、不同公司地理区域细分对齐等典型任务测试后，系统能准确提取信息，并有效支持需要跨期知识的分析。
AI.conclusion: 基于LLM的细分信息抽取和增强检索系统在提取、比较和解释企业细分披露方面表现优异，为未来财报分析方法开辟了新方向。

title: Terrain-Adaptive Grouser Wheel for Optimal Planetary Exploration: Design and Experimental Investigation
summary: Planetary rovers operating in extraterrestrial environments often encounter significant mobility challenges due to varying terrain features such as gradients and granularity. While recent works in multimodal wheel design have explored adjustments in stiffness, compliance, and diameter as a means to improve terrain adaptability, full wheel grouser-adjustable designs remain largely unexplored. Grousers are a compelling feature to actuate, as granular terrains tend to require increased grouser height for improved wheel performance. As a result, we introduce [Anonymized Robot Name], a multimodal wheel capable of continuously adjusting its grouser height for terrain adaptation. The platform was evaluated across four representative surfaces, including vinyl flooring, coarse rock, pea gravel, and sand under two packing states, spanning a range of granular conditions. Results from 750 experimental trials demonstrate that adaptive deployment reduces slip by 30.0--58.0\% and improves travel time and energy consumption by up to 77.4\% in granular regimes relative to fixed configurations. Using the terrain trial data, a simplified scaling analysis was developed and validated, suggesting a relationship between terrain granularity and optimal grouser height for the tested configuration. No single grouser height minimized slip across all terrains, underscoring the limitations of fixed-wheel systems commonly used for planetary exploration. This observation reinforces the potential of grouser-adaptive morphology, such as [Anonymized Robot Name], as an effective solution for enhancing rover mobility across diverse and mobility-challenging extraterrestrial environments.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种新型行星探测车轮，能够根据地形连续调节轮胎凸齿（grouser）高度，显著提升了探测车在不同地形（包括颗粒性强的地表）上的适应能力，与固定结构轮子相比表现更优。
AI.motivation: 在外星复杂地形下，探测车经常因地表颗粒性和坡度不同导致机动性受限。现有多模态轮设计虽可调节硬度、顺应性和直径，但对轮胎凸齿可调节的方案研究甚少。鉴于颗粒状地形对轮胎凸齿高度有更高适应需求，研究团队旨在通过主动调节凸齿高度提升通过性。
AI.method: 研发了一种能连续调节轮胎凸齿高度的新型多模态轮子，[Anonymized Robot Name]，并在四种典型地表（乙烯基层、粗石、豌豆石子和松沙）及不同压实状态下进行共750次实验，对比测量滑移率、通过时间和能耗等多项性能指标。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，在颗粒性强的地形下，主动调节凸齿高度可将滑移率降低30%-58%，通过时间和能耗最高可改善77.4%，远优于固定高度设计。理论分析进一步证实了地形颗粒度与最佳凸齿高度间的关联。
AI.conclusion: 没有单一凸齿高度能适应所有地形，固定轮设计存在明显局限。主动可变凸齿设计显著提升了复杂地表下的机动性，具备成为未来行星探测车新型轮系的潜力。

title: Brain-to-Image Retrieval and Reconstruction via Multimodal EEG Alignment
summary: We present a brain-to-image system that decodes visual stimuli from EEG signals recorded during natural image viewing. Our system addresses two tasks: (1) EEG-to-image retrieval, which ranks the correct stimulus image among 200 candidates given an EEG segment, and (2) EEG-to-image reconstruction, which generates an image consistent with the perceived stimulus. For retrieval, we implement a multi-level blurring approach improved with biologically inspired EVNet features and trained with the InfoNCE loss. Evaluated over 10 random seeds for a single subject, the retrieval model achieves a mean final-epoch Top-1 accuracy of 86.30% and Top-5 accuracy of 98.55%. For reconstruction, we implement CognitionCapturerPro, which aligns EEG representations to multi-modal CLIP embeddings, including image, text, depth, and edge embeddings, and synthesizes images with SDXL-Turbo conditioned via IP-Adapter. Averaged over 10 seeds, the reconstruction model achieves a CLIP score of 0.903 using ViT-H-14, a CLIP score of 0.870 using ViT-L/14, and an SSIM of 0.409. These results demonstrate the feasibility of decoding rich visual representations from EEG signals using modern multi-modal alignment and generative modeling techniques.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一套脑电到图像的系统，能够通过EEG信号在观看自然图像时解码感知内容，实现了图像检索和重建两项任务，并在实验中取得了优异的结果。
AI.motivation: 解码人脑视觉感知内容对于脑机接口、辅助沟通和神经科学研究具有重要意义。但此前脑电到图像领域存在准确率有限、信息提取不充分等瓶颈，因此需要提升EEG信号到图像内容的解码能力。
AI.method: 论文设计了两种任务：1）EEG到图像检索，利用多级模糊及生物启发特征（EVNet），结合InfoNCE损失，提升了检索准确率；2）EEG到图像重建，提出CognitionCapturerPro，将EEG特征与CLIP多模态嵌入对齐（包括图像、文本、深度、边缘等），并通过SDXL-Turbo和IP-Adapter进行高质量图像生成。
AI.result: 在一名受试者、10次随机实验中，检索任务Top-1准确率为86.3%，Top-5准确率为98.55%。图像重建任务以ViT-H-14计算CLIP分数达到0.903，ViT-L/14为0.870，SSIM为0.409。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，融合多模态对齐和生成模型技术，可实现从EEG信号中有效地解码和重建丰富的视觉表征，展示了脑电解码与视觉生成的新前景。

title: EchoDistill:Alignment Noisy-to-Clean Self-Distillation for Robust Audio LLMs
summary: Audio Large Language Models (ALLMs) are highly vulnerable to real-world noise, which often induces severe semantic drift and hallucinations. Existing robustness methods primarily rely on waveform-level acoustic enhancement, answer-level supervision, or the internal suppression of noise representations. To address these issues, we propose echodistill, an alignment-based noisy-to-clean self-distillation framework. Echodistill leverages a frozen clean-audio teacher to provide semantic references for an inference-time noisy-audio student. Specifically, the student samples candidate responses under noisy conditions to expose its test-time behavior. These trajectories are then optimized via group-relative policy optimization (GRPO), where the token-level consistency with the teacher acts as a reward bonus. By aligning the noisy student's candidate responses with clean semantic evidence, and applying audio-aware reward shaping, our method encourages reasoning trajectories that are both correct and genuinely acoustically grounded. Echodistill significantly improves the semantic reliability and task performance of Audio LLMs under complex noise, without introducing any additional inference costs. Extensive experiments show that: (I) Compared with the strongest baseline, echodistill achieves average improvements of 4.18\%$\uparrow$ in GSR under strong noise. (II) Ablation results on Qwen-Omni further show that echodistill improves over the GRPO-only variant by 3.02\%$\uparrow$ in Acc, 3.89\%$\uparrow$ in Noisy, and 4.53\%$\uparrow$ in GSR on average. Our codes are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/echodistill-10DE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为echodistill的自蒸馏框架，通过对齐干净语音和噪声语音下LLM输出，提高音频大模型在实际强噪声下的鲁棒性和语义一致性，方法无需增加推理开销，实验显著优于现有强基线。
AI.motivation: 现有音频大模型（ALLMs）在实际环境中对噪声极为敏感，容易出现语义漂移和幻觉。当前鲁棒性提升手段多局限于声学增强或简单监督，难以有效利用干净语音信息提升噪声环境下的模型输出质量。
AI.method: 提出echodistill框架，利用冻住的“干净语音教师”模型给推理时的“噪声语音学生”模型提供语义参考。学生模型在噪声下采样候选答案，通过与教师输出在token层面对齐，以作为奖励进行优化（GRPO方法），并进一步引入音频感知的奖励设计，鼓励语音语义和声学一致。
AI.result: 在强噪声环境下，echodistill模型的GSR指标较最强基线提升4.18%；在Qwen-Omni消融实验中，相较仅用GRPO方法分别在ACC、Noisy、GSR上提升3.02%、3.89%、4.53%。
AI.conclusion: echodistill有效提升音频大模型在复杂环境噪声下的语义可靠性和任务表现，无需增加推理成本，具有良好的实际应用价值。

title: IsaacIPC: Coupling High-Fidelity Simulation and Realistic Rendering for Contact-Rich Robotic Systems
summary: We present IsaacIPC, a robotic simulation framework that couples GPU accelerated incremental potential contact (IPC) with IsaacSim/Lab. IsaacIPC maps simulated deformation between simulation and visual meshes, enabling real-time realistic rendering with applications to data collection and policy evaluation. For tactile sensing, we introduce the geometric mortar contact potential (GMCP), which defines a barrier potential over contact samples on tactile surfaces to better resolve contact-pressure distributions. We evaluate GMCP on contact benchmarks and demonstrate IsaacIPC on rigid-deformable robotic simulations including a quadruped robot, a dexterous hand, and a universal manipulation interface (UMI) gripper.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IsaacIPC，这是一个结合GPU加速的增量势能接触（IPC）算法与IsaacSim/Lab的机器人仿真框架，实现了高效且真实的物理和渲染仿真，特别适用于触觉感知和策略评估。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人仿真平台对于接触建模特别是在形变、真实渲染及触觉感知之间的映射存在局限，难以高效准确地支持真实世界机器人任务的数据采集和性能评估，因此有必要开发更真实且高效的仿真框架。
AI.method: 作者将GPU加速的增量势能接触方法（IPC）与IsaacSim/Lab集成，实现了物理仿真与可视化网格间的高效映射，并提出了几何摩尔塔接触势能（GMCP），用以提升对触觉表面接触压力分布的建模精度。
AI.result: GMCP在接触基准测试中表现出色。IsaacIPC能够对包括四足机器人、灵巧机械手及UMI夹爪在内的刚体-可变形体混合系统进行高效、真实的仿真。
AI.conclusion: IsaacIPC将高效接触力建模与真实渲染结合，为机器人领域的数据采集和政策评估提供了强大工具，显著推动了涉及触觉感知的机器人仿真技术发展。

title: IVR-R1: Refining Trajectories through Iterative Visual-Grounded Reasoning in Reinforcement Learning
summary: Multimodal large language models via reinforcement learning (RL) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in complex visual reasoning tasks, yet they remain limited in long-horizon multimodal scenarios, often suffering from visual hallucination and logical error. Current methods typically pre-encode high-dimensional visual scenes into discrete textual proxies to facilitate downstream reasoning. As the reasoning chain unfolds, however, the inherent information asymmetry between text and visual scenes tends to erode visual grounding, resulting in misguided reasoning and erroneous outputs. To address this issue, we introduce IVR-R1 (Iterative Visual-grounded Reasoning), a novel RL training framework that facilitates dynamic visual re-alignment that actively rectifies reasoning trajectories to guide policy optimization. Specifically, by leveraging a reward-driven screening mechanism to identify flawed rollouts, IVR-R1 executes a fine-grained, step-level error attribution within the multimodal context. By iteratively cross-referencing intermediate reasoning states against pristine visual priors, a Re-Reasoning Loop enables automated trajectory rectification, effectively synthesizing expert-level demonstrations that serve as high-fidelity reasoning templates for the policy model. Our experiments across diverse multimodal benchmarks demonstrate that IVR-R1 consistently outperforms existing reinforcement learning methods, establishing a superior paradigm for maintaining logical and visual consistency in complex multimodal reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出IVR-R1框架，通过动态视觉对齐与迭代纠错，提升多模态大模型在复杂视觉推理任务中的表现，有效缓解视觉幻觉和逻辑错误。
AI.motivation: 尽管多模态大语言模型在视觉推理任务上取得进展，但在长周期推理中易出现视觉幻觉和推理错误。主要原因是文本与视觉信息的表达差异导致的视觉锚定丢失。
AI.method: 提出一种迭代视觉对齐的强化学习训练框架IVR-R1。其核心包括：基于奖励的错误筛查机制、细粒度推理步骤归因、利用原始视觉信息进行交叉校验和自动纠错循环，生成高质量推理示例指导模型优化。
AI.result: 在多项多模态基准测试中，IVR-R1均优于现有强化学习方法，有效提升了推理的逻辑与视觉一致性。
AI.conclusion: IVR-R1为复杂多模态推理任务提供了更有效的解决范式，显著缓解多模态推理中的视觉与逻辑失真问题。

title: TriVAL: A Tri-Validation Framework for Faithful Automatic Optimization Modeling
summary: Optimization modeling serves as the pivotal bridge between natural-language problem descriptions and optimization solvers, and remains a cornerstone for bringing operations research (OR) into real-world decision making. Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have driven significant progress in automatic optimization modeling. However, existing methods still lack explicit validation during the modeling process, allowing errors introduced in earlier stages to carry through the pipeline and ultimately reduce final modeling accuracy. To address this challenge, we introduce TriVAL, a tri-validation framework that performs explicit validation at three stages of automatic optimization modeling: semantic specification, mathematical formulation, and code generation. At each stage, TriVAL follows a construct-validate-revise loop that assesses the current result against stage-specific criteria and revises it when needed. This design helps identify and correct errors before they accumulate across stages, helping preserve faithfulness throughout the modeling process. To evaluate automatic optimization modeling on more challenging combinatorial problems, we further introduce NL4COP, a benchmark of 150 instances across 50 diverse problem types with more complex decision logic, more tightly coupled constraints, and more demanding modeling requirements than existing benchmarks. Experiments on NL4COP and established benchmarks show that TriVAL consistently outperforms state-ofthe-art methods, with the largest gains on the most challenging problems.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种三重验证（TriVAL）框架，通过在自动优化建模的三个阶段进行显式验证和修正，提高大语言模型驱动的自动优化建模准确率。新基准测试NL4COP也被提出用于评估更具挑战性的组合优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在自动优化建模过程中，缺乏中间过程的显式验证，导致早期错误得以累积，最终影响建模的准确性。为了解决这个问题，提高建模的可靠性和精确性，需要对建模流程中各阶段进行分阶段验证。
AI.method: 提出TriVAL三重验证框架，在语义规格、数学建模、代码生成三个阶段分别进行“生成-验证-修正”循环，每个阶段依据特定标准进行结果检测与修正，防止错误跨阶段积累。同时，authors还提出了NL4COP新基准，涵盖50类、共150个更复杂的组合优化问题实例。
AI.result: 在NL4COP与已有基准上的实验表明，TriVAL框架在自动优化建模任务上，比最新方法有更高和更稳定的准确率，尤其在高难度问题上的提升最为显著。
AI.conclusion: TriVAL通过分阶段显式验证与修正，提升了自动优化建模的可靠性和性能，并且NL4COP为评估方法在更复杂问题上的表现提供了新标准，在推动OR与AI结合落地方面具有一定意义。

title: PACT: Proactive Asking for Continual Task Assistance in Human-Robot Collaboration
summary: Robotic assistants in long-term human-robot collaboration need to assist users under partial observations while leveraging cross-day interaction history. However, human traits and routines are often unknown at the beginning of collaboration, making passive infer-then-act assistance ineffective and inefficient. To address this challenge, we study a cross-day proactive asking setting for continual task assistance and propose PACT (Proactive Asking for Continual Task Assistance), an ask-or-act framework that determines whether clarification should be sought before taking action. PACT leverages current observations together with accumulated interaction history to evaluate contextual sufficiency, enabling the robot to provide more reliable assistance and progressively adapt to the user over time. We implement its primary learned instantiation using reinforcement learning and evaluate alternative instantiations under the same framework. To assess such behavior, we further introduce a clarification utility metric that quantifies the trade-off between assistance accuracy and the frequency of clarification requests. Experiments in multi-day embodied collaboration scenarios demonstrate that, compared with passive inference baselines, PACT consistently improves both assistance accuracy and clarification utility, highlighting the importance of proactive asking in continual human-robot collaboration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PACT的主动提问框架，使机器人助手能在长期的人机协作中，结合历史交互信息更有效地提供帮助，实验显示其在多天任务中的表现优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人助手难以在用户信息不完全下高效提供长期帮助，单纯地推断后再行动常常既低效又不可靠，尤其当对用户习惯和特征不了解时问题更为突出。
AI.method: 提出PACT（Proactive Asking for Continual Task Assistance）框架，能让机器人判断在行动前是否需要主动澄清。PACT结合当前观测和历史交互信息，通过强化学习等手段进行决策，并设计了澄清效用指标来平衡帮助准确率与提问频率。
AI.result: 在多天、多场景的真实或仿真人机协作任务中，PACT相比被动推断基线方法，在辅助准确率和澄清效用指标上均有提升。
AI.conclusion: PACT通过主动提问机制和历史信息利用，在持续的人机合作环境中增强了机器人对用户的适应能力和互动效率，展示主动澄清在实际长期协作中的重要性。

authors: Guang Lin Haoyang Zheng Runzhe Zhang Guang Lin
title: Diff-Instruct with Diffused Reward: Towards Principled One-step Generator RL
summary: Recent advances in one-step text-to-image generation have enabled real-time synthesis with remarkable efficiency and quality. Previous reinforcement learning methods for one-step generators combine image-space reward optimization with diffusion noisy-space distribution matching. This paradigm brings challenges due to a mismatch between terminal reward optimization and the underlying generative dynamics. As a result, optimization tends to exploit stochastic degrees of freedom, often improving reward at the expense of image fidelity. To address this issue, we propose Diff-Instruct with Diffused Reward (DIDR), a data-free trajectory-level alignment framework derived from Integral KL minimization. DIDR propagates the RLHF-optimal reward-tilted clean-image distribution across all noise levels along the diffusion trajectory. We show that this objective admits the same minimizer as clean-image RLHF, while naturally inducing the Diffused Reward Score (DRS), which acts as a reward-driven correction to the reference score function. To make this practical, we further introduce the Diffused Reward Proxy (DRP), an efficient estimator of DRS based on differentiable short-step denoising. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DIDR consistently Pareto-dominates existing one-step SDXL baselines. Moreover, when transferred to a 6B DiT backbone (Z-Image), DIDR surpasses its 50-step teacher in preference alignment while requiring only a single generation step.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新颖的数据无关RLHF方法（DIDR），解决了一步文本到图像生成中的奖惩分布错配，提升了效率和图像质量，优于现有主流方法。
AI.motivation: 现有一步文本到图像生成强化学习结构在优化效率和最终奖励时会牺牲图像质量，这主要由于在噪声空间分布匹配与目标奖励优化间存在偏差和冲突。
AI.method: 提出Diff-Instruct with Diffused Reward (DIDR)，基于积分KL最小化，将最优奖励结构从去噪后的清晰图像分布传播至所有噪声等级。并引入Diffused Reward Score (DRS)作为奖励驱动的分数，以及其高效可微代理Diffused Reward Proxy (DRP)。
AI.result: 实验显示DIDR在多个基准上一致优于现有一步生成方法，尤其是在复杂模型迁移时（如6B DiT结构），单步生成下偏好对齐超过50步教师模型。
AI.conclusion: DIDR提供了一种更稳定、有效、泛化性强的文本到图像RLHF训练框架，为一步高质量图像生成提供了新方案。

title: SLAP: Stratified Loss-based Pruning for On-Policy Data-Efficient Instruction Tuning
summary: Instruction tuning has optimized the specialized capabilities of large language models (LLMs), but it often requires extensive datasets and prolonged training times. The challenge lies in developing specific capabilities by identifying useful data and efficiently fine-tuning. High-quality and diverse pruned data can help models achieve lossless performance at a lower cost. In this paper, we propose \textbf{SLAP}, a novel batch-aware data selection framework that evaluates the learnability of entire batch compositions rather than individual. SLAP ensures comprehensive data distribution coverage through distribution-aware stratified sampling while maximizing intra-batch diversity through relative distance optimization. By leveraging Hessian-approximated gradient information for dynamic batch selection, SLAP significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods across multiple model architectures (LLaMA, ChatGLM) and diverse downstream tasks including multi-turn dialogue, multilingual translation, and question answering. Most notably, SLAP achieves superior performance with 20-40\% less training data compared to full dataset training, substantially reducing computational costs while maintaining or improving model capabilities. These results establish SLAP as a powerful approach for efficient and effective instruction tuning of large language models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SLAP，一种面向批次的数据选择方法，通过提升批次多样性和数据覆盖，显著提升大模型指令微调的效率与效果。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型的指令微调通常需要大量数据和长时间训练，但如何高效选取有效数据，实现更低成本的能力提升是一大挑战。
AI.method: 提出SLAP框架，不仅评价单个样本，而是批次整体的可学习性。方法包括分布感知的分层采样保证数据覆盖，以及通过相对距离优化提升批内多样性，并利用海森矩阵近似的梯度信息进行动态批选择。
AI.result: SLAP在多个大模型架构（LLaMA、ChatGLM）和多样下游任务（多轮对话、多语种翻译、问答）上，均超越当前先进方法，且仅用全部数据的60%-80%达到甚至超越完整训练效果，显著降低了算力和数据需求。
AI.conclusion: SLAP是一种高效、有效的大模型指令微调数据选择新方法，可在保持乃至提升模型性能的同时，大幅节省训练成本。

title: RoboHitch: Learning Visual Affordance from Disordered Keypoints for Hitch Knots Tying
summary: Robotic manipulation of deformable linear objects (DLOs) presents significant challenges due to complex dynamics and frequent self-occlusions. Existing robotic knot tying methods typically rely on precise topological state tracking with ordered keypoints and explicit edge connectivity. This reliance makes them prone to failures due to tracking drift and topology mismatch caused by repeated bending and crossings during knot formation.To address these limitations, we introduce RoboHitch, a novel framework that learns to perform hitch knot tying from human demonstrations using only disordered 3D keypoints and RGB images. This eliminates the need for explicit topological order, allowing for more flexible manipulation. Our method employs a dynamic Graph Autoencoder to extract geometric features from untracked keypoints, complemented by a Convolutional Autoencoder that captures essential visual context. A bidirectional cross-attention mechanism then fuses these modalities to jointly predict pick and place affordances, facilitating implicit reasoning about the rope's state and enabling knot tying under occlusion.Real-world experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and generalizability of our approach, successfully completing hitch knots in scenarios with self-occlusions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的机器人打结方法RoboHitch，能在无需有序拓扑关键点和边信息的情况下，仅依赖无序3D关键点与RGB图像完成绳结打结任务，有效应对形变体的自遮挡和拓扑变化难题。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人打结方法依赖高精度的拓扑状态跟踪，但实际操作时由于绳索多次弯折与交叉，容易出现跟踪漂移和拓扑不匹配，导致算法失败。为解决因自遮挡和复杂动力学带来的难题，迫切需要方法摆脱对拓扑序的强依赖。
AI.method: RoboHitch框架通过学习人类演示，在无序3D关键点和RGB图像下操作绳结。其核心方法为：利用动态图自动编码器提取无跟踪关键点的几何特征，并用卷积自动编码器捕捉视觉上下文信息；随后通过双向交叉注意力机制融合多模态特征，共同预测抓取与放置的可行性，实现对绳状态的隐式推理，支持自遮挡下的打结。
AI.result: 在真实世界实验中，RoboHitch能够在存在自遮挡的情况下，有效并顺利完成hitch knot的打结任务，展现了较好的效果与通用能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法摆脱了有序拓扑关键点的依赖，增强了机器人对DLO复杂形变和自遮挡的鲁棒性，可为未来柔性物体操作任务提供新思路。

title: Remote sensing data imputation using deep learning for multispectral imagery
summary: Remote sensing techniques have been increasingly utilised in aquatic applications in recent years. A common challenge in using optical satellite data is the presence of missing observations due to cloud cover. These data gaps can lead to missed detection of critical events, such as algal blooms, in lakes of high interest to water authorities. As a result, enhancing the completeness of optical satellite datasets is crucial for improving the monitoring and prediction of algal blooms. In this study, we compared a traditional data imputation method (i.e., linear interpolation) with deep learning models for reconstructing missing spectral bands across four lakes with historical records of algal blooms. The deep learning models adopted include CNN-based architectures (i.e., CNN, Inception Resnet, and Autoencoder) and CNN-LSTM-based architectures (i.e., CNN-LSTM, Resnet-LSTM, and Autoencoder-LSTM). Our results demonstrated that deep learning models substantially outperformed the baseline linear interpolation method in imputing spectral band values within artificially masked regions. Among these models, CNN delivered the best performance across most lakes. Furthermore, we evaluated the performance of algal bloom indices (i.e., Green/Red and NDCI) derived from the imputed imagery by comparing them with the observed data. Our results demonstrate that deep learning models are effective for imputing missing data in PlanetScope SuperDove imagery, enabling more reliable applications in water monitoring.

AI.tldr: 深度学习模型（如CNN、Inception Resnet等）在卫星影像因云层导致的数据缺失填补方面，明显优于传统线性插值方法，提升了湖泊藻华监测的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 由于云层遮挡，卫星光学数据常出现缺失，影响重要水体事件（如藻华）的有效监测。提高数据完整性对水质管理非常关键。
AI.method: 对比了传统的线性插值方法与多种深度学习模型（包括CNN及其结合LSTM的变体）在填补卫星影像谱段数据缺失方面的表现。以四个有藻华历史的湖泊为例，评估了不同模型对人工屏蔽区域的重建效果，并进一步通过藻华指数验证重建数据的有效性。
AI.result: 深度学习模型在光谱数据重建任务中显著优于线性插值，且CNN大多情况下表现最佳。藻华指数的评估同样证明了深度学习模型填补缺失数据的有效性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法对缺失遥感影像数据的填补极为有效，能大幅提升湖泊水质遥感监测和藻华预警的可靠性。

title: Faithful or Fabricated? A Causal Framework for Rationalization Bias in LLM Judges
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as automatic judges for summarization and dialogue evaluation. Prior work has documented biases such as position, verbosity, and style preferences, but largely focuses on outcomes, leaving judge explanations underexplored. We instead ask whether LLM judges are cue-invariant, i.e., whether their rankings and explanations remain stable when non-evidential cues are perturbed while holding the underlying texts fixed. We introduce a suite of cue interventions (Blind, Truth, Flip, Placebo, Reveal-After) and tie-aware metrics that quantify outcome anchoring and rationale anchoring, including label-aligned rhetoric and explanation drift, alongside consistency and stereotype-intrusion checks. We design anchoring attacks using verbosity and confidence cues, and compare two mitigations: structured chain-of-thought prompting and PROOF-BEFORE-PREFERENCE (evidence lock, score, rank). Using a new dataset of 1,000 summaries from traditional extractive models and LLMs, we find substantial cue-anchored rationalization under label and placebo perturbations, while PROOF-BEFORE-PREFERENCE markedly improves cue invariance over baselines.

AI.tldr: 本论文探讨了当前大型语言模型(LLM)在摘要和对话评估中作为自动评审员时，对非证据性线索的敏感性及其解释稳定性。通过引入多种线索扰动方法和一致性度量，分析并提出了相应的缓解手段。
AI.motivation: 以往工作主要关注LLM评判结果存在的位置、冗长和风格偏好等偏差，但对LLM给出的解释缺乏深入探究。作者希望探明：当非证据性线索变动时，LLM的评分和解释是否能保持一致，揭示其在理解和判断过程中的可靠性问题。
AI.method: 提出一套线索干预（如Blind、Truth、Flip、Placebo、Reveal-After）并结合新指标，量化因扰动而导致的锚定效应和解释漂移。此外，针对冗长和信心线索设计锚定攻击，并比较了两种缓解方法：结构化思维链提示和PROOF-BEFORE-PREFERENCE流程。
AI.result: 在包含传统抽取法和LLM生成的1000条摘要的新数据集上实验，发现对于标签和安慰剂线索的扰动，LLM存在显著的线索锚定化合理化现象，而PROOF-BEFORE-PREFERENCE方法在提升对线索不变性方面明显优于对照组。
AI.conclusion: LLM评审员的解释易受非证据性线索影响，导致一致性和中立性问题。采用结构化先证据后偏好的方法可有效提升其对多余线索的鲁棒性，提升公正性和解释可信度。

title: Smoother Action Chunking Flow Policy via Prior-Corrected Orthogonal Trust-Region Guidance
summary: Flow-matching robot policies commonly use action-chunking inference for efficient closed-loop control, but chunk boundaries can introduce discontinuous action transitions. Existing RTC guidance improves continuity by injecting correction signals during denoising, yet its weight schedule is weak at intermediate timesteps and its unconstrained correction direction may introduce transverse perturbations. We propose POTR, a **p**rior-corrected **o**rthogonal **t**rust-**r**egion guidance method. First, we incorporate a data-prior scale $σ_d$ into the RTC guidance weight, yielding stronger intermediate-time correction. Second, we decompose the guidance vector into components parallel and perpendicular to the denoising velocity, and constrain the perpendicular component within a trust region. On LIBERO with $π_{0.5}$, POTR improves success rate and consistently reduces chunk-boundary discontinuity, acceleration, and jerk compared with RTC. Ablations show that the prior-corrected weight provides the main correction gain, while the orthogonal trust region further improves stability.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的机器人控制方法POTR，通过改善动作过渡的平滑性提升了机器人动作的稳定性和成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有流匹配（flow-matching）机器人策略采用action-chunking进行推理，提高闭环控制的效率，但在chunk边界处容易出现不连续的动作切换；虽然RTC引导能改善连续性，但在中间步权重较弱且校正方向不受约束，易带来横向扰动。
AI.method: 提出POTR方法：1）在RTC引导权重中引入数据先验比例σ_d，加强中间时刻的校正；2）将引导向量分解为平行和垂直于去噪速度的两个分量，并将垂直分量限制在信赖域中，有效约束扰动。
AI.result: 在LIBERO数据集上与基线π_{0.5}比较，POTR提升了任务成功率，并稳定减少了chunk边界处的不连续性、加速度及冲击（jerk）。消融实验显示，引入先验矫正权重对提升性能最为关键，正交信赖域进一步增强稳定性。
AI.conclusion: POTR显著改善了机器人策略中动作边界的光滑性与任务表现，在action-chunking流匹配控制领域有良好应用前景。

title: ActQuant: Sub-4-bit Action-Guided Quantization for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models exhibit remarkable action generation for embodied intelligence, but their heavy compute make deployment on edge platforms impractical. Aggressive, sub-4-bit weight quantization is the natural solution, yet existing post-training quantization (PTQ) methods suffer severe performance degradation in this regime. To address this, we introduce ActQuant, an action-guided mixed-precision PTQ framework that operates in two stages: (1) an inter-tensor bit allocator that assigns each weight matrix a single bit-width based on how much it contributes to predicting the agent's actions; (2) an intra-tensor scale optimizer tunes per-block quantization scales using action-aware curvature, so that dynamic range is concentrated on the weights most influential for control. To deliver the on-device benefits of our aggressive quantization, we further introduce OmniModel.cpp, an agentic conversion pipeline that ports architectures into a native C/C++ runtime with efficient low-bit kernels. We evaluate ActQuant both in simulation and on a real-world 6-DoF UR3 arm, with all models deployed through OmniModel.cpp. On the LIBERO benchmark, ActQuant is the only method that operates at or below 3 bits-per-weight, retaining 95.0% on OpenVLA-OFT and 94.8% on $π_{0.5}$. Pushed further, ActQuant reaches 2.5 bpw at 90.1% on OpenVLA-OFT, compressing the backbone from 14.3 GB to 2.7 GB (5.3$\times$). On the physical UR3 arm, $π_{0.5}$ quantized with ActQuant retains the baseline's success rate while reducing the memory footprint by 2.5$\times$.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为ActQuant的行动引导型混合精度量化框架，实现了极低位权重量化下的视觉-语言-行动模型部署，并有效提升模型在边缘设备部署的可行性。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言-行动（VLA）模型在生成动作方面表现优异，但因计算量大，不易在边缘设备部署。传统极低位（如亚4位）量化虽然可以压缩模型，但现有后训练量化方法在这种极低位下性能严重下降。
AI.method: 提出ActQuant框架，分两步：1）根据各权重矩阵对动作预测的贡献分配不同位宽（张间分配）；2）利用与动作相关的曲率对分块的量化尺度进行优化（张内优化），聚焦于对动作控制影响最大的权重。同时，开发了OmniModel.cpp工具，将量化模型转为高效低位C/C++代码，支持实际设备部署。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实6自由度UR3机械臂上通过OmniModel.cpp部署后，ActQuant是唯一能在3位及以下权重下维持高精度的方法，在LIBERO基准上OpenVLA-OFT得分95.0%，π_{0.5}得分94.8%；进一步压缩至2.5位时OpenVLA-OFT得分90.1%，主干从14.3GB压缩到2.7GB（5.3倍压缩）；在物理UR3机械臂上，ActQuant量化的π_{0.5}在减少2.5倍内存占用的同时保持基线成功率。
AI.conclusion: ActQuant显著提高了极低位（亚4位）量化下VLA模型的执行效果，使其适用于资源有限的边缘设备，并通过OmniModel.cpp实现了高效部署，极大提升了模型实际落地应用的可能性。

title: AERIC: Anticipatory Hidden-State Monitoring for Implicit Harmful Dialogue
summary: Current language models create two safety challenges: risk must be detected early enough to avoid exposing harmful continuation, and the harmfulness itself may be implicit rather than signaled by overtly toxic text. Existing response-level guards are strong at judging completed text, and native streaming guards move closer to token time, but both settings leave open whether a lightweight monitor can anticipate implicit harmful drift from the generator's own internal trajectory. We study anticipatory same-pass monitoring, where a safety monitor may read hidden states produced during ordinary decoding but may not invoke an additional forward pass through the base model. We introduce AERIC, a transfer-oriented hidden-state approach for implicit harmful dialogue that combines short-horizon hazard forecasting, support-sensitive suppression, and prompt-conditioned residual scoring under a same-pass exponential moving average decision rule. The default linear monitor contains only 387 trainable head parameters. Against Qwen3GuardStream-4B on balanced benchmarks, AERIC improves AUROC from 0.6830 to 0.7143 on DiaSafety and from 0.8219 to 0.8582 on Harmful Advice. For promptlevel trigger benchmarks, we calibrate the AERIC threshold by a source-side safe-budget rule that maximizes trigger coverage while constraining the safe-trigger rate to at most 10%. Under that rule, trigger@64 reaches 0.6438 and 0.4656 on HarmBench DirectRequest and 0.6849 and 0.7363 on SocialHarmBench for Qwen and Gemma, respectively, withholding between 23.53 and 41.86 answer tokens on average. Same-pass deployment is also efficient: on a 63-prompt harmfulprompt fixed-generation benchmark aggregated over HarmBench DirectRequest and SocialHarmBench under Qwen3-8B, the monitor increases mean latency by only 2.34%, whereas Qwen3Guard-Stream-4B increases it by 79.40%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型语言模型安全监控方法AERIC，通过利用解码过程中的隐藏状态，在不增加额外前向计算的情况下，实现了对潜在有害内容的早期预测与抑制。相比现有方法，AERIC在识别隐性风险和提升运行效率方面表现突出。
AI.motivation: 随着语言模型能力提升，其生成内容的安全风险日益突出。传统的响应级和流式守护措施在应对隐性有害内容、提升即时防控方面存在不足。因此，亟需一种高效且能够提前检测隐性风险的安全监控机制。
AI.method: 提出AERIC方法，基于同路线（same-pass）监控，即在标准解码过程中实时读取生成器的隐藏状态，不再增加额外前向传递。AERIC结合短期风险预测、支持敏感型抑制和基于提示的残差打分，通过指数移动平均判决规则，仅需训练387个头参数，强调轻量化和转移能力。
AI.result: 在DiaSafety与Harmful Advice基准上，AERIC相较Qwen3GuardStream-4B显著提升了AUROC（分别从0.6830提升到0.7143和从0.8219提升到0.8582）。面向提示的触发基准上，通过安全预算校准阈值实现了较优的触发覆盖率，并在平均 withheld token 上控制在合理范围。整体部署下，延迟基本不变，仅增加2.34%，远优于现有的流式守护。
AI.conclusion: AERIC方法在保障语言模型生成内容安全性方面实现了更早期、隐蔽风险的识别和高效部署，兼顾了安全性、准确性与推理效率，对现有大模型实际应用具有重要意义。

title: Vision-Guided Outdoor Flight and Obstacle Evasion via Reinforcement Learning
comment: Published in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, vol 11, no 2. Presented at the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation 2026
summary: Although quadcopters boast impressive traversal capabilities enabled by their omnidirectional maneuverability, the need for continuous pilot control in complex environments impedes their application in GNSS and telemetry-denied scenarios. To this end, we propose a novel sensorimotor policy that uses stereo-vision depth and visual-inertial odometry (VIO) to autonomously navigate through obstacles in an unknown environment to reach a goal point. The policy is comprised of a pre-trained autoencoder as the perception head followed by a planning and control LSTM network which outputs velocity commands that can be followed by an off-the-shelf commercial drone. We leverage reinforcement and privileged learning paradigms to train the policy in simulation through a two-stage process: 1) initial training with optimal trajectories generated by a global motion planner acting as a supervisory backbone, 2) further fine-tuning in a curriculum environment. To bridge the sim-to-real gap, we employ domain randomization and reward shaping to create a policy that is both robust to noise and domain shift. In outdoor experiments, our approach achieves successful zero-shot transfer to both obstacle environments and a drone platform that were never encountered during training.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于视觉与惯性导航的无人机自主导航策略，能在未知且无GNSS环境下实现零样本迁移，并成功避障到达目标点。
AI.motivation: 四旋翼无人机虽然高度灵活，但在复杂环境中需持续人工控制，尤其在无GNSS或遥测信号缺失的场景受限。因此，需要开发能自主感知和避障的导航策略。
AI.method: 提出了一种结合立体视觉深度、视觉-惯性里程计（VIO）的感知-运动策略。系统包括预训练自编码器感知头和LSTM控制网络，通过两阶段训练：第一阶段利用全局规划器生成最优轨迹做监督训练，第二阶段在课程学习环境中微调。使用域随机化与奖励调整以增强策略对噪声和域迁移的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在户外实验证明，该策略实现了在从未见过的障碍环境和新硬件上的零样本迁移，无需重新训练即可自主导航并避障。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法提高了四旋翼无人机在未知复杂环境下的自主导航能力，降低了对人工操作和GNSS的依赖，具有良好的泛化和实际应用前景。

title: Deep Learning-Based Automated Quantification of TIMI Myocardial Perfusion Frame Count (DL-TMPFC) from Coronary Angiography: A Novel Framework for Rapid Assessment of Microvascular Dysfunction
summary:
Aims: Coronary microvascular dysfunction (CMVD) affects approximately 40%-60% of patients with ischemia and non-obstructive coronary arteries, yet diagnosis remains challenging due to reliance on invasive functional testing or subjective Thrombolysis In Myocardial Infarction (TIMI) flow grade. The TIMI Myocardial Perfusion Frame Count (TMPFC) offers an objective, angiography-based quantitative measure of CMVD, but its clinical translation is hindered by cumbersome manual calculation and insufficient validation. This study aims to develop and validate a deep learning-powered TMPFC calculation (DL-TMPFC), enabling integration into clinical workflows.
  Methods and results: DL-TMPFC framework comprised two components. A stenosis detection network first excluded obstructive coronary artery disease (CAD). A territory-aware segmentation network then identified perfusion territories and TMPFC calculation module automatically determined the first and last frames from angiographic sequences. The framework was validated in a cohort of 655 patients (445 of obstructive CAD, 100 of confirmed CMVD, 110 of control group) from three independent institutions. DL-TMPFC showed excellent agreement with expert manual measurements (bias: -0.93 frames; 95% LoA: -5.33 to +3.47; r =0.98). DL-TMPFC markedly enhanced clinical feasibility by fully automating TMPFC and removing observer dependence. Clinically, DL-TMPFC accurately identified CMVD across a full spectrum of coronary pathologies and captured the continuous severity of CMVD beyond binary classification, enabling quantitative risk stratification.
  Conclusion: DL-TMPFC enabled automatic, standardized, and accurate quantification of CMVD directly from routine angiography. By providing an automatic and objective measure, this tool provided immediate diagnostic information for timely recognition and management of CMVD in clinical practice.

AI.tldr: 本研究开发并验证了一种基于深度学习的 TIMI 心肌灌注帧计数（DL-TMPFC）自动计算方法，实现对冠状动脉微血管功能障碍（CMVD）的快速、客观诊断。
AI.motivation: CMVD 诊断依赖侵入性检查和主观定性手段，缺乏简单、自动、定量的工具，阻碍了其临床广泛应用。
AI.method: 提出两步式深度学习框架（一是狭窄检测网络排除阻塞性冠心病，二是区域分割网络和帧自动识别模块自动计数 TMPFC），并用655例多中心临床数据进行验证。
AI.result: DL-TMPFC 与专家手工测量高度一致（r=0.98），实现自动化、无操作员差异，并准确捕获CMVD严重程度，支持连续量化风险分层。
AI.conclusion: DL-TMPFC 实现了冠状动脉微血管功能障碍的自动、标准化、精准量化，为临床及时识别与管理 CMVD 提供有力工具，推动其常规临床应用。

title: Direct Preference Optimization for English-Mandarin Code-Switching Speech Recognition in Audio LLMs
summary: Audio large language models (Audio LLMs) exhibit systematic failures in transcribing code-switching speech despite strong multilingual capabilities. Focusing on English-Mandarin, we identify three failure modes: language omission, translation-instead-of-transcription, and hallucination. We apply Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) to align models, constructing preference pairs in which chosen responses preserve mixed-language content while rejected responses mimic failure patterns. Training three Audio LLMs on 100K pairs (570 hours), we observe consistent behavioral shifts: models learn to preserve language composition rather than translating when prompted for transcription. This alignment yields MER reductions up to 89.6% (in-distribution) and 20.0% (out-of-distribution). Our findings suggest DPO can effectively elicit correct code-switching transcription behavior from multilingual Audio LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了当前音频大语言模型（Audio LLMs）在转录英-中混合语音（code-switching speech）时的系统性失误，并提出用直接偏好优化（DPO）进行模型对齐以显著改善模型表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管多语种能力强，但主流音频大模型在遇到混合语种的语音转录任务时，容易丢失语言、错误翻译或产生幻觉内容。因此，研究团队希望改进模型，实现更准确的code-switching语音转录。
AI.method: 提出并应用直接偏好优化（DPO）算法，通过构建10万对（570小时）的混合语言优劣响应样本，训练三个音频大模型，使模型学会偏好保留混合语言内容、避免直接翻译等常见错误。
AI.result: 经过DPO微调后，模型的MER（主要错误率）在数据分布内减少高达89.6%，在分布外减少20%。模型明显学会更合理地处理混合语音转录任务。
AI.conclusion: DPO是一种有效提升多语种音频大模型code-switching转录能力的方法。通过偏好对齐，模型能更好地保留原始混合语言内容，显著减少典型错误。

title: Polymander II: an amphibious salamander-inspired robot with contact and flow sensors
comment: This work has been accepted for publication in the 2026 \it{International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)}, Vienna, Austria
summary: Robots benefit from sensory information to coordinate body movement, gain robustness against perturbations, and transit between different modes to adapt to various terrains. However, few amphibious robots can sense interactions with both terrestrial and aquatic environments. In this paper, we present a solution that uses Hall-effect sensors to sense foot contact forces and lateral hydrodynamic forces on a salamander-inspired amphibious robot. With two bus lines, the robot can simultaneously acquire this exteroceptive information at more than 500 Hz and proprioceptive information, such as joint positions and loads, at 100 Hz. The Hall-effect sensors used are compact, making them suitable for embedding in multiple positions within a robot, and exhibit high sensitivity to small forces. Moreover, because the sensor can be positioned separately from the measured object, waterproofing can be implemented with relative ease. Our tests demonstrate the robot's capabilities in traversing amphibious environments and its potential in using feedback control for more complex locomotion tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用霍尔效应传感器的两栖机器人感知解决方案，实现了对陆地和水中环境交互力的多点实时感知。
AI.motivation: 目前很少有两栖机器人能够同时感知在陆地和水域中的环境交互，这限制了机器人对复杂环境适应和鲁棒性的提升。
AI.method: 作者设计并实现了一套基于霍尔效应传感器的感知系统，能够同时高频率采集机器人脚部接触力、侧向流体动力等外界信息（>500 Hz），以及关节位置与负载等本体信息（100 Hz）。传感器结构紧凑，易于在机器人多处嵌入，且便于防水设计。
AI.result: 实验证明，该系统有效提升了仿蝾螈两栖机器人在多环境下的感知能力，实现了复杂环境下的稳定穿越和潜在运动控制改进。
AI.conclusion: 该方案为两栖机器人环境感知和反馈控制提供了新思路，具有提升机器人在复杂地形中的自适应性与鲁棒性的应用潜力。

title: SkySeg: Collaborative Onboard Semantic Segmentation with Heterogeneous UAVs in the Wild
summary: The demand for unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV)-based image acquisition and analysis has surged, with UAVs increasingly utilized for semantic segmentation tasks. To meet the real-time analysis requirements of UAV remote sensing missions, performing onboard computation and making decisions based on the results is a natural approach. However, deploying semantic segmentation on resource-constrained UAV platforms presents two significant challenges: 1) hardware constraints limit the ability of UAVs to perform real-time semantic segmentation, and 2) environmental variations during flight cause data distribution shifts, deviating from the original training data. To address these issues, this paper introduces SkySeg, a heterogeneous multi-UAV air-air cooperation framework that integrates computer vision and flight pattern to enable onboard semantic segmentation using low-cost sensors. SkySeg employs an efficient information fusion inference method, combining low-definition, wide-area images with high-definition, focused-area images. Additionally, it incorporates a cross-device test-time adaptation (TTA) strategy to enhance segmentation performance in dynamic environments by collaboratively addressing distribution shifts of test data streams across UAVs. Experimental results demonstrate that our SkySeg framework accelerates inference latency by approximately 3.6x, improves onboard segmentation accuracy by 5.91\%, and achieves a 10.91\% average accuracy gain in the wild.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多无人机合作的实时语义分割系统SkySeg，在受限硬件条件和动态环境下有效提升推理速度和分割精度。
AI.motivation: 随着无人机图像采集和分析需求增加，对资源受限的无人机平台进行实时语义分割面临算力瓶颈和环境变化导致的数据分布偏移问题。
AI.method: 提出SkySeg框架，通过多无人机异构协作，融合低清宽域与高清局域图像，结合跨设备测试时自适应（TTA）策略，有效缓解训练测试数据分布差异。
AI.result: SkySeg在实验中表现突出，实现推理延迟加快约3.6倍，板载分割精度提升5.91%，在真实环境下平均准确率提升10.91%。
AI.conclusion: SkySeg框架证明了多无人机合作与信息融合在低成本传感器及实际应用中的有效性，为无人机语义分割任务提供了高效解决方案。

title: A Multi-Probe Audit of Clinical-Interview Depression Detection Benchmarks
summary: This paper audits benchmark evaluation in clinical-interview depression detection through four complementary probes across DAIC/E-DAIC, CMDC, ANDROIDS, MODMA, and PDCH. First, we re-evaluate E-DAIC under strict subject-disjoint leave-one-subject-out cross-validation. A lightweight hybrid text-plus-LLM-score model reaches macro-F1 = 0.723 - the highest reported under this protocol, to our knowledge - providing a conservative out-of-fold reference point that does not depend on the privileged official holdout. Second, we test whether the E-DAIC official split supports fine-grained leaderboard rankings by sweeping 96 model configurations across modality bundles, pooling strategies, and learners. Development-side cross-validation and official-test rankings align only moderately: the best cross-validation configuration ranks twentieth on the official test, the official-test winner ranks forty-first by cross-validation, top-3 overlap is zero, and the apparent winner is rank-1 in only 32.3% of subject bootstraps. Third, we externally validate strong public CMDC and ANDROIDS baselines that achieve near-ceiling in-domain performance. Zero-shot transfer to external corpora is substantially weaker. Finally, we stress-test E-DAIC text and audio models using paired symptom-dense versus symptom-light interview slices defined by an SRDS-based annotator. Text scores rise sharply on symptom-dense slices, whereas audio scores remain nearly flat; the text-minus-audio gap is positive across all five seeds.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性分析了临床面访抑郁检测多数据集的基准评估，检验了当前评估方法的稳健性和泛化能力，并提出了一种分数创新且公开的文本+大模型混合方法。
AI.motivation: 近年来临床抑郁检测的自动化研究关注于提升基准性能，但实际评估协议和泛化能力尚存不足，现有排行榜结果可能过度估计模型有效性。本文旨在审视和改进评估流程，提升检验公正性及可解释性。
AI.method: 作者四个实验探针：1）严格的受试体独立交叉验证，重新评估E-DAIC；2）对96种模型配置与排名一致性进行分析，探测开发侧CV与官方分割排名差异；3）强基线模型在不同语料数据分布下的零样本迁移测试；4）以SRDS注释对症状密集与稀疏文本/音频片段分别应答。
AI.result: (1)混合模型宏F1达0.723，为此协议下最高。(2)开发集CV名次和官方榜单一致性较低，top-3并无交叉，最佳配置在官方榜单仅居20位。(3)当前模型在异源数据集迁移泛化较弱。(4)文本在症状密集片段分辨力更强，音频表现较平稳，二者差值始终正向。
AI.conclusion: 现有面试型抑郁检测评估依赖特定分割结果可能高估实际应用能力，需采用更严谨交叉验证和多角度分析以真实反映模型泛化性能。文本和大模型分数提升评估敏感度，对比音频分析优势明显。

title: Elevator-LIO: Robust LiDAR-Inertial Odometry for Multi-Floor Navigation under Elevator-Induced Non-Inertial Motion
summary: This paper presents Elevator-LIO, a LiDAR-inertial odometry framework designed to achieve continuous robot localization during elevator travel, thereby supporting cross-floor robotic tasks. To address the state-estimation problem in non-inertial frames, Elevator-LIO establishes a decoupled state-estimation model that separately models the robot motion relative to the elevator and the elevator motion itself, and embeds it into a mode-dependent iterated error-state Kalman filter framework. This framework degenerates to conventional LIO estimation in ordinary indoor environments, while enabling the propagation and constrained update of elevator-related states in elevator non-inertial environments, thereby achieving continuous and stable localization. An elevator mode manager detects elevator entry and exit events using LiDAR ranging statistics and estimated states, and introduces event-triggered zero-velocity and zero-acceleration updates when the elevator stops to suppress accumulated vertical drift. In addition, this paper adopts an adaptive voxel downsampling strategy to maintain a stable number of effective points under significant environmental scale changes. We conduct extensive experiments on 20 real-world sequences containing 79 elevator rides, including practical challenges such as large-scale spaces, long vertical travel, dynamic pedestrian interference, and mirror reflections. The results show that Elevator-LIO maintains continuous localization accuracy in all sequences, with terminal height error below 1 cm in 17 sequences. In contrast, existing representative localization systems perform poorly on these elevator sequences. Tests on the Hilti 2022/2023 datasets further show that the proposed method remains competitive in standard indoor scenarios. The project page is available at https://xiaofan4122.github.io/Elevator_LIO_Page/.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了Elevator-LIO，一个能在电梯移动期间实现机器人连续定位的激光雷达-惯性里程计框架，有效支持跨楼层的机器人任务，并在多种真实场景下取得了优异定位表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的激光雷达-惯性定位（LIO）方法在非惯性环境（如电梯竖直运动）下表现不佳，难以保证机器人在不同楼层间移动时的连续精确定位。因此亟需一种能在电梯等特殊环境中保持稳定、准确定位的方法，以支持跨楼层的机器人应用。
AI.method: 提出了一种解耦的状态估计模型，将机器人相对电梯的运动和电梯本身的运动分别建模，并整合进模式相关的迭代误差状态卡尔曼滤波（Kalman Filter）框架。引入电梯模式管理器，利用激光雷达测距统计与估算状态检测电梯进出事件，在电梯停止时采用事件触发的零速度和零加速度更新抑制垂直漂移。此外，采用自适应体素下采样策略应对环境尺度变化，保证特征点数稳定。
AI.result: 在20组包含79次电梯乘坐的真实数据集上进行了大量实验，包含大空间、垂直距离大、人员干扰及镜面反射等挑战性场景。Elevator-LIO在所有序列中均保持了连续定位，17个序列末端高度误差低于1厘米，远优于代表性现有方法。在Hilti 2022/2023标准定位数据集上的测试表明，该方法在普通室内环境下也具备竞争力。
AI.conclusion: Elevator-LIO有效解决了机器人在电梯等非惯性环境下的连续定位难题，兼顾了标准室内与电梯场景的精度与鲁棒性，为实现跨楼层自主机器人任务提供了关键技术支撑。

title: MGVQ: Synergizing Multi-dimensional Sensitivity-Aware and Gradient-Hessian Fusion for Vector Quantization
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) achieve outstanding performance, yet their huge model size severely hinders deployment on edge devices with limited resources. As an efficient model compression technique, vector quantization (VQ) excels in ultra-low-bit representation, which maps model weights to discrete codewords in a compact codebook to cut memory consumption and transmission overhead while preserving model capability. Direct VQ application to VLMs still has two core limitations. First, cross-modality weight distribution differences brought by visual and textual inputs cannot be well fitted by a single unified codebook. Second, current second-order error compensation ignores first-order gradient information, causing weight deviation from pre-trained optimal states, gradient drift and biased compensation results. This work proposes MGVQ, a novel vector quantization framework integrating multi-dimensional sensitivity perception and gradient-Hessian fusion. It consists of two core modules: sensitivity-guided structured mixed-precision quantization dynamically assigns different bit-widths according to channel sensitivity via combined global and local sensitivity analysis for refined resource allocation; gradient-aware second-order error compensation embeds first-order gradients into error correction, and adopts Kronecker and Block-LDL decomposition to ensure low computational cost. Extensive experiments on mainstream VLMs including LLaVA-onevision, InternVL2 and Qwen2-VL verify the effectiveness of MGVQ. In 2-bit quantization settings, MGVQ surpasses existing advanced post-training quantization methods significantly, achieving a maximum accuracy improvement of 4.9 points (71.4% vs 67.0% on InternVL2-26B). The proposed method realizes stable and efficient ultra-low-bit VLM quantization, greatly promoting the practical deployment of multimodal large models in resource-limited environments.

AI.tldr: MGVQ是一种针对视觉-语言大模型(VLMs)的高效矢量量化算法，通过多维敏感性感知和梯度-海森融合，实现超低比特的稳定高效量化，显著提升量化精度，突破当前VQM在VLM应用的关键瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM体积庞大，部署在资源有限的边缘设备上受限。矢量量化虽能压缩模型，但直接应用存在代码本难以统一适配多模态权重分布，且误差补偿忽略梯度信息，导致偏差。本论文旨在解决这两个难点，实现高效低比特量化。
AI.method: 提出MGVQ框架，包括：1)敏感性引导的结构化混合精度量化，对不同通道根据全局与局部敏感性分析分配不同比特资源；2)梯度感知的二阶误差补偿，加入一阶梯度，结合Kronecker和Block-LDL分解降低计算开销。
AI.result: 在LLaVA-onevision、InternVL2、Qwen2-VL等主流VLM上，MGVQ在2比特量化下明显优于现有方法，InternVL2-26B模型Top-1准确率提升最大达4.9个百分点（71.4%较67.0%）。
AI.conclusion: MGVQ有效提升超低比特VLM的量化精度，实现既高效又稳定的模型压缩，为多模态大模型在边缘设备的实际部署提供了技术基础。

title: Toxicity in Twitch Chats: An LLM-Based Analysis Across Gaming Communities
comment: 8 pages, 2 figures, 5 tables. Accepted at the IEEE Conference on Games (IEEE CoG) 2026
summary: Toxicity in online gaming communities remains a persistent challenge, manifesting across genres, platforms, and player interactions. While much research is focused on in-game toxicity, less is known about how toxic behavior varies between gaming communities on streaming platforms. To address this shortcoming, we analyze approximately 20 million chat messages from 4,452 streams, spanning seven game genres on Twitch. We categorize messages according to Twitch's toxicity taxonomy with a pre-trained Large Language Model using zero-shot classification. The taxonomy comprises four categories and eight subclasses, including harassment, discrimination, sexual content, and profanity.
