Our approach achieves an F1 score of 94.5% on the TextDetox dataset and demonstrates human-model agreement comparable to inter-human agreement. Our analysis reveals that 2.4% of all messages are classified as toxic, with notable differences across genres: streams of MOBA games exhibit the highest relative rate of toxicity (3.2%), and sports games show the lowest rate (2%). Furthermore, results indicate that individual games differ significantly in their toxicity distributions, even within genres, suggesting the existence of game-specific community norms and mechanics that shape toxic behavior beyond genre-level effects. These findings offer empirical insights into genre- and game-specific toxicity patterns on Twitch and can inform more targeted moderation strategies for gaming communities.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了Twitch平台上不同游戏类型的聊天消息，揭示了流媒体社区中不同游戏和类型之间的有害行为（toxic behavior）的差异。
AI.motivation: 当前线上游戏社区中的有害行为广泛存在，但大部分研究集中在游戏内的有害行为，对于直播平台不同游戏社区之间的有害行为差异了解较少。研究旨在填补直播平台上有害行为分布和特征的知识空白。
AI.method: 作者收集了Twitch上4452个直播间、约2000万条聊天消息，涵盖七种游戏类型。利用预训练的大语言模型和zero-shot分类技术，基于Twitch官方毒性分类标准（4类8子类，包括骚扰、歧视、性内容、粗俗语言）对聊天内容自动分类。分类策略在人类标注数据上达到94.5%的F1分数，并且与人类判断水平接近。
AI.result: 整体来看，2.4%的消息被判定为有害，MOBA类游戏存在最高的相对毒性率（3.2%），而体育类最低（2%）。即便在同一游戏类型内，具体游戏的有害行为分布也有显著差异，暗示存在游戏特定的社区规范与机制影响。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了Twitch平台上，不同游戏类型及具体游戏的有害行为表现存在显著不同，为未来更针对性的社区管理和内容审核提供了数据参考。

title: MuGen: Multi-Skill Generative Locomotion Controller for Humanoid Robots
summary: This paper presents MuGen, a data-driven framework for learning and deploying multi-skill locomotion on humanoid robots. MuGen enables a robot to perform expressive motions like humans under the guidance of example motion sequences. To achieve this, we employ vector-quantized autoencoders (VQ-VAEs) trained with model-based reinforcement learning, resulting in a generative representation of locomotion that captures key patterns of human motion from hours of heterogeneous human performance data. We employ a teacher-student learning framework and develop a new policy distillation strategy to enable a deployable student policy learning this efficient latent representation. This policy allows the robot to track and mimic unseen human motions and further enables the robot to reuse the learned latent space for other tasks. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework through a diverse set of motions and accurate execution.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了MuGen，一个利用数据驱动方式实现人形机器人多技能运动的新方法，能让机器人模仿并复用人类运动风格。
AI.motivation: 当前人形机器人很难高效且自然地执行多样且复杂的人类运动，缺乏通用、可扩展的运动生成方法。作者希望利用人类动作数据和智能算法，让机器人能够表现出类似人类的多技能运动能力。
AI.method: 作者提出将向量量化自动编码器（VQ-VAE）与基于模型的强化学习结合，用于从大量人类动作中抽取运动潜在表达。通过教师-学生学习框架，采用新的策略蒸馏方法训练可部署的学生策略，使机器人能理解并复用学习到的潜在空间。
AI.result: MuGen框架可以让机器人准确模仿未见过的人类动作，同时展示多样化和高质量的运动，实现了高效的运动复用能力。论文展示了多个动作的实验和精确的执行效果。
AI.conclusion: MuGen显著提升了人形机器人多技能运动能力，为机器人模仿和迁移人类运动模式提供了高效、通用的解决方案。

title: Machine Intelligence that Understands Visual and Linguistic Information and Interacts with Humans and Environments
comment: Doctoral dissertation, Tohoku University, 2022. Uploaded for archival purposes. 146 pages
summary:
Advancements at the intersection of computer vision and natural language processing are crucial for applications like assistive tech, multimedia querying, and robotics. This dissertation proposes novel architectures to improve intelligent agents across three key vision-language tasks: image captioning, visual dialog, and interactive instruction following.
  First, we address limitations in visual representation for image captioning. Traditional models rely on region-based features from CNN detectors, which lack global context and suffer from high computational overhead. We propose GRIT (Grid and Region-based Image captioning Transformer), a transformer-only architecture. By integrating grid and region features using a DETR-based detector, GRIT enables end-to-end training and out-performs prior methods in both inference accuracy and speed.
  Second, we tackle visual dialog, which requires multi-turn conversation about an image. The challenge lies in efficiently modeling interactions between multiple inputs (image, question, history). We introduce LTMI (Light-weight Transformer for Many Inputs). Utilizing a specialized attention block, an LTMI layer matches the representational power of a standard Transformer extension while utilizing less than one-tenth of its parameters, as validated on the VisDial dataset.
  Finally, we study interactive instruction-following for embodied AI using the ALFRED dataset. We propose a framework featuring a two-stage instruction interpretation: it first decodes language directives independently of visual context to predict a tentative action-object sequence, which is then fused with visual features for final execution. Using multiple egocentric views and hierarchical attention, our method accurately localizes objects and achieves a state-of-the-art unseen success rate of 8.37%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了三个创新性的视觉-语言任务架构，分别用于图像描述、视觉对话和交互式指令跟随，有效提升了智能体的理解和交互能力，实现了在相关数据集上的性能突破。
AI.motivation: 当前计算机视觉与自然语言处理的结合在辅助技术、多媒体检索和机器人等领域极为重要。然而，现有方法在图像描述、视觉对话和体感智能体指令执行等关键任务中，分别存在对视觉全局性理解不足、对多输入交互建模效率低下，以及指令与视觉信息融合不充分等问题。因此，亟需新的架构或方法提升智能体在以上多模态任务中的性能。
AI.method: 1. 针对图像描述，提出了基于DETR探测器的GRIT架构，将栅格和区域级特征输入Transformer，实现端到端训练，提升全局语义理解与推理效率。2. 针对视觉对话，提出LTMI结构，采用轻量化专用注意力块，大幅减少参数量，提升模型高效性。3. 针对交互式指令执行，设计两阶段指令解析框架，首次独立解码语言指令生成操作-对象序列，再与视觉特征融合，并运用多视角和分层注意力机制增强目标定位与任务执行。
AI.result: （1）GRIT在图像描述任务上准确率和推理速度超越先前模型；（2）LTMI在VisDial数据集上，以不足传统Transformer扩展十分之一的参数量，匹敌标准Transformer性能；（3）交互式指令跟随方法在ALFRED数据集上达成8.37%未见场景成功率，位居SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 论文针对三个不同但相关的视觉-语言任务提出创新架构和训练范式，有效解决了全局语义融合、输入高效建模和复杂指令解析等瓶颈，对智能体多模态感知与决策领域推进具有重要意义。

title: CUNY at CLPsych 2026: A Pipeline Approach to Classification and Summarization of Mental Health Changes
summary: We describe our submission to the CLPsych~2026 Shared Task on capturing and characterizing mental health changes through social media timeline dynamics. To infer the dominant self-states in posts (Tasks 1.1 and 1.2), we ensemble in-context learning of three open-weight large language models using majority voting. For predicting moments of change in a timeline (Task~2), we train supervised classifiers on features derived from Task~1.1 predictions. To summarize the patterns of mood dynamics and their progression over time within a timeline (Task 3.1), we augment in-context example labels predicted by upstream systems (Tasks 1.1, 1.2, and 2), yielding performance gains over zero-shot and unaugmented in-context learning baselines. Our submission ranked first on Task~1.1, fourth on Task~1.2, fourth on Task~2, and third on Task~3.1.\footnote{The source code for the experiments is available at https://github.com/amirzia/clpsych26-cuny

AI.tldr: 本文参加了CLPsych 2026共享任务，通过分析社交媒体时间线动态捕捉与表征心理健康变化，提出了多语言大模型集成和下游任务特征引导的监督分类方法，并在多项任务评测中取得前列成绩。
AI.motivation: 由于心理健康与社交媒体动态密切相关，及时准确地捕捉社交媒体上的心理状态变化对于心理健康干预极为重要，但现有方法对时间线动态和状态变化的理解有限，因此亟需更强的自动分析手段。
AI.method: 1）针对任务1.1和1.2，集成三个开源大语言模型的上下文学习(In-Context Learning)结果并采用多数投票推断用户主导心理自我状态；2）针对任务2，基于任务1.1的预测结果提取特征，训练监督式分类器识别心理状态的时刻变化；3）针对任务3.1，利用上游任务预测标签对上下文例子进行扩充，增强情绪动态模式总结能力，并和零样本及无增强上下文学习方法比较。
AI.result: 该方案在四项任务中取得了优秀成绩，分别在任务1.1中排名第一，任务1.2和任务2中均排名第四，任务3.1中排名第三。
AI.conclusion: 集成大语言模型和多级特征驱动的分析方法可有效提升社交媒体中心理健康状态捕捉与动态变化识别的准确性，推动自动心理健康监测研究发展。

title: PoseRefer: Pathway-Local Parameters for Semantically Grounded Reference Resolution
comment: ICRA 2026 Workshop on Semantics for Reliable Robot Autonomy: From Environment Understanding and Reasoning to Safe Interaction
summary: A robot resolving ``put the cup on that one'' must fuse gesture, language, and scene geometry, yet 3D grounding benchmarks only partially capture this regime: descriptions are written post-hoc, gestures are templated, or pointing is staged for the camera. MM-Conv captures natural co-speech gesture from dyadic VR interaction alongside full-body motion capture and 3D scene graphs. We use it to evaluate pose-language fusion with a decoupled late-fusion architecture in which pose and text pathways share no learned parameters. The two choices together make category, pose, and text contributions easier to isolate through controlled ablations. Fusion with frozen MiniLM category embeddings exceeds pose alone and the best text-only pathway on every reference type, reaching 31.9% top-1. The learned scalar gate flips between opposing policies depending on whether the text pathway has category access. This is a reliability diagnostic: fusion-accuracy claims for semantic grounding systems are indistinguishable from category-representation artifacts unless pathways are architecturally decoupled.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MM-Conv数据集，记录了人在虚拟现实中自然而然的联合语言和手势互动，再借此评估姿态与文本路径完全解耦、后期融合的3D语义指代方法。实验显示在类别嵌入下，融合表现优于仅用单一路径的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有3D语义指代任务基准主要存在表述事后生成、手势模板化等问题，不能真实反映人机交互中的复杂信息融合情景。作者希望通过自然的共语手势数据，更好评估多模态融合方法的真实能力，并诊断当前方法的可靠性。
AI.method: 作者采集了MM-Conv数据集，包含虚拟现实场景下的真实对话、自然手势、全身动作捕获和3D场景信息。用该数据集测试了一个解耦的后期融合架构，让姿势与文本的识别路径没有共享的学习参数，通过控制消融可以独立分析类别、姿态和文本的贡献，并在分类向量用MiniLM进行冻结嵌入的设置下进行实验。
AI.result: 实验显示，类别嵌入加持下的多模态融合方法在所有参考类型上都超过了单独使用姿态或文本路径，top-1 准确率达31.9%。同时，网络的门控机制根据是否能获取类别信息自动调整策略，显示体系结构解耦对于避免类别表示相关虚假提升至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 完全解耦的多模态后期融合方法有助于可靠评估和分析3D语义指代系统的本质性能，当前语义落地的精度提升可能仅仅反映了类别表示带来的伪提升，只有体系结构解耦才能揭示真假性能差异。

title: Soft Tuy-Completeness for Robust Projection Selection in Cone-Beam CT
summary:
This work introduces a continuous soft near-orthogonality score and a resolution-aware saturated coverage objective for projection selection in region-of-interest focused cone-beam CT, grounded in Tuy's completeness theory. Replacing the binary hit-or-miss model of classical Tuy completeness with a graded, differentiable formulation preserves a direct link to achievable feature sizes while enabling both efficient approximate and exact optimisation.
  We establish that the underlying discrete decision problems are NP-complete via polynomial-time reductions from Set Cover, motivating a submodular greedy algorithm with proven $(1-1/\mathrm{e})$ approximation guarantees and a mixed-integer linear program (MILP) that provides certified optimality bounds. The MILP serves as a quality certificate for the greedy solution rather than a competing optimiser.
  The primary empirical finding confirms this relationship: across a systematic benchmark spanning six target regions, multiple projection budgets, and four controlled occlusion conditions, the pooled median greedy-to-MILP objective ratio was 0.998, with a substantial fraction of cases certified globally optimal. A binary formulation is included as a diagnostic baseline; it strengthens hard directional completeness but is weaker on the continuous coverage scale.
  We additionally introduce Effective Spatial Resolution (ESR), a physically interpretable trajectory-level diagnostic that maps directional sampling gaps to achievable feature sizes. ESR correlates reliably with matched reconstruction quality across projection budgets and occlusion levels, providing a practical bridge between the selection stage and the image domain without requiring reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种连续化的近正交性评分和分辨率感知的覆盖目标，用于在ROI聚焦的锥形束CT投影选择中，基于Tuy完整性理论，实现了理论与实际优化的结合，并通过贪心算法与MILP证实了方法的高效性和接近最优性能。
AI.motivation: 传统Tuy完整性是二值判别，难以准确衡量可达分辨率与覆盖效果，对大区域ROI和受遮挡条件下的投影选择问题很难做出高效优化。论文试图通过连续可导的覆盖与近正交性度量，提高投影选择质量，并弥合理论与实际诊断手段的落差。
AI.method: 提出连续的soft near-orthogonality分数和分辨率相关的覆盖目标，将判别问题归约为集合覆盖，通过贪心子模算法和混合整数线性规划（MILP）优化，后者为前者提供理论证明。提出新的ESR指标，直接反映方向采样缺口与可达特征尺度，无需重建即可评价轨迹。
AI.result: 六个ROI区域、多轮预算和四种遮挡条件下，贪心解与MILP最优解目标中位比为0.998，大部分实例被MILP验证为全局最优。二值模型虽方向完整性较强但连续覆盖效果较差。ESR指标可有效预测不同预算与遮挡下的重建质量。
AI.conclusion: 连续评分方法兼顾正交性与分辨率覆盖，配合贪心算法高效近优于MILP全局解，大多数实际场景下质量接近或等同最优，ESR诊断指标为选轨与重建间建立实用桥梁。

title: Extracting Training Data from Diffusion Language Models via Infilling
summary: Memorization in large language models has been studied almost exclusively through prefix-conditioned extraction, a natural choice for autoregressive models. However, diffusion language models (DLMs) can denoise masked tokens at arbitrary positions. Thus, prefix-only probing reveals only one facet of memorization in DLMs and significantly underestimates the risk of training-data extraction. In order to realistically model extractability of training data in DLMs, we introduce \emph{infilling extraction}, a data-extraction protocol parameterized by an arbitrary binary mask that subsumes prefix-only probing and accounts for the bidirectional inductive bias of DLMs. Instantiating it on LLaDA-8B and Dream-7B across five extraction modes, three training pipelines, and three corpora covering verbatim and partial leakage, we find that mask geometry governs extractability: edge-conditioned masks \emph{extract up to three times more} verbatim sequences than prefix-conditioned ones, and bidirectional access opens channels inaccessible in autoregressive models. In particular, we show that a realistic adversary with access to training data where personally identifiable information has been redacted, can even achieve higher recall on extracting redacted email addresses from DLMs than from scale-matched autoregressive models. Tunable parameters for decoding measurably affect extraction performance, while a follow-up supervised finetuning stage does not eliminate the prior memorization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了面向扩散语言模型（DLMs）的新颖数据提取协议“填充提取（infilling extraction）”，揭示了DLM相比自回归模型存在更高的数据泄露风险。
AI.motivation: 传统对大语言模型（尤其是自回归模型）的记忆评估方法——前缀引导提取，无法准确反映DLM的记忆与数据泄露风险。因为DLM可在任意位置去噪，需开发更全面的评估方法。
AI.method: 提出基于任意二进制掩码的“填充提取”协议，统一了前缀引导与DLM的双向归纳偏差。实现在LLaDA-8B和Dream-7B两个模型上，涵盖五种提取模式、三种训练流程和三类数据集，通过不同掩码几何形状对比提取效果。
AI.result: 发现掩码几何显著影响可提取性：边缘掩码能提取的原文内容数量是前缀掩码的三倍，DLM的双向机制导致更多新提取通道。对敏感信息地址的测试也验证了DLM泄露风险高于规模匹配的自回归模型。解码参数影响提取性能，而后续微调不能根除已有记忆。
AI.conclusion: 对DLM的记忆与数据泄露风险的评估需超越前缀提取，采用更通用的掩码方法。值得警惕DLM在实际应用中对隐私和敏感信息的记忆与提取能力；需研发更有效的防护手段。

title: Towards Low-Gravity Planetary Exploration using Reinforcement Learning for Walking, Jumping, and In-flight Attitude Control
summary: This paper presents reinforcement learning (RL) policies for dynamic quadrupedal locomotion in planetary exploration scenarios. Building on a taskoptimized quadruped with a 5-bar leg design, we develop RL policies for walking, vertical jumping, forward jumping, and in-flight attitude control, explicitly tailored to the reduced gravity on Mars. These policies jointly enable such robots to overcome obstacles larger than themselves through coordinated jumping and precise in-flight reorientation for safe landings. We demonstrate Sim2Real transfer of the attitude control policy on the Olympus quadruped through single-axis reorientation tests, while all locomotion policies are validated in simulation. A complete Mars exploration mission scenario demonstrates coordinated policy deployment across challenging terrain. Experimental results show 90° attitude reorientation in 2.6 seconds, with simulations demonstrating 3.1 meter vertical jumps and 3.9 meter forward jumps under Martian gravity conditions. - Supplementary video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qlSJ3P87A4A

AI.tldr: 本论文提出面向火星等行星勘探的四足机器人动态运动强化学习策略，涵盖步行、跳跃及空中姿态控制，并通过仿真和部分实物实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 针对火星探索等极端地形和低重力环境，现有机器人难以跨越高大障碍、实现稳定运动。为此，设计更高机动性的四足机器人及其智能控制策略变得尤为重要。
AI.method: 基于5杆腿结构的四足机器人，通过强化学习分别训练步行、垂直跳跃、前向跳跃和空中姿态控制策略，所有策略均面向火星重力环境进行优化，并在仿真及部分实物（姿态控制）中验证。其中，Sim2Real迁移用于空中姿态控制在真实机器人上的测试。
AI.result: 仿真下机器人可在火星重力条件实现3.1米高、3.9米远的跳跃。姿态控制策略实物测试中，机器人能在2.6秒内完成90°姿态调整。各控制策略可配合应对复杂地形任务。
AI.conclusion: 所提强化学习控制策略有效提升了四足机器人在火星等低重力行星环境下的机动性和环境适应能力，能实现越障、跳跃和空中自我调整，为未来自主行星探索任务奠定基础。

title: Mitigating Hallucinations in Large Vision-Language Models via Causal Route Gating
comment: Accepted as a Spotlight Paper at ICML 2026. 33 pages, 8 figures
summary: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) often hallucinate content that is fluent yet unsupported by the image, limiting their reliability in real-world deployment. We show that a key failure mode arises from route competition: even when visual tokens receive attention, the final token decision can be dominated by the textual pathway, causing the decoder to follow linguistic priors over visual evidence. To mitigate this, we propose a training-free, decision-aligned intervention that decomposes each attention head into a visual route and a text route, and estimates their token-level effects using an efficient one-forward/one-gradient approximation. These estimates reveal route conflict within heads and identify prior-dominant ones, enabling selective suppression of only the text route while keeping the visual route intact. Across five benchmarks spanning discriminative and generative settings, our method consistently reduces hallucination-related errors across models with limited impact on overall multimodal performance, while incurring a modest inference-time overhead.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种减缓大型视觉-语言模型（LVLMs）幻觉（即生成与图像无关但语句流畅内容）的方法，通过对注意力头的视觉和文本路径分别建模，实现无需训练的新型干预机制，有效提升模型可靠性。
AI.motivation: 当前LVLMs常常受到“幻觉”问题的困扰，即模型生成内容虽然符合语言习惯但未必与图像信息一致，这极大影响其在实际场景中的应用价值。作者发现其中一个主要成因是模型决策时存在视觉和文本路径的“竞争”，文本常常主导最终输出。
AI.method: 作者提出一种无须重新训练的干预方法：将每个注意力头分解为视觉路径和文本路径，并利用一次前向+一次梯度近似来高效估算二者对token决策的影响。通过检测出主要由文本主导且发生冲突的位置，仅抑制文本路径信号，保留视觉路径。
AI.result: 在五个涵盖判别和生成任务的基准上，该方法跨模型均有效减少了幻觉相关错误，对多模态整体性能影响较小，计算开销适中。
AI.conclusion: 所提新型注意力路由级干预能在不影响整体多模态性能的基础上，有效提升LVLMs的图像一致性和可靠性，为实用化落地提供有力支撑。

title: Teaching Through Analogies: A Modular Pipeline for Educational Analogy Generation
comment: 36 pages, 25 figures. To appear in Proceedings of the 21st Workshop on Innovative Use of NLP for Building Educational Applications (BEA 2026)
summary: Analogies help learners understand unfamiliar concepts by relating them to known concepts. Despite recent advances, large language models (LLMs) continue to struggle to generate analogies of comparable quality to those produced by humans. We present a modular pipeline for educational analogy generation, decomposing the task into four stages: source finding, sub-concept generation, explanation generation, and evaluation. Grounded in Structure Mapping Theory, the pipeline enables systematic, stage-by-stage analysis of how model choice and input configuration affect analogy quality. We evaluate 12 state-of-the-art LLMs across six model families on two datasets with structured sub-concept annotations (SCAR and ParallelPARC), alongside seven embedding models for closed-setting retrieval. Our results show that sub-concepts substantially improve explanation quality and closed setting retrieval precision but provide limited benefit in open-ended source generation. We further introduce an LLM-as-a-judge evaluation methodology and validate its scoring against human annotations from seven annotators, finding that Claude Sonnet 4.6 aligns more reliably with human rankings than with fine-grained absolute scores. Taken together, our findings reveal cross-stage interactions that isolated studies cannot capture, and highlight sub-concept grounding as a key driver of analogy quality generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种模块化流程，用于分阶段提升大模型生成教育类类比的质量，并系统评估各阶段对最终表现的影响。
AI.motivation: 当前大模型在生成高质量、类似人类的类比方面依然有不足。本研究希望通过分解流程、系统分析，找出提升方法，并理解各子步骤对类比质量的贡献。
AI.method: 将类比生成任务拆解为：源域查找、子概念生成、解释生成和评估四步。基于结构映射理论，针对两个有结构标注数据集和七种嵌入模型，评估12种SOTA大模型在每一步的表现，并引入模型自动评分方法（LLM-as-a-judge），验证其与人工评分的一致性。
AI.result: 结果表明，子概念引入能显著提升解释质量和封闭检索精度，但对开放式源域生成提升有限。自动评估方法在排序上与人工更一致。还发现各阶段之间存在交互影响。
AI.conclusion: 分阶段分析揭示了提升类比生成质量的关键因素，尤其是子概念的有效植入。隔离研究无法捕捉的各阶段相互作用被揭示，对后续优化有重要指导意义。

title: Sum of Costs Diffusion with Dynamic Guidance for Motion Planning
comment: Accepted at the Frontiers of Optimization for Robotics Workshop at the IEEE International Conference of Robotics & Automation (ICRA), 2026
summary: The motion planning problem for robotic manipulation can be addressed through classical or deep learning approaches. Existing methods face significant challenges in generalizing to diverse settings. In this study, we present a method with high generalization capability that generates collision-free trajectories using diffusion models where the denoising process is guided by the gradient of the total collision cost. We are also presenting a dynamic approach for choosing start step of the gradient guidance. Experimental results demonstrate that guiding the diffusion model dynamically with the sum of collision costs offers more robust performance by overcoming the generalization issues faced by competing methods. The proposed model demonstrates its effectiveness by achieving the highest performance on diverse test settings in M$π$nets\ dataset among the compared methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的高泛化能力的机器人运动规划方法，通过总碰撞代价梯度动态引导去噪过程，实现了无碰撞轨迹的生成，并在多样化测试环境下表现出优于现有方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人运动规划方法难以在不同场景间实现良好泛化，受限于传统方法或深度学习模型对环境高度依赖，难以获得鲁棒的无碰撞轨迹。
AI.method: 本研究采用扩散概率模型作为运动规划新范式，在去噪生成运动轨迹过程中，利用总碰撞代价的梯度作为引导，同时动态调整引导过程的起点，提高模型自适应能力，从而生成满足无碰撞约束的轨迹。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提出的方法在机器人操作M$π$nets数据集的多样化测试条件下取得了最高性能，解决了现有方法在泛化能力上的不足，展现了更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过动态碰撞代价引导扩散过程，本文方法不仅提升了运动规划中的泛化能力，还在多变环境下表现优秀，为机器人运动规划提供了更具通用性的新方案。

title: Towards Large Model Feature Coding
summary: Large models have delivered remarkable performance across a wide range of perception and generation tasks, yet practical deployment is increasingly constrained by computational and memory budgets, as well as privacy requirements. Split execution alleviates these constraints by partitioning computation across devices, but it inevitably introduces intensive transmission and storage of intermediate features. Unlike conventional feature coding for CNNs that typically targets homogeneous spatial activation maps, modern large models generate heterogeneous features with varying statistical distributions and compression tolerances, e.g., multi-level/multi-modal representations and autoregressive context caches. These characteristics necessitate treating large model feature coding (LaMoFC) as a fundamental system component and call for a systematic evaluation framework. In this paper, we present a comprehensive benchmark and evaluation framework for LaMoFC. We first build the feature dataset LaMoFCBench, covering diverse task requirements across 4 categories and 16 scenarios while integrating widelyadopted architectures and various split-computing settings. We then specify representative split points according to practical application scenarios to extract intermediate features, establishing a unified pipeline for fair and reproducible comparisons. Finally, we benchmark mainstream universal feature codecs, exposing the profound misalignment between existing coding paradigms and the heterogeneous nature of large model features. These findings reveal that LaMoFC demands a fundamental departure from existing paradigms, and LaMoFCBench provides the shared empirical foundation to drive this transition. The data and code will be available at https://github.com/lartpang/LaMoFCBench.

AI.tldr: 大模型部署受限于计算、内存和隐私，分布式执行引入了中间特征的高传输与高存储压力。当前特征编码方法无法适应大模型产生的异构特征。本文提出了LaMoFCBench基准和评测框架，以系统性评估和对齐大模型特征编码需求，推动新范式。
AI.motivation: 随着大模型的广泛应用，受限于计算资源、内存以及隐私需求，模型需要被分割到不同设备执行。分布式执行导致中间特征需要频繁传输和存储，现有特征编码方法不能很好适应大模型产生的复杂和异构特征类型，因此亟需新的编码策略和系统性评测手段。
AI.method: 1. 构建了LaMoFCBench特征数据集，涵盖4类16种场景，并集成主流架构和各种分布式计算配置。2. 设定了具有代表性的模型分割点，从而提取中间特征，并建立统一流程以保证比较的公平性和可复现性。3. 对主流的通用特征编码器进行了基准测试，分析目前方法与大模型特征实际异构性的错配。
AI.result: 通过定量和定性基准测试，揭示了现有主流特征编码器与大模型产生的异构特征在统计分布与压缩容忍度上的巨大不匹配。
AI.conclusion: 大模型特征编码LaMoFC需要根本性的新方法，现有编码范式难以胜任。LaMoFCBench为后续相关研究和性能评测提供了统一基准和经验基础。

title: QUEST: Training Frontier Deep Research Agents with Fully Synthetic Tasks
summary: Deep research agents extend the role of search engines from retrieving keyword-matched pages to synthesizing knowledge, fundamentally changing how humans interact with information. However, frontier systems remain proprietary, while existing open agents often generalize poorly across different task types, leaving unclear how to train a broadly capable deep research agent. We release QUEST, a family of open models (ranging from 2B to 35B) that serve as general-purpose deep research agents designed to handle a wide range of long-horizon search tasks, with strong capabilities in fact seeking, citation grounding, and report synthesis. To build QUEST, we propose an effective training recipe combining mid-training, supervised fine-tuning, and reinforcement learning. Central to this recipe is a curated data synthesis pipeline based on unified rubric trees, which applies to different task types and enables synthesizing training data with verifiable rewards without human annotation. In addition, QUEST incorporates a built-in context management mechanism that enables effective long-horizon reasoning and knowledge synthesis. Using only 8K synthesized tasks, QUEST approaches or even surpasses frontier closed-source agents across eight deep research benchmarks spanning diverse task types, and achieves the best overall performance among recent open-weight agents. We released everything: models, data, and training scripts.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出并发布了一套名为QUEST的开放式深度研究代理模型，可广泛执行多种搜索与知识合成任务，其性能接近或超过现有闭源系统。
AI.motivation: 当前开放式深度研究代理在多任务泛化能力上表现有限，且最前沿系统大多为闭源，制约了社区的开放发展。因此，亟需一种既开放又能广泛适应不同任务类型的深度研究代理。
AI.method: 提出了一套训练方案，将中期训练、监督微调与强化学习结合，并设计了基于统一标准树的数据合成流程，实现无需人工标注即可生成高质量训练数据。同时，内建高效上下文管理机制以支持复杂的长程推理能力。
AI.result: 通过仅8K合成任务即可使QUEST在八个涵盖不同任务类型的公开基准上，接近乃至超过闭源前沿代理，同时在所有近期开放权重代理中表现最优。
AI.conclusion: QUEST展示了开放深度研究代理的可行性与高性能，为社区贡献了所有模型、数据与训练脚本，有望推动智能信息交互与知识合成技术的发展。

title: Geometric Workspace Analysis and Transmission-Aware Dynamics of a Serial Spherical Tool for Microsurgery
summary: We present a kinematic and transmission-aware design framework for a serial spherical mechanism with an additional translational degree of freedom for microsurgery. The first contribution is an analytical workspace formulation that provides geometric insight into reachable motion and enables rapid selection of rotation axis orientations without numerical optimization. The second contribution is a dynamics-informed methodology for mechanisms driven by self-locking transmissions, supporting evaluation of torque requirements for a prescribed workspace geometry. The framework is accompanied by an open-source software package for friction identification and inverse dynamics analysis. Experiments on a purpose-built robotic tool for vitreoretinal surgery validate the predictive capability of the models and demonstrate their practical utility for engineering design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合运动学和传动特性的新型串联球体机构设计框架，适用于微创外科手术工具。
AI.motivation: 现有微创手术机器人在空间运动能力和驱动自锁机构的动力学分析上存在设计瓶颈，难以兼顾操作灵活性和工程可实现性。
AI.method: 提出了一种分析型工作空间建模方法，快速确定旋转轴方位，并引入基于自锁传动系统的动力学评估方法，同时提供用于摩擦特性辨识与逆动力学分析的开源软件包。
AI.result: 在为玻璃体视网膜手术开发的专用机器人工具上进行了实验，验证了该模型的预测能力及其实用价值。
AI.conclusion: 该设计框架有助于更高效的微创机器人设计和分析，为工程实践提供了理论和工具支持。

title: Mode-as-Sequence: Translating Multimodal Motion Prediction into Unified Sequential Mode Modeling
summary: Multimodal motion forecasting is inherently under-supervised: each training scene provides only one realized future, yet multiple plausible futures exist. This sparse supervision often leads to mode collapse (redundant hypotheses and insufficient mode coverage) and unreliable confidence ranking when predicting a small set of trajectories. We propose Mode-as-Sequence, a unified decoding framework that translates an unordered mode set into an ordered mode sequence and explicitly models mode-to-mode dependency. Under this framework, we develop two complementary instantiations. ModeSeq performs recurrent mode decoding, where each mode is generated conditioned on the previously generated modes, encouraging diverse, non-redundant hypotheses with calibrated confidence ordering. To remove the mode-by-mode autoregressive bottleneck, we further propose Parallel ModeSeq, which preserves the same causal dependency using masked mode-to-mode self-attention while decoding all modes in a single forward pass, enabling efficient large-$K$ inference and scalable joint-scene prediction. To learn representative modes and calibrated confidence under sparse labels, we introduce Early-Match-Take-All (EMTA) and its joint-scene extension MA-EMTA, together with a lightweight ranking regularizer that reduces confidence inversions. Extensive experiments on large-scale benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements in both ranking-oriented metrics and best-of-K accuracy across datasets, horizons, and object types. In the Waymo Open Dataset challenges, ModeSeq achieves 1st place in the 2024 LiDAR-free motion prediction track, and Parallel ModeSeq achieves 1st place in the 2025 Interaction Prediction Challenge, validating the effectiveness of Mode-as-Sequence for both accuracy and efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新颖的多模态运动预测解码框架Mode-as-Sequence，通过将无序的未来轨迹集合建模为有序序列并显式考虑轨迹间依赖，提升预测多样性和排序可靠性。两种实现方式（ModeSeq和Parallel ModeSeq）在多个大规模基准上显著改善预测性能，并在Waymo挑战赛中获得第一。
AI.motivation: 多模态运动预测任务常因监督稀疏导致模型难以全面覆盖所有可能未来，进而出现模式坍缩与不可靠的置信度排序，制约实用性和安全性。亟需新方法提升多样性、准确性与可解释性。
AI.method: 提出Mode-as-Sequence统一解码框架，将本应无序的预测未来（模式）集合转为有序序列，建模模式间依赖关系；包含两种实现：1)ModeSeq，递归生成每个模式，条件依赖于历史；2)Parallel ModeSeq，采用掩码自注意力一次性并行生成所有模式。还设计了EMTA及其多场景拓展MA-EMTA、轻量排序正则化方法，提升代表性与置信度校准能力。
AI.result: 在大型数据集和挑战赛（如Waymo Open Dataset）中，两种方法在排序相关度量和best-of-K指标上均优于现有方法。ModeSeq和Parallel ModeSeq分别在2024与2025年Waymo相关竞赛获得第一。
AI.conclusion: Mode-as-Sequence显著提升了多模态运动预测的模式多样性、代表性和置信度排序，兼顾准确性与推理效率，适合大规模场景预测应用。

title: Improving Labeling Consistency with Detailed Constitutional Definitions and AI-Driven Evaluation
comment: Under review at ACL Rolling Review (ARR), May 2026 cycle. Also available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20125267
summary:
Many automated labeling pipelines classify inputs into categories defined by a written specification, content moderation being a prominent use case. Simple category definitions are not detailed enough for labelers to produce the accurate, consistent golden labels these pipelines require. One solution is to write a prescriptive definition that settles enough real boundary cases that labelers cannot disagree with the written interpretation. In practice, definitions at that level of detail exceed what a human annotator can hold in working memory, so annotators fall back on intuition and the labels drift from the written rules, regressing on accuracy and consistency.
  We propose and demonstrate the efficacy of an AI-driven workflow in which AI helps write a per-category constitution that defines the label in enough detail to cover edge cases, and a frontier LLM interprets it on each input to produce the golden label more consistently and accurately than humans reading the same document. We evaluate on three content moderation categories (harassment, hate speech, non-violent crime) and show that the approach reduces cross-model inconsistency by up to 57x compared to paragraph definitions, with cross-model disagreement diagnosing specification gaps and the human responsible for high-level decisions about what each category should mean rather than individual labeling calls. For the safety evaluation, we introduce a dual-axis formulation scoring intent and content independently over the full conversation, so downstream consumers can act on either axis or both.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种AI驱动的自动标注流程，通过AI帮助撰写详细的类别定义，再用前沿大语言模型（LLM）解读定义，以提升标签的一致性和准确性，针对内容审核三类任务（骚扰、仇恨言论、非暴力犯罪）验证效果。
AI.motivation: 现有自动标注流程依赖书面定义，但简单定义导致标签准确性和一致性差，复杂定义又超出人工标注员记忆极限，导致标签偏离规则。因此亟需既详细又可操作的新办法。
AI.method: 采用AI协助撰写更详细、覆盖边界案例的“类别宪章”，再用LLM针对每个输入动态解读并赋标签，同时引入评估一致性的新方法并在人类审核流程中，将高层定义与具体标注工作分离。
AI.result: 在骚扰、仇恨言论、非暴力犯罪三类内容审核任务上，AI驱动流程将跨模型标签不一致减少至原来的1/57，能诊断定义漏洞，同时将决策焦点转移到类别意图而非具体标注。
AI.conclusion: AI辅助类别定义与动态LLM标注能够大幅提升复杂内容类别的标注一致性与准确性，为内容审核等领域的自动标注提供更高效、透明且可控的解决方案。

title: Enhanced INS/GNSS State Estimation using GNSS-Based Acceleration Measurements
summary: Accurate and reliable navigation is essential for autonomous ground vehicle operations. Standard INS/GNSS fusion relies on GNSS position updates, which provide limited observability of orientation and inertial sensor error states, particularly during low-dynamic motion. In this work, we propose utilizing past GNSS measurements alongside a motion model to extract meaningful vehicle acceleration information. This acceleration measurement is then integrated into the INS/GNSS filter to improve its robustness and accuracy. The proposed approach is evaluated on two real-world unmanned ground vehicle datasets collected from different mobile platforms and inertial sensor grades. Results demonstrate consistent positioning accuracy improvements relative to the standard position-aided filter, with mean position root mean square error improvements of 11.40 % and 20.74 % on the two datasets, respectively.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种利用过去GNSS测量和运动模型相结合，提升无人车导航精度的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统INS/GNSS融合主要依赖GNSS位置，但在车辆低动态运动时，方向和惯导误差状态可观测性有限，影响导航精度。如何提升定位精度和鲁棒性，是自动驾驶关键问题。
AI.method: 提出利用历史GNSS测量数据和车辆运动模型，估计有效的车辆加速度信息，并将该加速度信息集成进INS/GNSS融合滤波器中，提高系统性能。
AI.result: 在两个不同类型移动平台和惯性传感器级别的无人车数据集上测试，平均定位均方根误差分别提升了11.40%和20.74%。
AI.conclusion: 与传统位置辅助滤波方法相比，新方法能持续提升定位精度，对于提升无人车辆导航的可靠性与鲁棒性有实际价值。

title: Learning to See Like Humans: Gaze-Aligned Cycling Safety Prediction
comment: Accepted to be published as part of the 2026 IEEE 29th International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC), Naples, Italy, September 15-18, 2026
summary: Cycling delivers significant public-health and environmental benefits, yet its uptake in cities is often limited by perceived safety. When street environments appear unsafe, individuals are less likely to cycle, making perception a key barrier to adoption. Recent work has shown that pairwise comparisons of street-view images provide a scalable way to learn subjective safety judgments. However, existing approaches do not explicitly model human visual attention, which plays a central role in how humans perceive safety. We propose an Eye-Tracking-Guided Perceived Cycling Safety framework (EG-PCS) that integrates gaze data into a pairwise learning pipeline based on vision transformers. By supervising the model's attention mechanism with eye-tracking signals, we encourage alignment between learned attention maps and human fixation patterns. Experiments show that gaze-guided models achieve similar ranking performance compared to state-of-the-art approaches while producing attention maps that more accurately reflect human visual attention behavior. Our results demonstrate that incorporating eye-tracking information enhances both predictive accuracy and interpretability in perception-based urban analytics.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种结合眼动追踪数据与视觉变换器的骑行安全感预测方法，在提升模型解释性的同时保持了高准确率。
AI.motivation: 尽管骑行有诸多公共健康与环境益处，但由于人们对城市街道安全感的担忧，骑行普及率较低。当前的自动化安全感评估方法未充分利用人类视觉关注机制，难以精准解读人的主观感受，因此亟需更符合人类视觉注意特征的新方法。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种基于眼动追踪指导的感知骑行安全框架（EG-PCS），在视觉变换器的成对学习流程中加入了人眼注视点数据，利用人眼注视信号监督模型的注意力机制，使模型注意力与人类视觉关注模式对齐。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在安全感排名表现上与最先进方法相当，但输出的注意力图能更精准地反映人类视觉注意行为，提升了模型的解释性。
AI.conclusion: 引入眼动追踪信息，不仅提升了基于感知的城市骑行安全分析的预测准确率，还增强了模型的可解释性，对感知驱动的城市分析具有积极意义。

title: An Interactive Paradigm for Deep Research
summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have enabled deep research systems that synthesize comprehensive, report-style answers to open-ended queries by combining retrieval, reasoning, and generation. Yet most frameworks rely on rigid workflows with one-shot scoping and long autonomous runs, offering little room for course correction if user intent shifts mid-process. We present SteER, a framework for Steerable deEp Research that introduces interpretable, mid-process control into long-horizon research workflows. At each decision point, SteER uses a cost-benefit formulation to determine whether to pause for user input or to proceed autonomously. It combines diversity-aware planning with utility signals that reward alignment, novelty, and coverage, and maintains a live persona model that evolves throughout the session. SteER outperforms state-of-the-art open-source and proprietary baselines by up to 22.80\% on alignment, leads on quality metrics such as breadth and balance, and is preferred by human readers in 85\%+ of pairwise alignment judgments. We also introduce a persona-query benchmark and data-generation pipeline. To our knowledge, this is the first work to advance deep research with an interactive, interpretable control paradigm, paving the way for controllable, user-aligned agents in long-form tasks.

AI.tldr: SteER提出了一种可控的深度研究框架，实现过程中可解释、可交互的中途控制，提升LLM在复杂研究任务中的用户对齐性和研究质量。实际表现超越多个SOTA基线。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM驱动的研究系统大多流程刚性，一旦流程启动后，用户很难在中途进行干预与校正，导致成果很难完全符合用户意图或应对意图变化。
AI.method: 设计SteER框架，在研究流程的关键决策点基于成本-收益分析决定交互时机，实现“暂停-征询-继续”。融合多样性规划与校准、创新性、覆盖度指标，维持动态更新的用户角色模型。
AI.result: SteER在用户对齐度上相比其他开源和商业系统提升至多22.8%。在广度、平衡等质量指标上领先，85%以上偏好对比测试中被认为更优。同时提出新的人格查询基准和数据生成流程。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个在LLM深度研究流程中实现交互式、可解释控制范式的工作，为未来可控、对齐、长任务智能体发展打下基础。

title: MR-LiDAR: A Multi-Resolution Roadside LiDAR Benchmark for Perception Diagnostics and Deployment Guidance
summary: LiDAR model selection is a critical issue in roadside sensing systems, as it directly determines both perception capability and deployment cost. However, the lack of empirical benchmarks for comparing perception performance across different LiDAR configurations has greatly constrained scientific sensor selection and deployment planning. To address this gap, we present MR-LiDAR, a controlled multi-resolution LiDAR benchmark for roadside perception diagnostics. Using 16-, 32-, 80-, and 128-beam LiDARs in identical roadside scenarios, we collect point clouds and ground-truth annotations for diverse traffic participants, including vehicles and vulnerable road users (VRUs), across varying distances. This controlled design isolates intrinsic LiDAR specifications, particularly beam count and beam distribution, as the key variables for precise performance diagnostics. Based on MR-LiDAR, we conduct systematic empirical analyses to examine how beam count, beam distribution, target distance, object category, and vehicle occlusion affect LiDAR perception performance. The results reveal that all of these factors have substantial impacts. In particular, contrary to the common assumption that higher beam counts always yield better perception, we show that an 80-beam LiDAR with optimized beam distribution can match or even outperform a 128-beam LiDAR with uniform beam distribution. In addition, we provide a practical reference guide for LiDAR selection, including target point-count statistics and detection performance comparisons based on two widely used detection algorithms. This work offers a diagnostic benchmark and practical guidance for determining cost-effective LiDAR configurations in roadside perception applications.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出MR-LiDAR多分辨率传感器基准，系统比较不同参数LiDAR在路侧感知下的性能，并揭示实际部署中不同射线数与分布方案的优劣。
AI.motivation: 路侧感知系统中LiDAR选型决定感知能力和成本，但缺乏系统性、可控的多型号LiDAR感知基准，制约了科学选型和部署。
AI.method: 搭建包含16、32、80、128束LiDAR的多分辨场景，采集多类别交通参与者数据，严格控制变量（特别是射线数和分布），进行性能诊断。分析射线数、分布、目标距离、类别和遮挡对感知性能的影响。
AI.result: 各影响因素对感知能力影响显著，且优化射线分布的80束LiDAR性能可以媲美甚至优于128束均匀分布LiDAR。提供点云统计与两种主流检测算法下的性能对比。
AI.conclusion: MR-LiDAR作为诊断性基准，有助于科学、成本效益高地选择和部署路侧LiDAR传感器，为实际工程应用提供指导。

title: EMMA: Extracting Multiple physical parameters from Multimodal Data
summary: We introduce EMMA, a physics-informed multimodal framework that recovers all identifiable dynamical parameters of a system directly from raw video, audio, and image-based time-series observations. Unlike prior video-only approaches that struggle with occluded states, hidden actuation inputs, or assumptions about known initial conditions and coordinate frames, EMMA performs joint inference of explicit parameters, implicit dynamical components, and calibration invariants within a unified continuous-time model. EMMA leverages a Liquid Time-Constant (LTC) network to learn latent dynamics from heterogeneous modalities while a physics-constrained loss enforces consistency with the governing differential equations. A unified feature pipeline enables consistent alignment across video trajectories, acoustic signatures, and chart-derived measurements, allowing EMMA to estimate parameters under forced, implicit, and multivariate dynamics without requiring segmentation masks, differentiable rendering, or specialized sensors. Across 100+ scenarios including five standard dynamical benchmarks (75 Delfys videos), real-world rover and quadrotor systems with hidden inputs, and simulation-chart case studies spanning biological and chaotic systems, EMMA delivers robust multi-parameter recovery and significantly outperforms existing single-modality and equation-discovery baselines. Our results establish EMMA as a general, scalable solution for physics-consistent model extraction from opportunistic multimodal data. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/ImpactLabASU/EMMA-CVPR2026

AI.tldr: 本文提出EMMA框架，能够直接利用原始视频、音频和图像时序数据恢复系统的全部可辨识动力学参数，显著优于现有单一模态和方程发现方法。
AI.motivation: 现有仅基于视频的方法在观测状态被遮挡、输入隐藏、初始条件未知或坐标系不明确时表现较差，且往往需依赖额外先验或标签。而现实中许多场景下，能获得多模态但无标的原始观测数据，因此亟需一种无需特殊假设且能融合多模态信号进行参数恢复的方法。
AI.method: EMMA采用物理约束的多模态框架：利用LTC网络从多种模态学习潜在动力学，通过物理方程约束损失确保一致性；创新的数据管线对视频、音频和图表数据特征统一对齐，支持在受迫、隐含和多变量动力学下进行无掩码及无特殊传感器的参数估计。
AI.result: 在超过100个场景、包含标准动力学基准、真实机器人系统及仿生与混沌系统等任务中，EMMA能强健地恢复多参数，性能远超现有单模态与自动方程发现基线。
AI.conclusion: EMMA为利用多模态原始数据进行物理一致建模提供了通用、可扩展的解决方案，在参数恢复和模型提取方面显示出卓越的鲁棒性和普适性。

title: DRInQ: Evaluating Conversational Implicature with Controlled Context Variation
summary: Human conversation relies heavily on conversational implicature, in which speakers convey meanings that are suggested rather than explicitly stated. Although recent large language models exhibit strong conversational fluency, they remain unreliable when interpretation depends on reasoning that integrates social and contextual cues, a process rarely articulated in text. We introduce DRinQ, a benchmark for evaluating pragmatic reasoning about conversational implicature in question utterances, designed to isolate pragmatic variation while holding each question's surface form fixed. To support scalable evaluation, we propose a semi-automated pipeline that produces question-context-interpretation instances with systematic variation. Across evaluations, we find a consistent generation-inference asymmetry: while state-of-the-art models can generate plausible pragmatic scenarios when guided, they often fail to recover the intended implication at inference time. For smaller models, structured prompting improves alignment with human judgments. A comparative writing study further reveals complementary strengths: human authors tend to produce safer, predictable contexts, whereas models generate varied scenarios with interpretations that sometimes exceed contextual support. These findings highlight persistent challenges in modeling conversational implicature and motivate more context-sensitive evaluation frameworks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DRinQ基准，用于评估大语言模型在人类对话中基于语境和社会线索的含义推理能力，并揭示了生成和理解环节中的表现差异。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型尽管对话流畅，但在涉及隐含意义、语境与社会线索推理时表现不佳，缺乏有效的评估工具。作者希望通过新的基准测试专注考查这类语用推理能力，推动模型更好地模拟真实人类对话理解。
AI.method: 作者设计了DRinQ基准，通过保持问题表面形式不变，系统地引入不同语境，评估模型对同一问题在不同语境下隐含意义的理解。为提效，作者提出半自动化流程生成带有变化语境和解释的数据实例，并用该基准测试不同大模型在生成和理解含义时的表现。
AI.result: 评测显示：当前大模型在被引导生成语用场景时表现良好，但在推断问题隐含意义时，经常不能准确恢复目标解释。较小模型用结构化提示可提升与人类判断的一致性。人类作者更倾向于生成安全而可预测的语境，模型则生成更多样但有时脱离语境支持的解释。
AI.conclusion: 当前大模型在对话含义解释方面仍有显著不足，需要更灵敏的、以语境为中心的评价体系，以促进模型在人类真实对话中的推理与理解。

title: Manifold-Constrained MPPI: Real-Time Sampling-Based Control Under Hard Constraints
comment: International Journal of Control, Automation, and Systems
summary: Sampling-based model predictive control methods, such as Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI), offer derivative-free optimization and robustness in complex robotic systems. However, standard MPPI relies on cost-based soft penalties that cannot guarantee hard-constraint satisfaction, severely limiting its applicability to highly constrained tasks such as closed-chain manipulation. To address this, we propose Manifold-Constrained MPPI (MC-MPPI), a real-time sampling-based control framework that enforces manifold-based equality constraints while preserving the computational advantages of MPPI. The key idea is to decouple the constrained optimal control problem into latent-space planning and execution-level correction. At the planning stage, a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) learns a low-dimensional latent representation of the constraint manifold, enabling MPPI to efficiently generate near-feasible candidate trajectories without per-sample modification. Since this reference enables accurate linearization of the equality constraints, an execution-level Quadratic Programming (QP) controller resolves the residual manifold mismatch in a single solve rather than through iterative projection. Experiments on a 14-DoF closed-chain dual-arm system in both simulation and real-world settings demonstrate that MC-MPPI operates stably at 100 Hz, reliably navigates dynamic environments while effectively maintaining hard equality constraints, and significantly outperforms baseline methods in tracking accuracy. Supplementary videos and implementation details are available at https://rcilab.github.io/mcmppi.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新型的采样式模型预测控制方法MC-MPPI，可以在实时控制下严格满足等式约束，解决传统MPPI无法保证硬约束的问题，尤其适合高约束场景如闭链机械臂操作。
AI.motivation: 传统MPPI及其它采样式模型预测控制方法大多只依赖于基于代价的软约束，无法严格保证碰撞等硬约束的满足，限制了其在复杂约束任务（如闭链机械臂操作）中的应用。
AI.method: 作者提出将约束最优控制问题解耦为低维流形下的规划和执行端修正两个阶段：通过变分自编码器（VAE）学习约束流形的低维隐空间，利用MPPI在该隐空间中高效生成近似可行轨迹；然后，在执行时采用一次性的二次规划（QP）求解，快速修正轨迹使其严格满足流形约束。
AI.result: 在14自由度闭链双臂机器人上进行的仿真和真实实验显示，MC-MPPI能够以100Hz的频率稳定运行，在动态环境下保持硬等式约束，并且在轨迹跟踪精度上显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: MC-MPPI为高约束场景下的采样式模型预测控制带来了新的解决方案，能高效、精准地执行具有复杂等式约束的机器人任务，提升了对应系统在实际环境中的实用性。

title: fMRI-Diffusion: Generating fMRI Time Series Via a Temporal Transformer Diffusion Model for Major Depressive Disorder Diagnosis
summary: Diagnosing Major Depressive Disorder (MDD) from functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) using functional connectivity (FC) analysis requires large amounts of labeled data that are scarce in clinical settings. Existing augmentation methods synthesize FC matrices, which compress fMRI recordings into static pairwise summaries and discard temporal information. We propose fMRI-Diffusion, a framework that synthesizes region-of-interest (ROI)-level fMRI time series rather than FC matrices. A Temporal Transformer serves as the denoising network within a denoising diffusion probabilistic model, treating each time point as a token to capture temporal dependencies through self-attention. A supervised pretraining strategy initializes the Transformer with task-relevant representations before diffusion training, and FC matrices are derived from the synthesized time series for classification. Experiments on the REST-meta-MDD dataset show that augmenting training data with synthetic time series consistently improves diagnostic accuracy across ten classifiers, six parcellation atlases, and three acquisition sites. The method outperforms five recent FC-based synthesis approaches, with accuracy gains of up to 3.7 percentage points over the strongest baseline. Ablation studies confirm the contributions of both the Transformer-based denoiser and the pretraining strategy. Distributional fidelity metrics remain below 0.06 across all conditions, indicating close agreement between real and synthetic distributions. These findings suggest that synthesizing fMRI time series before FC computation preserves temporal information lost in matrix-level augmentation and provides a practical strategy for MDD diagnosis under limited data.

AI.tldr: 作者提出了一种fMRI数据增强方法，可以合成区域级别的fMRI时间序列，有效提升抑郁症诊断的准确率。
AI.motivation: 在使用功能连接（FC）分析从fMRI诊断重性抑郁障碍（MDD）时，需大量标注数据，但实际临床数据稀缺。现有增强方法只对FC矩阵进行合成，丢失了有价值的时间信息。
AI.method: 提出fMRI-Diffusion框架，直接对ROI级别fMRI时间序列进行合成。将Temporal Transformer作为扩散模型的去噪网络，通过自注意力机制建模时间依赖性。训练时先用监督预训练策略初始化Transformer，然后再进行扩散模型训练，最后提取FC矩阵用于分类。
AI.result: 在REST-meta-MDD数据集上，增强合成时间序列可在10种分类器、6种脑分区、3个采集点下均提升诊断准确率，优于5种现有FC生成方法，对比最强基线提升达3.7个百分点。消融实验验证了去噪器和预训练策略的重要性。合成数据与真实数据分布高度一致。
AI.conclusion: 新方法通过合成时间序列保留了关键的时序信息，相比仅增强FC矩阵更能提升MDD诊断效果，适用于临床数据有限的情况。

title: ContextEcho: A Benchmark for Persona Drift in Long Agentic-Coding Sessions
summary: A frontier language model's acknowledged "helpful programming assistant" persona does not survive long agentic-coding sessions in the deployment regime that production products actually run. After hours of tool-using debugging, a model that initially hedges preferences ("I don't have preferences") may begin asserting them ("Python - the feedback loop is instant..."), revealing user-visible drift that deployer evaluations may miss. Existing persona-stability studies focus on short dialogues and report little shift, leaving real-world code-generation regimes - thousands of tool-using turns, compaction, and hours-long sessions - largely uncharacterized. We introduce ContextEcho, a benchmark and reusable harness for measuring persona drift at deployment scale. It combines a 25-probe identity suite, a snapshot-then-probe protocol that forks conversation state without perturbing the main session, complementary judged and judge-free measurement surfaces, and three anonymized Claude Code sessions spanning 3,746-9,716 turns. Across 23 frontier models, ContextEcho shows that persona drift is general across organizations rather than family-specific, that in-session compaction does not reliably reset it, and that a single-shot anchor restores the trained register across measured targets. It also reveals mode-dependent downstream effects: while drift can facilitate tool-using continuation, in tool-free chat it breaks formatting contracts and inflates output length. Overall, ContextEcho provides researchers and deployers an open-source framework to audit whether the persona a model ships with is the persona users encounter at session end, across chat-completions API targets and without retraining.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了ContextEcho框架，用于衡量前沿大模型在长时间、复杂编码对话中的角色（persona）漂移问题，发现主流大模型的角色设定在长会话中会发生明显漂移，对模型部署有重要影响。
AI.motivation: 目前关于大模型角色一致性的研究大多集中在短会话，现实中代码生成等长时间、多回合工具交互场景下的角色漂移问题没有系统刻画，因此需要新的基准和测试工具来更真实地评估模型角色稳定性。
AI.method: 作者提出了ContextEcho测试平台，主要包括25项角色辨识测试、快照-探测协议（不中断主对话进程下并行观测角色状态）、包括人工和自动测量手段，以及3个Claude编程模型长会话数据集（覆盖3,746-9,716轮对话）；并在23个前沿大模型上开展实证。
AI.result: 实验证明：角色漂移是普遍现象，不限于特定公司，且会话压缩并不能有效重置漂移，但触发单轮锚点能恢复原始角色特征。此外，漂移有模式依赖——工具辅助任务中能促进任务推进，但在纯聊天场景下会破坏格式约定并导致输出膨胀。
AI.conclusion: ContextEcho为研究者和工业部署者提供了开源、可复用的角色一致性审计框架，无需重新训练即可衡量模型真实部署下角色变迁，有助于提升模型在真实复杂场景中的可靠性和用户体验。

title: Learning Transferable Motor Skills for Geometry-Aware Robotic Surface Tasks
summary: Robotic surface-interaction tasks, such as spray painting or welding, require both accurate geometric planning and precise motion execution. While modern motion planners generate valid geometric paths, they often lack the expert motor patterns observed in human operators. Conversely, learning from demonstration often tightly couples task execution to the specific training geometry, limiting transferability. We propose a modular framework that decouples geometric motion planning from execution-level expertise. Expert behavior is represented as a vocabulary of interpretable, atomic motor rules, such as velocity scaling and orientation offsets, that systematically modify a geometrically planned reference path. We train a multimodal neural network to infer rule parameters jointly from kinematic trajectory data and CAD model geometry. We evaluate our approach through dynamic simulation on L-shaped and window-shaped objects, demonstrating on simulated data that the model successfully extracts velocity and orientation rules across both topologies.

AI.tldr: 提出一种模块化框架，将机器人表面交互任务中的几何路径规划与执行层级的专家运动模式解耦，通过神经网络从示范数据和CAD几何中推断运动规则参数，在仿真中验证有效性。
AI.motivation: 当前的机器人运动规划器能生成几何路径但缺乏专家级运动模式；而基于示范的学习方法通常与具体训练几何紧密耦合，难以迁移到新任务。亟需一种既能利用专家经验又有良好任务适应性的机器人运动控制方案。
AI.method: 提出模块化框架，将几何路径规划与执行专业知识解耦。专业行为用可解释的基本运动规则（如速度缩放、姿态偏置）表征。训练多模态神经网络，结合轨迹数据与CAD模型共同推断运动规则参数，然后系统性地修正参考路径。
AI.result: 在L型和窗型物体的动态仿真任务中进行评估，结果表明该模型能在不同结构上有效提取并应用速度与姿态运动规则，展示了迁移性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架能有效融合专家级运动规则与现代路径规划，提升机器人表面任务的运动执行灵活性及对象适应性，对机器人灵巧控制具重要意义。

title: Distance-Aware Joint Spatio-Temporal Graph Contrastive Learning for Major Depressive Disorder Diagnosis
summary: Major depressive disorder (MDD) is a common neuropsychiatric condition whose accurate diagnosis from resting-state functional magnetic resonance imaging (rs-fMRI) remains difficult. Dynamic functional connectivity (DFC) captures time-varying interactions among brain regions and provides rich spatio-temporal information, yet current DFC-based methods face three limitations: sliding-window Pearson correlation yields noisy estimates sensitive to window length and motion artifacts; correlation-derived node features do not fully exploit frequency-domain properties of blood-oxygen-level-dependent (BOLD) signals; and most spatio-temporal graph models handle spatial structure and temporal dynamics in separate stages, restricting their ability to represent coupled brain network evolution. To overcome these issues, we reformulate DFC learning as joint spatio-temporal graph representation learning under a Hawkes-process-inspired temporal dependency prior and propose HWSTCL, a two-stage framework built on a reliability-refined joint spatio-temporal graph with a kernel-weighted pretraining objective. Within each temporal window, BOLD signals are encoded as spectral node descriptors and functional edges are refined by an exponential distance-decay prior that down-weights less reliable long-range connections. The joint graph is then formed by linking each region to itself across future windows through a Hawkes-inspired exponential kernel, allowing spatial and temporal information to be propagated together during message passing. A kernel-weighted contrastive objective further promotes temporal consistency for each region across windows while reducing redundant similarity between different regions. Experiments on a benchmark rs-fMRI dataset show that HWSTCL outperforms recent baselines and yields coherent spatio-temporal representations for MDD diagnosis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的联合时空图学习框架（HWSTCL），用于提升基于动态功能连接（DFC）的静息态fMRI抑郁症诊断能力，并在基准数据集上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的动态功能连接分析方法在抑郁症诊断中存在三个主要问题：1）滑动窗口相关性估计容易受到窗口长度和运动伪影影响，结果噪声较大；2）节点表征缺乏对BOLD信号频域信息的充分利用；3）大多数时空图建模方法分开处理空间结构和时间动态，难以有效表征脑网络的耦合演化。因此亟需一种更鲁棒、信息整合能力更强的方法助力MDD诊断。
AI.method: 作者将DFC学习重新定义为带有Hawkes过程启发的时空依赖先验下的联合时空图表征学习，并提出了HWSTCL两阶段框架。方法中，节点特征采用频谱表征，边权通过指数距离衰减先验优化，减少远距离弱连接的影响；再通过跨时间窗口的自连接与Hawkes核相结合，实现空间与时间信息在信息传递中的同步更新；同时引入核加权对比学习目标，提升时序一致性，减少冗余相似性。
AI.result: 在一项静息态fMRI的MDD基准数据集上，HWSTCL在诊断准确性上超越了最新的对比方法，并且学到的时空表征更具一致性和判别力。
AI.conclusion: HWSTCL方法有效解决了当前DFC方法的噪音、大脑网络表征不全等瓶颈，提升了MDD基于fMRI诊断的时空信息捕获能力。

title: Discovering Lexical Gaps Using Embeddings from Multilingual LLMs
summary: Lexical gaps are words that do not exist in certain languages. They pose challenges for building multilingual lexical resources, for machine translation, and for cross-lingual transfer. Existing lexical gap detection relies on human judgments or fixed conceptual taxonomies. We propose a data-driven framework for identifying cross-lingual lexical gaps. We extracted contextualized embeddings from Korean-English bilingual LLMs for Korean-to-English and English-to-Korean translation pairs. Combinations of LLMs, embedding types, dimensionality, and orthogonal transformations across 100 train-test splits yielded 4000 distinct embedding spaces in each source language. In each space, we computed the semantic similarity between each source word and its nearest neighbor in the target language, and compared their distribution for gap words versus non-gap words. In 94% (Korean-to-English) and 97% (English-to-Korean) of embedding spaces, gap words showed weaker cross-lingual semantic alignment than non-gap words. Logistic classifiers trained on unaligned embedding spaces can reliably separate gap words from non-gap words, achieving AUCs of 0.81 (Korean-to-English) and 0.76 (English-to-Korean) and retrieving 18/19 Korean and 26/27 English gap words. This approach provides a language-agnostic and taxonomy-free method for scalable lexical gap identification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于数据驱动的跨语言词汇空缺（lexical gaps）自动检测方法，通过分析韩英双语大模型（LLM）生成的上下文词向量，实现无需专家判断或固定本体的词汇空缺识别，取得高准确率与良好泛化效果。
AI.motivation: 词汇空缺问题影响多语种词典构建、机器翻译及跨语言迁移，目前依赖人工或固定本体结构，难以扩展或自动化。本文旨在提出一种可扩展、无需人工判断的自动检测方法。
AI.method: 作者从韩英双语大模型中提取翻译对的上下文嵌入，通过不同模型、嵌入类型、维度和变换方法组合，得到4000种嵌入空间。比较词汇在源、目标语言中语义相似度分布，并利用逻辑回归区分空缺词和非空缺词。
AI.result: 在94%（韩译英）和97%（英译韩）的嵌入空间中，空缺词和非空缺词的跨语义对齐具有显著差异。逻辑分类器AUC达0.81（韩译英）、0.76（英译韩），准确识别绝大多数空缺词。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需固定语义本体，具备语言通用性和可扩展性，为大规模自动检测词汇空缺提供了有效思路。

title: MuJoCoUni:Persistent Batched Runtime Primitives for MuJoCo
summary: We present MuJoCoUni, a downstream MuJoCo distribution for online robot learning and batched physics evaluation. Alongside the open-loop batched trajectory generation already provided by upstream mujoco.rollout, MuJoCoUni supplies runtime primitives for stateful environment execution. The target workloads need high-throughput parallel execution while retaining upstream CPU MuJoCo semantics for models, sensors, contact, and constraints. Its core object, BatchEnvPool, is a C++/pybind11 executor that owns per-environment mjModel copies, per-thread mjData workers, and an internal thread pool. It provides final-state-only short stepping, sparse reset, reset-lifecycle domain randomization, batched sensor forward evaluation without advancing dynamics, and batched Jacobian and height-field queries. The implementation is confined to the Python binding layer; MuJoCo's solver, contact model, integrator, and core source tree retain upstream semantics. This report describes the BatchEnvPool API, implementation boundary, relationship to rollout, and the validation and benchmark scripts shipped with the open-source mujoco-uni package, which is installed with \texttt{pip install mujoco-uni}.

AI.tldr: MuJoCoUni是MuJoCo下游分发版，用于在线机器人学习和批量物理评估，主要提供高吞吐量的并行环境执行与相关API。
AI.motivation: MuJoCo原生主要支持单环境/低并发物理仿真，无法高效支持大规模并行和在线机器人学习，对大规模强化学习训练流程有所限制。
AI.method: MuJoCoUni通过BatchEnvPool(C++/pybind11实现)管理每个环境的模型及线程局部数据，采用内部线程池，实现了批量状态步进、稀疏复位、生命周期域随机化、批量传感器正向、Jacobian和高度场查询等。所有实现仅限于Python绑定层，并保持MuJoCo底层语义和行为一致。
AI.result: 提供了一系列API和benchmark脚本，方便用户以高并发吞吐、高度定制的方式在保证官方物理一致性的前提下进行大规模并行仿真。验证表明高效支持并行任务，安装部署便捷。
AI.conclusion: MuJoCoUni极大拓展了MuJoCo面向大规模机器人强化学习等需求的适用性，实现高效并行和增强API，同时保证与上游语义兼容，是对机器人仿真工具生态的重要补充。

title: WideDepth: Millimeter-Accurate Benchmark for Fisheye Depth Estimation
comment: Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2026
summary: Fisheye cameras are increasingly adopted in robotics for near-field manipulation, navigation, and immersive perception, yet indoor depth benchmarks with accurate ground truth are still missing. To address this, we introduce WideDepth - the first indoor dataset for fisheye depth estimation, featuring 101 scenes containing 5K high-resolution stereo pairs labeled with millimeter-level ground truth depth and disparity. Our dataset also includes paired pinhole and fisheye samples across varying fields of view and baselines in both horizontal and vertical stereo setups. We further propose a method to adapt pinhole-trained stereo models to fisheye images and introduce a novel stereo fisheye image generation pipeline based on high-resolution LiDAR scans. Leveraging these methods, we thoroughly evaluate state-of-the-art monocular depth, stereo matching, and depth completion models on our benchmark. Additionally, we provide 18K LiDAR-derived sparse depth training samples, achieving up to a 62% performance boost on fisheye data when fine-tuning pinhole-based stereo models. In summary, the high precision and versatility of our benchmark set a strong foundation for advancing research in fisheye depth estimation and robotics perception. Project page: https://ilyaind.github.io/WideDepth

AI.tldr: 本文提出了WideDepth，这是首个针对鱼眼相机的室内深度估计算法与数据集，包含高精度立体对和真值深度，解决了以往缺少鱼眼真实基准数据的问题，并通过创新方法显著提升了现有模型在鱼眼数据上的性能。
AI.motivation: 鱼眼相机在机器人领域被广泛应用于近距离操作和感知，但目前缺乏具有真实高精度深度标注的室内鱼眼数据集，阻碍了相关算法的评测与进步。
AI.method: 作者构建了WideDepth数据集，包括101个场景、5000组高分辨率鱼眼立体图像对、毫米级精度的深度和视差标注；同时包含针孔相机与鱼眼图像的配对样本，涵盖不同视场和基线。还提出了一种将用针孔图片训练的立体模型迁移到鱼眼图像上的方法，并利用高分辨率LiDAR扫描生成鱼眼立体图像。
AI.result: 实验验证了当前先进的单目深度、立体匹配和深度补全模型在WideDepth基准上的表现。同时数据集还提供了1.8万组稀疏LiDAR深度训练样本，对针孔模型在鱼眼数据上的微调带来了最高62%的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: WideDepth以高精度和多样化的标注为鱼眼深度估计和机器人感知研究提供了坚实基础，为该领域模型开发与评测树立了全新标准。

title: End-to-End Intracortical Speech Decoding from Neural Activity
summary: Current high-performing intracortical speech neuroprostheses achieve low word error rates but typically rely on external language models during inference, increasing memory, computation, and latency. In this work, we investigate whether meaningful character-level decoding is achievable without such models. We propose an end-to-end Conformer-based neural decoder trained directly on intracortical recordings from a participant with amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS). Without any external language model, the system achieves a character error rate (CER) of 23.80\% on held-out validation data. Analysis shows that performance variability is driven by inter-session signal degradation, while dominant errors arise from incorrect word boundary segmentation. These results demonstrate that effective character-level decoding is possible in a fully end-to-end framework, providing a strong neural signal for downstream linguistic processing.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种无需外部语言模型的端到端字符级神经解码器，能够从体内皮层神经信号直接解码字符，对肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）受试者的数据取得了23.8%的字符错误率（CER），表明该方法在完全端到端框架下可实现有效的字符解码。
AI.motivation: 现有的皮层语音神经假体在推理时通常依赖外部语言模型，导致运算和内存开销大、延时增加。作者希望探索在无外部语言模型情况下，是否能实现可用的字符级语音神经解码。
AI.method: 作者提出采用基于Conformer结构的端到端神经解码器，直接从一位ALS受试者的体内皮层记录的数据训练和解码，不借助任何外部语言模型。
AI.result: 该系统在未见过的验证集上达到23.8%的字符错误率。分析发现，性能波动主要来源于多次采集间的信号退化，主要错误类型为单词边界识别错误。
AI.conclusion: 即使不使用外部语言模型，端到端结构仍可实现有效的字符级神经解码，这为后续的语言处理提供强有力的神经信号基础。

title: Dynamic Neural Koopman Distillation for Real-Time Robot Control Using Diffusion Models
summary: Diffusion models excel at generating diverse and multimodal trajectories for robotic planning, yet their iterative denoising process introduces latency that is incompatible with high-frequency closed-loop control. To address this problem, we propose Dynamic Neural Koopman Distillation, a framework that distills multistep diffusion inference into a single forward pass while retaining the multimodal expressivity of the teacher model. Specifically, we introduce a Factorized Dynamic Koopman layer that models the denoising process through a factorized latent transition with state-dependent modal gains. We evaluate the proposed method on standard D4RL MuJoCo locomotion benchmarks and a physical Kinova manipulator, comparing against one-step baselines. The results show that our method significantly outperforms existing one-step distillation approaches on the reported locomotion tasks, and reduces the inference latency to the millisecond regime compared with the teacher policy. Hardware experiments further demonstrate that our method enables smooth and fast closed-loop execution while maintaining task success and comparable accuracy. A project page is available at https://fdkoopman.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种动态神经Koopman蒸馏框架，将扩散模型的多步推理浓缩为单步前馈，显著加快了推理速度，同时保留了多模态特性。该方法在MuJoCo基准测试和真实机器人实验中均显著优于现有方案。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在机器人运动规划中表现优异，但其逐步去噪的推理过程导致推理延迟过高，无法满足高频闭环控制的实时性要求。因此有必要寻找能够既快又保留扩散模型多样性的推理方法。
AI.method: 提出了动态神经Koopman蒸馏（Dynamic Neural Koopman Distillation）框架。核心是引入了因式分解的动态Koopman层，通过状态相关的模态增益，对去噪过程建模，将多步扩散推理过程压缩为单步前馈。
AI.result: 在标准D4RL MuJoCo运动基准和Kinova机械臂实验中，相比于其他一次蒸馏方法，本文方法在推理延迟和任务表现上均大幅优于现有基线，延迟降至毫秒级，而且在实际硬件上也能维持准确性和任务成功率。
AI.conclusion: 动态神经Koopman蒸馏有效解决了扩散模型高延迟的问题，实现了快速且保有多模态能力的闭环控制，对实际机器人规划具有很高的应用价值。

title: D2-V2X: Depth-Driven Cooperative V2X Reasoning for Autonomous Driving
comment: Accepted to the DriveX Workshop at CVPR 2026 (Non-archival)
summary: Single-vehicle Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are fundamentally constrained by sensor occlusions. While Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) systems mitigate this, current benchmarks lack the cooperative reasoning required for resolving ambiguities in complex environments. We introduce D2-V2X, a spatially-aware Question-Rationale-Answer (QRA) benchmark featuring 8,500 triplets derived from multimodal vehicle and infrastructure sensors. We additionally establish a baseline that aligns 3D LiDAR features with the VLM's latent space. By enforcing natural language Chain-of-Thought rationales prior to structured JSON outputs, our model is forced to explicitly articulate spatial relations. Our experiments demonstrate that grounding VLMs in cooperative LiDAR achieves 24.4% recall in identifying occluded hazards compared to near-zero in zero-shot models and reduces spatial estimation error for visible objects by 77% compared to the zero-shot baseline. While the model achieves a functional decision-making F1-score of 53.5, we identify 3D-to-2D projection as a fundamental bottleneck in current VLM architectures, establishing a new baseline for future innovation. Data, code, and trained models available at https://github.com/KevinRichard1/D2-V2X

AI.tldr: 本文提出了D2-V2X数据集和基线模型，用于研究多车协作视觉-语言推理在复杂环境下解决遮挡和空间关系理解的问题。
AI.motivation: 单车视觉-语言模型受制于传感器遮挡，即使V2X系统能部分缓解，但当前缺乏能衡量多车协作推理能力的基准，无法充分评价该场景下的模型性能。
AI.method: 作者构建了含8,500组问题-推理-答案的D2-V2X数据集，数据源涵盖多辆车及基础设施的多模态传感器信息。模型将3D LiDAR特征对齐到VLM表达空间，输出先为自然语言推理再转为结构化JSON。
AI.result: 模型在识别被遮挡危险物体的回召率达到24.4%（零样本几乎为0）；对可见目标空间误差降低了77%；决策F1得分53.5，但3D到2D投影仍是关键瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: D2-V2X为多车协作视觉-语言推理建立了新基线，有效提升了遮挡场景下的推理和空间理解能力。但3D到2D投影限制仍需突破，为后续研究提供了方向。

title: Distinguishing Right from Wrong in Debates: Attribution Analysis of Chinese Harmful Memes
summary: Research on harmful meme detection has garnered significant attention, resulting in the development of numerous datasets and methods. However, progress in detecting Chinese harmful memes lags considerably, primarily due to two challenges: first, accurately assessing a meme's harmfulness depends heavily on understanding deep cultural context; second, many memes are semantically ambiguous, making harmfulness highly subjective. To address these issues, we focus on the interpretable detection of Chinese harmful memes by constructing the first Chinese harmful meme explanation dataset, Ex-ToxiCN-MM. This dataset offers opposing interpretations, categorized as "harmful" and "non-harmful", for each meme, aiming to rigorously evaluate a model's ability to discern and comprehend ambiguous, culturally grounded content. We built a specialized knowledge base of Chinese cultural concepts and offensive vocabulary to supply models with essential prior knowledge (C-HarmKB). To address the ambiguity and lack of background knowledge in meme attribution, we have developed a comprehensive attribution analysis framework, RIKE, which includes an Attribution Knowledge Enhancement module (AKE) and a Relative Intent Reasoning module (RIR). Extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms mainstream baseline models across multiple metrics in the task of attributing harmful memes in Chinese. The code, Ex-ToxiCN-MM dataset, and Chinese Harmful Semantic Knowledge Base (C-HarmKB) involved in this study have been open-sourced at https://github.com/wimiw123/Ex-ToxiCN-MM

AI.tldr: 本论文聚焦于中文有害梗图的可解释检测，通过构建首个中文有害梗图解释数据集，并提出新的分析框架，有效提升了模型对含糊、文化性梗图的判别能力。
AI.motivation: 当前有害梗图检测研究多集中于英文，中文领域进展缓慢。主要挑战包括：1）深刻文化语境的理解难度；2）梗图语义模糊、主观性强。为解决这些问题，作者希望通过可解释性的手段提升中文有害梗图检测能力。
AI.method: 论文构建了Ex-ToxiCN-MM数据集，每个梗图均有“有害”和“无害”对立解释。此外，制作了中文文化与攻击性词汇知识库（C-HarmKB），并提出RIKE归因分析框架，包含归因知识增强（AKE）和相对意图推理（RIR）模块，以帮助模型理解梗图语境与主观含义。
AI.result: 通过大量定量和定性实验，提出的方法在多项指标上明显优于主流基线模型，提升了中文梗图有害归因的准确性和解释性。
AI.conclusion: 本文补足了中文有害梗图研究的空白，首次提供可解释标注数据集和知识库，并提出有效的归因分析方法，为后续相关研究提供了数据和工具基础。

title: Learning High-Frequency Continuous Action Chunks in Latent Space
summary: Modern robotic policies increasingly rely on action chunking to execute complex tasks in the physical world. While action chunking improves temporal consistency at moderate action frequencies, it becomes insufficient when the action frequency is further increased (e.g., to 60~Hz). At such high frequencies, policies often fail to generate actions that are both temporally smooth and spatially consistent. We address this challenge by shifting high-frequency action learning from the action space to a latent space with variational autoencoder (VAE). This formulation significantly improves both temporal and spatial consistency of high-frequency control. To enable smooth real-time execution, we further introduce Reuse-then-Refine, a chunk-level refine strategy that improves continuity between adjacent action chunks under asynchronous inference. As a result, robots controlled by our policy can execute complex contact-rich tasks continuously, with less pauses and jerky motions. Experiments on three real-world contact-rich robotic tasks show that our approach consistently completes tasks with smooth motions. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/tars-robotics/RTR.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出将高频控制的动作学习从动作空间转移到潜在空间，结合VAE与新颖的动作块精细化策略，提高高频机器人控制的时空一致性，实现流畅复杂任务。
AI.motivation: 现有动作分块（action chunking）方法能提升中等频率下的机器人动作一致性，但在更高频率（如60Hz）下，动作常出现不连贯和运动生硬，亟需新的解决方案确保高频控制下的时空协调。
AI.method: 将高频动作学习转换到潜在空间，利用变分自编码器（VAE）编码动作空间，通过编码更容易获得时空一致的动作；并且提出Reuse-then-Refine块级动作重用+精细化策略改善异步推理下动作块的连续性。
AI.result: 在三项真实世界、接触丰富的机器人任务中实验，结果显示所提方法能够一致地以更流畅的运动完成任务，减少停顿与抖动。
AI.conclusion: 用VAE潜在空间进行高频动作学习并结合块级精细优化策略可显著提升机器人复杂任务执行的时空流畅性，对现实高频机器人控制具有重要意义。

title: COSY: Compositional 3DGS Synthesis for Disentangled Human Head Editing
summary: Recent 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) GANs for human heads synthesize and render photorealistic 3D models in real-time and offer a vast variety in identity and appearance. However, controlling specific semantic attributes such as hair color or glasses remains challenging, as edits in the entangled latent space often induce unintended changes in identity or appearance. Although there are several methods that aim to disentangle the latent space post training by estimating directions that only modify certain features, these methods cannot guarantee complete disentanglement and often require pre-trained classifiers. In our approach, we propose a new generator architecture that synthesizes components, such as hair, skin, glasses, and torso, completely independently. This allows for changing the latent vector for one region while keeping the remaining parts fixed. Further, we achieve this separation using only sparse information such as the hair or skin color, eliminating the requirement of segmentation masks or geometric priors, often seen in prior work. To ensure matching shape and lighting conditions during editing, we allow minimal shared information via context tokens between the independent generators. These tokens even allow us to control the shape and light, without any prior annotation. Compared to existing works on GAN-based generation and editing, our method shows better disentanglement, more precise editing control, and competitive visual quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的3DGS GAN生成器架构，可完全独立地合成如头发、皮肤、眼镜和上半身等部件，实现精细且独立的语义属性编辑，且仅需稀疏信息，无需分割掩码或几何先验，结果在属性解耦和编辑控制方面优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有3DGS GANs在人头三维生成与实时渲染上表现优异，但在语义属性（如发色、眼镜等）编辑时，常因潜空间纠缠而引发其他无关属性被意外改变，属性无法完全独立控制。现有依赖于训练后解耦的方向估计和分类器的方法，难以保证高度解耦且依赖预训练资源。
AI.method: 设计了一个新型生成器架构：将头发、皮肤、眼镜、上半身等部件完全独立地生成，编辑单一区域的潜向量时其他区域保持不变。信息分离不依赖分割掩码或几何先验，仅需如发色、肤色等稀疏属性信息。各区域通过少量context token实现形状和光照方面的必要联系，可同时编辑形状与光照条件。
AI.result: 相比现有的GAN生成与编辑方法，提出的方法在属性解耦、编辑精度和视觉质量三方面表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了对3D人头模型各区域语义属性的高度独立可控编辑，减少了训练和应用时对先验和标注的依赖，为3D人像生成与编辑提供了更灵活且精准的技术基础。

title: How Much Structure Do LLMs Need? Evaluating LLMs for Bibliometric Cluster Description
summary: Large language models (LLMs) can support scientific literature synthesis, but remain prone to hallucinated references, uneven coverage, and weakly grounded thematic organization. We evaluate whether bibliometric structure improves LLM-assisted synthesis by comparing six pipelines for generating cluster descriptions under different levels of evidence and structure. Using 100 published bibliometric analyses, we reconstruct Scopus corpora, extract human-written cluster descriptions, and assess outputs by human alignment, semantic coverage, clustering quality, graph quality, and reference grounding. Results show that LLMs produce descriptions semantically close to human-written ones, but are unreliable when asked to infer bibliometric structure from scratch. Performance improves when bibliometric algorithms define the clusters and the LLM interprets them. Overall, LLM-assisted bibliometric synthesis is most promising as a hybrid workflow in which algorithms provide auditable structure and LLMs generate readable descriptions.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了书目结构是否能提升大语言模型（LLM）辅助文献综述的效果，发现将书目聚类算法与LLM结合可获得最佳性能。
AI.motivation: LLM可协助科研文献综合，但存在虚假引用、覆盖不均等问题。本研究探讨利用书目结构提升LLM综述表现的可行性。
AI.method: 比较六种不同证据和结构水平下的聚类描述生成流程，利用100篇已发表书目分析，重建文献语料库，提取人工描述，并通过人类一致性、语义覆盖、聚类质量等多指标评估输出。
AI.result: LLM生成的描述语义上接近人工版本，但若独立推断聚类则表现不佳。当聚类由算法生成、LLM进行解释时，性能有明显提升。
AI.conclusion: 最优方案是算法负责可追溯书目结构，LLM负责生成可读描述，即算法-LLM混合型工作流最具潜力。

title: HumanEgo: Zero-Shot Robot Learning from Minutes of Human Egocentric Videos
summary: Human egocentric video captures rich manipulation demonstrations without any robot hardware, yet transferring these skills to robots remains challenging due to the embodiment gap between human and robot in both visual appearance and kinematics. We present HumanEgo, a framework that bridges the embodiment gap by lifting each human demonstration to an entity-level representation of hand-object interaction, and training a flow matching policy with dense auxiliary objectives that amplify supervision from every trajectory. HumanEgo is robot-data-free, hardware-agnostic, data-efficient, and zero-shot human-to-robot transferable. With only 30 minutes of human videos per task, HumanEgo achieves 92.5% average success across four real-world tasks (75% with just 15 minutes), outperforms matched-time robot teleoperation by 41%, and robustly transfers zero-shot across novel robots, cameras, and environments.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了HumanEgo框架，通过从人体第一视角视频中抽取手-物体交互的实体级表示，实现人类演示到机器人技能迁移。该方法无需机器人硬件数据，可在新任务和新机器人上实现零样本迁移，且性能优越。
AI.motivation: 人类通过第一视角视频进行操作演示极为丰富，但由于人类和机器人的外形和运动学差异，将这些演示直接迁移到机器人上存在困难。作者希望解决人机之间的表征和理解鸿沟。
AI.method: 方法包括：（1）将人类演示提升为手-物体交互的实体级表示；（2）结合密集辅助目标，训练流匹配策略，从所有轨迹中获取更强监督信号。该方案不依赖机器人数据或特定硬件，且数据高效。
AI.result: 在四项真实环境任务中，仅用每项任务30分钟的人类视频，HumanEgo平均成功率达92.5%（仅15分钟视频时为75%），比匹配时长的机器人远程操作提升41%。同时，该方法可在新机器人、新摄像头和新环境下实现鲁棒的零样本迁移。
AI.conclusion: HumanEgo有效消除了人类与机器人之间的表征差异，实现了优越的数据效率和通用性，可极大促进人类示范向机器人技能迁移的发展。

title: ImPartial: Multi-channel Whole-Cell Segmentation using Partial Annotations
summary: Accurate cell segmentation in pathology images typically requires dense pixel-wise annotations, which are costly and time-consuming to obtain. This challenge is especially important for emerging biological imaging modalities and multiplexed datasets with variable channel configurations, where expert-labeled data are scarce. In this work, we introduce ImPartial, a deep learning framework designed to achieve state-of-the-art segmentation performance in low-annotation regimes using sparse scribbles and limited supervision. ImPartial augments the segmentation objective via self-supervised multi-channel quantized imputation. This approach leverages the observation that perfect pixel-wise reconstruction or denoising of the image is not needed for accurate segmentation, and thus, introduces a self-supervised classification objective that better aligns with the overall segmentation goal. We demonstrate that ImPartial achieves performance at par with fully supervised models while requiring substantially fewer annotations. Extensive experiments on benchmark multiplexed cellular imaging and single-plex clinical brightfield immunohistochemistry datasets show consistent improvements over strong baselines with only partial annotations. All benchmark datasets and code are available via our Github: https://github.com/nadeemlab/ImPartial.

AI.tldr: ImPartial是一个能在注释稀缺时取得高效细胞分割性能的深度学习框架，显著减少了对密集标注的需求。
AI.motivation: 现有的细胞分割方法通常依赖于昂贵且耗时的像素级注释，且在新兴生物影像模态及多通道配置数据中，专家标注稀缺问题尤为突出。
AI.method: 提出ImPartial框架，通过自监督多通道量化插补，利用稀疏的涂鸦标注进行训练，采用自监督分类任务代替像素级重建，更贴合分割目标。
AI.result: 在多组真实数据集上，ImPartial仅用部分标注即取得与全监督模型相当的性能，并在基准方法上显著提升表现。
AI.conclusion: ImPartial大幅降低了对丰富像素级标注的依赖，为低注释场景中细胞分割任务带来有效解决方案。

title: Structure-Aware RAG: Structured Retrieval Augmented Generation from Noisy Data for Conversational Agents
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have been widely adopted in conversational applications. However, their reliance on parametric knowledge limits reliability in real-world scenarios that require dynamic or domain-specific information. Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) addresses this limitation by incorporating external knowledge during generation, but existing text-based and graph-based RAG methods often struggle with noisy or irrelevant contexts. In this work, we propose Structure-aware Retrieval Augmented Generation (SA-RAG), which uses tables as an intermediate structured representation to provide a compact and controllable interface that reduces noise while preserving essential information. We introduce a quality-aware table metadata generation framework that models metadata normalization and effectiveness, improving metadata quality and downstream performance. Furthermore, we explore both training-free and training-based table generation methods. Generation validation and direct preference optimization further improve table quality while maintaining semantic and structural consistency. Experiments on two noisy real-world datasets show that SA-RAG significantly outperforms existing RAG baselines. Our code is publicly available at a public repository.

AI.tldr: 论文提出一种结构感知检索增强生成（SA-RAG）方法，通过引入表格作为中间结构，有效提升了大语言模型在复杂场景下的信息检索与生成质量。
AI.motivation: 传统RAG方法处理真实应用中的动态或领域相关知识时，常受到噪声和无关信息的干扰，影响生成结果的可靠性和相关性。解决这一问题，提升LLM能力，成为该研究的动因。
AI.method: 提出SA-RAG方法，利用表格作为中间结构化表示，设计了高质量表格元数据生成框架，包括元数据归一化和有效性建模。探索了无需训练和需要训练的两种表格生成方法，并通过生成验证与偏好优化进一步提升表格质量和一致性。
AI.result: 在两个包含大量噪声的真实世界数据集上，SA-RAG在检索增强生成任务中表现优异，显著优于现有RAG基线。
AI.conclusion: 结构化的表格中间件能有效降低噪声干扰，提升信息浓缩与可控性，增强LLM-RAG系统的效果。

title: ARCANE-PedSynth: Synthetic Multi-Pedestrian Datasets with Behavioural Crossing Annotations
summary: We present ARCANE-PedSynth, an open-source CARLA-based software framework for generating synthetic multi-pedestrian datasets with dense behavioural annotations for pedestrian crossing prediction in autonomous driving. The framework overcomes CARLA's native 9% crossing rate through a hybrid AI-manual pedestrian control architecture, enabling configurable target rates up to 75%. A 12-state behavioural finite state machine with five character archetypes produces diverse crossing behaviours. The framework generates synchronised RGB, LiDAR, and DVS data with per-frame crossing labels, behavioural states, and estimated 2D pose keypoints. We demonstrate ARCANE-PedSynth through PedSynth++, an example dataset generated with the framework, comprising 533 multi-pedestrian clips across 12 weather conditions with RGB, LiDAR, and DVS streams. ARCANE-PedSynth is fully reproducible via CLI parameterisation and Docker containerisation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ARCANE-PedSynth，这是一套基于CARLA的自动驾驶合成多行人数据集生成框架，能产生丰富行为注释的数据，并显著提升模型中的行人过街行为比例。
AI.motivation: 现有CARLA仿真器行人过街行为发生率极低（仅9%），制约了自动驾驶中行人行为预测等研究。需要一种能够大幅提升和灵活控制行人过街行为生成比例，同时提供多维度传感器数据和丰富行为标签的工具。
AI.method: 设计了融合AI与手控的行人控制架构，可配置过街率达75%；利用12状态的行为有限状态机和五类行人角色来生成多样化过街行为。框架可输出同步的RGB、LiDAR和DVS传感器数据，并为每帧标注过街标签、行为状态和2D关键点。此外，支持CLI参数化和Docker封装，方便实验复现。
AI.result: 基于该框架生成了PedSynth++数据集，包括533段多行人视频，覆盖12种天气环境并同步提供RGB、LiDAR及DVS数据流，且含有详细行为注释。框架大幅提升了数据集中行人过街事件比例，并保证了数据的多样性和可复现性。
AI.conclusion: ARCANE-PedSynth为自动驾驶研究者提供了可灵活配置、高复现性、含有多传感器和细致行为注释的合成行人数据框架，有助于提升自动驾驶系统中行人过街预测等任务的数据质量和效果。

title: EchoVQA: Enabling Conversational Assistance for Point-of-Care Cardiac Ultrasound
summary: Point-of-care transthoracic echocardiography (TTE) enables cardiac assessment in virtually any clinical setting, yet its diagnostic utility remains constrained by the expertise required for image acquisition and interpretation. Visual question answering (VQA) offers a promising paradigm for bridging this expertise gap through interactive clinical assistance, but existing echocardiography VQA datasets are limited in scale, restricted to high-quality images, and only cover a few views. We introduce EchoVQA, the first large-scale VQA dataset for echocardiography, comprising 14,299 images and 74,819 question-answer pairs.
