The dataset integrates public sources (EchoNet-Dynamic, CAMUS) with our own point-of-care acquisitions from two handheld probes (Lumify, Clarius), spanning diverse views and including both high-quality and suboptimal images. Uniquely, EchoVQA includes acquisition guidance questions to help users optimize transducer positioning toward a diagnostic apical 4-chamber view for left ventricular ejection fraction estimation -- a challenging task for novice operators in point-of-care settings. We further develop a parameter-efficient method based on multimodal learnable prompts achieving state-of-the-art performance on most benchmarks, including EchoVQA, with significantly less trainable parameters than existing state-of-the-art approaches.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了EchoVQA，这是首个大规模超声心动图视觉问答（VQA）数据集，并开发了一种高效的多模态方法，提升了自动化问答性能。
AI.motivation: 床旁超声心动图（TTE）可在多种临床场景应用，但由于图像获取和解读需要丰富经验，限制了其诊断价值。视觉问答（VQA）能为临床提供智能辅助，缓解经验不足问题。然而，现有的超声VQA数据集规模小、仅包含高质量影像且视图有限，无法满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 研究者构建了EchoVQA数据集，包含14,299张图像和74,819对问答，融合了公开数据和多种便携式手持超声设备采集的临床实际数据，涵盖多样视图及品质参差影像。数据集首创纳入获得诊断性四腔心切面引导问题，尤其帮助新手操作员。作者还提出基于多模态可学习提示的高效参数方法，以更少训练参数达到或超越现有方法的性能。
AI.result: 所提出的数据集大大拓展了VQA在超声领域的适用性，包含更多场景与影像品质。新提出的多模态方法在各项基准测试（包括EchoVQA）上均取得了当前最佳或相当的性能，并且参数规模显著降低。
AI.conclusion: EchoVQA数据集和高效多模态方法为临床超声VQA研究提供了重要基础，有望提升床旁超声应用的智能化水平，特别是在经验有限的操作者和多样化、非理想图像条件下。

title: Side-by-side Comparison Amplifies Dialect Bias in Language Models
comment: In proceeding at ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency 2026
summary: Language models (LMs) can exhibit systematic biases against speakers based on variations in their dialects, even in the absence of a dialect label, a behavior known as covert dialect bias. In this work, we quantify covert dialect bias in online discourse by evaluating how LMs associate stereotypical traits (derived from social psychology research on racial bias) with intent-equivalent tweets in Standard American English (SAE) and African-American Vernacular English (AAVE). While prior work shows that LMs associate more negative stereotypes with AAVE when evaluating tweets in isolation, we are surprised to find that this bias is significantly exacerbated when SAE / AAVE tweet pairs are compared side by side, a setting that more closely reflects high-impact decision making contexts in which models are used to rank candidates. The bias only worsens when dialect labels are explicitly specified. This is striking, given the extensive efforts from commercial developers to mitigate bias in their LMs. Encouragingly, we show that counterfactual fairness finetuning can mitigate covert dialect bias for some stereotypical traits, reducing average disparities when evaluating tweets in isolation, however, these improvements do not consistently hold across traits when evaluating SAE / AAVE tweets side by side. Our findings show that existing evaluation settings for covert dialect bias may underestimate its severity, specifically in contrastive settings. Additionally, overt dialect bias remains pronounced even after safety aligned finetuning, indicating that it remains an unresolved problem, and motivates the need for more robust evaluation and mitigation frameworks.

AI.tldr: 本文研究语言模型在无明显方言标签下，对不同英语方言使用者表现出的隐性方言偏见，并发现在对比环境下偏见更为严重。
AI.motivation: 虽然有大量研究和实际应用试图减少语言模型的偏见，但对隐性方言偏见的系统性量化和模型在真实对比决策场景下的表现尚缺乏深入分析。作者旨在揭示模型对不同方言（如标准美式英语与非裔美式英语）在隐性与显性偏见上的差异，以及目前主流评测方法的局限。
AI.method: 作者基于社交心理学研究，构建具有意图等价的SAE和AAVE推文对，通过让语言模型对这些推文与刻板印象特征的关联进行评估。在对比推文对、明示方言标签和无标签等多种设置下，定量分析模型表达出的偏见程度，并引入反事实公平微调方法进行偏见缓解实验。
AI.result: 结果表明，模型不仅在独立评价推文时对AAVE存在明显负面刻板印象偏见，在对比环境下偏见程度大幅加重，显式标注方言后偏见进一步加剧。反事实公平微调可缓解某些特质上的偏见但无法在对比环境下稳定奏效。安全性微调后仍存较强显性偏见，未得到有效解决。
AI.conclusion: 现有隐性方言偏见评测方式低估了实际应用中的偏见风险，对比测试、显性偏见依然突出。亟需更健全的评估与消减框架，以确保语言模型在多样语言环境下更加公平和安全。

title: Bridging the Gap: Enabling Soft Actor Critic for High Performance Legged Locomotion
summary: Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) has become the de facto standard for training legged robots, thanks to its robustness and scalability in massively parallel simulation environments like IsaacLab. However, its on-policy nature makes it inherently sample-inefficient, preventing its use for continuous adaptation and fine-tuning on real hardware. Soft Actor-Critic (SAC), by contrast, is an off-policy algorithm that can reuse past experience, making it a natural candidate for sim-to-real transfer workflows where the same algorithm can be used both in simulation and for online learning on the real robot. Despite these advantages, SAC has consistently failed to match PPO's empirical performance in massively parallel training settings. This work identifies the root causes of this gap and introduces targeted modifications, covering policy initialization, timeout-aware critic targets, and multi-step return estimation, that enable SAC to train stably at scale. Evaluated across multiple legged robot platforms and diverse locomotion tasks, our approach closes the performance gap with PPO entirely.

AI.tldr: 本文通过对SAC算法的改进，使其在多并行环境下的性能达到甚至超越了PPO，为四足机器人等平台的训练提供了更高效的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 虽然PPO在仿真中表现优异并被广泛采用，但其on-policy特性导致样本利用效率低，难以在真实机器人上实现持续自适应。而SAC本身具备off-policy特性，理论上更适合sim-to-real流程，但在大规模训练中表现始终不及PPO。作者旨在分析SAC表现不佳的根本原因，并提升其性能。
AI.method: 作者对SAC算法进行了针对性改进，包括策略初始化、超时感知的评价目标（timeout-aware critic targets）和多步回报估计（multi-step return estimation）。通过这些设计，使SAC能在大规模并行训练环境下实现稳定高效的学习。
AI.result: 在多个四足机器人平台与多样动作任务上验证后，改进后的SAC稳定收敛，训练表现与PPO持平甚至超越，成功弥补了原有算法在并行仿真环境中的性能劣势。
AI.conclusion: 经有针对性的算法改进，SAC可在大规模仿真下与PPO媲美，为强化学习机器人线上自适应和实际部署提供了更强大的技术选项。

title: Loki: Representation over Architecture for Diffusion-Based Portrait Animation
summary: Portrait animation transfers a driver clip's facial expression and head pose onto a single reference image while preserving the reference's identity. State-of-the-art diffusion systems address this by stacking trained modules for expression, pose, and identity in turn, paying for it in trainable parameters, proprietary corpora, and residual entanglement between the very axes the system is meant to control independently. This complexity compensates for an upstream choice -- learning facial expression and head pose from RGB, a representation in which identity, pose, and expression are inseparable without being learned apart. Loki steps out of RGB on the conditioning path. Driver expression and head pose are encoded by a face model whose parameter axes are identity-orthogonal by construction, then rasterised into a spatial map that the diffusion backbone consumes natively. Identity is routed separately through the diffusion backbone's own pretrained features via lightweight key-value injection. Because the parametric representation factorises identity from expression and pose, cross ID reenactment reduces to a coefficient substitution at inference, requiring no cross ID training data. Loki requires ~43% fewer inference parameters than leading diffusion baselines and trained on 1496x less video samples. We define two metrics that directly measure whether the generated head pose trajectory and facial expression followed the driver's -- the questions portrait animation actually asks; Loki leads or co-leads on both.

AI.tldr: Loki提出了一种高效的肖像动画方法，通过将表情、姿态和身份解耦，显著减少参数量和训练数据需求，并在新指标上表现优越。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需通过训练多个模块独立处理表情、姿态和身份，且这些特征往往在RGB空间难以分离，导致模型复杂度与训练资源消耗过高。
AI.method: Loki在条件路径上不用RGB信号，而是通过人脸参数模型分离地表达身份、表情和头部姿态，这些参数被栅格化后与扩散主干网络原生交互；身份信息则通过轻量方式单独注入扩散主干网络，推理阶段仅需要参数替换即可完成跨身份动画，无需额外跨ID训练。
AI.result: 与主流扩散基线方法相比，Loki推理参数量减少约43%，训练所需视频样本量减少1496倍。在新提出的两个直接评测表情和姿态跟随度的指标下，Loki达到或领先同类方法。
AI.conclusion: Loki以更低的参数和数据成本，实现了高效、解耦的肖像动画迁移，直接解决了表情与姿态可控性的核心问题，在评测指标上表现突出，具有实际应用价值。

title: SEAL: Synergistic Co-Evolution of Agents and Learning Environments
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) agents are increasingly improved through interaction, yet most self-evolution methods adapt either the policy or the learning environment in isolation. We identify this structural gap as \emph{Agent-Environment Misalignment}: the agent's capability frontier changes during training, while the environment that provides supervision remains static or only weakly coupled to the agent's revealed failures. We propose SEAL, a closed-loop co-evolution framework for interactive tool-use agents. SEAL collects on-policy trajectories under executable verification, diagnoses failed rollouts into turn-level failure labels, and uses these diagnoses as a shared signal for both environment-side adaptation and model-side policy optimization. The environment evolves its training-time learning interface by exposing clearer tool affordance cues, constraint information, and recovery-oriented feedback, while the policy is updated with diagnosis-guided advantage reweighting. Extensive experiments across in-distribution and out-of-distribution multi-turn tool-use evaluations show that SEAL improves low-resource agent learning: with only 400 training samples, it yields +8.25 to +26.25 average-point gains across three backbones and exhibits positive out-of-distribution transfer. These results demonstrate the value of jointly adapting the learner and its training-time learning substrate for robust self-improving LLM agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SEAL的闭环协同进化框架，实现了大型语言模型(LLM)代理人与其学习环境的联合自我进化，显著提升了多轮工具使用任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM自我进化方法大多仅关注于模型策略或环境的单独优化，忽视了模型能力提升与静态或弱耦合环境之间的不匹配（即 'Agent-Environment Misalignment'），导致提升受限。
AI.method: SEAL框架通过收集带可执行验证的在策略轨迹，诊断失败案例并打上标签。用这些诊断信息既引导环境接口的改进——如更优的工具指示、约束反馈及恢复提示，又指导模型策略的优势再加权更新，实现环境侧和模型侧的协同优化。
AI.result: 在分布内和分布外的多轮工具使用测试中，SEAL即便只用400个训练样本，也在三种不同模型上带来+8.25至+26.25点的平均性能提升，并展现了良好的分布外泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: SEAL通过联合优化学习者与训练环境，突破了仅优化单方时的局限，为构建更健壮、能自我提升的LLM工具使用智能体提供了新思路和实证支持。

title: Loosely Coupled Factor Graph Optimization for Pseudolite-Augmented Navigation
summary: In Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS)-degraded environments, pseudolites (PLs) provide additional signal sources to enhance positioning performance, but their integration in optimization-based frameworks remains limited. This paper presents a loosely coupled factor graph optimization (FGO) framework that fuses the GNSS/PL least-squares (LS) solutions with inertial measurement unit (IMU) data. The evaluation considers low GNSS visibility scenarios with four high-elevation GNSS satellites and up to two PL transmitters over an 80~s window. FGO achieves a 22.8\% to 41.3\% reduction in mean 3D error compared to standard LS methods. Compared to a GNSS-IMU baseline, incorporating PL transmitters further improves positioning accuracy, with performance depending on geometry.

AI.tldr: 该文提出一种将伪卫星(PL)与GNSS和IMU数据融合的松耦合因子图优化(FGO)定位框架，并显著提升了GNSS受限环境下的定位精度。
AI.motivation: 在GNSS信号弱或不可用的环境中，定位精度大幅下降。伪卫星能够提供额外信号增强定位能力，但其与优化算法的深度融合研究较少。
AI.method: 采用松耦合因子图优化(FGO)方法，将GNSS/PL的最小二乘解与IMU数据进行融合。实验场景包括仅有4颗高仰角GNSS卫星和最多2个PL发射机，持续80秒。
AI.result: FGO方法相比标准最小二乘法，在3D均值误差上提升22.8%至41.3%。进一步，结合PL发射机，在GNSS-IMU融合基础上继续提升定位精度，且提升幅度取决于信号几何结构。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在GNSS受限环境下实现了定位精度显著提升，为PL与惯导系统在优化框架中的深度集成提供了有效途径。

title: Single View Seafloor Recovery from Imaging Sonar via Differentiable Rendering
summary:
Sonar is often the only modality suitable for high-resolution imaging underwater due to light attenuation and turbidity. Forward-looking imaging sonar provides measurements over range and horizontal angle but collapses vertical structure into a flat image, creating ambiguities that make 3D recovery challenging. A common use case for imaging sonar is underwater terrain mapping (bathymetry), yet current methods require many views, expensive multi-sensor setups, or significant training data, which limits use and adaptability to new environments.
  We present a training-free method that recovers bathymetry from a single sonar image in under 30 seconds via differentiable rendering, conditioned on a known seafloor tilt. To our knowledge, this is the first differentiable rendering approach for single-view height recovery in sonar. Our method implements differentiable sonar ray tracing and optimizes an explicit height field to reproduce the target image. On synthetic datasets, our approach outperforms a supervised CNN under distribution shift and remains close on rough terrain, while the CNN wins in-distribution. By modeling physically grounded priors of the sonar process, our method adapts across sensor configurations and environments without training data.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种无须训练、能在30秒内从单幅声呐图像恢复海底地形的可微渲染方法。
AI.motivation: 传统声呐地形测绘方法依赖多视角、昂贵传感器或大量训练数据，难以适应新环境且应用受限。单幅成像下的3D地形恢复充满挑战。
AI.method: 作者提出基于已知海底倾斜条件，利用可微声呐光线追踪，优化高度场以拟合目标声呐图像，实现训练自由、单图像高程恢复。首次将可微渲染应用于声呐单视角地形恢复。
AI.result: 在合成数据集测试中，该方法在分布外情况超越了有监督CNN，在复杂地形时接近CNN效果；而CNN在自身分布内表现更佳。
AI.conclusion: 通过物理驱动先验与可微渲染，该方法无需训练数据即可适配不同声呐配置与环境，为单图声呐地形恢复提供了新思路。

title: Found in Conversation: LLMs Teach Themselves to Close the Multi-Turn Gap
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) interactions are typically underspecified, with users clarifying all necessary details across multiple conversational turns. Yet recent work shows that LLMs perform far worse in this multi-turn setting than in a single turn with same information being available at once, a phenomenon termed "Lost-in-Conversation." However, bridging this gap effectively remains an open problem. Here we introduce Found in Conversation (FiC), a training framework where a model teaches itself to find and recover its single-turn competence given underspecified multi-turn prompts. We develop View-Asymmetric Self-Distillation, which distills across two views of the same task information--single-turn view for the teacher, multi-turn view for the student--transferring strong single-turn behavior into weak multi-turn behavior. This requires no stronger external teacher, which is unavailable as even frontier LLMs exhibit this gap. Across model families (Llama, Qwen, Phi, and OLMo) and sizes (3B-14B), FiC recovers at least 92% of single-turn performance and reaches 100% on two Llama backbones, yielding more efficient and helpful multi-turn conversations with single-turn capabilities intact.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为“Found in Conversation (FiC)”的训练框架，有效解决大语言模型在多轮对话中表现下降的问题，通过新颖的自蒸馏方法大幅提升多轮对话表现，接近或达到单轮对话水平。
AI.motivation: 现实中大模型与用户互动往往信息不全、需要多轮澄清，但现有模型在这类多轮对话场景下表现远比单轮差，严重影响应用体验，因此亟需提升其多轮对话表现。
AI.method: 提出View-Asymmetric Self-Distillation自蒸馏方法：让模型用其单轮能力作为教师引导其多轮能力作为学生，无需外部更强教师。具体地，对同一任务用单轮（teacher）和多轮（student）两种view进行知识转移，从而使多轮对话能力接近单轮表现。
AI.result: 在Llama、Qwen、Phi、OLMo等不同模型家族与规模（3B-14B）上实验，FiC训练框架至少恢复了92%的单轮对话性能，部分模型（Llama 2种）恢复到100%，显著提升多轮对话有效性和效率。
AI.conclusion: FiC框架无需更强外部教师、通用适配多种模型，可大幅缩小多轮对话与单轮表现的差距，为提升大模型实际对话体验提供了高效方案。

title: Learning, locomotion, and navigation of soft synthetic snakes in three-dimensional, heterogeneous environments
summary: Limbless terrestrial animals exhibit exceptional locomotor versatility and control, currently unmatched by engineered counterparts. Here, we introduce a computational framework that enables soft synthetic snakes to navigate unstructured, heterogeneous 3D terrains. Our approach is grounded in bio-inspired actuation and sensing models that reduce the control complexity inherent to high-degree-of-freedom, continuum bodies. These models are integrated into a reinforcement learning architecture to derive environment-traversing policies. Training first occurs in simplified, homogeneous terrains to learn locomotion primitives. These are then composed into adaptive strategies for complex landscapes. We demonstrate robustness by deploying a snake in high-fidelity 3D environments reconstructed from real-world imaging, achieving reliable navigation. Overall, this work provides a physically-realistic simulation platform and practical insights for the control of continuum systems in natural terrains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于计算框架的仿生软体蛇，实现了在复杂异构3D地形中的灵活导航。
AI.motivation: 人工仿生机器人在地形适应和运动控制上远不如自然的无肢动物。研究动机在于开发能适应复杂自然环境的高运动自由度软体机器人，并解决其控制难题。
AI.method: 采用仿生驱动及感知模型，简化连续体机器人的运动控制复杂度，并结合强化学习框架。先在简化同质地形中学会基本运动，再组合成面对复杂环境的自适应策略。使用高保真实世界3D环境进行验证。
AI.result: 仿生软体蛇在训练后，能在重建自真实影像的复杂地形中实现可靠、自适应的运动导航，表现出较强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 本工作提供了一个物理真实的仿真平台，并为连续体系统在自然地形中的控制提供了实用见解，对后续软体机器人研究具有参考价值。

title: Radiuma: A Unified Zero-Code Executable Graphical Workflow Generator for Reproducible and Shareable Medical Image Analysis and Machine Learning
summary: Medical image computing software is essential for identifying imaging biomarkers that can support diagnosis, prognosis, treatment planning, and clinical research. However, the lack of standardized, user-friendly, and reproducible software environments has limited the broader adoption of advanced medical image analysis workflows. We present Radiuma, a freely available modular platform designed to support reliable and reproducible medical image analysis across multiple modalities and file formats. Radiuma integrates image reading, visualization, registration, fusion, processing, segmentation, radiomics feature extraction, and machine learning modules for classification, regression, and clustering. Its modular design allows users to execute each component independently or connect modules through a visual workflow system, where the output of one step can be graphically passed to the next. This enables the creation of custom, executable, and reproducible multi-step pipelines without requiring extensive programming expertise. Results from each module can be inspected directly in the visualization window, providing immediate feedback on processing quality and workflow accuracy. Radiuma also supports saving and sharing customized workflows, promoting transparency, reusability, and consistency across collaborative studies. By combining flexibility, usability, and standardized analysis tools, Radiuma provides a practical environment for radiomics and machine learning research in clinical and translational settings. The platform is designed to be accessible to users with diverse expertise, including radiologists, physicists, clinicians, and data scientists.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Radiuma，一种用于医学影像分析的模块化软件平台，便捷整合多种分析工具，简化并标准化医学影像计算流程。
AI.motivation: 现有医学影像分析工具缺乏标准化、用户友好和可复现的环境，严重限制高级医学影像分析工作的更广泛应用。因此需要一个更可靠且易用的解决方案。
AI.method: 作者开发了Radiuma平台，集成了图像读取、可视化、配准、融合、处理、分割、放射组学特征提取以及分类、回归、聚类等机器学习模块。通过模块化和可视化流程系统，用户可组合自定义多步分析流程，并可实时查看每步结果。同时支持流程保存和共享。
AI.result: Radiuma平台实现了多种影像分析功能的可视化、模块化和可复现操作，用户无需编程即可搭建复杂流程，并可以方便地进行结果检查和流程共享。
AI.conclusion: Radiuma兼具灵活性、易用性和标准化，适用于临床和转化研究中的放射组学及机器学习应用，能被不同专业背景的用户广泛采纳和使用。

title: Phonetic Modeling of Dialectal Variation in Vietnamese Speech
summary: Vietnamese exhibits substantial dialectal phonetic variation across Northern, Central, and Southern regions, where identical lexical items may be realized with markedly different pronunciations. Such variation poses challenges for automatic speech recognition (ASR) and remains difficult to model computationally due to the complex relationship between Vietnamese orthography and phonology. Existing approaches typically address dialect variability at the word level, assuming dialect-invariant mappings between spelling and pronunciation, which limits their ability to capture systematic phonetic differences. We propose a dialect-aware phonetic framework that explicitly models Vietnamese phonological structure and dialectal variation at both the vocabulary and decoding levels. The framework introduces a phonetic vocabulary that decomposes each syllable into structured phonetic components and maps them to dialect-specific IPA representations, together with a phonetic-structure decoder that jointly predicts these components. Experiments on the UIT-ViMD, a only-available dataset for multi-dialect in Vietnamese, show that the proposed approach outperforms various pre-trained baselines, \textbf{especially matches the performance of the strongest pretrained wav2ve2-base-vi-250h} across dialects while \textbf{using substantially fewer parameters and no external pretraining}. Code for experimental reproducibility will be publicly available upon the acceptance of this paper.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向越南语方言的音系建模框架，在词汇和解码层面显式建模方言差异，大幅提升了多方言越南语自动语音识别（ASR）的准确性，且模型更小、无需预训练。
AI.motivation: 越南语在不同地区（北、中、南）有显著的方言语音差异，相同词汇的发音可能不同，导致ASR系统难以准确识别，尤其是现有方法多在词层面处理，忽视了方言间拼写到发音的系统性差异。
AI.method: 提出了基于音系结构的方言感知建模框架：将每个音节分解为结构化音系成分，用于方言特定的IPA表示，并联合预测这些成分，同时在词汇和解码层面建模方言变体。实验基于UIT-ViMD越南语多方言数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多方言识别任务上优于各种预训练基线模型，并且在参数量远小、无外部预训练条件下，性能可达到当前最佳wav2vec2-base-vi-250h模型水平。
AI.conclusion: 本方法能够有效捕捉越南语多方言的系统性语音差异，提升了ASR的跨方言泛化能力，有望为方言丰富语言的ASR系统开发提供新思路。

title: Stiffness Optimization for Concentrated Bending in Magnetically Actuated Catheters: Maintaining Steerability under Gradient Stiffness
summary: Achieving both efficient pushability (propulsion transmission) and proximally concentrated bending for steerability is challenging for magnetically actuated soft catheters: higher axial/bending stiffness improves force transmission but reduces steerability, whereas lower stiffness enables large, proximally concentrated bending yet increases kinking/buckling risk under compressive push loads. To address this trade-off, we propose a stiffness-optimized multi-segment magnetically actuated catheter (SO-MAC) that integrates a decoupled steering-advancement mechanism with a gradient-stiffness architecture. The SO-MAC concentrates bending about a stable proximal pivot during advancement while the distal section passively self-straightens to transmit propulsion, aided by the optimized stiffness distribution and elastic recovery of the spring backbone against friction-induced kinking/buckling. Over $0{-}180^{\circ}$ combined steering and advancement, the pivot remained stable and the distal tip advanced near-straight toward the target direction. A 1.5 mm-diameter SO-MAC achieved up to $180^{\circ}$ steering with a 3 mm bending radius at its 10 mm tip, with an average shape error of $1.39 \pm 0.56$ mm and a steering-pivot error of $0.35 \pm 0.10$ mm. Visual feedback control in a bronchial phantom further confirmed robust navigation through highly curved, bifurcating paths.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型磁驱动软导管（SO-MAC），通过多段梯度刚度结构，实现了高效推进力传递与近端集中弯曲双优性能，解决了导管推力与可控性间的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 磁驱动软导管在医疗领域（如血管、支气管等微创操作）需求日益增加。传统导管在刚度与可控性之间难以兼得：刚度高则推力好但不易控制，刚度低则易弯曲但容易失稳。如何兼顾两者成迫切难题。
AI.method: 设计了一种多段梯度刚度结构，并将推进与弯曲控制解耦，实现近端稳定枢轴弯曲，远端自我伸直以优化力传递。采用弹簧骨架和优化刚度分布，有效减轻因摩擦导致的屈曲和折叠。
AI.result: 1.5毫米直径SO-MAC导管实现了最大180°转向，10毫米导管端部弯曲半径仅为3毫米，平均形状误差1.39±0.56毫米，枢轴误差0.35±0.10毫米。体外模型实验显示在复杂分叉路径中可稳健导航。
AI.conclusion: SO-MAC导管兼顾了推进效率与高可控性，弥补了传统磁驱动软导管的短板，为临床微创导航操作提供了更优方案。

title: GIBLy: Improving 3D Semantic Segmentation through an Architecture-Agnostic Lightweight Geometric Inductive Bias Layer
summary: In 3D scene understanding, deep learning models rely on large models and extensive training to capture basic geometric structures that are present in the 3D data. However, existing methods lack explicit mechanisms to incorporate geometric information, such as learnable primitive shapes, often necessitating large models and more training data which in turn increases cost and can limit generalization. We introduce GIBLy, a lightweight geometric inductive bias layer that integrates learnable geometric priors into 3D segmentation pipelines. GIBLy enhances existing architectures -- whether MLP-based, convolution-based, or transformer-based -- by providing features aligned with simple geometric shapes (and thus human-interpretable) that improve segmentation performance with minimal computational overhead. We validate our approach across multiple 3D semantic segmentation benchmarks, demonstrating consistent performance gains, including up to +11.5% mIoU on TS40K with PTV3, while adding only 58K extra parameters. Our results highlight the benefit of explicitly encoding geometric structure to support accurate and efficient 3D scene understanding, with a lightweight add-on layer

AI.tldr: GIBLy是一种轻量级的几何归纳偏置层，可以集成到现有的3D分割神经网络中，通过显式嵌入可学习的几何先验提升性能，且参数增加极少。
AI.motivation: 现有的3D场景理解深度学习模型需要庞大模型和大量训练数据，并且缺乏将几何信息（如原始几何形状）显式整合到模型中的机制，导致高成本及泛化能力受限。
AI.method: 提出GIBLy，一个轻量级可学习几何归纳偏置层，可无缝集成到MLP、CNN或transformer等3D分割架构中，通过提供与简单几何形状对齐的特征，提高分割性能且计算开销极小。
AI.result: 在多个3D语义分割基准（如TS40K）上取得一致性性能提升。以PTV3为例，mIoU提升达11.5%，仅增加58K参数。
AI.conclusion: 结果证明显式编码几何结构可以显著提升3D场景理解的精度和效率，GIBLy作为轻量插件具有实际应用价值。

title: Temporal Concept Drift in Legal Judgment Prediction: Neural Baselines Across Three Epochs of Ukrainian Court Decisions
summary: Legal NLP benchmarks evaluate models on randomly split data, implicitly assuming that legal language is stationary. We test this assumption by fine-tuning four transformer encoders -- XLM-RoBERTa (base and large) and their legal-domain variants -- on Ukrainian court decisions from three temporal epochs defined by geopolitical disruptions: pre-war (2008-2013), hybrid war (2014-2021), and full-scale invasion (2022-2026). Each model is trained on one epoch and evaluated on all three, producing a 3x3 cross-temporal generalization matrix. Four findings emerge. (1) Forward degradation is severe: models trained on pre-war data lose up to 27.2 percentage points of macro-F1 when applied to full-scale invasion era decisions. (2) The degradation is asymmetric: backward transfer (full-scale to pre-war) is substantially more robust than forward transfer, consistent with the hypothesis that legal language is additive. (3) Legal-domain pretraining (Legal-XLM-R) does not improve absolute performance but reduces forward degradation magnitude and asymmetry. (4) Chronological continual learning eliminates catastrophic forgetting for general XLM-R: pre-war knowledge is fully retained (+1.8 to +6.2 pp) while full-scale performance gains +16.5 to +19.0 pp; reverse-chronological training causes severe forgetting. Cross-jurisdictional pretraining on Swiss Judgment Prediction data improves absolute performance but does not reduce temporal degradation magnitude, confirming that temporal drift is an intrinsic property of legal language evolution. The dataset (428K decisions across three epochs) is publicly available as a LEXTREME contribution.

AI.tldr: 本文针对法律自然语言处理（NLP）领域，首次系统性地探究了法律语言在不同历史时期（乌克兰法院裁决跨三个地缘政治阶段）下的时序漂移现象及对模型泛化能力的影响，揭示了现有基准评测方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 当前法律NLP基准普遍假设法律文本语言在时间上是固定不变的，忽略了实际中的法律语言在重大社会、政治变革期间会发生显著变化。作者希望检验这一假设，对模型的时序泛化能力和预训练策略在应对时序漂移上的有效性进行评估。
AI.method: 选取四种Transformer编码器（XLM-RoBERTa及其法律领域变体），基于乌克兰法院决策数据，分别在三个时代段（战前、混合战争、全面入侵）上进行训练，并跨所有时代段测试，形成3x3跨时序泛化矩阵。同时，系统评估法律领域预训练、按时间顺序的持续学习和跨法域预训练等策略对时序泛化能力的影响。
AI.result: （1）前向漂移退化显著，战前模型迁移至全面入侵时代表现下降至27.2%。（2）退化具有不对称性，后向转移较为稳健，符合法律语言“加性”假说。（3）法律领域模型可缓解时序退化和不对称性，但无法提升绝对性能。（4）按时间顺序持续学习能消除遗忘问题并显著提升模型表现；逆时间序训练则造成严重遗忘。跨国家法域预训练可提升整体效果，但无法抑制时序退化，印证了法律语言演化的固有时序漂移属性。
AI.conclusion: 法律语言在时间上并不稳定，传统NLP基准忽视了法律文本的时序漂移问题。应对这一问题需采用时间敏感的评估和训练方法。持续学习能够缓解遗忘和提升泛化能力。该领域相关数据已公开，为后续研究奠定基础。

title: Convex-Neural RRT*: Fast and Reliable Learning-Guided Sampling for High-Quality Robot Path Planning
summary: Sampling-based algorithms for robot path planning offer probabilistic completeness and strong empirical convergence properties across environments with diverse obstacle configurations. However, in practice, these methods often require many iterations to obtain high-quality solutions. This paper proposes Convex-Neural RRT*, an enhanced RRT* variant that incorporates neural guidance to predict informative waypoint regions near high-quality paths. Convex candidate regions are extracted from these predictions, enabling the planner to concentrate exploration on geometrically relevant areas while preserving global exploration. The proposed algorithm is evaluated against Neural RRT*, Neural Informed RRT*, classical RRT*, and LTA* across three environment types and 18 benchmark maps. Experimental results show that Convex-Neural RRT* reduces computation time by 30-75% compared to neural-guided variants and up to 88-98% relative to LTA*, while achieving an average path length reduction of approximately 5% compared to classical RRT*, with larger improvements observed in complex environments. The method also maintains an overall success rate above 99% across varying obstacle densities. These findings indicate that convex-guided neural sampling provides an effective balance between computational efficiency and solution quality, supporting its applicability to time-sensitive robotic navigation tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合神经网络引导和凸区域采样的新型RRT*算法（Convex-Neural RRT*），显著提升采样效率和路径质量，适用于复杂障碍环境下的机器人路径规划。
AI.motivation: 采样型路径规划方法如RRT*虽然理论上完整，但实际获得高质量路径往往需要大量采样，效率低。提升收敛效率和路径质量，是应对复杂障碍环境和实时场景的关键。
AI.method: 算法利用神经网络预测高质量路径附近的关键路点区域，并从中提取凸候选采样区，引导RRT*在几何上更相关的位置采样，同时保留全局探索能力。与多种经典及神经引导方法在三类环境、18组地图上对比实验。
AI.result: Convex-Neural RRT*计算时间较现有神经引导方法减少30-75%，相比LTA*减少88-98%；相较经典RRT*路径更短（约5%），在复杂环境提升更大，且整体成功率超99%。
AI.conclusion: 结合神经采样预测与凸区域引导，兼顾采样效率与路径质量，可有效支持对时效性要求高的机器人导航任务。

title: CRISP -- Clustering-Based Redundancy-Reduced Instance Sampling for Pathology Case Representation and Retrieval
summary: Digital pathology archives increasingly contain multiple whole-slide images (WSIs) per case, capturing spatially distinct tumour regions and reflecting intrinsic morphological heterogeneity. However, most existing approaches rely on a single pathologist-selected slide, thereby discarding potentially informative evidence distributed across the remaining WSIs. To date, no autonomous framework has been proposed for comprehensive multi-WSI case processing. Here, we present an unsupervised framework for case-level analysis that integrates information from all available slides within a case. Rather than relying on a single designated slide, the proposed approach constructs case-level representations by selectively distilling informative patches across WSIs. We introduce Clustering-Based Redundancy-Reduced Instance Sampling for Pathology (CRISP), a two-stage framework that first reduces redundancy within individual WSIs and subsequently applies clustering-based sampling to select a compact yet representative set of patches for the entire case. The resulting patch set captures case-level heterogeneity while avoiding exhaustive processing of gigapixel images, and directly serves as a retrieval index. Using two Mayo Clinic breast cancer datasets for diagnosis and treatment planning, we demonstrate that CRISP consistently matches or surpasses the current standard practice of combined model and pathologist slide selection for patient/case search and retrieval. By automating case-level processing and eliminating subjective WSI selection, CRISP potentially enables the exploitation of clinically relevant information distributed across multiple WSIs that is currently overlooked.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CRISP，一种无监督、降低冗余的多全景切片（WSI）病例级处理框架，通过优化补丁抽样实现WSI间信息整合，显著提升病例搜索和检索性能。
AI.motivation: 当前数字病理存档常包含多个WSI，反映肿瘤形态异质性，但传统方法仅依赖单一专家选择切片，导致信息丢失，无法全面利用病例包含的所有切片信息。
AI.method: 提出CRISP框架，包括两步：1）在单个WSI内降冗余，2）在病例级通过聚类抽样选出具代表性的补丁集，实现信息浓缩和避免处理大量像素。该补丁集可直接用作病例检索索引。
AI.result: 在Mayo Clinic乳腺癌诊断与治疗计划数据集上，CRISP在患者/病例搜索与检索任务表现与现有专家-模型联合方法持平甚至更优。
AI.conclusion: CRISP框架自动实现病例级信息整合，去除主观切片选择，充分利用多WSI内分布的重要临床信息，推动数字病理分析智能化和实用性提升。

title: Decompose-and-Refine: Structured Legal Question Answering with Parametric Retrieval
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown strong performance in the legal domain, demonstrating notable potential in Legal Question Answering (LQA). However, unlike general QA, LQA requires answers that are not only accurate but also rigorously grounded in explicit legal authority. In statutory LQA, many questions require multi-hop reasoning across multiple legal issues, substantially increasing the risk of hallucination, thereby making accurate retrieval of supporting statutory provisions a critical prerequisite. Despite recent progress in multi-hop QA, existing approaches often rely on reasoning in natural language or retrieval without explicit query reformulation, leaving the vocabulary gap between user questions and statutory text largely unaddressed. To address this challenge, we propose Decompose-and-Refine (DaR), a statute-grounded LQA framework that tightly integrates step-wise question decomposition with parametric knowledge-based query refinement. DaR progressively decomposes a complex legal question into atomic sub-questions and generates statute-aligned parametric queries for each sub-question, enabling the selection of a single most central statutory provision corresponding to each legal issue. We evaluate DaR on KoBLEX, a Korean multi-hop LQA benchmark grounded in statutory law, using Qwen3-32B and Gemma3-27B. Experimental results demonstrate that DaR consistently improves both retrieval accuracy and final answer quality over existing approaches. Moreover, by explicitly separating sub-questions and their corresponding statutory provisions, DaR facilitates transparent, issue-level verification of complex legal reasoning processes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Decompose-and-Refine (DaR)的新型法律问答（LQA）框架，能有效提升多跳法律检索与推理的准确性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有大型语言模型虽在法律问答中表现良好，但在多跳推理和法条检索方面，存在‘词汇鸿沟’和幻觉等问题，导致答案不够精确、无法严密依托权威法条。论文旨在解决多步法律推理中检索和答案依据准确性不足的难题。
AI.method: DaR框架通过逐步分解复杂法律问题为子问题，并针对每个子问题生成与法条文本高度对齐的检索查询，对应选出最核心的法条条款。采用Qwen3-32B和Gemma3-27B模型，在Korean多跳LQA数据集KoBLEX上进行实验评测。
AI.result: 实验表明，DaR在法条检索准确率和最终答案质量这两方面，均显著优于现有方法。此外，DaR能明确划分子问题与相应法条，有助于复杂法律推理的透明性和逐步验证。
AI.conclusion: DaR框架提升了法律问答场景中多跳推理的准确性与可解释性，并为复杂法律推理提供更透明、精细的过程支持，具有良好的应用前景。

title: Performance Comparison of Classical and Neural Sampling Algorithms for Robotic Navigation
summary: Integrating artificial intelligence (AI) into sampling-based motion planning provides new possibilities for improving autonomous navigation efficiency. In this paper, three algorithms, namely RRT*, Neural RRT*, and Neural Informed RRT*, are implemented and evaluated on environments containing convex and concave obstacles with different obstacle densities. The obtained results indicate that neural-guided planners improve path quality, producing up to 14\% shorter paths and 55--75\% smoother trajectories compared with the conventional RRT* algorithm. Among the evaluated methods, Neural Informed RRT* achieves the best overall performance in terms of path length and trajectory smoothness. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of AI-guided sampling strategies for improving reliability and trajectory efficiency in robotic and UAV navigation, despite a slight increase in computation time. Overall, the study highlights the growing importance of artificial intelligence in real-time robotic path planning applications.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了传统RRT*与AI引导的Neural RRT*和Neural Informed RRT*三种路径规划算法，发现引入人工智能可显著优化自主导航路径质量。
AI.motivation: 提高自主机器人和无人机在复杂环境中的路径规划效率和可靠性。传统采样路径规划方法在路径质量和实时性上存在不足，AI有潜力加以改进。
AI.method: 分别实现并比较了三种算法：RRT*、Neural RRT*和Neural Informed RRT*，在包含凸形和凹形障碍物、不同障碍物密度的环境中进行实验评估。
AI.result: AI引导的两种规划器生成的路径比传统RRT*短14%、轨迹平滑度提升55%-75%，其中Neural Informed RRT*在路径长度和轨迹平滑度方面表现最佳。计算时间略有增加。
AI.conclusion: AI引导的采样路径规划策略显著提升了机器人和无人机在复杂环境中的导航可靠性和效率，彰显了人工智能在实时路径规划中的重要作用。

title: Plume Segmentation from MethaneSAT with Cross-Sensor Transfer Learning and Physics-Informed Postprocessing
summary: Automated detection and masking of individual methane plumes from satellite imagery is important for operational emission attribution and quantification. We present a machine learning framework for plume detection from MethaneSAT retrieved column-averaged dry-air mole fractions of methane. We address two core challenges: the scarcity of labeled MethaneSAT data and the need for inference reliability across diverse atmospheric and surface conditions. We first demonstrate that Mask R-CNN with a ResNet-50 backbone outperforms U-Net semantic segmentation on both MethaneAIR (an airborne version of MethaneSAT) and MethaneSAT data, with pixel-level F1 score gains of 10.49 and 5.48 respectively. To address MethaneSAT data scarcity, we evaluate three cross-sensor transfer strategies leveraging MethaneAIR flights and synthetic plumes. Mask R-CNN with ResNet-50 fine-tuned from MethaneAIR pre-trained weights is the most effective strategy, achieving instance-level precision of 0.60 and a near-perfect recall of 0.98 at the baseline operating point. A physics-informed post-processing pipeline converts detections into two operationally distinct modes. The first is a high-sensitivity mode that applies morphological filtering and proximity-based merging for comprehensive emission screening, achieving precision of 0.71 and recall of 0.94. The second is a high-precision mode that additionally applies a distribution-based classifier for confident source attribution, achieving precision of 0.92 and recall of 0.70. Manual review of detections classified as false positives against our wavelet-based ground truth labels reveals that a meaningful fraction of cases correspond to real methane enhancements excluded by conservative labeling criteria, indicating that precision values reported are lower bounds on true detection performance... Our data and code are available at: https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/FR959H

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用机器学习方法从MethaneSAT卫星影像中自动检测甲烷羽流的新框架，结合物理分析，对甲烷排放进行有效归因和定量分析，并公开了相关数据和代码。
AI.motivation: MethaneSAT等卫星获取的甲烷羽流数据对排放源归因和监测具有重要意义，但当前主要面临标注数据稀缺和算法需要在各种复杂环境条件下具备高可靠性的挑战。
AI.method: 作者使用Mask R-CNN（ResNet50骨干网络）对甲烷羽流进行实例分割，与U-Net语义分割方法对比，前者表现更优。为解决数据稀缺，提出跨传感器转移策略（利用MethaneAIR和合成羽流数据），并通过微调提升检测能力。后续还设计了物理约束的后处理流程，实现高敏感度和高精度两种操作模式，以适应不同的应用需求。
AI.result: Mask R-CNN（ResNet50）微调策略效果最佳，在MethaneSAT上获得了0.60的实例级精度和0.98的召回。高敏感度模式下达到0.71精度和0.94召回；高精度模式下达到0.92精度和0.70召回。手工复查部分被判为假阳性的检测，发现实际上不少是真实甲烷增强，表明实际精度可能被低估。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架实现了MethaneSAT影像中甲烷羽流的高效检测和归因，并能兼顾不同应用对准确率和召回率的需求。该成果为实际甲烷排放监测及数据公开化应用提供了有力工具。

title: Grammatically-Guided Sparse Attention for Efficient and Interpretable Transformers
summary: The quadratic complexity of self-attention in Transformer models remains a significant bottleneck for processing long sequences and deploying large language models efficiently. For this approach, there has been significant research into Sparse Attention, and Deepseek Sparse Attention has combined various methods of creating segments of tokens to reduce the time complexity. This paper introduces a novel approach, Grammatically-Guided Sparse Attention, which constrains attention computations based on the grammatical roles of tokens. By leveraging Parts-of-Speech (POS) tags, attention masks are dynamically generated that enforce linguistically coherent connections between tokens, reducing the computational graph without sacrificing essential linguistic dependencies. Two masking strategies are proposed and evaluated: a hard mask that strictly allows only predefined grammatical interactions, and a soft mask that biases attention towards these interactions. The experiments, conducted on the SST-2 sentiment classification task using a DistilBERT-like architecture, demonstrate that Grammatically-Guided Sparse Attention maintains comparable accuracy to full attention while significantly reducing the theoretical computational overhead. Preliminary results show accuracy values of 0.8200 for hard masking and 0.8165 for soft masking, closely matching the 0.8200 of full attention, providing a path towards more efficient, interpretable, and linguistically-informed Transformer architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于语法引导的稀疏注意力方法，借助词性标签动态生成注意力掩码，在降低计算复杂度的同时保持模型性能。实验结果显示，该方法能接近全注意力机制的准确率。
AI.motivation: Transformer自注意力机制的二次复杂度限制了其在长序列和大模型中的应用效率。现已有稀疏注意力研究，但如何更好地兼顾性能和计算效率仍是难题。
AI.method: 提出了语法引导的稀疏注意力方法：利用词性（POS）标签动态生成注意力掩码，并设计了两种策略——严格语法限制的hard mask和倾向语法关系的soft mask。
AI.result: 在SST-2情感分类任务和DistilBERT模型下，hard mask准确率为0.8200，soft mask为0.8165，几乎与全注意力机制持平（0.8200），同时模型的理论计算开销显著减少。
AI.conclusion: 语法引导的稀疏注意力方法在保证准确率的基础上，降低了Transformer的计算复杂度，提升效率，具有更好的解释性和实际应用潜力。

title: Micro-Swarm Locomotion Optimization in Dynamic Flow using Multi-Objective Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
summary: Coordinating micro-robotic swarms in physiologically realistic, time-dependent fluid environments remains an unsolved challenge for biomedical and environmental applications. We present a hybrid Computational Fluid Dynamics - Multi-Objective Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning framework that directly couples a high-fidelity incompressible Navier-Stokes solver with decentralized proximal policy optimization to learn physically consistent swarm control strategies in oscillatory flow. Sixteen magnetically actuated micro-robots navigate a pulsatile arterial waveform, simultaneously optimizing upstream progression, energy conservation, and motion smoothness, reconciled using PCGrad surgery. Without PCGrad, energy efficiency and smoothness rewards collapse to near zero within 10,000 training steps while progress exhibits persistent large-amplitude oscillations, confirming that gradient conflict resolution is a structural requirement rather than an optional refinement in this domain. The converged policy achieves a progress reward of 6.5-7.0, a sustained energy efficiency of 0.63-0.65, and near-maximum smoothness (0.97-0.99), representing improvements over brute-force baselines on the primary objective while both baselines yield negative energy efficiency throughout. Training reveals three emergent behavioral phases: a collective two-layer hydrodynamic throttling formation that suppresses peak channel velocities during forward flow, a cycle-synchronized ratchet mechanism that exploits flow reversals for upstream repositioning, and an individualized final approach as agents near the success boundary. These results establish that time-dependent fluid-agent interactions can be captured directly within multi-objective reinforcement learning loops, offering a physically grounded paradigm for micro-swarm control in biomedical navigation, environmental monitoring, and industrial microfluidics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种混合计算流体力学与多目标多智能体强化学习相结合的框架，实现了微型机器人群体在复杂脉动流体环境中的高效自主控制。
AI.motivation: 在生物医学和环境领域，实现微型机器人群体在时变、复杂流体环境中的协调导航始终是未解决的重要难题。现有方法难以处理高精度流体动力学与多目标控制任务间的冲突。
AI.method: 本研究将高保真不可压Navier-Stokes流体求解器与去中心化PPO强化学习算法直接耦合，通过PCGrad算法解决多目标间的梯度冲突，实现在复杂脉动流环境中多目标（进展、能耗、平滑性）优化。采用16个磁驱微机器人在模拟脉动动脉内导航测试。
AI.result: 无PCGrad时，能耗与运动平滑奖励迅速衰减，表明梯度冲突影响学习效果。引入PCGrad后，实现了进展奖励6.5-7.0、能耗效率0.63-0.65、平滑性0.97-0.99，均优于暴力基线法。训练还涌现出分层节流、流向同步棘轮、个体化推进三种行为模式。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了多目标强化学习可直接捕捉流体-智能体耦合动力学，为生物医疗导航、环境监测和工业微流控等领域的微群智能控制提供了物理可解释新范式。

title: Unveil: Unified Visual-Textual Integration and Distillation for Multi-modal Document Retrieval
summary: Document retrieval in real-world scenarios faces significant challenges due to diverse document formats and modalities. Traditional text-based approaches rely on tailored parsing techniques that disregard layout information and are prone to errors, while recent parsing-free visual methods often struggle to capture fine-grained textual semantics in text-rich scenarios. To address these limitations, we propose \textbf{Unveil}, a novel visual-textual embedding framework that effectively integrates textual and visual features for robust document representation. Through knowledge distillation, we transfer the semantic understanding capabilities from the visual-textual embedding model to a purely visual model, enabling efficient parsing-free retrieval while preserving semantic fidelity. Experimental results demonstrate that our visual-textual embedding method surpasses existing approaches, while knowledge distillation successfully bridges the performance gap between visual-textual and visual-only methods, improving both retrieval accuracy and efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Unveil框架，将视觉与文本特征融合用于文档检索，通过知识蒸馏兼顾高效与语义一致性，在多个指标上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现实中的文档格式多样，单纯依赖文本解析方法无法处理布局信息，且易出错；而仅视觉方法则无法充分捕捉细粒度文本语义，因此需要一种能有效融合视觉和文本特征的新方法。
AI.method: 提出了视觉-文本嵌入（visual-textual embedding）框架Unveil，把文本和视觉特征整合用于文档表示；再通过知识蒸馏，将视觉-文本模型的语义理解能力迁移到全视觉模型，实现无需解析的高效文档检索。
AI.result: 实验表明：Unveil视觉-文本方法在检索性能上超过现有方法，知识蒸馏有效缩小了视觉-文本与纯视觉模型的性能差距，提升了准确率与效率。
AI.conclusion: Unveil及其知识蒸馏方案实现了高效且鲁棒的无需解析文档检索，能兼顾高性能与实际应用需求，有望推广至多模态文档处理场景。

title: ParkingWorld: End-to-End Autonomous Parking Reinforcement Learning from Corrective Experience in 3DGS Simulation
comment: 9 pages(including 1 page of Appendix), 6 figures. Will be submitted to RA-L 2026
summary: Autonomous parking demands precise low-speed maneuvering within narrow, cluttered, and highly constrained environments, where vehicles must navigate tight spaces while avoiding static obstacles and complex geometric boundaries. Unlike imitation learning, which typically requires massive volumes of high-quality expert demonstrations to converge to a stable policy and often suffers from limited generalization to unseen scenarios, traditional reinforcement learning (RL) methods face persistent challenges including excessive training overhead, inefficient exploration, and even failure to learn viable parking strategies in challenging settings. To address these limitations, this paper presents a correction-in-the-loop sample-efficient reinforcement learning (CIL-SERL) framework for end-to-end autonomous parking, which is entirely trained in a photorealistic 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) parking simulator that enables high-fidelity digital reconstruction of real-world scenes. Inspired by error-correction notebooks used in learning practice, we design a novel multi-level replay buffer mechanism. These buffers hierarchically organize and store standard RL rollouts, human corrective interventions, failed exploration trajectories, and rollback-based correction segments in separate yet interconnected memory regions, facilitating structured sampling and targeted learning during training. The proposed framework is systematically evaluated in both the 3DGS simulation environment and a physical vehicle platform. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves substantial improvements in parking success rate, operational efficiency, and safety performance across diverse scenarios, validating the effectiveness and practical applicability of the proposed CIL-SERL-based end-to-end autonomous parking solution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为CIL-SERL的高效纠错强化学习方法，在光真实3D仿真环境和实车中验证，实现了端到端自动泊车，且显著提升了成功率和安全性。
AI.motivation: 目前自动泊车面临狭窄、复杂环境下的精准低速操控难题，而仿照学习和传统强化学习方法都存在学习效率低、泛化性弱或完全无法收敛等显著缺陷。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种纠错闭环的高效采样强化学习（CIL-SERL）框架，将常规RL训练、人工纠错、失败探索和回滚修正等不同类型数据分层管理于独立但联结的经验池中，有针对性地采样以提升学习效率；并应用于高保真的3DGS仿真停车场。
AI.result: 实验表明，无论在3DGS仿真系统还是实车平台上，该方法在多种复杂场景中显著提升了泊车成功率、操作效率和安全性能。
AI.conclusion: CIL-SERL 框架不仅训练高效、适应性强，还能应用于实际自动泊车，具备较高的实用价值和行业推广前景。

title: ArtSplat: Feed-Forward Articulated 3D Gaussian Splatting from Sparse Multi-State Uncalibrated Views
summary: Articulated object reconstruction from sparse-view images is an ill-posed problem that requires simultaneous inference of geometry and underlying articulation structure. Existing methods for articulated object reconstruction based on NeRF and 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) typically rely on dense views or strong priors (e.g., depth maps, joint types, predefined number of joints) and require costly per-object optimization. In this paper, we propose ArtSplat, the first feed-forward framework for articulated 3D Gaussian Splatting. It reconstructs both geometry and joint parameters from sparse multi-view images across multiple articulation states in a single forward pass. To address the challenges of single-pass articulated reconstruction, we introduce a per-pixel joint map representation that enables the integration of joint parameter estimation into the feed-forward pipeline. We further propose a Cross-State Attention (CSA) mechanism with state tokens, which effectively captures discrete motion across input states. Experiments on 68 articulated objects from PartNet-Mobility, including both single- and multi-joint configurations, demonstrate that ArtSplat achieves competitive performance in both geometry and joint estimation, while being over 400 times faster than baselines.

AI.tldr: ArtSplat是一种面向稀疏视角输入、能同时重建几何和关节参数的新型articulated 3D Gaussian Splatting方法，实现了极快的推理速度，且无需繁琐的逐物体优化。
AI.motivation: 现有基于NeRF或3D Gaussian Splatting的articulated object reconstruction方法通常依赖稠密视角数据或强先验，且每个物体需要代价高昂的优化，难以适应稀疏视角和快速应用场景。
AI.method: 提出ArtSplat：一种首次实现的前馈式articulated 3D Gaussian Splatting框架。创新点包括：1）提出像素级joint map表达，将关节参数估计高效整合进前馈管道；2）设计带有state tokens的Cross-State Attention机制，有效捕捉不同状态下的离散动作。
AI.result: 在PartNet-Mobility的68个关节物体数据集（单关节与多关节）上实验结果表明，ArtSplat在几何重建和关节估计准确性上有竞争力，推理速度比现有方法快400倍以上。
AI.conclusion: ArtSplat实现了无需逐物体优化即可从稀疏多视图图像中快速高效地进行关节物体的3D重建和关节参数估计，大幅提升了效率且结果优良。

title: RAMBA: 4D Radar Mapping by Bundle Adjustment
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures, to present in ISPRS2026 Thematic Session 10 on Radar Perception
summary: 4D radar is increasingly attractive for robotic mapping because it provides range, azimuth, elevation, and Doppler measurements while remaining robust in adverse visibility conditions. Although recent radar and radar--inertial odometry methods have achieved promising online state estimation performance, offline global map refinement for 4D radar remains underexplored. This paper presents RAMBA, a radar bundle-adjustment framework for globally consistent 4D radar mapping. Given initial poses and radar frames from a radar--inertial odometry front-end, RAMBA jointly refines radar frame states using covariance-weighted geometric residuals, IMU preintegration factors, and radar ego-velocity constraints. The geometric residuals extend pairwise GICP to a multi-frame optimization by forming voxel-based correspondences across selected frames and weighting each residual with point covariances. To improve robustness against drift and revisits, RAMBA enforces temporal consistency during correspondence formation while explicitly supporting loop-closure constraints. Experiments on the ColoRadar and SNAIL Radar datasets show that RAMBA improves map consistency and usually enhances trajectory accuracy over radar--inertial odometry and pose-graph optimization baselines.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了RAMBA，一种用于4D雷达全局一致性地图构建的束调整框架，有效提升了地图一致性和轨迹精度。
AI.motivation: 目前4D雷达因其对恶劣可视条件的鲁棒性及多维测量能力，受到机器人定位与建图领域的关注。然而，大多数相关工作仅关注了在线状态估计（如雷达或雷达-惯性里程计），而针对离线的全局地图精化方法研究很少。为提升4D雷达建图的全局一致性与精度，亟需一种专门的离线优化框架。
AI.method: 提出了RAMBA框架，利用雷达-惯性里程计前端提供的初始位姿及雷达数据，通过协方差加权的几何残差、IMU预积分因子和自运动速度约束联合优化雷达各帧状态。扩展了GICP算法，将配准残差推广到多帧、基于体素的匹配，并结合点的协方差加权。为减缓漂移、支持回环检测，框架在配准时保持时序一致性，并显式支持回环约束。
AI.result: 在ColoRadar和SNAIL Radar数据集上，RAMBA方法在地图一致性和轨迹精度方面，相较于雷达-惯性里程计及位姿图优化等基线方法表现更优。
AI.conclusion: RAMBA有效提升了4D雷达地图的全局一致性与运动轨迹的精度，为4D雷达在恶劣环境下的高精度建图和定位提供了新方法。

title: CoDA: Color Distribution Probing for Efficient and Generalizable AI-Generated Image Detection
summary: AI-generated image detection faces a persistent trade-off between generalization and efficiency: lightweight artifact-based methods often degrade on unseen generators or domains, whereas more robust large-scale models are computationally expensive. Meanwhile, existing benchmarks mainly focus on cross-model evaluation in photorealistic settings, leaving cross-domain robustness underexplored. To address this gap, we introduce FakeForm, a large-scale benchmark with approximately 370,000 images across 62 diverse domains for both cross-model and cross-domain evaluation. Motivated by this broader setting, we revisit color-distribution probing as an efficient complementary cue for AI-generated image detection. We observe that, especially for photographic content, real photographs tend to exhibit smoother and more stable color patterns, whereas synthetic images often show characteristic color imbalances introduced by neural generation. Based on this observation, we propose CoDA, a compact 1.48M-parameter detector built on a Noise-Quantization Probe, together with a theoretical analysis linking probe responses to color non-uniformity. Experiments show that CoDA achieves state-of-the-art performance on standard benchmarks and the best results on the challenging cross-domain evaluation of FakeForm, while remaining highly competitive in cross-model photorealistic settings. These results suggest that persistent generative artifacts can provide a practical foundation for efficient and robust AI-generated image detection. The models and FakeForm benchmark will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效且鲁棒的AI生成图像检测方法，并发布了一个涵盖62个领域的大规模基准数据集FakeForm，用于更全面地评估检测器在跨模型和跨领域的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有AI生成图像检测方法在高效性和泛化能力之间存在权衡，轻量级方法在新生成器或新领域上表现不佳，强鲁棒性的模型则计算开销大。此外，目前的基准主要关注跨模型且局限于写实领域，对跨领域鲁棒性探讨不足。
AI.method:
1. 构建FakeForm基准，包含约37万张图像、62个多样领域，用于跨模型和跨领域评测。
2. 基于发现：真实照片颜色分布更平滑，而合成图像颜色常失衡。
3. 提出CoDA检测器（148万参数），利用Noise-Quantization Probe，理论分析其对颜色不均匀性的响应，作为检测AI合成图像的重要线索。
AI.result: CoDA在主流检测基准和FakeForm跨领域测试中表现出色，在Photorealistic领域的主流检测中也具竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 合成图像中固有的生成伪影，如颜色不均匀性，为高效且鲁棒的AI生成图像检测提供了可行基础。研究所提出的模型和基准集将在社区开放。

title: AstroMind: A High-Fidelity Benchmark for Spacecraft Behavior Reasoning Based on Large Language Models
summary: Understanding why a spacecraft maneuvers -- rather than simply that it did -- is an increasingly important problem for space domain awareness as Earth orbits grow crowded and contested. Current analysis pipelines are built for detection: they are good at picking up that something happened, less good at reasoning about what it means. AstroMind is a physics-grounded benchmark designed to close that gap. It draws on high-fidelity astrodynamics simulations and real observational constraints, converting them into verifiable reasoning problems across three task types: intent inference, maneuver parameter estimation, and threat assessment. Each scenario includes realistic sensing noise and multi-source textual intelligence at varying reliability levels. Evaluation metrics capture both semantic correctness and quantitative consistency under physical constraints. Benchmarking a suite of open-weight models shows no single model dominates every axis: Qwen3 (32B) leads on intent inference accuracy; QwQ (32B) leads on threat assessment and achieves the lowest median relative error on parsed items; GPT-OSS (20B) produces the strongest judged reasoning quality and extracts the most scalar values for parameter estimation (136 of 241 parsed items). Training data composition and reasoning style matter as much as model size. Structured reasoning prompts help consistently across tested 8B models, with larger gains for those that can already track physical constraints. AstroMind gives the field a shared test for a problem where getting the physics right and reading the tactical situation correctly are both required -- neither is sufficient on its own.

AI.tldr: AstroMind是一个针对航天领域态势感知的基准数据集，聚焦于推理航天器机动背后的原因，并通过高保真动力学仿真和真实观测，设置了推断意图、参数估计、威胁评估三类任务，对开源模型进行了系统评测。
AI.motivation: 随着地球轨道日益拥挤和有争议，对于航天器为何机动的推理变得重要，然而现有方法只重检测，对机动原因的理解不足，有必要以物理和推理结合的方式提供评测基准。
AI.method: 构建了基于真实约束和仿真的推理问题，涵盖意图推断、机动参数估计、威胁评估，并引入感知噪声和多源文本情报。采用多维度定量和定性指标对多种大模型进行测试，对比不同模型在各子任务的表现。
AI.result: 没有单一模型能在所有指标上领先。Qwen3(32B)在意图推断准确度最高，QwQ(32B)在威胁评估和参数误差最小，GPT-OSS(20B)推理质量和参数提取最多。训练数据和推理风格对表现影响显著，有结构化推理的prompt对8B模型提升最大。
AI.conclusion: AstroMind给领域提供了一个物理和战术理解兼重的共享测试平台，推动模型在物理约束和战术推理上的全面进步。

title: X-DiffVLA: X-Embodied Diffusion Action Heads for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Learning universal policies from cross-embodied data remains a fundamental challenge in robotics. Although Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are pre-trained on large and diverse datasets, they typically rely on embodiment-specific fine-tuning to achieve strong performance in downstream tasks. This requirement severely limits their generalization capability and restricts knowledge transfer across embodiments performing similar tasks. To overcome these limitations, we focus on cross-embodied settings with shared robotic bases and heterogeneous end-effectors, and propose X-DiffVLA, a diffusion-based VLA model featuring a unified cross-embodied action head. X-DiffVLA can leverage the generative strengths of diffusion models to capture both the diversity and latent correlations in cross-embodied datasets. Specifically, we introduce Embodiment Forcing, a classifier-free guidance technique to implicitly steer action generation toward embodiment-specific functional components, capturing fine-grained structural nuances without explicit supervision. In addition, a Morphological Tree Diffusion approach is designed to strengthen behavioral correlations across diverse end-effectors, maximizing the transferability of heterogeneous demonstrations. Experimental results across RoboCasa and Isaac Gym, covering different embodiments from grippers to dexterous hands, show that X-DiffVLA achieves state-of-the-art performance, with improvements of 15.3% and 12.5%, respectively. Real-world evaluations further validate the robustness of the proposed framework and its effectiveness in scalable cross-embodied policy learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）跨体态策略学习方法X-DiffVLA，无需针对不同机器人重新微调模型，便能大幅提升策略泛化与迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型VLA模型虽然具备一定泛化性，但仍依赖于针对不同机器人（体态）的下游微调，限制了它们在跨体态情景下的知识迁移与通用性。尤其在机器人基础相同但末端执行器不同（如夹爪与灵巧手）的场景下，通用性尤为重要。
AI.method: 1. 提出X-DiffVLA，一种基于扩散生成的VLA模型，使用统一的跨体态动作头，利用扩散模型捕捉不同体态数据间多样性与潜在关联。2. Embodiment Forcing：一种无监督引导动作生成关注各体态功能细节的技术。3. Morphological Tree Diffusion：通过形态结构树扩散方法强化不同末端执行器之间行为相关性，实现异构演示的最大化迁移。
AI.result: X-DiffVLA在RoboCasa与Isaac Gym平台多个不同机器人末端（包括夹持器和灵巧手等）的基准测试中获得领先性能，分别提升15.3%和12.5%。实物实验也表明该方法具有鲁棒性和良好的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: X-DiffVLA能够无需针对具体机器人微调，实现更强的跨体态策略泛化与迁移，推动了机器人多样化场景下的通用策略学习与知识共享。

title: Unified 3D Scene Understanding Through Physical World Modeling
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2026
summary: Understanding 3D scenes requires flexible combinations of visual reasoning tasks, including depth estimation, novel view synthesis, and object manipulation, all of which are essential for perception and interaction. Existing approaches have typically addressed these tasks in isolation, preventing them from sharing a common representation or transferring knowledge across tasks. A conceptually simpler but practically non-trivial alternative is to unify these diverse tasks into a single model, reducing different tasks from separate training objectives to merely different prompts and allowing for joint training across all datasets. In this work, we present a physical world model for unified 3D understanding and interaction (3WM), formulated as a probabilistic graphical model in which nodes represent multimodal scene elements such as RGB, optical flow, and camera pose. Diverse tasks emerge from different inference pathways through the graph: novel view synthesis from RGB and dense flow prompts, object manipulation from RGB and sparse flow prompts, and depth estimation from RGB and camera conditioning, all zero-shot without task-specific training. 3WM outperforms specialized baselines without the need for finetuning by offering precise controllability, strong geometric consistency, and robustness in real-world scenarios, achieving state-of-the-art performance on NVS and 3D object manipulation. Beyond predefined tasks, the model supports composable inference pathways, such as moving objects aside while navigating a 3D environment, enabling complex geometric reasoning. This demonstrates that a unified model can serve as a practical alternative to fragmented task-specific systems, taking a step towards a general-purpose visual world model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个统一的3D理解与交互物理世界模型（3WM），能够通过不同的推理路径，实现深度估计、新视角合成及物体操作等多种视觉任务，无需单独针对每个任务进行训练。
AI.motivation: 以往3D视觉任务（如深度估计、新视角合成、物体操作）各自为战，缺乏统一的模型来共享表示与知识迁移，导致效率低下且难以综合利用多任务数据。作者希望构建一个能够统一处理多种3D任务的模型，简化训练与推理流程，并促进跨任务的泛化能力。
AI.method: 作者提出3WM，将3D理解和交互建模为一个概率图模型，节点表示多种模态场景元素（如RGB图像、光流、相机位姿），不同任务对应于在图上的不同推理路径。所有任务均以提示(prompt)作为输入，无需特定任务的数据训练，实现零样本推理。
AI.result: 3WM模型在新视角合成（NVS）和3D物体操控等任务上实现了业界领先表现，无需微调超过了各任务的专业基线，展现出对现实场景的几何一致性、强可控性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 统一模型能够作为多任务碎片化系统的可行替代方案，不仅能高效处理既定任务，还支持组合式推理路径，为实现通用视觉世界模型迈出重要一步。

title: WhenLoss: Diagnosing Write and Retrieval Bottlenecks in Long-Context Memory Systems
summary: Long-context memory systems often fail under fixed budgets, but end-to-end evaluation does not reveal whether evidence was discarded during compression or preserved but never retrieved. We introduce a four-condition diagnostic protocol that evaluates a fixed reader under truncated full context (TFC), oracle evidence (OE), complete stored memory (CSM), and retrieved memory (RM). Under this fixed-budget LongMemEval setup, write-side gaps exceed retrieval-side gaps for most tested baselines, with four of six baselines robustly write-dominant under our default diagnosis margin. Motivated by this diagnosis, we propose Expected Predictive Compression (EPC), which moves the key decision--what information to retain--to write time by using an LLM to anticipate likely future questions and preserve the minimal supporting evidence under the token budget, while leaving retrieval unchanged at question time. Across all 500 LongMemEval questions with three readers (GPT-5.2, Claude Sonnet 4, Gemini 2.5 Pro), EPC achieves the highest CSM scores among all systems (0.49 vs. 0.44 for Summary (LLM), the strongest baseline), reducing Delta_write to 0.04 while leaving Delta_retr comparable to other LLM-based systems. These results suggest that, on this benchmark and evaluation setup, improving what the write stage preserves is a key avenue for performance gains in the tested systems.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了长上下文记忆系统在固定存储预算下的信息保留和检索瓶颈，通过设计更细致的诊断协议，鉴别出主要的性能短板在记忆写入阶段，并提出了一种新的写入端优化方法EPC，有效提升了系统整体表现。
AI.motivation: 现有长上下文记忆系统的性能诊断手段有限，无法区分信息在写入压缩或检索时丢失，因此难以针对性改进系统。
AI.method: 作者提出四条件诊断协议（TFC、OE、CSM、RM），分离评估写入和检索各自的性能瓶颈，并据此设计了EPC方法，让LLM在写入时预判后续可能问题，保存最小必要证据，提高信息利用效率。
AI.result: 在三个主流大模型（GPT-5.2、Claude Sonnet 4、Gemini 2.5 Pro）和500道LongMemEval题中的测试显示，EPC方法的CSM分数最高（0.49）, 明显优于最佳基线（0.44），写入端损失（Delta_write）减少至0.04，检索端性能与其他方法持平。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，在长上下文记忆任务和该评价框架下，优化写入阶段的信息保留是提升整体性能的重要方向。

title: A Decentralized LiDAR-SLAM System with Certifiably Optimal Pose Graph Optimization
comment: In Proceedings of the IEEE International Conference on Robotics & Automation (ICRA'26) 1st Workshop on Robot Meets GNSS and Ranging for Seamless Autonomy, Vienna, Austria, Jun. 5, 2026
summary: Decentralized multi-robot LiDAR-SLAM is essential for collaborative missions but faces significant challenges in maintaining global consistency. Existing frameworks predominantly rely on local-search optimization or one-time coordinate alignment, which are prone to suboptimal convergence and long-term inconsistency, especially in large-scale or degenerate environments. To address these limitations, this paper presents the first decentralized LiDAR-SLAM system that integrates a state-of-the-art certifiably optimal Pose Graph Optimization (PGO) backend. By leveraging the Riemannian Block Coordinate Descent (RBCD) algorithm, our system ensures globally consistent trajectory estimation without requiring accurate initial guesses. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves superior robustness, improving trajectory RMSE by up to 48.9% compared to the state-of-the-art DiSCo-SLAM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个结合可认证最优位姿图优化（PGO）后端的分布式多机器人LiDAR-SLAM系统，有效提升了全局一致性与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有分布式多机器人LiDAR-SLAM方案多依赖本地优化或一次性坐标配准，易陷入次优收敛并导致长期一致性问题，尤其在大规模或退化环境下更为明显。需要一种新方法确保全局一致性。
AI.method: 该系统集成了当前先进的可认证最优PGO后端，并采用黎曼分块坐标下降（RBCD）算法，使多机器人在无需精确初值的情况下，获得全局一致的轨迹估计。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，相比主流的DiSCo-SLAM，本系统在轨迹RMSE上最多提升48.9%，展现出更强的鲁棒性和精确性。
AI.conclusion: 采用RBCD-PGO方法的分布式多机器人LiDAR-SLAM系统能够更好地保证全局轨迹一致性，为协作任务提供更精准的定位与地图构建基础。

title: Causal Physics Steering in Video World Models via Concept Activation Vectors
comment: In proceedings of CVPR 2026 workshop on Video World Model
summary: Video world models learn representations of physical dynamics, but controlling their physical expectations at inference time remains an open problem. Recent interpretability work identified a Physics Emergence Zone (PEZ), a group of middle transformer layers in VideoMAE where physical plausibility is represented separately from other visual features. However, it remained unclear whether this structure could be used to directly control the model's physics reasoning. We present physics steering, a training-free method that uses the weight vector of a linear probe at a PEZ layer as a Concept Activation Vector (CAV) and injects it into hidden states during inference. This shifts the model's physical expectations without changing any model weights. On the IntPhys benchmark, this intervention reliably shifts the model's plausibility judgment in either direction, depending on the steering sign. The effect appears only when the intervention is applied within the Physics Emergence Zone, suggesting that the relevant physics representation is localized there. We further find that physics is encoded separately from motion direction, and that different intuitive physics principles occupy distinct directions within this representation space. Together, these results show that physical reasoning in VideoMAE is not only readable, but also directly steerable.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种无需再训练即可直接操控视频物理推理的新方法（physics steering），通过对VideoMAE模型中识别出的物理涌现区（PEZ）隐藏层注入物理方向向量，实现了对模型物理可行性判断的可控性。
AI.motivation: 虽然视频世界模型能捕捉物理动态，但目前尚无法在推理时主动调控模型对物理规律的理解。近期发现VideoMAE部分中间层分离表征物理合理性，但是否可操控还未明确。
AI.method: 作者提出“physics steering”方法：利用线性探针在PEZ层获得的权重向量作为概念激活向量（CAV），在推理阶段直接注入至隐藏状态，无需改动原有模型权重。
AI.result: 在IntPhys基准上，该方法能有效双向调节模型对物理合理性的判断，且干预效果仅在PEZ区域显现。还发现物理表征与运动方向分离，不同物理直觉原则分布于不同方向。
AI.conclusion: VideoMAE物理推理层不仅可解释，也可直接被“引导”与操控。本文方法为模型物理理解的可控性及可解释性提供了新的视角。

title: Word Class Representations Spontaneously Emerge from Successor Representations Trained on Natural Language
summary: Language models are typically trained to predict the next token in a sequence. Here, we explore an alternative predictive principle from reinforcement learning: Successor Representations (SRs), which model the expected discounted distribution of future states rather than the immediate next state. We transfer this framework to natural language and train neural networks to predict future word distributions across multiple temporal horizons, thereby learning representations of long-range transition structure. We train a deep residual neural network on WikiText-103 (103 million tokens; 20,000-word vocabulary) and optimize successor representations as probability distributions using KL divergence. Without explicit linguistic supervision, structured language representations emerge spontaneously. After training, the learned space develops a clear geometric organization with respect to part-of-speech (POS) categories: nouns, verbs, and adjectives become separable and recoverable through unsupervised clustering. This organization depends systematically on predictive horizon, with short horizons producing the strongest syntactic structure and longer horizons increasingly integrating broader contextual and semantic information. At finer resolutions, additional interpretable lexical substructure emerges, revealing coherent subclasses within major word categories. These findings suggest that syntactic categories need not be explicitly encoded but may arise as a consequence of predictive sequence learning. To our knowledge, this work provides the first systematic application of successor representations to natural language and establishes a conceptual bridge between reinforcement learning, linguistics, and cognitive neuroscience.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出利用强化学习中的成功者表示（SR）框架训练语言模型，通过预测未来词分布学习长距离的语言结构表示，在无监督下自然形成词类结构。
AI.motivation: 目前主流语言模型仅预测下一个词元，缺乏对长距离语言结构的建模能力。本文尝试引入强化学习中的成功者表示（SR）理论，解决这一局限，探索语言中长程依赖和结构自然形成的可能性。
AI.method: 将SR框架迁移到自然语言建模中，用神经网络预测多个时间跨度上的未来词分布，并以KL散度优化这些概率分布。实验证明，采用残差神经网络在WikiText-103语料库上训练，无需显式的语言学标注。
AI.result: 模型学习到的表示空间具有清晰的词性组织结构，名词、动词、形容词等类别在无监督聚类下可分离、可恢复。且预测时间跨度不同，组织结构兼顾句法和语义层面，更多的词类细分结构也随之显现。
AI.conclusion: 句法类别可以作为预测序列学习的自然结果自发产生，无需显式编码。该方法首次系统性将SR应用于自然语言，架起了强化学习、语言学与认知神经科学之间的桥梁。

title: Soft Pneumatic Actuators for Soft Robotics: A Motion-Based Review of Actuation Mechanisms and Performance Trade-offs
summary: Soft pneumatic actuators are widely used in soft robotics because they can produce large motions while remaining compliant enough to interact safely with objects, environments, and the human body. However, their performance is not solely determined by pressure. Instead, the response depends on the way the actuator is built, including the shape of its chambers, the placement of reinforcements, the use of folds, material stiffness, and the constraints that guide its deformation. As the literature has expanded, it has become more difficult to determine which mechanism is most suitable for a given application and which reported results can be compared across studies. This review examines soft pneumatic actuators according to the design strategies used to generate four motion classes: linear, bending, twisting, and omnidirectional actuation. For each class, it analyzes the structural features that define the deformation path, including braid angle, fold geometry, fiber orientation, chamber arrangement, structural asymmetry, and internal constraint layers. It then discusses how the design choice affect motion output, force generation, air demand, repeatability, durability, fabrication difficulty, and robotic integration. The review further identifies key conditions that must be considered when selecting or comparing actuators, including pressure, loading condition, actuator size, pneumatic supply, and hysteresis This approach helps explain why actuators with similar motion outputs may differ substantially in design requirements, pneumatic demand, and practical suitability. It also highlights the design priorities needed for compact, efficient, repeatable, and deployable soft pneumatic systems in wearable, biomedical, and mobile robotic applications.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了软体气动驱动器的主要结构设计方法及其对运动类型和性能的影响，帮助读者根据不同应用需求选取合适的气动驱动器设计。
AI.motivation: 随着软体气动驱动器应用和研究的增加，不同的结构设计和运动实现方式导致难以比较和选择最合适的驱动器，亟需系统梳理各类设计特点及其性能影响。
AI.method: 根据软体气动驱动器实现的四种主要运动（线性、弯曲、扭转、全向），分类分析了影响变形路径的结构特征，包括编织角度、褶皱几何、纤维取向、腔室布置、结构不对称性及内部约束层。对各类结构对应的输出运动、力、耗气量、重复性、耐久性、加工难度及集成特性进行了归纳讨论。
AI.result: 系统比较了不同设计下驱动器在实际参数、结构需求、气动资源消耗及应用适用性上的异同，总结了在可穿戴、医疗和移动机器人等应用场景中对紧凑、高效、高重复性系统的设计侧重。
AI.conclusion: 该综述梳理了软体气动驱动器设计与性能的关联，提出选择和对比各类驱动器时需考虑的重要条件，为未来软体机器人系统的高效集成和应用提供了设计指导。

title: ViViD-5K: Vineyard vision dataset for field-based berry detection and segmentation and grape cluster closure estimation
summary: Cluster closure, defined as the progressive filling of gaps between the berries in a grape bunch, is a key trait in vineyard management, impacting disease risk. However, traditional visual scoring methods are labor-intensive, subjective, and lack temporal resolution. Existing datasets rarely support fine-grained berry-level analysis, limiting the development of robust deep learning models. In this work, we present ViViD-5k, a large-scale in-field Vineyard Vision Dataset containing 5,000 images with dense annotations, including over 648,000 berry centroids and cluster segmentation masks spanning 13 grape varieties. Building on this dataset, we introduce GrapeSAM, a two-stage visual pipeline that combines point-based berry localization with prompt-based segmentation using Segment Anything, followed by transformer-based cluster segmentation. The pipeline enables automated, in-field estimation of cluster closure with minimal supervision. Quantitative results demonstrate strong segmentation and counting accuracy across diverse conditions, while visualizations confirm robustness on both in-domain and out-of-domain samples. This work provides a scalable and objective alternative to manual compactness scoring and supports high-throughput grape phenotyping with enhanced spatial detail.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ViViD-5k葡萄园视觉数据集及自动化葡萄穗闭合度检测的视觉管线GrapeSAM，实现了葡萄粒级别的准确计数和分割，提升了病害风险管理的自动化与客观性。
AI.motivation: 葡萄穗闭合度分析对于葡萄园病害管理至关重要，但现有视觉打分方式主观、耗时且时效性差。同时，缺乏粒级精细注释数据集，限制了深度学习模型的发展和应用。
AI.method: 作者构建了ViViD-5k数据集，包含5000张田间葡萄穗的密集注释图像，涵盖648,000多个葡萄粒和13种葡萄品种。提出GrapeSAM视觉管线，分两步：先用点级定位结合Segment Anything模型提示进行单粒分割，然后用transformer实现整穗分割，从而自动估算穂闭合度。
AI.result: 在多种条件下，GrapeSAM实现了高精度的葡萄粒分割和计数，视觉化展示显示对域内外样本均具有较强鲁棒性，量化结果证实其高性能。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为人工主观评分提供了可扩展、客观的替代方案，支持高通量、空间分辨率提升的葡萄表型分析，为葡萄园自动化管理开辟新途径。

title: CSP-Atlas: Concept-Specific Neural Circuits in a Sparse Python Transformer
summary: A sparse 8-layer code transformer develops dedicated neural circuitry for every Python construct tested, and that circuitry is organised by a clean computational principle rather than by semantic category. We extract neural circuits for 106 concepts (43 AST node types, 63 builtin objects) by marginalising across 63,800 controlled prompts, and decompose each circuit into concept-specific and token-driven components using contrastive checker prompts that present a keyword token without its associated syntactic structure. Three findings emerge. First, all 106 concepts produce non-empty universal circuits at every one of nine parameter settings, and the ranking of concept-specificity across constructs is stable across the sweep - survival is not an artifact of a permissive threshold. Second, AST circuits contain a genuine concept component distinct from token activation: concept-only neurons constitute up to 62.5% of the loudest-firing neurons at mid-to-late layers, while builtin circuits are almost entirely token-driven. Third, six computationally atomic constructs - Import, ImportFrom, Break, Continue, Pass, Assert - cluster together despite being semantically unrelated, sharing only the property of being single-statement constructs requiring no nested body; this atomicity super-cluster, together with a four-tier hierarchy organised by token ambiguity and structural distinctiveness, shows that the model's internal organisation tracks computational structure rather than meaning. The methodology, full decomposition data, and analysis code are released.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了稀疏的8层代码Transformer模型在理解和表征Python构造时的神经电路结构，发现模型内部组织遵循计算结构而非语义类别。
AI.motivation: 探讨大模型（特别是Transformer架构）在处理程序代码时，是否会发展出专用于不同Python语法构件的神经电路，以及这些电路组织的原则。希望揭示模型内部表示是否与代码的计算结构直接相关。
AI.method: 利用63,800个人工设计的代码提示语，测试和提取了106个概念（包括43种AST结点类型与63个内建对象）对应的神经电路。通过对比检查提示（checker prompts），将每个电路分解为概念专属部分和仅由token驱动的部分，并在九组不同超参数下进行分析。
AI.result: 1）所有106个概念在九种参数下均能形成稳定的电路，显示概念对应的神经元是模型固有特性；2）AST（语法树）相关电路中有明显区分于token激活的概念神经元（在中后层占比高达62.5%），而内建对象相关电路几乎全由token驱动；3）六种原子构件（如Import、Break等）虽然语义无关，但其神经电路聚类显示它们在模型中形成了一个组织层次，仅因其具有同样的“单语句无嵌套体”属性，反映了模型内部依计算结构分层。
AI.conclusion: 代码Transformer模型在处理Python代码时，会自发形成分工明确、按计算结构组织的神经电路，而不仅仅依据语义或token。这揭示了模型内部表征与实际计算属性紧密相关，为理解类GPT代码模型如何理解和泛化程序结构提供了新视角。该研究还公开了方法、数据及代码，方便后续深入分析。

title: InvariantCloud: A Globally Invariant, Uniquely Indexed Point Cloud Framework for Robust 6-DoF Tactile Pose Tracking
summary: Recent advances in imitation learning and vision-language models highlight the need for high-fidelity tactile perception, with 6-DoF tactile object pose estimation providing a crucial foundation for precise robotic manipulation. We introduce InvariantCloud, a 6-DoF pose estimation framework that leverages the global invariance of surface marker constellations on vision-based tactile sensors. In contrast to recent approaches, our one-shot globally invariant point cloud registration suppresses cumulative drift and overcomes long-standing limitations in accurately estimating yaw (Z-axis) rotation. Experimental verifications show that InvariantCloud achieves superior yaw tracking accuracy and re-localization repeatability compared to existing benchmarks, demonstrating its precision and robustness in long-sequence manipulation tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于6自由度物体位姿估计的新方法——InvariantCloud，该方法显著提升了机器人操作过程中的精度和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 随着仿生学习和视觉-语言模型的发展，对高保真触觉感知的需求日益突出。尤其是在精细机器人操作中，如何获得高精度的6自由度物体位姿估计变得尤为关键。现有方法存在累计漂移和姿态角（偏航/Yaw）估计不准的问题。
AI.method: 提出了InvariantCloud框架，通过利用视觉型触觉传感器表面标记星座的全局不变性，实现了一种一次性、全局不变的点云配准方法。该方法抑制了累计误差漂移，有效提升了Yaw轴旋转的估计精度。
AI.result: 实验表明，InvariantCloud在Yaw轴追踪精度和重定位重复性方面优于现有基准，特别适用于长序列操作任务中的精确和鲁棒表现。
AI.conclusion: InvariantCloud方法有效解决了触觉位姿估计领域的若干长期瓶颈，为精密机器人操作提供了坚实基础。

title: SparseWorld: Enhancing End-to-End Autonomous Driving via World Models with Sparse Scene Representation
summary: Recently, world models have made significant progress in enhancing end-to-end driving systems through both future situation forecasting and improved scene understanding. However, existing driving world models are typically built upon dense scene representations, causing high computational costs and redundant information. In this paper, we present SparseWorld, a lightweight world model that focuses on predicting only the critical layout of the scene, enabling efficient future forecasting for end-to-end driving systems. SparseWorld first performs autoregressive rollout to forecast future map elements and surrounding agents, enabling the model to learn how driving scenarios evolve over time. It then leverages these predicted futures to refine downstream motion prediction and trajectory planning. Specifically, we propose a Sparse Dreamer that anticipates future instances in the latent space through joint temporal and spatial attention. By interacting with predicted future instances, the motion planner captures more accurate motion patterns and generates more informed and safety-aware trajectories. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SparseWorld significantly reduces collision risk and achieves state-of-the-art performance on the open-loop planning metrics of the nuScenes dataset with a collision rate of 0.05\%. Moreover, it substantially outperforms the baseline method in closed-loop planning metrics on the Bench2Drive benchmark. Supplementary material is available at the project page: https://wryzju.github.io/SparseWorld/.

AI.tldr: SparseWorld提出了一种稀疏表征的世界模型，显著提升自动驾驶的预测效率和安全性，达到领先的规划表现。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶世界模型多依赖稠密场景表示，导致计算开销大且信息存在冗余。为提升效率与关键场景捕捉能力，研究团队提出更轻量化的稀疏世界模型。
AI.method: SparseWorld聚焦于场景关键布局的预测，通过自回归方式推断未来地图元素及周边主体变化，并将这些未来信息用于运动预测和轨迹规划。创新点是Sparse Dreamer，结合时序与空间注意力机制，在潜空间中预测未来实例，并与运动规划器联动，实现更精准和安全的轨迹生成。
AI.result: SparseWorld在nuScenes数据集的开放式规划指标上取得0.05%极低碰撞率，在Bench2Drive基准的闭环规划测试上大幅优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 采用稀疏表示的世界模型不仅大幅减小计算量，还能有效提升自动驾驶预测与规划性能，对于实际应用和安全性有明显优势。

title: Guarded Repair for Harm-Aware Post-hoc Replacement of LLM Mathematical Reasoning
comment: 15 pages,including appendices. Code and artifacts available at https://github.com/Haizhoux0517/guarded-repair
summary: Post-hoc repair of LLM mathematical reasoning introduces an asymmetric risk: fixing an incorrect reasoning trace is useful, but replacing a trace that was already correct can be harmful. We study this problem under a selective replacement setting, where a system must decide whether a repaired candidate is safer than preserving the original cached trace. We present GuardedRepair, a guarded best-of-N repair framework that diagnoses cached reasoning traces, selectively triggers repair, and accepts answer-changing candidates only when deterministic verification guards support replacement. The framework combines lightweight symbolic checks, surface semantic-risk diagnostics, bounded candidate generation, and conservative acceptance policies. On the full GSM8K test set, where the initial reasoner already achieves 95.60% accuracy, GuardedRepair improves final accuracy to 96.89%, fixing 17 of 58 remaining errors without measured broken-correct cases in the main run. On a weak-reasoner ASDiv setting, accuracy improves from 78.40% to 87.60%. Direct regeneration baselines show that this gain is not explained by stronger-model re-solving alone: re-solving all GSM8K examples lowers accuracy to 93.03% and breaks 47 initially correct answers. Additional analyses show that guarded repair substantially improves the fixed/broken tradeoff, while also revealing that replacement risk is reduced rather than eliminated. These results support viewing post-hoc repair as harm-aware selective replacement rather than unconstrained re-solving.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GuardedRepair框架，实现对大语言模型（LLM）数学推理答案的选择性修复，有效提升准确率，同时避免破坏原本正确答案。
AI.motivation: 对LLM数学推理的事后修复存在“不对称风险”：修正错误有益，但若误替换了原本正确的推理，将造成损害。目前缺乏针对性机制，可靠区分该修复还是保留，提升系统安全性与性能。
AI.method: 提出GuardedRepair框架，对缓存的推理轨迹进行诊断，仅在经过确定性验证后才触发修复，并谨慎接受会改变答案的候选结果。该方法融合轻量符号检测、语义风险判断、有限候选生成及保守接受策略。与直接全量重解（re-solving）对比，验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在GSM8K测试集上，将初始准确率由95.60%提升至96.89%，修复了58个错误中的17个，未引入新的错误。在ASDiv弱推理场景下，准确率提升由78.40%到87.60%。全量重解反而会降低准确率，且破坏大量正确答案。分析表明，该方法实质性改善了“修复/破坏”权衡。
AI.conclusion: 基于风险感知、选择性替换的修复策略（如GuardedRepair）比不加约束的重解更安全高效。该框架能够提升正确率，最大限度减小替换风险，为LLM推理后处理提供了新视角和理论支撑。

title: FusionCore: A 23-State Unscented Kalman Filter for IMU, Wheel Encoder, GPS, and Visual SLAM Fusion in ROS 2
summary: We present FusionCore, an open-source ROS 2 sensor fusion package that fuses IMU, wheel encoder odometry, GPS, and Visual SLAM pose into a single 100 Hz odometry stream using a 23-state Unscented Kalman Filter (UKF).
