The 23rd state is an online estimate of the wheel encoder's systematic yaw rate bias, identified through GPS heading cross-covariance and subtracted during GPS blackouts to reduce heading drift in coast mode. FusionCore also estimates gyroscope and accelerometer biases as explicit filter states, handles GPS natively in ECEF without a separate coordinate projection node, applies per-sensor Mahalanobis chi-squared outlier gating calibrated to measurement degrees of freedom, and adapts sensor noise covariance automatically from the innovation sequence. VSLAM pose fusion enables GPS-denied operation with any visual odometry or SLAM system, including automatic recovery from map reinitialization. We evaluate against robot_localization on twelve full-length sequences (55-92 min each) from the NCLT public dataset. FusionCore achieves lower Absolute Trajectory Error (ATE) on ten of twelve sequences, with improvements ranging from 1.2x to 22.2x on winning sequences. The robot_localization UKF diverges numerically on all twelve sequences. FusionCore is available at https://github.com/manankharwar/fusioncore under the Apache 2.0 license.

AI.tldr: FusionCore是一个开源的ROS 2多传感器融合包，能把IMU、轮速计、GPS和VSLAM位姿数据实时融合，生成高精度的100Hz里程计数据。创新性地估算和修正轮速计偏差，并在多项实际数据集上效果优于现有主流方法。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人定位融合方案在GPS失效或轮速计存在系统误差时容易出现精度降低或漂移（如机器人在室内或受遮挡环境中）。同时，主流库如robot_localization在长时间运行时还常发生数值发散。因此，亟需开发一种更稳健、高精度、适用于多传感器输入且支持开源社区使用的融合方法。
AI.method: 提出了FusionCore：基于23维无迹卡尔曼滤波器（UKF），额外建模轮速计系统性横摆率误差，并依据GPS与轮速计的相关性在线估算。融合了IMU、轮速计、GPS、VSLAM等多源位姿信息，支持自动异常剔除、自适应传感器噪声估计，并支持GPS失效时通过视觉SLAM可靠定位，GPS采用ECEF坐标直接处理，无需单独投影节点。
AI.result: 在NCLT公开数据集（共12段55–92分钟不等的序列）上对比主流的robot_localization库：FusionCore在10/12段数据上绝对轨迹误差更低，误差提升1.2~22.2倍；对比库出现全部数值发散的现象，FusionCore表现出明显的数值稳健性。
AI.conclusion: FusionCore显著提升了多传感器融合定位的精度与鲁棒性，对现有主流方案有明确工程优势，支持公开开源，对机器人社区具有现实应用价值。

title: Gaussian Rank-Based Neighborhood Degree for Graph Neural Networks in Image Classification
summary: The exponential growth of data has intensified the gap between the availability of unlabeled data and the high cost of manual annotation. Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have emerged as a promising solution, as they exploit relational structures and learn from both labeled and unlabeled data, performing semi-supervised learning. A crucial component of many of these models is degree-based normalization, which influences message propagation but typically assumes uniform importance among neighboring nodes. In image classification, graphs are usually constructed from feature similarity, where treating all neighbors equally may overlook important variations in relevance. Motivated by this gap, we propose GRaNDe (Gaussian Rank-based Neighborhood Degree). This novel degree measure integrates neighborhood ranking with Gaussian distance weighting to better capture node importance. Experiments on five public image classification datasets show consistent accuracy improvements and competitive or superior results compared to state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 针对图神经网络（GNN）在半监督学习中的常用度量归一化方法存在局限，提出了一种结合邻域排序与高斯距离加权的新型度量方法GRaNDe，有效提升了图像分类任务表现。
AI.motivation: 目前GNN在针对无标签数据充分利用时，常假设邻居节点具有一致重要性，这种简单处理未能捕捉特征相似图中节点相关性的差异，容易忽略关键信息。
AI.method: 提出GRaNDe方法：将邻居节点进行排序，引入高斯函数加权，结合节点在邻域内的排名和距离实现新的度量归一化方式，从而更精准反映每个邻居节点的重要性。
AI.result: 在五个公开图像分类数据集上实验，GRaNDe带来了一致的准确率提升，结果优于或媲美主流最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: GRaNDe作为一种新型度量方法，可以有效提升图像分类等任务中GNN的表现，具有实际应用潜力，对GNN归一化机制研究具有一定推动作用。

title: Measuring the Depth of LLM Unlearning via Activation Patching
summary: Large language model (LLM) unlearning has emerged as a crucial post-hoc mechanism for privacy protection and AI safety, yet auditing whether target knowledge is truly erased remains challenging. Existing output-level metrics fail to detect when this knowledge remains recoverable from internal representations. Recent white-box studies reveal such residual knowledge but often rely on auxiliary training or dataset-specific adaptations, leaving no generalizable metric. To address these limitations, we propose the Unlearning Depth Score (UDS), a metric that quantifies the mechanistic depth of unlearning via activation patching. UDS first identifies layers that encode the target knowledge using a retain model baseline, then measures how much of it is erased in the unlearned model on a 0-1 scale. In a meta-evaluation across 20 metrics on 150 unlearned models spanning 8 methods, UDS achieves the highest faithfulness and robustness, confirming our causal approach as the most reliable for unlearning evaluation. Case studies further reveal that white-box metrics can disagree at the layer level and that erasure depth varies across examples. We provide guidelines for integrating UDS into existing benchmarking frameworks and streamlining the evaluation pipeline. Code and data are available at https://github.com/gnueaj/unlearning-depth-score

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的大型语言模型（LLM）遗忘评估指标“Unlearning Depth Score（UDS）”，能够更准确地量化目标知识在模型内部表示中的擦除程度。
AI.motivation: 现有的遗忘评估方法大多只关注模型输出层，无法检测模型内部是否仍保留目标知识，且很多指标对特定数据集和训练方法依赖性强，缺乏通用性。
AI.method: UDS通过激活修补（activation patching）技术，比较保留模型与遗忘模型内不同层对目标知识编码程度，并在0-1区间量化遗忘深度。大规模实验证明其在多个评测维度和模型上的稳定性和可靠性。
AI.result: 在对20个指标、150个模型和8种遗忘方法的基准测试中，UDS在忠实性和鲁棒性上表现最佳。案例分析还揭示，不同白盒指标在层级评估上可能存在分歧，遗忘深度也因样本而异。
AI.conclusion: UDS是一种高度可靠和通用的LLM遗忘评估指标，适合作为遗忘算法评测基准，且作者提供了与现有基准集成的建议与开源代码。

title: GreenSeg: Ground Segmentation Algorithm for Agricultural Robots in Mediterranean Greenhouses using RGB-D Point Clouds
summary: Greenhouse agriculture in the Mediterranean region faces significant automation challenges due to its unique structural and environmental constraints. These environments are characterized by extremely narrow aisles, heterogeneous terrains ranging from concrete to tilled soil and severe optical interference caused by polyethylene covers, which induce specular reflections and "ghost points" in depth sensors. While autonomous navigation is essential for digitizing agricultural tasks, traditional solutions often rely on expensive 3D LiDAR systems that are economically unscalable for most facilities. To address this, this paper presents GreenSeg, a robust perception framework for autonomous navigation using RGB-D sensing. The proposed method introduces a dual-layer validation strategy: a robust global plane fitting combined with a surface curvature filter for terrain adaptability, and a seed-point-based Region Growing constraint to ensure the spatial continuity of the navigable plane. Experimental validation was conducted using the AGRICOBIOT I platform across four diurnal scenarios with varying solar elevations. The results show that GreenSeg consistently outperforms benchmark segmentation methods, achieving peak improvements of 11.58% in mean Recall and 19.24% in mIoU during critical rotational maneuvers at the end of corridors. These findings confirm that the proposed algorithm enables stable and safe autonomous navigation in unstructured, dynamic agricultural environments that are subject to budget constraints and sensitive to lighting conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GreenSeg感知框架，在地中海地区温室复杂环境下，利用廉价RGB-D传感器提升自主导航表现，为农业机器人自动化提供经济可行方案。
AI.motivation: 地中海温室环境空间狭窄、地形复杂且光学干扰大，传统导航多依赖昂贵的3D LiDAR系统，经济性有限，迫切需要低成本、鲁棒的感知方法实现自动化管理。
AI.method: 提出GreenSeg: 基于RGB-D传感器的感知与分割方案。核心包括全局平面拟合+曲率滤波，提高地形适应性，再结合基于种子点的区域生长约束，确保可通行平面的空间连续。
AI.result: 在AGRICOBIOT I平台和不同光照条件下实测，GreenSeg在关键转弯等场景下，Recall提升11.58%，mIoU提升19.24%，整体优于现有分割基线算法。
AI.conclusion: GreenSeg算法实现了在低成本、复杂、不规则且光照变化剧烈的温室环境下的稳定安全自主导航，具备实际农业自动化的推广价值。

title: SliceWorld: A Predictive and Controllable World-State Model for CT Report Generation
summary: CT report generation (CTRG) requires models to summarize three-dimensional anatomical context and pathological findings from hundreds of axial slices. Existing methods typically learn a direct image-to-text mapping, providing limited mechanisms for modeling how CT evidence evolves across slices or how reports respond to controlled changes in latent lesion-related factors. We propose SliceWorld, a CT-specific world-state framework that treats an axial CT scan as an ordered sequence along the z-axis. SliceWorld encodes prefix CT evidence into factor-aware latent states containing anatomy, lesion, and uncertainty components, and projects these states into world tokens used for multi-step future-slice feature prediction, lesion-factor intervention, and LLM-based report generation. The model is first pretrained on CT slice sequences with predictive, factor-aware, and counterfactual objectives, and is then fine-tuned on paired CT-report data. Experiments on M3D-Cap and CT-RATE show that SliceWorld improves natural language generation metrics and clinically oriented automatic evaluation. Further analyses demonstrate multi-horizon future-slice prediction, measurable factor alignment, reduced-slice robustness, and selective lesion-sensitive report modulation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种专为CT影像报告生成（CTRG）设计的新框架SliceWorld，能够更好地捕捉三维解剖和病灶信息，显著提升报告生成质量和灵活性。
AI.motivation: 现有CT报告生成方法缺乏建模跨切片病变演变的能力，且难以根据特定病灶因素调整报告。需要一种能表达CT扫描三维信息并具备可控性的生成机制。
AI.method: 提出SliceWorld框架，将CT扫描视为z轴顺序的切片序列，编码获得包含解剖、病灶和不确定性成分的潜在状态，用“世界状态”token驱动未来切片预测、干预实验和大模型报告生成。先用预测、因子感知和反事实目标进行预训练，再用CT-文本对进行微调。
AI.result: 在M3D-Cap和CT-RATE数据集上显著提升NLU/NLG和自动化医学评估指标。额外分析验证其多步未来切片预测能力、病灶因子一致性、对缺失切片的稳健性及对局部病变表达的灵活性。
AI.conclusion: SliceWorld为三维CT报告生成提供了新的建模范式，提升了生成报告的准确性、临床相关性和可控性，对智能医学影像理解具有重要意义。

title: HiMed: Incentivizing Hindi Reasoning in Medical LLMs
summary: Medical large language models hold promise for reducing healthcare disparities, yet Hindi remains severely underrepresented. While medical LLMs excel in high-resource languages, their performance degrades sharply in Hindi, particularly on Indian systems of medicine. We argue that robust cross-lingual medical transfer requires Hindi reasoning. To this end, we introduce HiMed, a Hindi reasoning medical corpus and benchmark suite covering both Western and Indian medicine. We further propose HiMed-8B, a Hindi-form medical reasoning LLM, through the design of decaying scaffolding reward. Extensive experiments demonstrate improvement in Hindi medical reasoning performance and reduction in the English--Hindi accuracy gap. Ablation studies validate the contribution of each training stage and reward component. All data and code are available on GitHub: https://github.com/FreedomIntelligence/HiMed.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了HiMed——一个涵盖西医与印度传统医学的印地语医疗推理语料库与基准测试，并基于此开发了针对印地语医疗推理的HiMed-8B大模型，通过创新的奖励机制提升了印地语医疗推理性能。
AI.motivation: 当前医疗大模型在高资源语言表现优异，但印地语等低资源语言表现明显落后，特别是在印度传统医疗领域。因此，推动印地语医学推理能力，有助于减少卫生健康不平等。
AI.method: 作者首先设计并发布了HiMed印地语医学推理数据集与评测套件，内容包含西医与印度医疗体系；随后提出基于“递减支撑奖励”机制的HiMed-8B医疗推理大模型。通过系统性实验（包括消融实验）分析各训练阶段和奖励模块对模型性能的贡献。
AI.result: HiMed-8B模型在印地语医疗推理任务上表现优异，显著提升了模型在印地语上的医学推理能力，有效缩小了英文与印地语间的准确率差距。消融实验证实奖励机制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过创新的数据集、评测套件以及针对性优化的医疗推理大模型，显著提升了低资源语言（印地语）医疗大模型的推理水平，为减少医疗健康不平等提供了切实有效的技术方案。

title: Parallel Differentiable Reachability for Learning and Planning with Certified Neural Dynamics and Controllers
summary: Neural network (NN) dynamics models and control policies achieve strong performance in robotics, but providing sound guarantees under uncertainty remains difficult, especially for closed-loop NN systems. Existing reachability tools provide formal over-approximations, yet are often non-differentiable, overly conservative, or too slow for modern learning and online planning pipelines. To address this, we present a parallelizable, differentiable reachability framework in JAX for continuous- and discrete-time systems with analytical and NN-based dynamics and controllers. Our framework combines Taylor-model flowpipe construction with CROWN-style linear bound propagation through a unified representation that preserves affine dependencies while supporting GPU-batched computation and automatic differentiation. Building on this reachability primitive, we develop (i) a certified training method that encourages reachability-friendly dynamics models and controllers, and (ii) a reachability-aware sampling-based MPC scheme with gradient-based refinement. Experiments on non-prehensile manipulation and quadrotor tasks, including hardware and higher-dimensional evaluations (up to 72D), demonstrate practical online planning while maintaining certified reachable-set over-approximations under bounded uncertainty.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个可并行、可微分的可达性分析框架，以更高效且准确地为神经网络动力学模型及其控制器提供不确定性下的正式保障。
AI.motivation: 神经网络动力学模型和控制策略在机器人中表现优异，但难以在不确定性环境下给出严格保证。现有的可达性分析工具要么不可微、要么过于保守、要么计算太慢，无法适配当前的在线规划和学习需求。
AI.method: 提出了基于JAX的可达性分析框架，适用于连续与离散时间的分析，结合了泰勒模型的流管构造与CROWN风格的线性界传播，实现对仿射依赖的保留、GPU批量计算与自动微分。基于此提出了带有可达性保障的训练方法和采样式MPC方案。
AI.result: 在非抓持操作等任务，以及多维（最高72维）四旋翼任务上，包含真实硬件测试，结果表明该方法支持高效在线规划，并能在有界不确定性下给出认证的可达集合过近似。
AI.conclusion: 该框架实现在复杂神经网络动力学系统下，兼顾效率与安全保障的可达性分析，对学习型机器人控制具备实用意义。

title: VectorArk: Learning Practical Image Vectorization with Rounded Polygon Representation
summary: Recent vision-language model (VLM)-based approaches have achieved impressive results on image vectorization tasks. However, they are typically evaluated on synthetic benchmarks, where clean SVGs are rasterized at high resolution and then re-vectorized. As a result, these methods generalize poorly to real-world scenarios, such as images with unknown rasterization methods or those generated by text-to-image models. We introduce VectorArk, a new VLM-based model designed for robust and practical image vectorization. VectorArk employs a novel rounded polygon representation that simplifies the learning process while naturally producing smooth, visually appealing primitives. We also propose a degradation model that enhances robustness across diverse and imperfect inputs. Our experiments show that, in contrast to previous methods, VectorArk achieves superior geometric completeness and artifact suppression across multiple datasets, with comprehensive ablations validating the contribution of each component.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了VectorArk模型，通过创新的向量表示和退化建模，实现了更高鲁棒性和更优异的图像矢量化效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉-语言模型（VLM）的图像矢量化方法主要在合成数据集上评测，面对真实场景时泛化能力不足，难以处理多样且复杂的输入。
AI.method: 作者设计了VectorArk模型，使用新颖的圆角多边形表示方式，简化学习任务并提升输出图形的平滑度和美观性。同时引入退化模型以增强模型对真实数据的适应能力。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，与以往方法相比，VectorArk在多个数据集上实现了更完整几何结构和更佳伪影抑制，并通过消融实验验证了各模块的贡献。
AI.conclusion: VectorArk在实际复杂场景下展现出更强鲁棒性，为实用图像矢量化提供了有效方案。

title: Know You Before You Speak: User-State Modeling for LLM Personalization in Multi-Turn Conversation
summary: Personalized dialogue requires more than recalling explicit user histories: systems also need to infer hidden user states that evolve through interaction and shape appropriate response strategies. Existing memory- and profile-based methods primarily reuse observable user information, offering limited support for modeling user-state dynamics or selecting actions based on how they shape future user states. We propose PUMA (Prospective User-state Modeling for Action selection), a framework grounded in the Free Energy Principle (FEP) that formulates personalization as decision-making under partial observability, centered on an explicit user state model that captures latent user states and their action-conditioned dynamics. At each turn, PUMA maintains a belief over the user's hidden state, refines the user state model for observation generation and action-conditioned state transition, and selects dialogue actions by minimizing expected free energy, balancing epistemic and pragmatic objectives under a unified criterion. This formulation shifts personalization from passive memory retrieval to model-based decision-making over user evolution. We instantiate PUMA on healthcare-oriented counseling and motivational interviewing benchmarks with latent state annotations for rigorous evaluation. Experiments show that PUMA improves long-horizon dialogue outcomes while maintaining strong response quality, and a cross-dataset study demonstrates more reliable user-state estimation and next-state prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了PUMA框架，用于更好地建模和跟踪对话中用户的隐含状态，并根据这些状态动态优化对话决策，显著提升了长对话效果。
AI.motivation: 现有的个性化对话大多依赖用户历史或显式档案，难以捕捉和利用用户随对话变化的隐含心理状态，对行动选择与未来用户状态影响的建模有限。
AI.method: PUMA框架以自由能原理（FEP）为基础，将个性化对话建模为在部分可观测环境下的决策过程，显式维护用户隐状态及其因行动变化的动态。每轮对话中PUMA推断用户隐状态、优化状态转移和观测生成，并通过最小化期望自由能选择平衡探索与实际应答的最佳行动。
AI.result: 在健康咨询和激励式面谈等带有隐状态标注的数据集上，PUMA获得了更好的长篇对话表现和对用户状态的更准估计，同时保证了对话质量。跨数据集实验也验证了其泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: PUMA推动了个性化对话系统从静态信息复用向动态、基于模型的决策转变，在复杂任务与长对话场景中具有更优表现和更高的泛用性。

title: Prior Policy Guided Dual-Agent Coordinated Manipulation Planning of Spacecraft-Manipulator System
summary: The strong dynamic coupling between the manipulator and the base poses a significant challenge to maintaining spacecraft attitude stability, potentially compromising mission safety. In this paper, we propose a Dual-Agent Coordinated Manipulation Planning (DACMP) framework that simultaneously achieves high-precision end-effector pose reaching for a 6-DoF space manipulator and attitude stabilization of the base spacecraft. To enhance learning efficiency, we present a prior policy-guided Deep Reinforcement Learning algorithm incorporating the Timestep-level Expert Switching Guidance (TESG) mechanism, thereby promoting global convergence and improving task success rates. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DACMP significantly outperforms baseline DRL algorithms in terms of task success rate and control precision. Furthermore, the robustness of DACMP is validated under various challenging scenarios, including system constraints, environmental disturbances, and perception uncertainties. The code and simulation configurations are available on GitHub: https://github.com/HIT-YuhuiHu/DACMP.

AI.tldr: 本文针对空间机械臂与基座之间的强动态耦合问题，提出了双智能体协同操作规划框架（DACMP），结合基于先验策略指导和专家切换机制的深度强化学习方法，大幅提升了操作精度与系统鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 空间机械臂操作时与飞行器基座存在动态耦合，容易造成姿态不稳，危及航天任务安全，因此亟需方法确保执行器精确到位的同时维持飞行器姿态稳定。
AI.method: 提出DACMP框架，采用基于先验策略指导的深度强化学习并引入Timestep-level Expert Switching Guidance（TESG）机制，提升任务学习效率与收敛速度。
AI.result: 在多项实验中，DACMP相较于传统深度强化学习方法，在任务成功率和控制精度上均有显著提升，并在系统约束、环境扰动和感知不确定性等复杂场景下表现出优异的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DACMP框架能够有效应对空间机械臂操作中的动态耦合难题，同时实现高精度操作与基座姿态稳定，具备广阔的工程应用前景。

title: Dual Prototype-Conditioned Diffusion Model for Scalable Multi-Class Unsupervised Anomaly Detection in Large Category Spaces
summary: Multi-class anomaly detection aims to build unified models across diverse product categories. However, as the number of categories grows, its performance often degrades due to increasingly complex and heterogeneous normal distributions. To address this challenge, we propose DPDiff-AD, a Dual Prototype-conditioned Diffusion model for large-scale multi-class Anomaly Detection. DPDiff-AD models heterogeneous normal distributions through complementary local and global prototypes. Local prototypes capture representative fine-grained structural patterns via nearest-prototype aggregation, while global prototypes regulate holistic feature geometry through optimal transport regularization. Together, these dual-scale representations define a structured normality space. This space is refined through diffusion-based reconstruction conditioned on both local and global prototypes via prototype-aware attention. By jointly leveraging dual prototypes during generation, DPDiff-AD achieves precise normality modeling, preserves structured separability as category cardinality grows, and enables scalable anomaly discrimination. Extensive experiments across five benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness and scalability of DPDiff-AD. On the 160-category large-scale dataset, it improves image- and pixel-level AUROC by 5.3 and 2.9 points over the previous state-of-the-art method Dinomaly+, while maintaining stable performance as category cardinality increases.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的基于双原型扩散模型（DPDiff-AD），用于解决大规模多类别异常检测中文本模型性能因类别数量增加而下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 随着类别数量的增长，多类别异常检测模型难以有效建模多样、复杂的正常分布，导致检测性能下降。需要建立更具表达力的联合模型以保持检测效果的可扩展性和准确性。
AI.method: 提出DPDiff-AD模型，通过“局部原型”和“全局原型”双重机制建模复杂正常分布。局部原型用以捕捉细粒度结构特征，全局原型则维护整体特征空间结构，并应用最优传输正则化。两者通过原型感知注意力机制在扩散重构过程中协同工作，高效刻画高维正常空间。
AI.result: 大规模基准测试（五个数据集、最多160类）中，DPDiff-AD在图像及像素级AUROC上分别比前沿方法Dinomaly+提升了5.3与2.9个百分点，并能稳定应对类别数量增加，展示了优异的扩展性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: DPDiff-AD通过创新的双原型扩散模型显著提升了多类别异常检测的性能和扩展能力，适合大规模实际应用，具有广阔发展前景。

title: Mix-MoE: Improving Multilingual Machine Translation of Large Language Models through Mixed MoEs
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown great promise in multilingual machine translation (MT), even with limited bilingual supervision. However, fine-tuning LLMs with parallel corpora presents major challenges, namely parameter interference. To address these issues, we propose Mix-MoE, a mixed Mixture-of-Experts framework designed to train LLMs for multilingual MT. Our framework operates in two distinct stages: (1) post-pretraining with MoE on monolingual corpora, and (2) post-pretraining with MoE on parallel corpora. Crucially, we divide the MoE layers into two specialized groups: Language Model Experts (LM Experts) and Machine Translation Experts (MT Experts). LM Experts are designed to capture and retain the monolingual knowledge learned by the pre-trained LLM. MT Experts, on the other hand, are specifically trained to acquire and store bilingual translation knowledge. Furthermore, to facilitate effective interaction between these specialized experts and leverage potential underlying structural patterns in text, we introduce a routing mechanism enhanced by Fourier Transform features derived from model representations. The experimental results demonstrate that Mix-MoE excels in multilingual MT, significantly outperforming existing baselines and showing notable progress in mitigating parameter interference.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的Mix-MoE架构，通过专家分组和新路由机制，有效提升了多语言机器翻译效果，并缓解了参数干扰。
AI.motivation: 多语言机器翻译中，利用LLM进行双语微调时容易出现参数干扰，影响模型性能，如何解决这个问题成为关键挑战。
AI.method: 采用混合专家（Mixture-of-Experts, MoE）结构，按功能将MoE层分为语言模型专家（LM Experts）和机器翻译专家（MT Experts），分两步先分别用单语和双语语料后置训练。同时，提出结合傅里叶变换特征的专家路由策略，提升组间协作效果。
AI.result: 实验显示，Mix-MoE在多语言机器翻译任务上显著优于一系列现有方法，并有效减轻了参数干扰带来的负面影响。
AI.conclusion: Mix-MoE为多语言机器翻译模型提供了新的架构改进思路，在提升翻译性能的同时保证了参数的独立性，对未来模型设计具有借鉴意义。

title: FOUND-IT: Foundation-model-first Task-driven 3D Scene Graphs with Granularity on Demand
summary: We present the first approach to build hierarchical task-driven 3D scene graphs of arbitrary indoor or outdoor environments using an uncalibrated monocular camera in real-time. We leverage geometric foundation models to estimate geometric attributes of the scene graph (e.g., object bounding boxes), but we also observe that traversability information (the "places" layer of a scene graph) can be directly reconstructed by adding an extra head to existing geometric foundation models, like VGGT. Our approach is task-driven in the sense that we adjust the granularity of the objects and regions in the map depending on the task; for instance, during a manipulation task, our approach is able to resolve small knobs on a stove, while during a navigation task it can focus on large objects (e.g., the entire stove). However, in a major departure from related work, we consider the realistic case where the list of tasks is not predefined and fixed, but evolves as the robot operates. This naturally allows dealing with complex loco-manipulation tasks, where the robot can dynamically adjust its representation as the task unfolds. We dub the resulting approach FOUND-IT. FOUND-IT also includes an agentic approach to query information in the scene graph. In addition to achieving 79% higher accuracy on the ASHiTA SG3D task grounding benchmark, we demonstrate FOUND-IT runs in real-time on a ground robot using a Jetson Thor. Furthermore, to highlight the robustness of our method, we demonstrate constructing 3D scene graphs on casually captured realtor apartment tours from YouTube. Code will be made available upon publication.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种利用单目摄像头在实时条件下构建层次化、任务驱动的3D场景图的新方法，可适用于任意室内外场景。方法基于几何基础模型，并通过动态调整图中对象和区域的粒度来适应不同任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常需要预先定义固定任务或使用多种传感器，且缺乏对任务动态变化和粒度调整的支持。本研究旨在突破这些局限，实现机器人在未知和不断变化的任务环境中灵活、高效地生成和利用场景图。
AI.method: 方法依赖几何基础模型（如VGGT）来估算场景图的几何属性（如物体边界框），并通过添加额外分支，实现场景遍历性（位置层）信息的直接重建。粒度调整根据当前任务需求而动态变化，并集成基于智能体的场景查询机制，实现对任务多样性的实时适应。
AI.result: 相较现有方法，该方法在ASHiTA SG3D任务基准测试上准确率提高了79%，并在Jetson Thor平台上实现了地面机器人上的实时运行。此外，还在YouTube上公开获取的房产视频中证明了方法的稳健性。
AI.conclusion: FOUND-IT方法显著提升了3D场景图在灵活任务环境下的适应性和准确性，且具有较高的实时性和广泛适应性，能够支持复杂的移动与操作任务。代码将在发表后开放。

title: Artiverse: A Diverse and Physically Grounded Dataset for Articulated Objects
summary: We present Artiverse, a diverse and physically grounded dataset of high-quality articulated 3D objects designed for realistic functional modeling and simulation. Artiverse contains 5.4K human-authored objects across a broad range of 88 categories, aggregated from multiple 3D static repositories. Objects are annotated with functional parts, interior structures, realistic kinematic relationships and articulated joints including multi-DoF joints, and physical attributes such as metric scale, material, and mass. We develop a semi-automated annotation pipeline that combines few-shot segmentation, geometric reasoning, and multi-stage human verification to achieve high-quality and efficient annotation, reducing manual annotation time by over 30%. We demonstrate the value of Artiverse on tasks of part mobility analysis, articulated object generation, and physics-based interaction. Artiverse provides a data resource to advance functional understanding for articulated objects.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Artiverse，这是一个多样化且物理属性丰富的高质量三维关节物体数据集，旨在促进对带有关节物体的功能建模与仿真研究。
AI.motivation: 现有三维物体数据集普遍缺乏对功能结构、关节关系和物理属性的细致标注，限制了三维仿真、机器人操作等领域的研究进展。因此，亟需一个高质量、具备详细功能与物理注释的数据集。
AI.method: 作者设计并收集了包含88类、5400个高质量三维带关节物体的数据集。通过综合利用少量样本分割、几何推理和多阶段人工验证的半自动标注流程，实现了功能零件、内部结构、物理属性（如比例、材质、质量）与关节（包括多自由度关节）的高效、准确注释，有效降低了人工标注工作量。
AI.result: Artiverse数据集实现了高质量的结构、功能与物理属性标注，节省了30%以上人工标注时间。通过三个任务（部件运动性分析、关节物体生成、基于物理的交互）展示了其在物体功能理解领域的价值。
AI.conclusion: Artiverse为带关节物体的功能建模与仿真提供了坚实的数据基础，有望推动该领域方法的发展与应用。

title: CP-Agent: A Calibrated Risk-Controlled Agent for Feedback-Driven Competitive Programming
summary: Large language models still struggle with contest-level programming, while many agentic remedies rely on massive inference-time sampling or expensive multi-stage post-training. We study when execution feedback reliably helps an LLM CP solver and which mechanisms govern the gains. We model feedback-driven solving as a calibrated stopped process and identify three quantities: false-admission risk, program-level evidence against bad programs, and the active-state success hazard. Under held-out trace calibration and selection from a pre-declared finite controller manifest, the resulting structural certificate lower-bounds the clean success probability before false admission. We instantiate mechanisms targeting these quantities as Dual-Granularity Verification, Test Augmentation, and Experience-Driven Self-Evolving, yielding CP-Agent. Without updating any parameters, CP-Agent raises Pass@1 from 25.8\% to 48.5\% on LiveCodeBench Pro and improves Refine@5 by 11.0\% on ICPC-Eval. Across three LLM backbones, CP-Agent lies on the cost--accuracy efficiency frontier, and ablations show that each component primarily affects its corresponding certificate quantity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需模型参数更新，利用执行反馈提升大模型竞赛级编程能力（CP）的反馈驱动型agent——CP-Agent，通过多机制提升解题成功概率，在多个数据集上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在解决竞赛级编程（CP）问题时表现一般，传统方案依赖推理时大量采样或代价高昂的后训练方法，效率和效果均有限。因此，探索如何高效利用执行反馈帮助模型更好地自动编程具有重要意义。
AI.method: 将反馈驱动的解题建模为一个校准后的停止过程，提出影响编程成功率的三大关键量：错误采纳风险、反向证据和成功概率，并设计了三种对应机制（双粒度验证、测试拓展与经验自进化），形成CP-Agent。整个过程无需进一步模型参数微调。
AI.result: 在LiveCodeBench Pro数据集上，CP-Agent能将Pass@1提升至48.5%（原为25.8%）；在ICPC-Eval上Refine@5提升了11.0%。三种不同LLM骨干下都位于成本—精度效率前沿。消融实验表明每个模块都对各自产生的核心量有决定性作用。
AI.conclusion: CP-Agent证明了无需模型参数更新，仅靠结构性反馈机制即可大幅提升编程任务表现，且成本可控；各机制互补，关键量建模有效。该工作为大模型自动编程提供了新的高效思路。

title: Decision-Making with Lightweight Confidence-Aware Language Model for Autonomous Driving
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) and Multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) have demonstrated immense potential in autonomous driving (AD) by offering human-like reasoning and open-world generalization. However, the excessive computational overhead and high inference latency of these massive models severely hinder their deployment in resource-constrained AD systems. To address this challenge, we propose a novel decision-making framework utilizing a lightweight confidence-aware language model, which bridges the gap between complex multimodal intention reasoning and efficient inference. Specifically, we design a multi-agent collaborative workflow, comprising action voting, confidence assessment, and summarization agents, to generate high-quality, confidence-annotated decision demonstrations via explicit Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning. These demonstrations are then distilled into a lightweight language model featuring a dual-head architecture, enabling the joint prediction of decision probabilities and the generation of textual rationales. The distillation is realized via a confidence-aware fine-tuning strategy coupled with Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) to enhance the model's adaptability and data efficiency. Comprehensive closed-loop experiments on the nuPlan benchmark demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) success rates in both regular and long-tail scenarios while maintaining low inference latency.

AI.tldr: 文章提出了一种新型轻量级、置信度感知的语言模型决策框架，用于提升自动驾驶场景下的推理效率与实用性，克服大型多模态语言模型高计算消耗与推理延迟难题，在nuPlan基准测试中效果显著。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶领域需要既能实现复杂推理、又能高效推理的模型，当前大型多模态语言模型虽然表现卓越，但高计算需求和推理延迟成为实际部署瓶颈，因此亟需更轻量高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计了多智能体协作流程（包括动作投票、置信度评估和总结），显式CoT推理生成带置信度的决策示例，通过蒸馏到双头轻量语言模型，实现联合决策概率预测与文本解释生成，并引入置信度感知微调和RAG增强模型适应性及数据效率。
AI.result: 在nuPlan自动驾驶基准的闭环实验中，该方法在常规和长尾场景下均取得了SOTA成功率，并显著降低了推理延迟。
AI.conclusion: 提出的轻量级置信度感知语言模型框架在保持低延迟的前提下，实现了高水平的决策质量与强泛化能力，为资源受限自动驾驶系统部署提供了有效方案。

title: Benchmarking Composed Image Retrieval for Applied Earth Observation
summary: Remote sensing composed image retrieval (RSCIR) enables search in large satellite image archives using composed queries that combine a reference image with a textual modifier. Although RSCIR offers a flexible interface for expressing targeted retrieval intent, the transferability of modern composition methods to Earth observation (EO) imagery and their relevance to operational EO workflows remain underexplored. We address this gap through a unified benchmark and an application-oriented study. First, we systematically adapt and evaluate representative composed image retrieval methods with six vision-language backbones on PatternCom under a standardized protocol, analyzing their behavior across backbones, composition strategies, and query types. Second, we introduce xView2-CIR, a change-centric dataset for disaster and damage monitoring, where retrieval is conditioned on scene identity and a target post-event state. Our results show that training-free composition methods provide strong and scalable baselines for EO retrieval, while change-centric retrieval presents different challenges from attribute-based retrieval, particularly due to the need to preserve scene identity. Overall, this study establishes a practical benchmark for RSCIR and positions composed retrieval as a complementary tool for remote sensing image retrieval, archive exploration, and change analysis. The dataset and code are available at https://github.com/billpsomas/rscir.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并评估了适用于遥感遥感组合图像检索（RSCIR）的统一基准，开发了面向场景变化监测的新数据集，验证了主流组合方法在遥感图像检索中的可行性及其与实际应用的相关性。
AI.motivation: 在遥感图像检索中，结合参考图像与文本修饰子的组合查询能更灵活表达用户检索意图，但当前现代组合方法在地球观测遥感影像上的迁移性及其实用性尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 1）选用六种视觉-语言主干网络，系统适配并评估代表性组合图像检索方法，在PatternCom基准及统一协议下分析不同主干、组合策略和查询类型的表现；2）新建以场景变化为核心、适用于灾害损毁监测的xView2-CIR数据集，通过条件检索场景标识和事件后状态。
AI.result: 无需训练的组合方法在遥感图像检索中表现强劲且具可扩展性，同时，基于变化的检索和基于属性的检索面临不同挑战，尤其在于保持场景标识的一致性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究建立了实用的RSCIR基准，将组合图像检索方法定位为遥感影像检索、档案探索与变化分析的有力补充工具；相关数据集和代码已开源。

title: The Path Matters: Learning a Token-Commitment Policy for Diffusion Language Models
summary: Diffusion large language models promise faster generation by refining many token positions in parallel, but this parallelism introduces a hidden control problem: which proposed tokens should be transferred into the partially decoded sequence at each step? We refer to this decision as token commitment. Existing frozen-generator decoders largely rely on hand-designed confidence rules or block-specific acceptance filters. We argue that token commitment can instead be learned as a reusable trace-state policy. We introduce TraceLock, a lightweight plug-in controller that instantiates this policy for a frozen diffusion language model. Since oracle commitment times are unavailable, TraceLock derives self-supervision from future stability: at decoding step t, a proposed token for position i is labeled stable if it matches the final token at position i after the full decoding trace completes. The controller scores variable-length trace states and decides which active token proposals should be committed to the partially decoded sequence. Once trained for a given frozen backbone, the controller can be deployed across local-window widths, generation lengths, and step budgets without retraining or per-setting calibration. Experiments on question answering, mathematical reasoning, and code generation show that TraceLock improves the quality-step tradeoff over heuristic and learned baselines, with particularly stable behavior under cross-setting deployment. Diagnostic analyses show that its decisions are not reducible to scalar confidence, suggesting that frozen diffusion language models expose a learnable space of commitment trajectories beyond confidence-based decoding. Code is available at https://github.com/BobSun98/TraceLock.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TraceLock，一种可泛化的Token承诺控制器，提升了扩散式大语言模型并行生成的性能和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 扩散式大语言模型能够并行处理多个Token位置，加速文本生成过程。但并行生成也带来了Token承诺（commitment）决策问题——如何决定当前步中哪些Token应被纳入最终输出。现有方法依赖人工设定的置信度规则，缺乏灵活性和泛化能力，需要更优的、可泛化的Token承诺机制。
AI.method: 提出TraceLock，一个轻量级可插拔的控制器，通过“未来稳定性”自监督机制学习Token承诺策略——即某个Token如果在全部解码过程中都未被更改，则认为其稳定。控制器根据当前状态动态决定哪些Token应被承诺，无需针对输入窗口、长度和步数单独微调或重新训练。
AI.result: 在问答、数学推理和代码生成多个任务上，TraceLock较人工/学习基线取得了更优的质量与步数权衡，并展现出较强的跨设定迁移能力。分析表明其决策超越传统置信度，揭示了更丰富的可学习决策空间。
AI.conclusion: TraceLock为大语言模型的扩散解码带来高效、稳定且可迁移的Token承诺策略，有助于提升并行生成的质量和实用性。

title: Path Following Control System of Line-of-Sight Guidance for Robotic Dolphin with Multi-Link Mechanism in Underwater Simulator
summary: Biomimetic autonomous underwater vehicle (BAUV) with multi-link mechanism is widely used in aquatic life observation and environmental surveys due to its low power consumption and high maneuverability. An environmental survey requires a path following system that automatically follows specific points. However, the path following system of BAUV is limited, and its evaluation with multi-link mechanism robots has not yet been clarified. The path following system in BAUV requires prior simulation because the model differs depending on the type of biomimetics. In this study, we propose a path following system for BAUVs with a multi-link mechanism and evaluation in underwater simulation. In this result, it was possible to design a path following system suitable for BAUV, determine parameters using a simulator, and evaluate control methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于多连杆仿生自主水下航行器（BAUV）的路径跟随系统，并在水下仿真环境中进行评估。
AI.motivation: 目前多连杆BAUV由于能源消耗低和机动性高，被广泛用于水下观测和环境调查，但其路径跟随系统受限，对此类系统的评估尚不明确。
AI.method: 提出并设计了一套适用于多连杆BAUV的自动路径跟随系统，并结合仿真器对参数进行调优和控制方法进行评估。
AI.result: 成功设计出适用于BAUV的路径跟随系统，在模拟环境下找到了合适的参数，并评估了控制方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的路径跟随系统可满足多连杆BAUV的需要，并可通过仿真优化参数和提升控制性能。

title: SILSM: A Sustainable Interactive Level Set Method for Progressive Refinement
summary: Interactive segmentation aims to precisely isolate target objects using sparse user guidance. However, traditional methods often suffer from heavy interaction burdens and parameter sensitivity, while deep learning approaches struggle with data dependency and iterative instability. Motivated by these limitations, we propose the Sustainable Interactive Level Set Method (SILSM). The proposed level set evolution equation incorporates interaction, regularization, and segmentation terms. Specifically, high-order regularization is employed to maintain numerical stability, and unlike traditional methods, we decouple user guidance into an independent interaction term to enable direct manual control over the zero-level set evolution. Furthermore, we develop a numerical algorithm tailored for multiple interactions, which facilitates dynamic refinement by effectively updating the segmentation results based on sequential user inputs. We theoretically demonstrate that the high-order term provides stronger regularization constraints than the conventional length term, while the interaction term ensures segmentation strictly within the user-selected region. Experimental results further demonstrate that the proposed method is robust to interactive inputs, achieves competitive performance at the first interaction, and supports stable multi-round interactions with progressively improved segmentation quality.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的可持续交互式水平集方法（SILSM）用于交互式分割，结合高阶正则化与独立交互项，实现了更高的分割精度和更稳定、多轮的交互表现。
AI.motivation: 现有交互式分割方法的主要局限包括：传统水平集方法交互繁琐、参数敏感，深度学习方法过度依赖数据且交互过程可能不稳定。因此需要一种既能减少用户操作压力又能保持数值稳定性的方法。
AI.method: 将水平集演化方程细分为交互、正则化和分割三项。其中高阶正则化增强数值稳定性，独立的交互项允许用户直接控制零水平集的演化。提出了针对多次交互特别设计的数值算法，实现交互结果的动态优化。
AI.result: 理论分析证明高阶正则化强于传统长度约束，并且交互项可以保证分割严格限于用户指定区域。实验显示该方法对用户交互输入具强鲁棒性，首轮交互分割表现优异，且多轮分割过程中分割质量持续提升且过程稳定。
AI.conclusion: SILSM方法兼具高效性、鲁棒性和数值稳定性，能够以较少用户交互实现精确、可持续的目标分割，优于传统和现有深度学习方法。

title: TS-Skill: A Benchmark for Evaluating Analytical Skills in Time-Series Question Answering
summary: Large language models (LLMs) and time-series language models (TSLMs) are increasingly applied to time-series question answering (TSQA). Unlike text-only QA, TSQA requires models to ground answers in temporal signals whose patterns may occur at different scales, specific time locations, or across separated intervals. However, existing benchmarks are typically organized by task types or high-level reasoning categories, making it difficult to diagnose the underlying signal-level capabilities driving model performance. We introduce TS-Skill, a controlled benchmark for evaluating three composable analytical skills in TSQA: temporal scale selection (SK1), temporal localization (SK2), and cross-interval integration (SK3). TS-Skill provides timestamp-aware questions, broad domain coverage, and human-validated QA quality. To construct the benchmark at scale, we develop SKEvol, a skill-guided agentic framework that combines domain-aware time-series seed generation, skill-controlled question generation, metadata- and code-assisted answer construction, multi-phase signal-grounded verification, and human-in-the-loop curation. Experiments on ten state-of-the-art LLMs and TSLMs reveal substantial and uneven capability gaps across SK1-SK3. In particular, SK3 remains consistently challenging for non-agent models, whereas tool-augmented agents show a selective advantage on standalone SK3. These findings demonstrate that skill-level evaluation can uncover temporal reasoning failures that are obscured by aggregate TSQA scores.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TS-Skill基准，用于细致评估大语言模型与时间序列语言模型在时间序列问答领域的信号级分析能力，发现各模型在不同技能间表现差异显著，特别是在跨区间整合能力上存在明显不足。
AI.motivation: 现有时间序列问答基准主要按任务类型或推理类别组织，难以诊断模型在底层信号处理方面的具体能力，因此需要更细致、可控的技能级评测工具。
AI.method: 提出TS-Skill基准，包含三项可组合分析技能：时间尺度选择（SK1）、时间定位（SK2）、跨区间整合（SK3）；并开发SKEvol自动化框架，从领域时序数据生成到多阶段信号验证，并引入人工参与，确保数据质量。
AI.result: 在十个先进的大语言模型和时间序列模型上进行实验，发现模型在三项技能上存在明显性能差异，尤其是SK3（跨区间整合）对非工具增强模型构成挑战，而具备辅助工具的Agent型模型则更具优势。
AI.conclusion: 技能级评估能够揭示模型在时序推理上的具体短板，补充传统整体分数无法反映的问题，有助于进一步推动时序问答模型能力的提升。

title: How to Mitigate the Distribution Shift Problem in Robotics Control: A Robust and Adaptive Approach Based on Offline to Online Imitation Learning
summary: Distribution shift in imitation learning refers to the problem that the agent cannot plan proper actions for a state that has not been visited during the training. This problem can be largely attributed to the inherently narrow state-action coverage provided by expert demonstrations over the full environment. In this paper, we propose a robust offline to adaptive online imitation learning framework that handles the distribution shift problem in a lifelong, multi-phase scheme. In the offline learning phase, we leverage supplementary demonstrations to broaden the state-action coverage of the policy by utilizing a discriminator to effectively train the policy with supplementary demonstrations, thereby enhancing the robustness of the policy to distribution shift. In the subsequent online inference phase, our framework detects the occurrence of distribution shift and conducts self-supervised imitation learning from online experiences to adapt the policy to the online environments. Through extensive evaluations in MuJoCo environments, we demonstrate that our method exhibits better robustness to distribution shift and better adaptation performance to online environments than the baseline algorithms, which indicates superior performance of our framework against the distribution shift.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种针对模仿学习中分布转移问题的全新离线到自适应在线框架，有效提升了策略的鲁棒性和适应能力。
AI.motivation: 模仿学习中，智能体训练时因状态-动作覆盖范围有限，导致在未见过的状态下容易出现策略失效（即分布转移），影响实际应用效果。
AI.method: 在离线阶段，通过引入辅助演示并利用判别器，提升策略对更多状态-动作对的覆盖，实现更鲁棒的初始策略；在线阶段，通过检测分布转移并自监督地从新体验中再学习，使策略能够自适应新环境。
AI.result: 在MuJoCo环境下的实验表明，该方法在应对分布转移和适应在线环境方面都优于基线算法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的框架能够有效减缓分布转移带来的负面影响，显著提升模仿学习算法的实用性和性能。

title: EgoProx: Evaluating MLLMs on Egocentric 3D Proximity Reasoning Across a Cognitive Hierarchy
summary: Humans constantly reason about 3D proximity, the relations between their body and surrounding objects, to guide perception and action in daily life. Whether multimodal large language models (MLLMs) can perform such embodied 3D reasoning remains unclear. To this end, we introduce EgoProx, a benchmark for egocentric 3D proximity reasoning. We organize our tasks along a cognitive chain, covering intention, exploration, exploitation, and chain-of-actions reasoning. We also design an agent based data engine that produces diverse and consistent QA pairs at scale. We benchmark prevailing MLLMs on EgoProx and conduct additional analyses with dataset specific and task specific instruction tuning. We observe large cross-domain gains, indicating that current MLLMs contain some spatial knowledge; however, they still struggle to effectively leverage it for spatial reasoning VQA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了EgoProx基准，用于评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在人类自我中心的3D空间推理方面的能力。结果表明，当前MLLMs表现出一定的空间知识，但在空间推理问答任务中仍有较大提升空间。
AI.motivation: 人类在日常生活中需要通过3D空间推理与环境互动，目前尚不清楚多模态大语言模型是否能胜任这种具身推理。为评估和推动MLLMs在这一方向的发展，作者提出了新的基准和任务。
AI.method: 作者设计了EgoProx数据集，覆盖意图、探索、利用和行动链等认知环节，并用智能体生成了大规模一致的问答数据。对主流MLLMs进行了基准测试，并结合特定数据集和任务指令微调进行深入分析。
AI.result: 实验显示，经过特定训练后当前MLLMs在不同任务领域上表现出了明显进步，证明其具备一定的空间认知能力。但在更复杂的空间推理视觉问答任务上仍面临挑战。
AI.conclusion: 虽然MLLMs已拥有部分空间知识，但在具身3D空间推理方面距离人类能力还有差距，需要进一步改进模型结构和训练方法。

title: The Tokenizer Tax Across 25 European Languages: Domain Invariance, Cross-Lingual Few-Shot Effects, and the Ukrainian Penalty
summary: Tokenizer fertility the number of tokens per word imposes a hidden cost on non-English NLP. We measure fertility for ten foundation models across 25 European languages on parallel text, producing the first controlled tokenizer tax map for the continent. The tax spans 2.5x from English (1.2 tokens/word) to Greek/Maltese (~3.1), following a clear hierarchy: Romance (1.5-1.7), Germanic (1.7-1.9), Slavic (2.2-2.5), Uralic/Baltic (2.7-3.0). Ukrainian (2.7) pays 15-18% more than cognate Slavic languages, reflecting underrepresentation in pre-training data. Fertility rankings are domain-invariant across three text registers (rho > 0.97). A subword analysis reveals that high-fertility tokenizers fragment morphological boundaries rather than preserving them. Cross-lingual few-shot evaluation on four Slavic languages shows that few-shot effects are model-intrinsic, not language-dependent. We release all measurements as a public dataset.

AI.tldr: 本论文首次系统性测量并绘制了25个欧洲语言在不同主流模型下的Tokenization“税负”地图，揭示非英语NLP面临的额外开销。
AI.motivation: 主流NLP模型大多以英语为中心，不同语言在分词时需要额外token，导致“隐藏的代价”，尤其在非英语任务中影响公平性与效果。
AI.method: 对25种欧洲语言的平行语料在10种主流基础模型下进行Token数量统计，系统比较各语言Tokenizer Fertility，并分语系、域分析，进一步通过子词分析考察Token边界与形态结构关系，并做跨语言few-shot实验证明该效应属于模型内生。
AI.result: 不同语系分词税负明显：英语最低(1.2)，而希腊语、马耳他语等最高(~3.1)。乌克兰语较其他斯拉夫语高15-18%，与预训练语料稀缺对应。Token分割偏离形态边界。跨语域排名非常一致（rho>0.97），few-shot效应归因于模型本身。
AI.conclusion: 现有Tokenizer对非英语语言存在系统性“分词税”，尤其低资源语言更显著，这对多语言NLP公平性和下游效果造成挑战，需引起关注，并已公开全部数据以促进后续研究。

title: OPAL: Omnidirectional Path-efficient Aerial 3D expLoration
comment: Submitted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)
summary: Autonomous exploration is critical for robot mapping unknown environments. Desirable characteristics of exploration algorithms include compute efficiency and small traversed distance during the exploration process. Motivated by these, we present Omnidirectional Path-efficient Aerial 3D expLoration (OPAL), an exploration framework centered on deliberate 360-degree yaw rotation at ambiguous branch points rather than compute-heavy global tour planning. We devise multiple variants of OPAL to determine the frontier-selection strategy once the yaw pan is completed. One variant is model-free, while others use large language models (LLMs) or vision-language models (VLMs). We characterize the performance of these variants while varying the vicinity search radius to include frontiers in the selection process. Through simulations we find that although the time-consuming in-place yaw rotation increases total exploration time relative to more computationally complex baselines such as EDEN and FALCON, OPAL is computationally simpler and achieves shorter travel distances and higher coverage-versus-distance area under the curve. We also show that adjusting the frontier-selection search radius enables a tradeoff between travel distance and total exploration time. We verify our results on a Modal AI drone in two indoor environments by comparing OPAL against FALCON, and find that the traveled distance for a variant of OPAL to be as much as 25% lower than FALCON.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了针对三维无人机自主探索的新框架OPAL，通过在分岔点进行全方位转向替代复杂的全局路径规划，以减少计算量和路径长度。实验显示OPAL在总路程和覆盖率方面优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有探索算法普遍计算量大，或会导致机器人在环境中行走距离过长。研究旨在寻求计算高效、探索路径短、适合实时无人机应用的新方法。
AI.method: 提出OPAL框架，在不明确选择前进方向的分岔点实施360度原地旋转（yaw pan），随后采用不同前沿点选择策略，包括无模型方法，以及基于大语言模型和视觉-语言模型的方法。系统性比较不同策略下的表现，并调整前沿点搜索半径以考察效率和路径的权衡。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，尽管原地旋转略增总探索时间，OPAL较EDEN与FALCON等基线算法在计算上更简单，并显著缩短实际行走距离，提高单位距离的面积覆盖度。实地测试中，OPAL某一版本比FALCON路径长度低达25%。
AI.conclusion: OPAL框架在保持计算效率和路径最短化上取得了良好平衡，适合实时3D无人机探索任务，前沿点搜索半径的调整还能灵活权衡路径长度与探索时间。

title: Coarse-to-Fine Domain Incremental Learning with Attentive Distillation for Mining Footprint Segmentation in Multispectral Imagery
summary: Automatically mapping and segmenting global mining footprints using remote sensing and deep learning is critical for monitoring the socio-environmental risks and impacts of mining, yet its progress is hindered by the scarcity of fine-grained annotated data. Although large-scale datasets with coarse boundaries are widely available, leveraging them to improve fine-grained segmentation is challenging due to significant domain shift. To address this, we propose MineC2FNet, a coarse-to-fine domain incremental learning framework that exploits abundant coarse data to enhance fine-grained mining footprint segmentation. MineC2FNet adopts a teacher-student architecture with attentive distillation at both the feature and prediction levels, selectively transferring generalized knowledge from the coarse domain while enabling boundary refinement using limited fine-grained data (fine domain). We further introduce an expertly validated dataset of 219 images with precise boundary annotations across diverse geographies and commodities. Extensive experiments against state-of-the-art approaches, including domain adaptation and domain incremental learning methods, demonstrate that MineC2FNet achieves superior performance while effectively handling domain shift. The dataset and code are publicly available at https://github.com/risqiutama/MineC2FNet.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合遥感与深度学习的新框架MineC2FNet，用于全球矿业足迹的自动映射与精细分割，有效提升了在缺乏精细标注数据场景下的分割效果。
AI.motivation: 矿业活动对社会与环境影响巨大，遥感与AI用于其监测有重要意义。但全精度标注的数据稀缺，导致高精度分割任务进展缓慢，现有大规模数据只提供粗糙边界。本研究致力于解决粗细粒度数据域带来的领域转移难题。
AI.method: 提出MineC2FNet，采用教师-学生结构，实现从粗到细的领域增量学习。通过特征与预测层级的关注蒸馏，从粗糙域中有选择地迁移知识，并结合有限的精细标注样本精化边界。同时构建了涵盖多地多矿种的精细标注影像数据集。
AI.result: 与当前主流领域自适应与增量学习方法对比，MineC2FNet在应对领域转移与提升精细分割性能方面表现更优。实验证明该方法效果明显领先于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: 利用丰富的粗粒度数据，通过创新的跨域学习框架，有效提升了矿业区精细分割的效果。所发布的数据集与代码进一步促进该领域的发展。

title: World-State Transformations for Neuro-symbolic Interactive Storytelling
comment: To be presented at the 17th International Conference on Computational Creativity (ICCC'26)
summary:
Large Language Models (LLMs) have changed the possibilities of Interactive Storytelling systems that process free-text user input. However, as more of these systems are built, evidence continues to mount regarding the story coherence problems that arise when relying solely on them. Recent research suggests that LLMs can effectively predict state changes within rule-based Interactive Storytelling systems, triggering pre-programmed world-state transformations.
  In this paper, we conduct an exploratory evaluation of whether such transformations can serve as a catalyst for player expression while aiming to address the incoherence issues typical of purely LLM-based approaches. Building upon a neuro-symbolic architecture, we conducted experiments using an open-source model (Llama 3 70B) and a closed-source model (Gemini 1.5 Flash), with testing conducted in both English and Spanish. Eight participants played two scenarios, carefully designed to assess different evaluation objectives. Our observations suggest that transformations offer a way to maintain world-state consistency while encouraging players to interact creatively through their written inputs.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨将规则驱动的世界状态变换机制引入大语言模型（LLM）互动叙事系统，以弥补纯LLM驱动下故事连贯性不足问题。实验显示，该方法在增强连贯性的同时，也未抑制玩家的创造性交互。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的互动叙事系统，虽然能处理用户自由文本输入，但容易出现故事连贯性不佳的问题。为提升叙事质量并探索玩家表达潜力，研究希望将规则系统的状态变换与LLM结合，平衡创造力和一致性。
AI.method: 作者基于神经符号架构，在开源模型（Llama 3 70B）和闭源模型（Gemini 1.5 Flash）上进行了实验。采用英语和西班牙语两种语言，安排了8位参与者体验两种不同叙事场景，针对不同的评估目标进行测试和观察。
AI.result: 实验观察发现，引入规则驱动的世界状态变换不仅有助于维持虚拟世界的逻辑一致性，也能够激发参与者通过文本进行创造性的互动表达。
AI.conclusion: 将规则系统的状态变换机制与LLM结合，是提升互动叙事系统连贯性且不损害玩家表达自由的有效方式。

title: EXPO-FT: Sample-Efficient Reinforcement Learning Finetuning for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: The ability to efficiently and reliably learn new tasks has been a foundational challenge in robotics. Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have demonstrated strong generalization across diverse manipulation tasks, yet pretrained policies consistently fall short of the reliability required for real-world deployment. Reinforcement learning (RL) fine-tuning offers a promising path to bridge this gap, but existing approaches either train from scratch without fully leveraging pretrained priors, or fine-tune VLAs without achieving the sample efficiency and success rates that practical deployment demands. We present EXPO-FT, a system for stable, sample-efficient RL finetuning of pretrained VLA policies that closes this gap. Our system solves a suite of challenging manipulation tasks, including routing string lights and inserting the plug to light it up, striking a pool ball into a pocket, and inserting a flower into a wine bottle, each requiring combinations of high precision, dynamic actions, and robustness to varied initial states. Our system achieves perfect task performance (30/30 successes) across all evaluated tasks within an average of 19.1 minutes of online robot data, outperforming both prior RL-from-scratch and VLA finetuning approaches. We release an open-source codebase with the aim of facilitating broader adoption of RL finetuning of VLA models in robotics.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种高效、稳定的强化学习微调框架EXPO-FT，用于提升预训练的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在机器人任务中的泛化和实用性。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型虽泛化能力强，但直接用在实际机器人的成功率和可靠性仍达不到部署标准；而现有强化学习微调方法存在样本效率低、未充分利用预训练信息、成功率不理想等问题。
AI.method: 提出了EXPO-FT系统，专为快速、稳定地对预训练VLA策略进行强化学习微调，以弥补有效性和效率的不足，并将该方法应用于一系列复杂的机器人操作任务（如灯串插拔、台球击球、瓶插花等）。
AI.result: EXPO-FT在所有评测任务上均实现了完美表现（30/30次成功），微调平均只需19.1分钟的机器人在线数据，明显优于现有RL-from-scratch和VLA微调方法。
AI.conclusion: EXPO-FT有效提升了VLA模型实际应用的能力，极大增强了样本效率和实际成功率，为VLA类模型的机器人部署提供了可行且高效的新路径，并开源了代码促进研究社区应用。

title: TempRet: Temporal Enhancement and Two-Stage Reranking for CVPR 2026 EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Multi-Instance Retrieval Challenge
comment: Technical Report for CVPR 2026 EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Multi-Instance Retrieval Challenge
summary: Video-text retrieval has witnessed remarkable progress driven by large-scale vision-language pretraining, yet most existing approaches inherit an implicit assumption from image-text retrieval: that visual semantics can be captured frame-by-frame. This assumption overlooks the temporal dynamics of egocentric videos. The EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Multi-Instance Retrieval (MIR) challenge further raises the bar by providing soft-label relevance matrices rather than binary labels, demanding models that can resolve graded semantic correspondences across modalities. In this report, we present our solution, termed TempRet, to the CVPR 2026 EPIC-KITCHENS-100 MIR challenge. Our approach builds upon a CLIP-based dual-encoder backbone and introduces two key components to address the temporal and cross-modal challenges. First, a temporal transformer operates exclusively on the video side, modeling inter-frame dependencies through learnable positional encodings and multi-head self-attention over frame-level CLIP features. Second, a two-stage reranking pipeline first retrieves Top-K candidates via the dual-encoder, then refines their scores using a cross-encoder equipped with an Image-Text Matching (ITM) head. The entire system is trained with Symmetric Multi-Similarity Loss to exploit the soft-label relevance matrices provided by the challenge. Our method achieves 67.97% average mAP and 82.92% average nDCG on the EK-100 MIR benchmark, demonstrating the effectiveness of temporal modeling and cross-modal refinement for egocentric video retrieval.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TempRet的新方法，针对EPIC-KITCHENS-100 MIR挑战，结合时序建模和跨模态重新排序，有效提升了自视频文本检索性能。
AI.motivation: 目前主流视频文本检索方法多受图像-文本检索假设的影响，忽略了第一视角视频中的时序动态信息；此外，挑战赛采用软标签相关性矩阵而非二值标签，对模型提出了更高要求，需要更好地处理跨模态的细粒度相关匹配。
AI.method: 1. 基于CLIP双编码器结构；2. 在视频侧引入时序Transformer，用于建模帧间依赖关系（通过可学习的位置编码和多头自注意力完成）；3. 两阶段重新排序流程：先用双编码器检索Top-K，再用Cross-Encoder结合Image-Text Matching（ITM）头精细地重排序；4. 全系统采用对称多相似性损失，以利用挑战赛提供的软标签相关性矩阵。
AI.result: 在EK-100 MIR基准测试上，方法达到了67.97%的平均mAP和82.92%的平均nDCG，成果显著优于简单聚合帧特征的方法。
AI.conclusion: 引入时序建模及跨模态精细重排序，有效提升了第一视角视频-文本检索的精度。本文的方法适用于软标签细粒度跨模态检索，为相关领域研究提供了有价值的参考。

title: ROC Analysis for Evaluating Translation Quality Estimation Systems
comment: 16 pages, 8 PNG figures, 3 tables, uses acl.sty
summary: The increasing use of automated translation quality estimation (QE) systems calls for practical, decision-oriented methods for evaluating their performance. We propose that Receiver Operating Characteristic (ROC) analysis is a useful approach for this purpose. Our study shows that ROC analysis not only produces results consistent with currently prevalent methods, but also offers several important advantages, including actionable performance insights that support business decision-making.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用ROC分析法用于自动翻译质量评估系统（QE）的效果评测，发现该方法不仅与当前主流方法结果一致，还能为实际决策提供有价值的洞见。
AI.motivation: 当前自动翻译质量评估系统被广泛使用，但缺乏面向实际决策、具有实用性的评估方法，因此需要更有效的性能评估手段。
AI.method: 提出采用ROC（受试者工作特征）分析法，对翻译质量评估系统进行性能评测，并与既有主流方法进行对比分析。
AI.result: ROC分析法评测结果与当前常用评估方法一致，同时RO分析还能为系统实际应用和业务决策提供更多有意义的性能反馈。
AI.conclusion: ROC分析不仅是QE系统性能评估的有效工具，还能提供辅助实际业务决策的有效数据，具备明显的实践优势。

title: RepSAM: Bridging Foundation Models to Robotic Vision via Representation-Guided Adaptation
comment: Accepted to IJCAI-ECAI 2026 (Special Track on AI and Robotics). 8 pages, 4 figures, 12 tables
summary: Robotic perception in unstructured environments remains challenging despite the zero-shot capabilities of foundation models such as SAM. This work attributes performance degradation to non-uniform representation shifts across transformer layers: shallow layers exhibit substantial domain gaps (CKA < 0.5), whereas deep layers transfer effectively (CKA > 0.7). Based on this observation, we propose RepSAM, a representation-guided parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) framework for adapting foundation models to robotic vision. RepSAM employs a theoretically grounded CKA-guided rank allocation strategy combined with a multi-modal fusion module for robust handling of challenging robotic scenarios, including transparent objects and cluttered scenes. Experimental evaluation across six benchmarks and robotic manipulation tasks demonstrates that RepSAM achieves 97.9% of full fine-tuning performance (89.0% vs. 90.9% mIoU) while reducing trainable parameters by 158x (from 632M to 4.0M). RepSAM outperforms DoRA by 7.9% mIoU with just 4 hours of training on a single A100 GPU (a 96x reduction from full fine-tuning, which takes 384 GPU-hours). These improvements are statistically significant (p < 0.01) and translate to a 12.0% absolute improvement in robotic manipulation success rates over the LoRA (RGB) baseline.

AI.tldr: 提出RepSAM方法，提高了基础模型在机器人视觉中的适应能力，显著减少参数与训练时间，取得优越的分割性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管SAM等基础模型具备零样本能力，但在非结构化环境中的感知表现不佳，主要原因在于Transformer各层的表征迁移能力不均。
AI.method: 分析基础模型在不同层的表征迁移性后，提出RepSAM：一种基于CKA指导的参数高效微调框架，包含秩分配策略和多模态融合模块，用于更好地适配复杂机器人视觉任务。
AI.result: 在六个基准和实际操作任务中，RepSAM用比全量微调少158倍的参数、96倍的训练时长，达成接近全量微调的分割性能（mIoU提升，97.9%逼近）且显著优于主流对比方法如DoRA和LoRA。
AI.conclusion: RepSAM大幅提升了基础模型在机器人感知中的泛化能力和操作成功率，兼具训练和参数高效性，适合实际机器人应用，具有重要实用价值。

title: Robust Fuzzy Multi-view Learning under View Conflict
summary: Trusted multi-view classification aims to deliver reliable fusion for accurate predictions and has recently attracted substantial attention in both academia and industry. However, existing TMVC methods typically assume strict alignment across different views during both training and testing phases, which is often impractical in real-world scenarios. This limitation motivates us to revisit TMVC and extend it to a more challenging setting: how to mitigate the impact of view conflict (VC) during both training and inference. To tackle this setting, existing TMVC methods suffer from three critical limitations: underestimated uncertainty, misleading decisions, and overfitting to VC. To address these issues, this paper proposes a novel Robust Fuzzy Multi-View Learning (R-FUML) framework grounded in Fuzzy Set Theory. Specifically, R-FUML models network outputs as fuzzy memberships to quantify category credibility and uses an entropy-based method for reliable multi-view fusion. To this end, we present a Robust Multi-view Fusion (RMF) strategy that accounts for both view-specific uncertainty and inter-view conflicts, thereby alleviating the adverse impacts of VC on decision-making. To identify and conquer VC during training, we further design a Robust Learning Against VC (RLVC) framework. RLVC isolates conflicting samples by leveraging neural networks' memory effects and then retrains the model by applying a penalty to these conflicting views. Extensive experiments across eight public datasets demonstrate that R-FUML consistently outperforms 15 state-of-the-art baselines in robustness and uncertainty estimation. The code will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种鲁棒的模糊多视图学习（R-FUML）框架，有效应对多视图分类中的视图冲突（VC）问题，提高了多视图数据融合的可靠性和模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有可信多视图分类（TMVC）方法通常假设各视图在训练和测试时严格对齐，但在实际场景中这一假设不现实。多视图间经常存在不一致（VC），导致分类不准确。因此，论文旨在解决在有視圖衝突的情况下，如何可靠地进行多视图融合和分类。
AI.method: 基于模糊集理论，提出R-FUML框架，将网络输出建模为对各类别的模糊隶属度用于不确定性量化，并通过基于熵的多视图融合实现可靠输出。具体包括：1）鲁棒多视图融合（RMF）策略，兼顾各视图的不确定性及视图间冲突；2）鲁棒对抗视图冲突（RLVC）训练机制，通过神经网络记忆效应区分并隔离冲突样本，再对这些样本施加惩罚以提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在8个公开多视图数据集上，R-FUML的鲁棒性和不确定性估计性能显著优于15个主流方法。
AI.conclusion: R-FUML能有效缓解多视图分类中视图冲突带来的负面影响，并大幅提升多视图融合的鲁棒性和预测可靠性，为实际多视图融合应用提供了更可信的解决方案。

title: StepGap: A Hybrid NLI-LLM Checker for Step-Level Evidence-Gap Detectionin Multi-Hop Question Answering
summary: We present \textbf{StepGap}, a hybrid NLI-LLM decision tree that detects step-level evidence gaps in multi-hop QA and emits one of three typed labels: \textsc{Contradicted Claim} (CC), \textsc{Irrelevant Evidence} (IE), or \textsc{Missing Bridge} (MB), each tied to a concrete repair action. On 82 multi-hop questions (181 annotated steps, $κ{=}0.704$), StepGap reaches sF1$=$72.0, within the bootstrap confidence interval of an LLM-only baseline (70.1) but with a more decomposable structure: every StepGap stage \emph{hurts} F1 when removed, while three of four LLM-only removals \emph{improve} F1 -- a sign of \emph{competing-error cancellation}, where internal stages mask each other's errors. We further expose a \emph{Q-F1 trap}: question-level F1 is mechanically inflated by checkers that flag every step, making step-level F1 the necessary diagnostic. Used as a typed GRPO process reward, StepGap improves Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct Exact Match from $32.1{\pm}0.3$ to $35.4{\pm}0.9$ across three seeds, with the single-run comparison showing a $+5.6$ Avg EM gain over the matched Search-R1 GRPO reproduction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了StepGap，一个混合NLI-LLM决策树模型，用于检测多跳问答中每一步的证据缺口，并将其分类为三种类型：矛盾声明、无关证据和缺失桥接，分别对应具体的修正措施。该模型在分步诊断、性能提升和结构可解释性方面优于传统的LLM-only方法。
AI.motivation: 现有多跳问答（multi-hop QA）系统难以准确诊断推理步骤中的证据缺口，且很多时候依赖的大模型判别不可分解，诊断难以精细落实到推理每一步。作者希望提出一种方法，能自动发现并细分类推理过程中出现的各类证据信息缺失（如矛盾、无关、桥接缺失），推动问答系统更可解释和易于修正。
AI.method: 提出了StepGap混合决策树，将NLI与LLM结合，对多跳QA问题的每步推理进行证据缺口检测。该方法可输出三种标签（矛盾声明、无关证据、缺失桥接），并与具体修正方案挂钩。并通过注释数据进行分步F1评测，同时探讨了与LLM-only基线和其各阶段删减在F1上的影响。
AI.result: 在82道多跳问题（181步注释，kappa=0.704）上，StepGap取得了step-level F1为72.0，性能与LLM-only基线接近但结构更可解释；经消融实验，发现StepGap的每一步都对性能有帮助，而LLM-only各模块相互抵消错误。采用StepGap作为奖励机制，Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct模型在Exact Match指标上由32.1提升到35.4，并在对比实验中有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: StepGap不仅能精准、可分解地诊断多跳问答推理中的证据缺口，还能提升问答模型实际表现，是更具解释力和实用性的自动诊断组件。同时，论文指出step-level F1才是诊断推理系统性能的必要指标。

title: Action-Prior Denoising for Smooth Real-Time Chunking
summary: Real-time chunking (RTC) lets chunked action policies operate under inference delay by conditioning a newly generated action chunk on actions already committed by the previous chunk. Training-time RTC simulates this delay during learning and avoids expensive guidance at deployment, but its binary prefix mask treats all non-prefix tokens as fully unconstrained. This under-models asynchronous execution: early overlap actions are fixed, while later overlap actions remain editable but should still stay close to the previous plan. We propose Soft RTC, a training-time RTC generalization based on action-prior denoising. Soft RTC constructs corrupted overlap tokens from partially denoised states instead of pure noise and injects the aligned previous chunk as the same prior during inference through a lightweight token-wise blending rule. On the 12 released large Kinetix levels, a short soft window nearly matches hard training-time RTC in overall solve rate (0.809 vs. 0.815), while a medium window reduces high-delay action delta and jerk by 9.1% and 9.6% relative to hard RTC. Both variants keep near-naive runtime, unlike inference-time RTC baselines. A small preliminary real-robot sorting study provides additional evidence that training-time RTC can improve completion and that Soft RTC gives the lowest commanded-action finite-difference metrics among the tested policies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Soft RTC的改进型实时分块（RTC）策略训练方法，有效提升了动作计划在存在推理延迟时的表现，并在Kinetix关卡和初步机器人实验中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有的RTC策略在推理时存在延迟，通过前缀蒙版进行动作分块，但该方法将所有非前缀动作看作无约束，低估了异步执行过程中不同分块动作的关联性。实际中早期重叠动作通常已被确定，后续重叠动作仍可编辑但应保持与计划的一致性。需要更精细地建模重叠序列的约束和可编辑性，以提升任务完成和动作平滑度。
AI.method: 提出Soft RTC，利用部分去噪状态而非纯噪声生成被扰动重叠动作，通过轻量的token级加权方法，在推理时将先前分块信息纳入动作生成。训练及推理过程中分别注入更细致的上下文，兼顾灵活性与对历史动作的约束。
AI.result: Soft RTC在12关Kinetix测试中，短重叠窗口下整体完成率（0.809）几乎与硬前缀RTC（0.815）持平，中等窗口设置下高延迟动作变化和突变分别比硬RTC降低9.1%和9.6%。推理效率接近原生RTC，远好于推理阶段引导的对照组。在真实机器人分拣实验中，Soft RTC也取得了最小动作变化等指标的领先表现。
AI.conclusion: Soft RTC兼顾动作灵活性与历史一致性，能在保证效率的同时改善动作平滑性和任务完成度，相比硬RTC和推理时RTC具有更优的工程实用性。

title: OmniEgo-R$^2$: A Routed Reasoning Framework for the 1st Cross-Domain EgoCross Challenge at CVPR 2026
comment: Technical Report for the 1st Cross-Domain EgoCross Challenge at CVPR 2026
summary: The 1st Cross-Domain EgoCross Challenge at EgoVis, CVPR 2026 evaluates whether multimodal large language models can reason over egocentric videos across surgery, industry, extreme sports, and animal perspective. We achieved second place in both the Source-Limited and Open-Source tracks. In this report, we formulate EgoCross as a robust cross-domain embodied video reasoning problem rather than a simple multiple-choice visual question answering task. We identify three key challenges: (C1) temporal boundary ambiguity, where critical state transitions are sparsely sampled and often occur between frames; (C2) cross-domain semantic granularity mismatch, where the same capability requires different domain-specific visual grammar; and (C3) decision instability under close options, where long multimodal reasoning can select unsupported distractors or produce malformed outputs. To address them, we propose OmniEgo-R$^2$ (Omnidomain Egocentric Routed Reasoning), a unified routed reasoning pipeline consisting of temporal-evidence normalization, domain-agnostic capability routing, structured perception--dynamics--decision reasoning, boundary-aware option verification, and defensive answer calibration. OmniEgo-R$^2$ uses the Qwen3-VL-4B-SFT checkpoints on each EgoCross domain as the visual-language backbone, and wraps them with lightweight test-time reasoning and parsing programs. Our final submissions obtain 66.35% overall accuracy in the Source-Limited track and 66.77% in the Open-Source track, ranking second in both leaderboards.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了OmniEgo-R^2方法，用于应对跨领域自我视角视频推理挑战，并在竞赛中取得第二名。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大模型在自我视角视频推理上的表现有限，难以应对跨领域、多粒度、边界模糊等复杂情境，亟需更鲁棒的推理框架。
AI.method: 作者将问题重新定义为跨领域具身视频推理，提出了OmniEgo-R^2方法，包括时序证据归一化、领域无关能力路由、结构化感知-动态-决策推理、边界感知选项验证、防御性答案校准等模块，并采用Qwen3-VL-4B-SFT作为视觉-语言骨干。
AI.result: 方法在EgoCross Challenge的Source-Limited和Open-Source赛道分别取得66.35%和66.77%的准确率，均排名第二。
AI.conclusion: OmniEgo-R^2展现出优越的跨领域自我视角视频推理能力，能有效应对时序、语义和决策挑战，对后续具身AI发展具有借鉴价值。

title: Who judges the judges? Governance from metrics: a runtime framework for continuous LLM compliance monitoring
summary: Current approaches to AI compliance treat conformity as a binary, audit-time verdict rather than a continuous, measurable property of production systems. We argue that this compliance fiction is structurally ill-suited to the requirements of the EU AI Act, which demands ongoing human oversight and the detection of emergent behavioural drift in deployed systems. We introduce governance from metrics, a principle whereby regulatory compliance is derived as a continuous signal from runtime observability rather than from static assessments. Building on this principle, we present govllm, an open-source framework implementing a governance-driven routing architecture in which model selection is determined by accumulated compliance scores rather than by latency or cost alone. Central to our approach is a panel of regulatory judges - LLM evaluators specialised per criterion (EU AI Act, GDPR, ANSSI, accessibility) - whose inter-judge disagreement we reframe not as noise but as a regulatory uncertainty signal warranting human arbitration. We validate this approach through a ground truth corpus of 49 annotated prompt/response pairs across five regulatory criteria, evaluated by four small language models (SLMs, 1.7B-7B parameters) running fully on-premise. Agreement rates range from 51.5% (mistral:7b) to 69.1% (phi4-mini), with no single model dominating across all criteria - empirically motivating the Profile-as-jury design. We further document three structural failure modes in small regulatory judges and a judge-specific position bias that degrades agreement by up to 25 percentage points across three question-order conditions (original, reversed, permuted). govllm is released as open-source software to support reproducible AI governance research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将AI合规性作为可持续、可度量信号处理的新方法，并实现了开源治理框架govllm，通过多个小型模型的“合规评分”动态选择模型，而不是单纯考虑延迟和成本，并将模型间的不一致作为需要人工裁决的合规性不确定性信号。
AI.motivation: 现有AI合规性方法多以静态审计为核心，无法满足欧盟AI法持续监控与行为漂移检测的要求。本文提出新的治理思路，以适应更实时、动态的合规要求。
AI.method: 提出“从度量进行治理”原则，以运行时观测获得合规信号。设计并实现govllm框架，采用多模型“合规法官团”，并通过模型间不一致来发出合规不确定性信号，需要人工干预。对49组标注的问答数据集，在5项合规标准下，对4个小语言模型进行全面评测。
AI.result: 不同模型的合规判定一致率介于51.5%至69.1%之间，无一模型在所有标准占优，验证了“法官团”设计的必要性。发现了三类结构性失败模式和显著的位置偏差现象（最多降低25%一致率）。
AI.conclusion: 将合规性作为持续可测量的属性更适配监管需求，通过开源govllm验证了治理架构的可行性。模型组合与人工干预是实现可靠AI合规的重要手段，为AI治理研究提供了新工具和数据。

title: Safety-Critical Whole-Body Control for Humanoid Robots via Input-to-State Safe Control Barrier Functions
summary: Safety-critical control is essential for humanoid robots operating in complex human-centered environments, where physical safety constraints such as joint limits, self-collision avoidance, obstacle avoidance, and workspace boundaries must be satisfied during real-robot operation. However, existing approaches remain limited because kinematic safety guarantees can be degraded in the presence of unknown disturbances, such as model uncertainties, trajectory-tracking errors, and external perturbations. This paper presents a hierarchical safety-critical whole-body control framework for humanoid robots based on input-to-state safe control barrier functions (ISSf-CBFs). The proposed architecture integrates a kinematic-level whole-body controller (KinWBC), an ISSf-CBF safety filter, and a dynamic-level whole-body controller (DynWBC). KinWBC generates nominal joint-motion references from prioritized tasks; the ISSf-CBF filter minimally modifies these references to satisfy kinematic safety constraints under bounded disturbances; and DynWBC tracks the filtered references while enforcing full-body dynamic feasibility and contact stability. Safety constraints are imposed on a whole-body kinematic model, and the ISSf-CBF parameters are conservatively tuned so that the resulting kinematic safety guarantees can be transferred to full-order humanoid dynamics under unknown disturbances. Simulation and real-robot experiments demonstrate that the proposed framework improves safety margins under model mismatch and reliably enforces multiple safety constraints in real time during locomotion, teleoperation, and single-leg balancing with hand control. Project website: https://kwlee365.github.io/SafeWBC-Website/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于输入到状态安全控制障碍函数（ISSf-CBF）的分层全身安全控制框架，可在未知干扰下保证仿人机器人运动中的一系列安全约束。通过仿真和真实机器人实验，验证了该方法在多种任务中有效提升了安全裕度、可靠性地满足多种安全约束。
AI.motivation: 仿人机器人在现实复杂环境下操作时，必须满足如关节极限、自碰撞、避障、工作空间边界等安全约束。然而，现有方法在存在模型不确定性、轨迹跟踪误差和外部扰动时，难以保证这些运动学安全约束。本文旨在解决如何在未知扰动下，可靠保障仿人机器人运行安全。
AI.method: 提出一种分层控制架构：上层的运动学级别全身控制器（KinWBC）生成关节参考轨迹，中层的ISSf-CBF安全滤波器在有界干扰下对参考进行最小修改，以保证运动学安全，下层的动力学全身控制器（DynWBC）则跟踪经过安全修正的关节参考同时保证动力学可行性与接触稳定性。
AI.result: 通过仿真和实际机器人（包括行走、远程操控、单腿平衡）实验表明，所提方法在模型不匹配情况下提高了安全裕度，并能实时可靠地满足多种安全约束。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，本文提出的ISSf-CBF分层控制框架可在存在不确定扰动时，为仿人机器人提供更强的全身安全保障，有助于其安全地执行复杂实际任务。

title: Appearance-Invariant Detection of Suggestive Motion via Laban Movement Descriptors on SMPL Skeletons
comment: 2 pages, 2 figures. Accepted as a Poster at SIGGRAPH 2026
summary: Content moderation in online multiplayer 3D virtual environments has recently been relegated to automated, AI-based pipelines. However, the field has mainly been involved in detection of illicit content in images, video, and audio, leaving blind spots in detection techniques for suggestive motion. We present a motion-only classification pipeline that detects suggestive and explicit movement from SMPL skeleton trajectories using Laban Movement Analysis (LMA) descriptors. On 20,514 motion fragments (17+ hours) spanning four ordinal tiers -- everyday, artistic, suggestive, explicit -- logistic regression over 110 LMA features achieves 57.3% four-way accuracy (2.3x chance), 72.1% three-way, and 78.7% binary SFW/NSFW. Confusion concentrates on adjacent tiers, confirming that classification errors are concentrated between adjacent tiers over non-adjacent ones. Moreover, different movement qualities dominate at each level of the taxonomy -- no single feature drives the classification, suggesting that the four-tier structure reflects genuinely distinct motion regimes.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种仅基于动作的分类流程，能够仅通过骨架轨迹识别3D虚拟环境中暗示性与露骨性的运动行为。
AI.motivation: 当前线上3D虚拟环境中的内容监管多依赖AI，但主要用于图像、视频和音频的检测，对于动作中暗示性行为的检测存在盲区。作者希望弥补这一内容审核空白。
AI.method: 作者基于SMPL骨架轨迹，采用拉班动作分析（LMA）方法提取110个特征，利用逻辑回归对20,514段（共17小时）的动作片段按四级层次——日常、艺术、暗示、露骨——进行分类。
AI.result: 四分类准确率为57.3%（为随机水平2.3倍），三分类为72.1%，二分类（健康/不健康）为78.7%。分类混淆主要发生在相邻层级。同时不同动作层级由不同的动作质量主导，没有单一特征能驱动分类，四层级结构反映了运动的真实差异。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效自动检测并区分虚拟环境中的暗示性与露骨性动作，有助于弥补当前内容审核中在“动作”层面的短板。

title: TapSampling: Inference-Time Sampling with a Task-Progress-Understanding Verifier for Robotic Manipulation
summary: Existing embodied control research demonstrates remarkable performance improvements by scaling training data and model size. We instead explore inference-time strategy as an alternative axis. Non-deterministic generative models, such as diffusion and autoregressive models, have been widely adopted in the field of embodied control. However, the single-shot inference paradigm limits their performance. In this paper, we propose \textbf{TapSampling}, a plug-and-play framework for inference-time sampling. First, we introduce an Action-VAE that represents actions in a low-dimensional latent space by mapping policy-generated initial actions into a compressed posterior distribution, from which any number of latent samples can be drawn and decoded into candidate actions that approximate the true action distribution. Second, we formulate action verification as task-progress outcome prediction, using the intrinsic sequential structure of robotic datasets to train a semantically grounded verifier for interpretable action selection. Furthermore, TapSampling is a policy-agnostic framework. Extensive experiments in both simulated and real-world environments demonstrate that our method substantially improves multiple generalist policies without further policy finetuning. Code and models are available at the project page.

AI.tldr: 作者提出了TapSampling框架，通过推理时抽样提升具身控制任务效果，无需微调原有策略。
AI.motivation: 现有具身控制领域多依赖扩大训练数据和模型规模来提升表现，但作者希望探索不改变模型、仅用推理阶段策略提升性能的新途径。
AI.method: （1）提出Action-VAE，将策略生成动作映射到低维潜在空间，从压缩后分布采样，生成候选动作；（2）设计动作验证器，将动作选择问题表述为任务进度预测，利用机器人的时序数据训练可解释的验证网络进行筛选；整个框架不依赖具体策略，属可插拔方法。
AI.result: 在多种仿真和真实环境中，TapSampling无需微调原有策略即可显著提升各类通用策略的性能。
AI.conclusion: 推理时采样与动作验证框架为提升具身智能体表现提供了新思路，实验证明了其普适性和有效性。

title: Med-R2: An Adversarial Benchmark for Evidence-Grounded Reasoning in Medical VLMs
summary: Vision-language models have demonstrated impressive capabilities in general medical visual question answering, yet due to limited interpretability, it remains unclear whether their predictions reflect evidence-grounded clinical reasoning or reliance on spurious priors. We introduce Med-R2 Bench, a hierarchical benchmark aligned with the clinical workflow to evaluate adversarial robustness with visual grounding. We design stepwise QA tasks to assess whether reasoning chains are strictly grounded in visual evidence across the four clinical stages, and employ adversarial perturbations to test robustness against misleading cues. Med-R2 comprises 42,432 images, 31 task categories, and 110,406 QA pairs. Evaluation across 14 VLMs reveals a sequential performance degradation along the four-stage clinical workflow. Adversarial experiments show that models rely heavily on correct prompts to guess answers. Even when provided with explicit visual cues, the models struggle to accurately align textual descriptions. Finally, we demonstrate stepwise fine-tuning using our hierarchical data significantly improves reasoning robustness, highlighting its potential to drive future improvements in evidence-based medical AI.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了Med-R2 Bench，这是一个与临床流程紧密结合的分层基准，用于评估视觉语言模型在医学视觉问答中的抗干扰性与视觉证据依赖性。
AI.motivation: 虽然医学视觉问答模型表现出色，但其推理是否真正基于证据尚不明确。主因是模型可解释性有限，可能依赖偶然关联而非临床证据。
AI.method: 作者设计了Med-R2 Bench，包括42,432张图片、31种任务类别和110,406个问答对，按照临床流程构建多阶段问答任务，并利用对抗干扰测试模型是否能坚持基于视觉证据推理。对14个主流视觉语言模型进行分阶段测试和对抗实验。
AI.result: 结果显示，随着临床流程的推进，模型表现连续下降。对抗实验表明，模型主要依赖于正确提示词进行猜测，即使已明确给出视觉线索，模型在文本与视觉描述对齐上仍有较大困难。
AI.conclusion: 利用分层数据进行逐步微调，能显著提升模型的推理鲁棒性，证明该基准对于发展基于证据的医学AI具有潜力和指导意义。

title: Translators as Invisible Teachers of AI: Copyright, Translation Memory, and the Political Economy of Linguistic Data
summary: This paper examines how the labour of translators has been transformed into foundational data capital for the age of artificial intelligence (AI). Translation memories (TM) and parallel corpora preserve a one-to-one correspondence between source and target text and therefore constitute extraordinarily valuable supervised training data for machine translation. The development of statistical machine translation (SMT), neural machine translation (NMT), the Transformer architecture, and multilingual large language models (LLMs) cannot be disentangled from the accumulation of such translation data. And yet, translators' renditions have been bought as deliverables under contract, segmented as technical objects, and processed as "information analysis" data under copyright law -- losing their moral, creative, and economic attribution to the translators who produced them. The paper develops two concepts to capture this process. The first is appropriation without consumption: a mode of use in which works are not read, viewed, or listened to, but only mined for statistical features -- a use that is legitimated under Article 30-4 of the Japanese Copyright Act. The second is the invisible teacherisation of translators: the process by which translators, through the construction of translation memories, post-editing, and quality assessment, have functioned as teachers of AI without recognition as such. Drawing on the data supply chain that runs from translators through language service providers (LSPs) and platforms to model developers, on a comparative reading of Japanese, European, and United States legal frameworks, on the distinction between open and proprietary AI models, and on the premium status that human-generated data has acquired in the era of model collapse, the paper asks what translators are actually afraid of, and points toward concrete directions for redistributive design.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨译者劳动如何转化为人工智能时代的数据资本，以及他们权益的被忽视。通过译文记忆和平行语料，译者贡献成为机器翻译等AI技术的关键训练数据；但译者的创作属性在合同和版权框架下被弱化甚至消失。作者提出“非消费性占有”和“译者隐形教师化”概念，并剖析法律与数据流通对译者权益的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着AI技术（如统计/神经机器翻译与大型语言模型）的迅猛发展，成熟的机器翻译系统依赖于大量高质量、人工生成的双语数据。译者的劳动支撑了这一切，但他们的劳动价值和权利在数字与法律体系下被系统性剥夺。作者旨在揭示并批判译者在AI发展过程中的隐形付出与权益被忽视现象。
AI.method: 本文采用跨学科研究方法，结合数据供应链分析、比较日本、欧洲和美国的法律框架，并结合对AI模型（如开放与专有模型）与翻译数据流动的讨论，通过理论分析提出新概念解读现象。
AI.result: 论文提出“非消费性占有”和“译者隐形教师化”两大概念，指出译者在AI训练链条中的核心作用，却缺乏道德、经济、创意上的承认与回报。分析揭示了译者数据被采集、压缩、用于AI训练的多层次过程，以及相关法律如何助推了译者劳动被剥夺的问题。
AI.conclusion: AI发展的核心在于高质量人类创造的数据，尤其是来自译者的劳动。译者既是AI系统的“隐形老师”，也是无力主张自身权益的弱势方。作者呼吁针对译者的数据权益进行再分配设计，并推动相关法律及行业改革，保护译者在AI生态下的合法权益。

title: Acting on the Unseen: Communication-Free Collaborative Filtering for Decentralized Multi-Robot Task Allocation
summary: Multi-robot task allocation usually assumes some combination of communication, known task models, or a coordinator. We study the opposite extreme, a regime common in practice but overlooked in theory, which we name Zero-Knowledge MRTA (ZK-MRTA): a robot team with no prior knowledge (no task models, not even the latent rank), no communication (no messages, no parameter sharing, no coordinator), and only a partial and privately-noisy view of a public stream of teammates' outcomes. A hidden low-rank structure governs which robot suits which task, and there are far more tasks than rounds, so most (robot, task) pairs are never attempted. Yet each robot can act well on tasks it never attempted, and onboard new tasks, by running online low-rank collaborative filtering over the broadcast (SwarmCF). The advantage over any structure-free learner is categorical, not a constant factor: a structure-free learner is provably at the prior-mean error floor on unseen pairs.
