We prove a matching per-robot sample complexity (Θ(d) versus Θ(n), in the rank d and the task count n), an anytime (cumulative-reward) separation under task scarcity, and a deterministic condition under which decentralized recovery from the masked broadcast is exact (validated empirically). Experiments quantify the value of the broadcast, a positive scaling law (per-robot unseen-pair skill rises with team size), and the strongest masking-robustness and anytime profile among low-rank methods, recovering most (about 80% on earned skill) of a centralized full-communication ceiling, and holding under capacity-1 contention and in a robotics-grounded sensing instance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并研究了一种极端场景下的多机器人任务分配问题——零知识多机器人任务分配（ZK-MRTA）。在完全无通信、无任务模型、没有协调器，仅能观测同伴结果的前提下，实现低秩协同过滤（SwarmCF），并在这种场景下证明了该方法在泛化能力、样本效率和鲁棒性等方面的显著优势。
AI.motivation: 当前多机器人任务分配（MRTA）方法大多依赖一定程度的信息共享、通信能力或任务模型，而现实中常常会遇到通信和先验知识极度受限的情况。该文旨在探讨缺失理论关注但实际常见的极端、稀疏、高度去中心化的MRTA场景，并寻求有效方法。
AI.method: 提出一种基于低秩协同过滤（SwarmCF）的方法，各机器人仅能局部、噪声地观测公共任务结果流，在无通信和缺乏任务-机器人适应性先验下，在线推断低秩结构，实现对未见过任务的泛化分配。理论分析了每个机器人在这种环境下的样本复杂度，相比无结构学习显著更优，并给出在特定条件下的去中心化精确恢复证明。
AI.result: 实验验证了SwarmCF对广播信息的利用价值，团队规模越大，单机器人泛化能力越强，且在低秩方法中具备最强的遮蔽鲁棒性和任何时刻表现，能恢复约80%的中心化通信上限表现，并在资源竞争和实际感知场景下均保持性能领先。
AI.conclusion: 即便在信息极度受限、完全去中心化的场景下，利用低秩结构协同过滤能大幅提升分配效率和泛化能力，远超无结构学习方法，为实际复杂多机器人系统的任务分配提供了理论和方法基础。

title: EgoAction: Egocentric Action Composition with Reliability-Aware Temporal Fusion for the EPIC-KITCHENS Action Detection Challenge at CVPR 2026
comment: Technical Report for CVPR 2026 EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Action Detection Challenge
summary: The EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Action Detection challenge evaluates whether a model can localize the start and end of each action in long untrimmed egocentric videos and assign the corresponding verb--noun action label. In this report, we formulate our submission as EgoAction (Egocentric Action Composition with Reliability-Aware Temporal Fusion), a unified decoupled detection and fusion pipeline. The pipeline uses EPIC-finetuned VideoMAE-L features, trains separate noun and verb temporal detectors with causal temporal modeling, composes action hypotheses from top noun--verb pairs, and introduces a confidence-adaptive boundary fusion rule at post-processing time. The key observation is that verb and noun streams often fail differently: verb scores are sensitive to motion transitions, whereas noun scores are sensitive to hand-object visibility and object clutter. A fixed arithmetic mean of their predicted boundaries can therefore amplify localization errors when one stream degenerates. We replace this hard-coded mean with Dynamic Weighted Fusion (DWF), which normalizes the maximum noun and verb classification confidences into proposal-wise boundary weights and linearly combines the two intervals. This lightweight tensor-only operator shifts boundary authority toward the more reliable stream while preserving the decoupled action scoring mechanism. Together with sliding-window inference, top-K noun--verb action composition, and class-wise Soft-NMS, EgoAction provides a compact and reproducible system for egocentric temporal action detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EgoAction方法，通过引入动态时序融合和置信度自适应边界优化，提高了EPIC-KITCHENS-100自日志视频中的动作检测精度。
AI.motivation: 动作用于实际场景（如厨房）的视频识别任务中，动作边界的精细定位和动作标签分配十分困难。已有方法在动词和名词检测准确性和边界融合机制上存在缺陷。
AI.method: 提出了独立的名词和动词时序检测器，分别使用因果时序建模；动作假设由分数前列的名词-动词对组合产生；提出置信度自适应边界融合（Dynamic Weighted Fusion, DWF），依据信心动态加权组合动词、名词边界；配合滑窗推理和Soft-NMS实现。
AI.result: DWF方法能够根据检测置信度动态调整边界权重，在动词或名词流表现较差时优先采用更可靠流，有效减少因平均融合带来的定位误差。总体系统结构紧凑、易于复现，在EPIC-KITCHENS-100数据集上的动作检测任务中取得优异表现。
AI.conclusion: EgoAction通过解耦动作检测策略与动态自适应边界融合方法，提升了长段自日志视频中的动作检测效果，为未来相关工作提供了有效、可靠的方案。

title: Repeated Sequences Reveal Gaps between Large Language Models and Natural Language
summary:
Evaluating whether large language models (LLMs) capture the structure of natural language beyond local fluency remains an open challenge. Existing evaluation methods, largely based on task performance or short-context behavior, provide limited insight into the long-range statistical organization of generated text.
  We propose a complementary evaluation framework based on repeated subsequences. By analyzing their distribution across scales and relating it to higher-order Rényi entropies, we probe how texts reuse previously established structure under finite-length conditions. Experiments on human-written texts and length-matched GPT-generated texts show that, while power-law models can describe restricted ranges of block length, the observed entropy growth is often equally or better characterized by logarithmic--power forms.
  Across datasets, natural language exhibits stable entropy-growth patterns over accessible ranges, with consistent average behavior despite variability across individual texts. In contrast, GPT-generated texts show systematic and statistically significant shifts in estimated exponents with model size. These results demonstrate that repeated-subsequence entropy provides a quantitative structural diagnostic that reveals systematic differences in long-range organization, distinguishing natural language from state-of-the-art LLM outputs beyond surface-level fluency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于重复子序列分析的新框架，用于评估LLMs生成文本在超越局部流畅性方面对自然语言结构的捕捉情况，并发现自然语言与LLM输出在长程组织上有明显差异。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM评估方法主要关注任务表现或短语境行为，难以反映生成文本在长距离统计结构上的把握能力，因此需要新的评价视角。
AI.method: 作者提出利用重复子序列的分布特性及其与高阶Rényi熵的关联，分析不同文本（人类书写与GPT生成）在有限长度下重用已有结构的能力，并通过对比熵增长模式揭示其组织规律。
AI.result: 实验发现：自然语言在所有可获得区间内熵增长表现稳定一致，而GPT输出的增长指数会随模型规模系统性变化；传统幂律模型只能描述受限范围，实际熵增长更适合对数-幂律模型。
AI.conclusion: 重复子序列熵能作为定量结构诊断方式，揭示自然语言与LLM文本在长程组织上的系统性差异，表明LLM尽管在流畅性上接近人类，但在深层结构捕捉方面仍可区分。

title: G-DRAGON: Geospatial Reasoning and Dynamic Planning for Retrieval-Augmented Outdoor Navigation
comment: Accepted by IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)
summary: Autonomous ground robots operating in large-scale outdoor environments require both robust long-range navigation and fine-grained ''last-mile'' exploration. Current advances in visual-language navigation (VLN) work well at short-range tasks, lacking geospatial grounding for long-distance missions. Some OpenStreetMap (OSM)-based methods relying on cloud-based Large Language Models (LLMs) are prone to factual hallucination and cannot conduct ''last-mile'' exploration based on human instruction. To address these challenges, we present G-DRAGON, a retrieval-augmented framework for outdoor, open-world navigation. This framework maps natural-language commands to versioned, local OSM entities via generative retrieval based on lightweight LLM, yielding accurate coordinates for global route planning. A high-level planning module bridges global topological routes with the SLAM system, projecting geospatial waypoints into the robot's navigable frame. For the ''last mile," the framework transitions to frontier-based exploration and open-set semantic voxel mapping to localize open-vocabulary targets. Experimental results in simulation demonstrate our framework outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. Furthermore, we validate the system in unseen real-world urban environments on an Unmanned Ground Vehicle (UGV), successfully completing person-search missions with trajectories of up to 500m.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为G-DRAGON的新型户外自主机器人导航系统，可结合视觉语言与地理信息，实现远距离导航与精细“最后一公里”探索，实验效果优于现有方法，并已在真实城市环境中得到验证。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言导航（VLN）方法在户外大规模、长距离导航任务中表现不佳，缺乏地理空间支持，“最后一公里”探索亦难以基于人类指令顺利完成。基于OSM与大模型的方法容易产生事实幻觉，且难以本地部署。
AI.method: G-DRAGON框架首先利用轻量级生成式检索大模型将自然语言指令映射到本地OSM实体，获得准确坐标用于全球路径规划。高层规划模块将全局拓扑路径与SLAM系统对接，把地理航点投影到机器人实际可达空间。在“最后一公里”阶段，则切换到前沿探索和多语义体素建图，定位开放词汇目标。
AI.result: 在仿真环境下，G-DRAGON在导航和探索性能上超越了现有主流方法，并且在真实未见过的城市环境、最远500米的实际地面无人车搜索任务中成功导航与搜索目标。
AI.conclusion: G-DRAGON有效解决了户外机器人远距离导航和指令驱动“最后一公里”探索的问题，具备良好的实用性与性能，极具应用推广前景。

title: EgoAdapt: A Multi-Scene Egocentric Adaptation Method for CVPR 2026 HD-EPIC VQA Challenge
comment: Technical Report for CVPR 2026 HD-EPIC VQA Challenge
summary: This technical report presents our solution, EgoAdapt (Egocentric Adaptation via Category, Calibration, and Consistency), to the CVPR 2026 HD-EPIC VQA challenge. HD-EPIC evaluates whether a vision-language model can reason over realistic first-person kitchen videos, where the evidence for an answer may be a short hand-object interaction, a long recipe trajectory, a spatial relation to a fixture, or a subtle gaze cue. The benchmark contains 26K multiple-choice questions across seven macro-categories: recipe, ingredient, nutrition, fine-grained action, 3D perception, object motion, and gaze. We observe that the main difficulty is not only model capacity, but also the mismatch between a single generic inference recipe and the heterogeneous temporal, spatial, and semantic structure of the benchmark. Our method, EgoAdapt, introduces three inference-time components: (1) category-conditioned routing with per-category prompts, frame budgets, and sampling rates; (2) calibrated option scoring that evaluates all candidate answers with letter-token likelihoods and generation agreement instead of relying only on direct generation; and (3) test-time consistency adaptation that aggregates predictions across option permutations and verification-style prompts for ambiguous cases. This design substantially improves over the available HD-EPIC baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EgoAdapt的方法，用于提升视觉-语言模型在第一人称厨房视频问答中的表现，尤其是在面对复杂、多样的问题时，通过引入类别自适应、选项校准和推理一致性等策略，有效提升了解题准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型在面对第一人称视频问答的数据集（HD-EPIC）时，常因单一通用的推理流程难以兼顾多样化的问题类别（如配方、营养、空间等），导致推理效果受限。因此，亟需方法增强模型对不同类型、多时长、多语义结构任务的适配能力。
AI.method: EgoAdapt提出了三大推理阶段策略：（1）按类别动态调整推理路径，包括使用不同类别Prompt、帧数预算和采样率；（2）在候选答案评估时，采用基于字母Token概率和生成一致性校准的得分方法，避免仅靠直接生成结果判断；（3）测试阶段结合选项排列与验证风格Prompt，对多义场景进行一致性判别，提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: EgoAdapt在HD-EPIC VQA基准上的表现大幅超过现有公开的基线方法，尤其在多类别、多结构问题上具有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过类别条件推理、校准候选得分和一致性适配，EgoAdapt显著提升了视觉-语言模型在复杂第一人称问答场景中的泛化与准确性，为此类问题提供了新思路与实证依据。

title: Lngram: N-gram Conditional Memory in Latent Space
summary: Sequence modeling requires both compositional reasoning and local static knowledge retrieval, yet standard Transformers handle both through dense computation. Engram partially decouples retrieval from the backbone, but its token-based keys remain tied to text tokenization and hash compression. We propose Lngram, a latent-space conditional memory module that learns discrete symbols directly from hidden states and performs N-gram lookup over these symbols. This design removes the dependence on tokenizer IDs and naturally extends to non-text modalities. In our evaluated settings, Lngram outperforms Transformer and Engram baselines, consistently reduces perplexity in long-context language modeling, and effectively injects domain knowledge when added post hoc to pretrained models. Joint training with the backbone further surpasses full fine-tuning, while experiments on vision-language and vision-language-action tasks show overall gains. Analyses with LogitLens and CKA suggest that Lngram enables prediction-relevant information to emerge earlier, increasing effective depth with limited inference and memory overhead. Code is available at https://github.com/zyaaa-ux/Lngram.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种新的条件记忆模块Lngram，通过在隐空间中学习离散符号并进行N-gram查找，提升了序列建模能力，同时减少了对密集计算的依赖。
AI.motivation: 当前Transformer模型将组合推理与静态知识检索混合在密集计算中，不够高效且受限于tokenizer，对多模态扩展性差，Engram虽然解耦了检索但依然依赖于tokenizer和哈希压缩。
AI.method: Lngram直接从隐状态学习离散符号，不依赖tokenizer，将这些符号用于N-gram查找，实现条件记忆检索；可与主干模型联合训练，也支持后验添加。
AI.result: Lngram在长文本建模中的困惑度低于Transformer与Engram基线，能有效向预训练模型注入领域知识，联合训练效果超过全量微调，并在视觉-语言及动作等任务中同样有效。
AI.conclusion: Lngram能更早地激发表达与预测相关的信息，用有限的推理和内存开销提升了模型的有效深度，并具备良好的通用性与可扩展性。

title: Compliant Non-Prehensile Pushing Manipulation
summary: In this paper, we address the challenge of performing non-prehensile pushing operations with a compliant robotic manipulation system. To ensure safe operations in human-populated environments, robots must comply with external physical interactions and exhibit passive behavior. To achieve this, we extend a state-of-the-art pushing model to integrate it with impedance-controlled robots. We develop a model predictive control framework built upon this model that enables compliant pushing through optimal modulation of the robot's position/velocity set-point, jointly realizing the required pushing force and contact point adaptation to obtain desired object motion. However, external interactions may induce tracking errors, causing a consequent potentially indefinite increase of the pushing force. To prevent this, we integrate an energy tank passivity filter that further modulates the robot velocity set-point to guarantee passivity and avoid uncontrolled energy buildup. The proposed method has been rigorously tested in simulation and validated through experiments on two different robotic systems, demonstrating passive compliance during human-robot interactions and assessing trajectory tracking performance and robustness to variations in the object's physical parameters.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新方法，使机器人能够在与人类共处环境下安全、合规地推动物体，保证被动行为和能量安全，同时在多种系统上验证了其实用性和稳健性。
AI.motivation: 在存在人类的环境中执行推动等非抓持操作时，机器人的安全、合规和被动行为非常重要，防止失控或对人造成伤害。过去的方法尚未充分解决推力追踪误差导致能量积累问题。
AI.method: 将先进的推模型与阻抗控制机器人集成，开发了基于模型预测控制（MPC）的方法，通过最优调整机器人位置/速度设定点，实现所需推力与接触点自适应。同时引入能量油箱无源性滤波器防止因误差导致能源失控积累。
AI.result: 该方法在仿真和两类实际机器人系统中经充分测试，能够在保证无源、合规的前提下实现鲁棒的轨迹跟踪，并能适应物体物理参数变化。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法解决了外部干预导致的能量失控问题，保障了人机协作环境下的安全与合规，并具备良好的广泛适应性和可靠性。

title: FoodMonitor: Benchmarking MLLMs for Explainable Compliance Analysis
summary: As AI-powered compliance monitoring becomes increasingly important in public governance and industrial safety, the ability to provide verifiable evidence and traceable accountability signals is essential. However, existing video anomaly detection datasets focus on event-level binary classification, lacking the rule-driven, explainable analysis required for real-world compliance scenarios. We introduce FoodMonitor, a benchmark for explainable compliance analysis in commercial kitchen surveillance. FoodMonitor comprises 477 video clips with 3,307 violation annotations across a dual-channel design covering both person-level and environment-level violations. Each annotation specifies which rule was violated, what non-compliant behavior occurred, and who committed it with frame-level bounding boxes. We establish a unified evaluation protocol with a two-stage matching mechanism that separately assesses spatial localization and semantic understanding, along with a composite metric ($C_{\text{score}}$) that balances environment and person detection performance. Systematic evaluation of several state-of-the-art multimodal large language models reveals that the best-performing model achieves only 0.360 $C_{\text{score}}$, with spatial localization and fine-grained rule understanding emerging as the primary bottlenecks. Our analysis identifies two distinct failure modes: localization-dominated errors and semantics-dominated errors, providing diagnostic insights for future model development.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了FoodMonitor基准数据集，专用于商用厨房监控中的可解释合规分析，填补了现有异常检测数据集在规则驱动与可解释性分析上的空白。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频异常检测数据集仅支持事件级二分类，缺乏适用于真实世界合规场景的规则驱动以及可解释性分析能力。因此，需要一个新的基准来支持合规监测的精细化与解释性要求。
AI.method: FoodMonitor包括477段视频，涵盖3307条违规注释，采用双通道方案区分人员和环境层面的违规行为。每条注释详细标注违规则、违规行为、责任人，以及帧级的边界框。作者制定了统一的评测协议和双阶段匹配机制，分别评价空间定位和语义理解能力，并设计了综合指标C_score衡量模型整体合规检测性能。
AI.result: 多种先进的多模态大语言模型在FoodMonitor上进行了系统测试，最优模型C_score仅为0.360，显示目前模型在空间定位和细粒度规则理解方面存在明显瓶颈。分析揭示了两类典型失败模式：定位主导型和语义主导型错误。
AI.conclusion: FoodMonitor为可解释合规分析提供了新的基准和评测标准，对模型在真实世界合规场景的诊断与改进具有重要价值。未来模型应重点提升空间定位和规则理解能力以满足实际需求。

title: Towards a Universal Causal Reasoner
summary: Despite the importance of causal reasoning, training LLMs to reason causally remains underexplored. Existing data efforts mostly focus on benchmarking LLMs on specific aspects of causality, making them less suitable for training generalizable causal reasoners. To address this, we propose UniCo, a data generation framework that both (1) addresses 18 causal query types across Pearl's Causal Ladder and (2) translates natively symbolic examples into code and natural language forms to simulate real-world use cases where causal terms are not explicitly specified. To ensure data quality, UniCo grounds answers with exact causal inference and filters cases with reasoning shortcuts. Upon supervised finetuning with 66.6K UniCo-generated instances, Qwen3-4B, Qwen3-8B and Olmo-3-7B-Instruct achieve an average of 22.9% improvements across all 18 in-distribution query types, and 8.1% over state-of-the-art causal data generation frameworks on 7 established causal benchmarks outside the training distribution. More importantly, in real-world medical understanding, legal decision, and tabular reasoning, UniCo-trained models consistently display more faithful reasoning traces, outperforming the base models by an average of 20.2% in faithfulness metrics. These suggest that causality-centered training not only strengthens causal reasoning, but also equips LLMs with a causal mindset in general reasoning tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的因果数据生成框架UniCo，通过系统化地覆盖18种因果查询类型并将符号化例子转化为代码和自然语言，提升了大模型的因果推理能力，并验证了在真实世界任务中的广泛适用性和有效性。
AI.motivation: 因果推理对类脑智能至关重要，但当前LLM的因果推理能力训练研究不足，现有数据集难以覆盖全谱因果问题且多偏向评测，因此亟需系统化、适用于训练的因果推理数据资源。
AI.method: 作者设计了UniCo框架，涵盖Pearl因果阶梯的18类因果查询类型，通过将符号化因果例子转为代码和自然语言版本模拟真实场景。同时，保证了推理的准确性并过滤掉捷径样例，生成高质量的训练数据，用于对主流LLM进行微调训练。
AI.result: 基于66.6K条UniCo数据微调后，多个主流模型在18种因果任务中的平均提升为22.9%，在7个业界基准上的提升为8.1%。在医疗、法律和表格推理等现实任务中，模型的推理忠实度平均提升20.2%。
AI.conclusion: 因果中心化的训练显著提升了大模型的因果推理和泛化推理能力，使其具备更强的'因果思维'，表明高质量的因果数据对通用推理AI发展具有重要意义。

title: HumanFlow -- Diffusion-Driven MAV Navigation Among Humans via Tightly-Coupled Motion Tracking, Forecasting, and Control
comment: Accepted to Robotics Science and Systems (RSS), 2026
summary: Robust and accurate perception of humans in their 3D scene context is essential for integrating robots into everyday environments. Existing approaches, however, often fail to predict plausible and accurate human motion estimates that are consistent with the surrounding scene, especially in the presence of heavy occlusions or partial visibility. This can limit both safety and efficiency for robotic operations. We introduce HumanFlow, a latent diffusion model that unifies human motion tracking and forecasting, conditioned on the 3D scene context. We show that our human motion model produces smooth and accurate predictions under challenging conditions, including heavy occlusions, and outperforms state-of-the-art methods in tracking accuracy while being significantly more efficient. Furthermore, we show how HumanFlow's latent space can be tightly coupled with control by conditioning a flow-matching-based, approximate MPC policy on these representations. We validate our policy in simulation with real human trajectories for MAV social navigation, demonstrating superior navigation performance and remaining collision-free, even under partial observability of the human.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个名为HumanFlow的新方法，能够结合3D场景上下文，对人类运动进行更准确和鲁棒的追踪与预测，在遮挡等复杂场景下表现优异，并用于机器人安全导航。
AI.motivation: 现有的人体运动估计方法在遮挡或视野受限时常常无法生成与环境一致且真实的运动预测，影响机器人在实际环境中的安全与效率。因此，亟需一种能与场景强关联、且在恶劣条件下依然高性能的方法。
AI.method: 提出了HumanFlow，这是一种基于潜在扩散模型（latent diffusion model）的方法，将人体动作追踪与预测统一，结合3D场景进行条件建模。进一步，将该模型的潜在空间与基于flow-matching的近似MPC控制策略结合，实现了对机器人行为的条件控制。
AI.result: HumanFlow方法即使在严重遮挡等具有挑战性的条件下，依然能输出平滑且准确的人体运动预测。在追踪精度上超越了当前SOTA方法，同时计算效率更高。将此模型用于MAV（多旋翼无人机）与人类的社交导航任务时，导航表现更优，且在人类视野部分不可见的情形下依旧能避免碰撞。
AI.conclusion: HumanFlow在人体运动预测和机器人控制任务中表现出色，提升了场景一致性和安全性，为机器人在现实复杂环境下的部署带来新可能。

title: FDDet: Achieving Data-Efficient Food Defect Detection Under Real-World Scenarios
summary: Food defect detection is critical for automated quality control, yet existing studies lack unified benchmarks and suffer from data scarcity. We introduce FDD-48, a comprehensive dataset with fine-grained annotations across 13 food types and 48 defect categories under diverse real-world conditions. To improve detection with limited labeled data, we propose FDDet, a semi-supervised framework featuring two key components: (1) BBoxMixUp, a data augmentation technique that mixes same-category defect regions to reduce spurious feature associations, and (2) CGPC (Consistency-Guided Pseudo-Label Calibration), which filters pseudo-labels based on intra-sample consistency. Experiments show FDDet significantly outperforms mainstream detectors on FDD-48, demonstrating its effectiveness for food defect detection under data-limited scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了FDD-48食品缺陷检测数据集，并设计半监督检测框架FDDet，有效提升在标签稀缺情况下的食品缺陷检测表现。
AI.motivation: 当前食品缺陷检测研究存在基准不统一和数据稀缺的问题，影响了实际自动化质控的效果。
AI.method: 作者构建了涵盖13类食品和48种缺陷类型的FDD-48数据集，并提出半监督检测框架FDDet。FDDet包含：1）BBoxMixUp数据增强方法，将同一缺陷类别的区域混合，减少虚假特征关联；2）CGPC伪标签校准机制，通过样本内部一致性筛选伪标签。
AI.result: 在FDD-48数据集上，FDDet在有限标注数据情况下显著优于主流检测方法。
AI.conclusion: FDD-48为食品缺陷检测建立了统一评测标准，FDDet框架有效提升了稀缺数据下的检测性能，对自动化食品质控具有重要意义。

title: DTO: a Differentiable Training Objective for Effective Counterfactual Story Rewriting
summary: Counterfactual story rewriting is a natural language processing task that requires updating an existing story to reflect a chosen alternative event, yet preserving all the unaffected storyline elements and overall coherence. While large language models have recently made remarkable progress on this task, it still remains challenging since the required modifications are typically very small in size and highly localized. As a consequence, models trained in a conventional manner with the maximum-likelihood training objective tend to overlook these nuances. At the same time, more sophisticated training approaches based on reinforcement learning are notoriously slow and difficult to set up. For these reasons, our paper proposes a novel, differentiable training objective (DTO) that directly optimizes for the requisite counterfactual improvements. In our approach, a transformer model is fine-tuned via end-to-end backpropagation against a fully differentiable loss function that jointly rewards (i) fidelity to the reference rewrite and (ii) semantic consistency with the source narrative. The empirical evaluation on the TimeTravel and ART datasets shows that the proposed DTO approach has been able to surpass a maximum-likelihood baseline and a preference-based approach, and perform competitively against two contemporary large language models in all evaluation metrics. These findings substantiate the effectiveness of task-specific differentiable objectives for nuanced, controlled text-generation tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的可微分训练目标（DTO），用于提升大型语言模型在反事实故事重写任务中的表现，显著优于传统最大似然和基于偏好的方法。
AI.motivation: 反事实故事重写任务要求对原故事作出局部精细的修改，仅针对某些小细节而不影响故事整体连贯性。现有最大似然训练目标常常忽视这些微妙修改，且基于强化学习的方法难以有效部署。因此，亟需更精细化的训练目标。
AI.method: 提出了可微分训练目标（DTO），通过端到端反向传播优化的loss函数，奖励模型在符合参照重写和与原故事语义一致间取得平衡。将Transformer模型在此目标下进行微调。
AI.result: 在TimeTravel和ART两个数据集上的实验表明，DTO方法在所有评测指标上均优于最大似然基线和偏好式方法，且与当前主流大语言模型表现相当。
AI.conclusion: DTO方法能够有效提升模型在需细致、受控文本生成任务中的表现，展示了任务特定可微分目标在NLP领域的重要价值。

title: Implicit Null-space Manifold Generation for Redundant Robotic Systems
comment: Accepted to Robotics: Science and Systems (RSS) 2026
summary: Robotic systems with redundant degrees of freedom can achieve the same task outcome using multiple configurations, resulting in solution sets that form manifolds in the configuration space. Existing approaches typically exploit such redundancy locally through Jacobian-based techniques to compute individual solutions or trajectories. While effective for solution computation, these methods do not retain a representation of the geometry of the solution set itself. In this work, we adopt a representation-centric approach to estimate the geometric structure of the solution space. We consider solution manifolds induced by general task-defining maps and construct an implicit scalar field over the configuration space, whose zero-level set corresponds to the solution manifold. To this end, we generate samples in the neighborhood of the solution manifold using a Jacobian-guided exploration strategy, which efficiently captures its local and global structure. The resulting implicit representation is defined over the configuration space and naturally induces a continuous, distance field that encodes proximity to the solution manifold. Experiments on a planar three-link robot and a seven-degree-of-freedom Franka manipulator demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed representation. Furthermore, the framework enables consistent modeling of solution spaces across families of tasks with continuous variation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的方法，用于显式表示具有冗余自由度机器人任务的解空间流形，而不仅仅是单一解或轨迹。
AI.motivation: 传统Jacobian方法只能寻找单一解或局部轨迹，无法捕捉多解空间几何结构。因此需要一种能表示整个解流形的技术。
AI.method: 通过构建在配置空间上的隐式标量场（其零水平集对应解流形），并用Jacobian引导的采样方法高效探索并表征解空间的局部和全局结构，从而得到解流形的连续表示。
AI.result: 在三连杆平面机器人和Franka七自由度机械臂上的实验表明，该方法可有效表征各种任务下的解空间结构，并具备在连续变化的任务族中一致建模的能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为高冗余度机器人任务的多解空间提供了新的表征方式，有助于算法开发和任务转移，优于只关注单一解的传统方法。

title: Φ-Noise: Training-Free Temporal Video Conditioning via Phase-Based Noise Manipulation
summary: Latent video diffusion models generate videos by progressively transforming Gaussian noise into realistic samples conditioned on text or visual inputs. However, existing conditioning methods often require additional training and computational overhead. Motivated by recent findings on the importance of frequency components in generative models, we propose a simple, training-free approach for motion-conditioned video generation by injecting low-frequency phase information from a reference video directly into the diffusion noise latents. Our method transfers motion cues without modifying the model architecture or inference pipeline. Using several applications, we demonstrate effective control over both appearance and dynamics in generated videos, while achieving competitive or superior results compared to more complex conditioning approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需额外训练的运动感知视频生成方法，即通过在扩散噪声潜变量中注入参考视频的低频相位信息，实现基于运动条件的视频生成，既简洁又高效。
AI.motivation: 当前视频扩散模型的条件控制通常依赖额外训练和复杂计算，作者受生成模型中频率成分重要性的启发，探索能否通过更简单方式提升运动控制能力。
AI.method: 方法是在推断阶段直接将参考视频的低频相位信息注入扩散噪声的潜变量，无需改变模型架构或推理流程，也不需要额外训练。
AI.result: 多项应用实验表明，该方法能够有效控制生成视频的外观与动态表现，达到了与复杂方法相当或更优的效果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法实现了简洁、高效的运动条件控制，为视频生成模型的实际应用提供了更具可行性的解决方案。

title: When Reasoning Hurts: Source-Aware Evaluation of Frontier LLMs for Clinical SOAP Note Generation
summary: Reasoning-enabled LLMs perform strongly on medical reasoning benchmarks, but it remains unclear whether these gains transfer to structured clinical documentation; we investigate this question using SOAP note generation from clinical dialogue in a source-aware benchmark spanning OMI Health, ACI-Bench, and PriMock57. We evaluate GPT-5.4, DeepSeek-V4-Flash, and Gemma-4-E4B in a controlled 2x2 design that independently toggles provider-native reasoning and same-source retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). Outputs are assessed using seven automatic metrics alongside two reference-aware LLM judges. Both evaluation approaches agree that a non-reasoning GPT-5.4 configuration achieves the highest overall quality, while DeepSeek-V4-Flash performs best among reasoning-enabled configurations. Enabling reasoning significantly degrades GPT-5.4 performance across all three datasets, whereas same-source RAG yields smaller, model-dependent improvements. Overall, the findings indicate that stronger reasoning capability should not be assumed to improve fidelity-sensitive SOAP note generation without dedicated, task-specific evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本论文探讨了具备推理能力的大型语言模型（LLM）在结构化医学文档生成（SOAP笔记）任务上的表现，发现推理能力不一定带来更高质量的文档输出。
AI.motivation: 推理型LLM在医学推理基准数据集上表现优异，但尚不清楚这类能力能否转化到实际临床文档生成等高保真任务，因此需深入研究。
AI.method: 选用OMI Health、ACI-Bench和PriMock57三个数据集。分别测试GPT-5.4、DeepSeek-V4-Flash和Gemma-4-E4B三款模型，采用2x2控制设计，分别启用/关闭推理和同源RAG功能。用七项自动指标和两个LLM裁判进行评估。
AI.result: 无推理能力的GPT-5.4在整体质量上表现最好；在具备推理的配置中，DeepSeek-V4-Flash表现最佳。对GPT-5.4来说，开启推理能力会显著降低三个数据集上的性能；启用RAG带来较小且依赖模型的提升。
AI.conclusion: 不能简单认为推理能力更强的模型在高保真SOAP笔记生成任务中会有更好表现，需要结合具体任务进行专门评估。

title: ParkourFormer: Integrating Predictive Supervision and Sequence Modeling into Parkour Locomotion
summary: Humanoid parkour requires locomotion policies to coordinate whole-body dynamics across rapidly changing terrains such as stairs, gaps, slopes, and obstacles. Existing reinforcement learning policies are largely reactive, mapping observations directly to actions without explicitly modeling future body states. Such modeling becomes critical in agile locomotion tasks where successful motion execution depends strongly on anticipating upcoming contact transitions and body dynamics.We present ParkourFormer, a Transformer-based sequence modeling framework that reformulates humanoid locomotion as a future-conditioned decision-making problem. The current robot state queries historical sensorimotor trajectories through cross-attention, while a lightweight prediction head forecasts short-horizon future proprioceptive states. The predicted future states, trained with supervised signals, are fused with temporal features to generate actions, enabling the policy to jointly reason over motion history and anticipated future dynamics. We evaluate ParkourFormer on a diverse multi-terrain humanoid parkour benchmark including stairs, gaps, slopes, rough terrain, and obstacle traversal. Experiments in simulation and on a real humanoid robot show that ParkourFormer achieves a 93.85% average traversal success rate on highly challenging terrains, with improvements of up to 42.73% over strong MLP, MoE-based MLP, and vanilla Transformer baselines, while maintaining a single unified policy across all terrain types. These results demonstrate that explicit future-state modeling significantly improves robustness and generalization for agile whole-body locomotion.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ParkourFormer，一种基于Transformer的序列建模方法，通过显式预测未来状态来提升类人机器人在复杂多变地形（如台阶、裂缝、斜坡和障碍物）上的敏捷运动能力。实验证明该方法在多样地形下具有显著优势。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习策略大多为反应式，直接将观测映射为动作，缺乏对未来身体状态的建模，这在需要预判接触转换和身体动态的敏捷运动（如类人机器人跑酷）任务中，严重限制了运动的成功率和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出ParkourFormer架构，将运动决策建模为未来条件决策问题。当前状态通过交叉注意力机制查询历史感知-运动轨迹，同时一个轻量预测头预测短期未来状态，并通过监督信号训练。未来状态与时序特征融合后生成动作，实现了对运动历史和未来动态的联合推理。
AI.result: 在多样化的类人机器人跑酷基准（包含台阶、缝隙、斜坡、崎岖地形和障碍穿越）上，ParkourFormer在仿真与真实机器人测试中平均通过率达93.85%，比MLP、MoE-MLP和基础Transformer最多提升42.73%，且能统一适应各种地形。
AI.conclusion: 显式对未来状态的建模显著提升了类人机器人在复杂地形下的运动鲁棒性与泛化能力。ParkourFormer为全身敏捷运动策略提供了新颖且有效的解决方案。

title: NudgeVAD: Language-Nudged End-to-End Driving via FiLM Residuals
comment: Technical report for the doScenes Instructed Driving Challenge, CVPR 2026 DriveX Workshop. 1st place in the Ablation track
summary: Natural-language instructions promise controllable end-to-end driving, but their benefit can be hidden when planners already receive reliable high-level commands. We propose NudgeVAD, a frozen-planner residual framework that uses language as a calibrated nudge to a VAD trajectory. With identity-initialized FiLM and a zero-initialized residual head, NudgeVAD is equivalent to the frozen planner at initialization, so learned deviations arise only from language-conditioned residuals. We evaluate NudgeVAD along a command-reliability axis. With reliable commands, language improves the initial planner but becomes nearly redundant once compared against VAD-FT (UNCOND), a compute-matched VAD model fine-tuned without language. With random commands, however, language becomes essential: detaching text degrades ADE6s to 3.166 m, while NudgeVAD with text recovers 2.806 m and outperforms VAD-FT (UNCOND) by 0.312 m. These results show that language is not universally additive; it is most valuable when the categorical command channel is unreliable.

AI.tldr: 该文提出NudgeVAD框架，探讨在高层命令不可靠时，自然语言指令对端到端自动驾驶系统的作用。实验证明，只有在命令渠道不可靠时，语言信息才显著提升驾驶表现。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶系统中，加入自然语言指令可提升可控性，但当高层指令可靠时，其实际作用不明确。作者希望澄清语言指令的真实价值，并提升系统在指令不可靠情境下的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 作者提出NudgeVAD：以冻结的planner作为基础，用自然语言通过FiLM模块和残差头对轨迹微调实现语言调控。该结构初始时等同于原planner，语言作用仅由残差学习得到。通过在不同高层命令可靠性的设定下，对NudgeVAD以及对照系统进行对比实验。
AI.result: 当高层命令可靠时，加入语言可略有提升，但与不加语言的微调模型（VAD-FT UNCOND）相比，优势几乎消失。命令完全随机时，移除语言会导致ADE6s误差增大到3.166米，加入语言的NudgeVAD可将误差降低到2.806米，并超过VAD-FT (UNCOND) 0.312米。
AI.conclusion: 自然语言指令对自动驾驶的帮助不是无条件的，仅在现有高层命令信息质量较低时才有显著价值。今后应关注如何在不可靠指令场景下更好利用语言信息。

title: Quantifying the Impact of Translation Errors on Multilingual LLM Evaluation
summary: Machine-translated benchmarks are widely used to assess the multilingual capabilities of large language models (LLMs), yet translation errors in these benchmarks remain underexplored, raising concerns about the reliability and comparability of multilingual evaluation. We address two practical gaps: (i) how well automatic MQM-style error spans from LLM judges and a span-aware QE baseline (xCOMET-XXL) match expert human span annotations on benchmark translations, and (ii) how strongly translation errors (as opposed to source-side issues in the English original) explain accuracy drops on translated benchmarks. We find that span agreement is non-trivial on naturally occurring benchmark translations, and that target-side translation errors are consistently associated with measurable, percentage-point drops in translated accuracy even after controlling for English correctness and source-side anomalies.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在多语言大模型评测中，机器翻译基准数据集的翻译错误问题，重点分析自动化错误检测与人工标注的一致性以及翻译错误对模型评测结果的影响。
AI.motivation: 目前多语言大模型广泛使用机器翻译生成的基准测试集，但对这些数据中的翻译错误关注较少，这可能影响多语言评测的可靠性和结果对比。作者希望了解自动化方法与人工标注在发现翻译错误上的一致性，以及翻译错误是否实质性影响评测结果。
AI.method: 作者比较了LLM自动化错误检测（MQM风格）和一个基于xCOMET-XXL的QE模型与人工专家标注在翻译错误片段上的一致性。此外，还分析了翻译错误（与原文英文的质量无关）对多语言评测准确率下降的影响，排除了源端问题的干扰。
AI.result: 发现：1）自动方法与人工专家在翻译错误的区间标注上仅有有限一致性；2）实际基准集的翻译错误会导致显著的多语言模型准确率下降，并且这种下降在控制源端英文质量后依然存在。
AI.conclusion: 机器翻译生成的多语言基准集存在不可忽视的翻译错误，现有自动错误检测手段与人工标注的一致性有限。这些翻译错误会显著影响多语言大模型的评测准确性。因此，未来在多语言LLM评测中需要更加重视基准数据的翻译质量及其检测手段。

title: HoLoArm: Deformable Arms for Collision-Tolerant Quadrotor Flight
comment: 8 pages, 15 figures, 1 table, Accepted at the IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L) and the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2026
summary: The increasing use of drones in human-centric applications highlights the need for designs that can survive collisions and recover rapidly, minimizing risks to both humans and the environment. We present HoLoArm, a quadrotor with compliant arms inspired by the nodus structure of dragonfly wings. This design provides natural flexibility and resilience while preserving flight stability, which is further reinforced by the integration of a Reinforcement Learning (RL) control policy that enhances both recovery and hovering performance. Experimental results demonstrate that HoLoArm can passively deform in any direction, including axial one, and recover within 0.3-0.6 s depending on the direction and level of the impact. The drone can survive collisions at speeds up to 7.6 m/s and carry a 540 g payload while maintaining stable flight. This work contributes to the morphological design of soft aerial robots with high agility and reliable safety, enabling operation in cluttered and human shared environments, and lays the groundwork for future fully soft drones that integrate compliant structures with intelligent control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种灵感来自蜻蜓翅膀结构的具备柔性臂的四旋翼无人机HoLoArm，通过软体结构和强化学习控制实现了抗撞击和快速恢复，提升了在复杂、人机共存环境下的安全与机动性。
AI.motivation: 随着无人机在人类应用领域的普及，提升无人机在碰撞发生时的抗冲击能力和快速恢复能力成为保障人机安全的刚需。现有的无人机设计在这方面存在欠缺，尤其是在与人类或障碍物频繁接触的环境中易导致损坏和伤害。
AI.method: 作者设计了一款受蜻蜓翅膀节点结构启发、配备柔性臂的四旋翼无人机HoLoArm。该设计不仅在结构上实现了自然的柔韧性和抗撞击性，还结合了基于强化学习的控制策略，以提升无人机的飞行稳定性和撞击/恢复能力。
AI.result: HoLoArm可以在任何方向（包括轴向）被动变形，并能在0.3-0.6秒内根据撞击方向和强度完成恢复。实验显示，该无人机能承受最高7.6 m/s的碰撞速度，并能稳定携带540克载重飞行。
AI.conclusion: 该工作推动了软体航空机器人形态和智能控制的结合，使无人机在复杂及人机混杂环境下可安全、灵活运行，为未来全软体、智能无人机的研发奠定了基础。

title: Image-Conditioned Instance Prompt Network for Referring Remote Sensing Image Segmentation
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures. Equal contribution: Biaoyu Ren and Qingsheng Wang. Corresponding authors: Dingkang Yang and Wenxuan Wang
summary: Referring Remote Sensing Image Segmentation (RRSIS) is a situated, task-driven cross-modal task related to the embodied perception paradigm, requiring models to align visual-spatial features with linguistic intentions for precise target perception. Recent research has focused on refining the granularity of textual features and optimizing image-text feature fusion to better guide target feature representations. However, insufficient descriptive granularity and sensitivity to semantic shifts can cause bottlenecks in cross-modal feature fusion. To address these issues, we propose the Image-Conditioned Instance Prompt Network (ICIPNet) with Bilateral Information Fusion, which is designed to alleviate bottlenecks in cross-modal feature fusion. ICIPNet introduces an Image-Conditioned Instance Prompt (ICIP) module to generate self-adaptive visual and semantic representations without external knowledge. The Bilateral Information Fusion (BIF) module enhances feature fusion along the token and channel dimensions. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed ICIPNet outperforms existing RRSIS models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的遥感图像分割方法ICIPNet，在融合图像与文本特征方面取得突破，并在实验中优于现有模型。
AI.motivation: 现有的遥感图像分割方法在视觉与文本特征融合时，因文本描述粒度不足和语义变动敏感，导致跨模态特征融合效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出了ICIPNet架构，包括一个图像条件实例提示（ICIP）模块用于自适应生成视觉和语义表征，以及一个双向信息融合（BIF）模块，在token和通道维度提升特征融合效果。整个网络无需外部知识即可完成特征表达。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的ICIPNet在RRSIS任务上，相比现有方法取得了更好的分割性能。
AI.conclusion: ICIPNet通过创新的特征融合模块，有效提升了跨模态信息的融合能力，为遥感图像分割任务提供了更优的解决方案。

title: Extending Embodied Question Answering from Perception to Decision
summary: Embodied Question Answering (EQA) connects perception, reasoning, and interaction within embodied environments. However, existing datasets and benchmarks remain fragmented, each focusing on a limited subset of reasoning skills such as spatial understanding or procedural reasoning, without offering a unified large-scale framework for comprehensive evaluation. We present EQA-Decision, a large-scale embodied QA dataset that systematically covers four complementary dimensions of embodied reasoning: static scene construction, spatial understanding, task dynamics reasoning, and instant decision. The dataset contains over four million question-answer pairs with hierarchical annotations across diverse embodied scenarios. In addition, we develop RoboDecision, a strong baseline model aligned with the EQA-Decision Benchmark, providing a unified framework that jointly evaluates perception, reasoning, and action-level decision-making in embodied environments. Results demonstrate that EQA-Decision effectively benchmarks and enhances VLM capabilities in spatial and interaction reasoning, providing a solid foundation for advancing embodied intelligence research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个大规模的具身问答数据集（EQA-Decision），系统覆盖了具身推理的四个重要维度，并配套设计了强基线模型RoboDecision，实现了感知、推理与决策的统一评测。
AI.motivation: 现有的具身问答数据集和基准测试各自只关注推理技能的某一个方面，如空间理解或过程推理，缺乏统一大规模的全面评测框架，制约了具身智能的系统性研究和进展。
AI.method: 提出EQA-Decision数据集，涵盖静态场景构建、空间理解、任务动态推理和即时决策四个维度，包含四百多万个多层级标注的问答对；同时，提出RoboDecision基线模型，与基准配套，实现整合感知、推理和动作决策能力的统一评估。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，EQA-Decision提升了VLM（视觉语言模型）在空间和交互推理方面的能力，有效推动了具身智能的评测和研究。
AI.conclusion: EQA-Decision为具身智能研究提供了全面、系统的基准和数据基础，有助于推动该领域的深入发展和模型能力提升。

title: Learnable Shape Prototypes with Occlusion-Geometry-Guided Injection for Amodal Instance Segmentation
comment: 13 pages, 7 figures, 5 tables. Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology
summary: Amodal instance segmentation aims to predict the complete object mask including occluded regions that lack pixel-level observations and must be inferred with the aid of shape priors. Existing methods acquire shape priors through fixed-capacity encoding spaces or expensive generative models, and inject them uniformly across all spatial positions without adapting to the varying prior demand between visible and occluded regions. In this paper, we propose a gated reliability-adaptive shape prior framework, which introduces a shape prior memory module that combines learnable prototypes via cross-attention to produce instance-adaptive shape priors through weighted prototype combination rather than generation. A spatial adaptive reliability gate then employs the signed distance field of the visible mask to modulate injection intensity at each position according to its occlusion depth, preserving reliable features in visible regions while directing shape compensation toward occluded areas. Experiments on two mainstream amodal instance segmentation benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms existing approaches under multiple evaluation settings, improving the mean intersection-over-union over occluded regions by over 11 percentage points on one of the two benchmarks under the standard setting, while using approximately one-third of the total parameters. Linear probing analysis further reveals that the visible-mask cross-attention module implicitly encodes occlusion geometry into visual token representations, explaining the effectiveness of the proposed module decomposition.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的门控自适应置信度形状先验框架，用于提升amodal实例分割准确性，尤其在物体被遮挡区域。
AI.motivation: 现有amodal实例分割方法无法根据不同空间位置自适应地调整先验信息的注入，导致对遮挡区域的分割不够精准，并且方法要么模型容量固定，要么代价高昂。
AI.method: 该方法提出了形状先验记忆模块，通过learnable prototype与cross-attention方式，动态组合输出实例自适应的形状先验。同时，提出空间自适应置信门控机制，利用可见掩膜的signed distance field对每个空间位置的先验注入强度作调节，有效区分可见与遮挡特征处理。
AI.result: 在两个主流amodal实例分割数据集上实验，方法在标准设置下使遮挡区域mIoU提升超过11个百分点，且参数量仅为传统方法的约三分之一。线性探查分析表明提出模块有效编码了遮挡结构信息。
AI.conclusion: 该方法从自适应和高效性角度显著提升了amodal实例分割效果，尤其对遮挡区域，验证了方法的有效性和创新性。

title: MultiHaluDet: Multilingual Hallucination Detection via LLM Hidden State Probing
summary: Hallucinations in Large Language Models (LLMs) represent a critical barrier to their reliable deployment, a vulnerability heavily exacerbated in non-English and resource-constrained contexts. Existing detection approaches that rely on output confidence heuristics or single-layer internal representations frequently fail to capture deep, complex factual inconsistencies across diverse languages. To address this, we introduce MultiHaluDet, a novel three-stage stacking framework that detects multilingual hallucinations by probing the full hidden state trajectories of frozen LLMs without requiring language-specific fine-tuning. Our method extracts sequential features across multiple layers and processes them via a hybrid architecture using multi-scale attention and self-attention pooling. By generating out-of-fold embeddings that feed into a calibrated classical classifier ensemble, MultiHaluDet captures both fine-grained and coarse-grained patterns of factual inconsistency. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework achieves state-of-the-art detection performance, reaching up to 98.55% AUROC on the English HaluEval and TriviaQA benchmarks using Mistral-7B and LLaMA2-7B architectures. Crucially, we rigorously evaluate our framework's cross-lingual generalization across high (French), medium (Bangla), and low-resource (Amharic) languages. MultiHaluDet demonstrates exceptional representational robustness, consistently outperforming baselines and successfully transferring hallucination detection capabilities across typologically diverse linguistic tiers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的多语言大模型幻觉检测方法MultiHaluDet，能够无需针对特定语言微调，在多种语言和资源条件下实现高准确率的幻觉检测。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型（LLM）在多语言和低资源场景下生成内容时，常常出现事实不符（即幻觉）问题，显著影响其可靠性。现有检测方法在多语言及复杂场景下效果受限，因此迫切需要更有效且具备跨语言泛化能力的检测方法。
AI.method: 提出MultiHaluDet三阶段堆叠框架：1）全面提取冻结LLM所有层的隐藏状态特征；2）用多尺度注意力+自注意力池化组成的混合架构处理这些序列特征；3）生成分层embedding送入标定后的集成分类器，实现多粒度幻觉模式捕捉。该方法无须对不同语言进行单独微调。
AI.result: 在英语HaluEval、TriviaQA数据集（Mistral-7B、LLaMA2-7B架构）上AUROC高达98.55%，且在法语、孟加拉语、阿姆哈拉语等高-中-低资源语言上表现出强泛化能力，全面优于已有方法。
AI.conclusion: MultiHaluDet不仅大幅提升了多语种幻觉检测准确性，还具备强跨语种迁移能力，为LLM在多语言真实应用中提供了更为可靠的安全保障。

title: OASIS: Observation-Action Space Alignment via SE(3) Trajectory Prediction for Robotic Manipulation
summary: Recent vision-language-action (VLA) models and world action models (WAMs) advance robotic manipulation by enriching intermediate representations with auxiliary spatial features or future visual-state prediction. However, these representations largely remain within the observation space and do not share the rigid-body geometry of the action space, forcing the action decoder to implicitly recover this geometry. We propose OASIS, a visuomotor policy that aligns the intermediate representation with the action space via $SE(3)$ end-effector trajectory prediction. OASIS couples a 3D-aware feature encoder that fuses vision-language and metric-depth features with an $SE(3)$ trajectory predictor that produces a camera-frame end-effector trajectory. Conditioned on the predictor's pose-supervised hidden states, the action decoder generates action chunks consistent with rigid-body motion. Across simulation and real-world experiments, OASIS outperforms VLA and WAM baselines in success rate and out-of-distribution generalization. Our project page is available at https://npuhandsome.github.io/OASIS_web.

AI.tldr: OASIS是一种新型的视觉-语言-运动控制策略，通过对中间表示和动作空间进行对齐，在机器人操作任务中实现更高的成功率和更强的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉-语言-动作模型（VLA）和世界动作模型（WAM）虽然丰富了机器人中间表征，但这些表征主要停留在观测空间，并未捕捉动作空间的刚体几何信息，导致动作解码过程复杂且隐含几何恢复难。
AI.method: 提出OASIS方法，引入三维感知特征编码器，将视觉、语言与度量深度特征融合，结合$SE(3)$轨迹预测器生成末端执行器的三维轨迹。解码器基于姿态监督的隐藏状态，生成符合刚体运动特性的动作序列。
AI.result: 在模拟和现实场景中，OASIS在任务成功率及超出分布的泛化能力上均超越了基线VLA和WAM方法。
AI.conclusion: OASIS有效补足了表征与动作空间的几何鸿沟，推动了机器人视觉-语言操作系统的性能边界。

title: IQA-Spider: Unifying Multi-Granularity Image Quality Assessment with Reasoning, Grounding and Referring
summary: We present IQA-Spider, the first image quality assessment (IQA) framework that unifies reasoning, grounding, and referring into a single LMM-based framework for multi-granularity quality understanding. Existing LMM-based IQA methods typically support only partial perception dimensions, such as quality description and question answering~(\textit{i.e.}, reasoning) or pixel-level grounding. This limitation largely stems from the absence of (i) a unified task and data formulation and (ii) effective optimization paradigms for multi-granularity learning. To address these limitations, we formulate a rigorous four-task paradigm covering global and local quality description, pixel-level grounding, and region-level referring. Based on this formulation, we construct a corresponding IQA dataset with a scalable and automatic annotation pipeline, thereby providing a solid foundation for unified multi-granularity learning. To further enable unified perception, we adopt a conflict-free two-stage design that progressively extends text-level multi-granularity understanding to pixel-level grounding: (i) the first stage equips the model with fine-grained text-level reasoning across multiple IQA tasks, and (ii) the second stage introduces a training-free text-to-point grounding paradigm, which bridges textual semantics and pixel-level perception by mapping token logits to spatial coordinates. Based on these efforts, we achieve IQA-Spider with unified multi-granularity explainable image quality assessment. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate strong performance, validating the effectiveness and versatility of the proposed formulation and framework.

AI.tldr: IQA-Spider是首个将推理、定位和指代三者统一于单一LMM框架下，实现多粒度图像质量理解的框架，实验表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有LMM驱动的图像质量评价方法仅支持部分感知维度，主要由于缺乏统一任务/数据建模及多粒度学习优化范式，导致无法实现多层次精细理解。
AI.method:
1. 提出严格的四任务范式：全球和局部质量描述、像素级定位和区域级指代。
2. 制作配套IQA数据集，具备可扩展自动标注流程。
3. 采用无冲突的两阶段架构：第一阶段训练模型在多个IQA任务进行细粒度文本级推理；第二阶段引入免训练文本-点定位方法，将文本语义与像素级感知桥接。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上，IQA-Spider展现了优异的多粒度可解释图像质量评价能力，验证了方法有效性和通用性。
AI.conclusion: IQA-Spider实现了统一的多粒度可解释图像质量评估框架，为多层次视觉理解和质量解释提供了新的解决方案。

title: H$^{2}$MT: Semantic Hierarchy-Aware Hierarchical Memory Transformer
summary: Transformer-based LLMs achieve strong results on many language tasks; however, long inputs remain challenging because context windows are finite, and prefill latency and memory grow rapidly with prompt length. Flat token-stream processing and chunk-based retrieval can therefore spend substantial computation and context budget on text unrelated to the query. Offline-indexed RAG additionally introduces external storage and index management overhead, and typically appends retrieved evidence as raw text, increasing prefill cost and latency. H^{2}MT makes long-context inference structure-aware: it builds a semantic hierarchy offline, computes a memory embedding for each node via bottom-up post-order aggregation, and routes queries coarse-to-fine at inference to prune irrelevant branches early. On LongBench QA (NarrativeQA, HotpotQA, QASPER) and two structured technical-document settings, H MT achieves favorable quality efficiency trade-offs, delivering competitive ROUGE-L and F1 (where applicable) with lower peak GPU memory and time-to-first-token (TTFT) than prompt compression, memory-token methods, and retrieval-augmented generation baselines.

AI.tldr: LLMs在处理长文本时面临内存和延迟瓶颈，本文提出H^2MT结构感知方法，通过语义分层索引和推理阶段的粗到细查询路由，有效剪枝无关内容，实现更高效长文本推理。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM在长上下文推理时，受限于有限的上下文窗口，长输入下推理延迟和GPU内存需求急剧上升，同时许多输入内容与查询实际无关，导致大量计算和内存浪费，亟需一种高效利用计算与内存的方法。
AI.method: H^2MT首先在离线阶段对文本建立语义层级结构，每个层级用后序聚合方法获得记忆嵌入；推理时，模型自上而下将查询分层路由，仅深入与查询最相关分支，从而高效过滤掉无关文本。
AI.result: 在NarrativeQA、HotpotQA、QASPER等LongBench QA和技术文档等场景下，H^2MT相比提示压缩、memory token和检索增强生成（RAG）方法，在ROUGE-L和F1等评价指标接近甚至优于其他方法同时，大幅降低了峰值GPU显存和首token延迟。
AI.conclusion: H^2MT作为一种结构感知的长上下文推理方法，在保持问答质量的前提下显著提升了推理效率和资源利用，在长文本场景有广泛应用潜力。

title: When Search Becomes Memory: Turning Robot Design Trials into Transferable Skills
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as proposal generators for evolutionary robot design, yet most loops remain memoryless: simulator results shape the next population but are not preserved as reusable design knowledge. We present Auto-Robotist, a self-evolving LLM agent that distills morphology-search traces into an explicit natural-language skill library. Each skill stores a structural archetype, evidence-grounded positive and negative rules, and the evaluated designs that support them, making design memory inspectable rather than implicit in a population. During search, the agent retrieves skills to condition LLM edits of elite bodies while retaining a Genetic Algorithm (GA) mutation path for exploration; after evaluation, it updates the library through Add, Diagnose, and Merge. Across seven EvoGym tasks spanning locomotion, traversal, and object interaction, Auto-Robotist improves cold-start 5x5 search and transfers learned skills to 10x10 design spaces, where reference-conditioned transfer outperforms GA on every task. These results suggest that LLM agents can convert expensive physical evaluations into reusable, auditable design principles. Our code will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Auto-Robotist，一个让大模型在机器人进化设计中累积并显式表达设计知识（技能库）的系统。实验表明，与传统进化算法相比，其在多个任务和更大设计空间中表现更好。
AI.motivation: 目前大型语言模型（LLMs）在机器人结构设计中的应用大多只关注短期优化，缺乏对历史设计经验的长期记忆，导致昂贵的仿真结果无法沉淀为可复用的知识。
AI.method: 引入Auto-Robotist系统，将LLM在机器人设计中的搜索轨迹提炼为带例证的自然语言技能库。技能包含结构原型、正负规则及支撑设计，每次搜索时检索技能指导LLM修改机体，并用遗传算法实现探索，循环过程中通过增添、诊断和合并维持技能库演化。
AI.result: 在EvoGym的七个任务（涵盖运动、穿越与物体交互）上，Auto-Robotist在冷启动和技能迁移（小空间到大空间）任务中均优于传统遗传算法，显著提升了搜索效率与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: LLM驱动的Agent能将每次设计尝试转化为可检验、可迁移的知识，从而不断提升自动机器人设计的有效性和透明度。

title: PEDESTRIANQA: A Benchmark for Vision-Language Models on Pedestrian Intention and Trajectory Prediction
summary: Pedestrian intention and trajectory prediction are critical for the safe deployment of autonomous driving systems, directly influencing navigation decisions in complex traffic environments. Recent advances in large vision-language models offer a powerful new paradigm for these tasks by combining high-capacity visual understanding with flexible natural language reasoning. In this work, we introduce PedestrianQA, a large-scale video-based dataset that formulates pedestrian intention and trajectory prediction as question-answering tasks augmented with structured rationales. PedestrianQA expresses richly annotated pedestrian sequences, in natural language, enabling VLMs to learn from visual dynamics, contextual cues, and interactions among traffic agents while generating concise explanations of their predictions without needing specialized architectures tailored for each task. Empirical evaluations across PIE, JAAD, TITAN, and IDD-PeD show that finetuning state-of-the-art VLMs on PedestrianQA significantly improves intention classification, trajectory forecasting accuracy, and the quality of explanatory rationales, demonstrating the strong potential of VLMs as a unified and explainable framework for safety-critical pedestrian behavior modeling.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了PedestrianQA数据集，将行人意图与轨迹预测任务以问答形式进行建模，并通过大规模视觉语言模型（VLM）实现对行人行为的统一和可解释的预测。
AI.motivation: 行人意图和轨迹预测对于自动驾驶安全至关重要，但现有方法需要专门的架构。随着视觉语言模型的发展，研究者尝试是否可以用VLM统一建模这些任务并提升可解释性。
AI.method: 作者构建了一个包含视频与结构化注释的PedestrianQA数据集，并将意图和轨迹预测转化为自然语言问答任务。利用现有主流视觉语言模型进行微调，使模型能理解视觉动态、上下文及交互，并在生成预测的同时给出简洁的解释。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集（PIE, JAAD, TITAN, IDD-PeD）上实验证明，针对PedestrianQA微调后的VLM不仅提升了意图分类与轨迹预测的准确率，还生成了高质量的解释性理由。
AI.conclusion: 大规模视觉语言模型有望成为安全关键场景下对行人行为建模的统一且可解释的强大框架。

title: NITP: Next Implicit Token Prediction for LLM Pre-training
summary: Standard next-token prediction (NTP) supervises language models solely through discrete labels in the output logit space. We argue that this sparse one-hot supervision leaves the latent representation space under-constrained, allowing hidden states to drift into degenerate and anisotropic configurations that can limit generalization. To address this issue, we propose Next Implicit Token Prediction (NITP), which augments discrete prediction with dense continuous supervision directly in the representation space. NITP trains the model to predict the implicit semantic content of the next token, using shallow-layer representations from the same model as stable self-supervised targets. We provide theoretical analysis showing that NITP regularizes the optimization landscape by mitigating under-constrained degrees of freedom and encouraging a compact, structured representation geometry. Empirically, across dense and MoE models ranging from 0.5B to 9B parameters, NITP consistently improves downstream performance with negligible computational overhead. On a 9B MoE model, NITP achieves a 5.7% absolute improvement on MMLU-Pro, along with gains of 6.4% on C3 and 4.3% on CommonsenseQA, with approximately 2% additional training FLOPs and no additional inference cost. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/aHapBean/NITP.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的语言模型训练方法NITP（Next Implicit Token Prediction），通过在表示空间引入密集连续监督代替仅使用离散标签，提升模型性能和泛化能力。实验证明这项方法对各类模型均有明显效果提升，性能提升显著且计算开销极小。
AI.motivation: 传统的NTP（Next-Token Prediction）方法只利用离散标签进行监督，导致模型潜空间受限较少，隐状态容易陷入退化和非各向同性，这会影响模型的泛化能力。研究动机是希望在潜在表示空间引入更强的约束，提升潜表征的结构化和模型的泛化性。
AI.method: 提出NITP方法，将模型预测下一个token的隐式语义内容，通过自身前浅层的表征作为自监督目标，添加到训练中形成连续的密集监督信号。理论上证明这种设计能够约束潜空间的自由度，优化结构表达能力。
AI.result: NITP在0.5B至9B参数规模的稠密与MoE（Mixture-of-Experts）模型中均显著提升下游任务性能。在9B MoE模型上，MMLU-Pro提升5.7%，C3提升6.4%，CommonsenseQA提升4.3%。计算开销仅增加约2%训练FLOPs，推理不增加任何计算开销。
AI.conclusion: NITP在几乎不增加额外计算的情况下，极大提升了大语言模型的表示结构和泛化能力，具有理论和工程上的广阔前景。

title: RePlan-Bot: Multi-Level Replanning for Embodied Instruction Following
summary: Embodied instruction following (EIF) requires agents to understand and execute complex natural language commands within interactive 3D environments. Despite recent advances, existing methods often fail in long-horizon planning and handling irreversible state changes, resulting in low task success rates. To address these challenges, we introduce RePlan-Bot, a novel EIF agent that performs multi-level, continuous replanning throughout task execution. RePlan-Bot integrates a high-level LLM-based auditor for dynamic sub-goal adjustments guided by environmental feedback, a commonsense-guided search mechanism based on a multi-layered instance map for precise and structured object localization, and a lightweight ViT-based corrector to preemptively fix risky low-level actions. Evaluated on the ALFRED benchmark, RePlan-Bot achieves state-of-the-art performance in both seen and unseen environments, demonstrating superior adaptability and reliability.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种新颖的EIF智能体RePlan-Bot，通过持续多层次重新规划，显著提升了3D环境下指令执行的性能，在ALFRED基准上取得了最佳成绩。
AI.motivation: 现有的三维环境下体现式指令执行方法，在处理长时序任务和不可逆状态变更时容易失败，导致任务成功率低。
AI.method: RePlan-Bot包含三个创新模块：1）基于LLM的审计器动态调整子目标，利用环境反馈支持连续高层次重新规划；2）多层实例图和常识驱动的搜索机制，实现结构化、精确的目标定位；3）轻量级的ViT纠错器，用于预防和修正低层次潜在风险动作。
AI.result: 在ALFRED基准中，RePlan-Bot在已见和未见环境上均取得最新最优表现，展现了更强的适应性和可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 多层次、连续的重规划策略能有效缓解长时序执行和不可逆状态问题，为EIF领域带来显著性能提升。

title: EMA: Effort Metric Attention for Anatomical Effort-Guided Human Motion Diffusion
comment: Accepted at IEEE International Conference on Automatic Face and Gesture Recognition (FG 2026)
summary: Human motion diffusion models can synthesize action sequences from text, but controlling motion intensity remains challenging. Existing approaches rely on effort-related adverbs, which are ambiguous and fail to capture quantitative aspects such as pacing, often resulting in flat and monotonous dynamics. We propose an intensity-control framework based on Effort Metric Attention (EMA), a cross-attention module that conditions diffusion on numerical effort signals. Inspired by Laban Movement Analysis (LMA), the framework focuses on the Time and Weight effort factors. We approximate these factors using two kinematic metrics: peak joint positional change for pacing and collective joint positional change for motion amount. EMA enables fine-grained, region-wise control without costly post-hoc optimization. We introduce two evaluation tasks, metric-to-motion consistency and body-part-level effort modulation, to assess numerical fidelity and localized control. Experiments and a user study show near-monotonic alignment between specified effort levels, generated motion dynamics, and established LMA descriptors. These results indicate effective and interpretable control of effort dynamics in practice.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的运动强度可控的人体动作生成方法，通过引入Effort Metric Attention (EMA)模块，实现了基于数值信号的精准强度调控，使合成的动作更具动态变化和真实感。
AI.motivation: 当前基于扩散模型的人体动作生成方法虽然能根据文本合成动作，但对动作强度的控制不精确，现有方法仅依赖含糊的副词描述，难以量化并容易导致动作动态单一。为实现对动作动态的精细调控，迫切需要基于定量指标的有效方法。
AI.method: 提出一种基于Laban Movement Analysis理论，以时间和重量两个维度制定努力因子，通过峰值关节位移（代表节奏快慢）和整体关节位移（代表运动幅度）两个运动学指标量化动作强度。在生成模型中引入Effort Metric Attention跨注意力模块，将这些数值强度信号作为控制条件，显著提升运动合成的可控性和精细度。
AI.result: 实验和用户调查结果表明，该方法能在不需要后处理优化的前提下，实现动作强度的区域化细粒度控制，且指定的努力值与生成运动的动态特性及LMA描述词基本单调对应，实现了目标的数值一致性和本体一致性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的EMA框架实现了可解释、精细且高效的人体动作强度控制，在运动合成领域具有良好的应用前景。

title: SEP-Attack: A Simple and Effective Paradigm for Transfer-Based Textual Adversarial Attack
summary: Despite the strong performance of deep neural networks in modern Web and language applications, they remain vulnerable to adversarial attacks, especially transferable attacks that generate adversarial examples using surrogate models without accessing the victim model. Transferable attacks in the text domain are still under-explored, with only a few studies addressing this challenging issue, often with suboptimal results due to equal treatment of submodels or inaccurate estimation of importance scores. To address these challenges, we propose a simple yet effective paradigm for transfer-based textual adversarial attack, named SEP-Attack. Specifically, we employ the Determinantal Point Process (DPP) to generate diverse surrogate ensemble weights, representing the transferability of submodels. Using these weights, we introduce a new metric to evaluate prediction confidence scores, which in turn are used to calculate word importance scores and generate adversarial candidates. Finally, we quantify the transferability score for each candidate and select the top ones as the final transferable adversarial examples. Experiments conducted on four datasets and two real-world APIs validate the efficacy of SEP-Attack, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的文本可迁移对抗攻击方法SEP-Attack，通过多样性分布（DPP）优化代理模型集成权重，再用此权重指导对抗扰动生成。实验表明该方法明显优于现有方案。
AI.motivation: 现有深度神经网络虽强大，但易受可迁移对抗攻击影响，尤其是在文本领域相关研究较少且效果一般，主要因无法准确评估子模型重要性或对其一视同仁。
AI.method: 提出SEP-Attack，利用DPP产生多样化子模型权重，将其用于计算预测置信及词语重要性分数，指导对抗候选生成，并量化每个候选的迁移性，选取最优的对抗样本。
AI.result: 在4个数据集和2个真实API上实验，SEP-Attack明显优于现有最优基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SEP-Attack在提升文本领域对抗攻击可迁移性方面效果显著，方法简单有效，具备实用推广价值。

title: AnyScene: Towards Highly Controllable Driving Scene Generation at Anywhere and Beyond
comment: Work in progress. Project page: https://mind-omni.github.io/
summary: Generating high-fidelity and controllable synthetic data is critical for advancing end-to-end autonomous driving, particularly for addressing the long tail of rare safety-critical scenarios. Existing occupancy-guided methods typically rely on shallow conditioning mechanisms and reference-frame-dependent video synthesis, which limits fine-grained controllability from arbitrary BEV layouts and restricts their applicability for scalable simulation. In this paper, we propose AnyScene, a unified occupancy-centric framework for driving scene generation. AnyScene generates semantic occupancy sequences from BEV layouts through a Spatial-Temporal Occupancy Diffusion Transformer that jointly tokenizes BEV and occupancy features in an autoregressive manner. This design enables precise controllability from cross-dataset and user-defined BEV inputs while naturally supporting long-horizon generation. Building upon the generated occupancy, a Geometry-Grounded View Expansion module treats occupancy as the canonical spatial representation and synthesizes temporally consistent multi-view driving videos in a reference-free and autoregressive fashion, supporting flexible camera configurations at inference time. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AnyScene achieves state-of-the-art performance in both occupancy and video generation. It exhibits strong generalization to unseen and customized layouts, and provides measurable benefits for downstream tasks such as sparse-view 3D reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 提出了AnyScene框架，通过空间-时序扩散Transformer和几何引导的视频生成，实现了高精度、可控的自动驾驶场景生成，在占用与视频生成领域取得了SOTA效果。
AI.motivation: 当前自动驾驶对高质量且可控的合成数据需求迫切，尤其在处理罕见的关键安全场景时。现有方法在场景可控性、视频生成扩展性方面存在明显局限，无法从任意鸟瞰图(BEV)布局实现细致操控，影响大规模仿真与泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出AnyScene统一占用为中心的生成框架。首先，利用空间-时序占用扩散Transformer，将BEV与占用特征联合编码，自回归生成占用序列；然后，设计几何引导的视图扩展模块，将占用映射为标准空间表征，并生成时间一致、参考帧无关度的多视角视频，支持推理阶段灵活配置相机。
AI.result: AnyScene在占用和视频生成方面达到了最新SOTA性能，实验表明可有效泛化至未知与自定义BEV布局，并在稀疏视角3D重建等下游任务提升了表现。
AI.conclusion: AnyScene为自动驾驶高保真、可控场景生成提供了新方案，克服了现有方法扩展性与可控性不足，实现了优异的生成质量和下游任务增益。

title: World Models as Group Actions
summary: Video world models have achieved strong visual realism, but this does not ensure that their dynamics are truly governed by actions. In this work, we argue that action faithfulness should be understood through the compositional structure of actions, which in many embodied settings follows a group structure (e.g., SE(2) for navigation). Based on this insight, we formalize action-conditioned world modeling as realizing a group action on the state space, providing a principled criterion for evaluating dynamics beyond visual quality. To operationalize this framework, we propose a unified approach that enforces identity, inverse, and composition consistency via latent-space regularization with synthesized supervision, avoiding additional data collection. We further introduce two metrics: Group-Action Consistency (GAC) and Group-Action Robustness (GAR), to evaluate structural correctness and rollout stability. Extensive experimental results show that our method consistently improves both GAC and GAR in state-of-the-art video world models without degrading perceptual quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过群结构视角下的组合性结构来增强视频世界模型对动作的真实建模能力，并引入了新的结构评估指标和正则化方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有视频世界模型能生成高度逼真的视觉效果，但它们的动态变化未必真正由动作控制。因此需要新的标准和方法来评估和增强模型对动作的忠实性，特别是在具身任务中，动作遵循一定的数学群结构。
AI.method: 作者将动作条件世界建模形式化为在状态空间上实现群作用，并通过在潜空间中引入基于合成监督的正则化，来强制模型满足群的恒等、逆和组合一致性，无需额外数据采集。同时，提出了两个新的评估指标：群作用一致性（GAC）和群作用鲁棒性（GAR）。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，本文方法能在不降低视觉感知质量的前提下，显著提升当前最先进视频世界模型在GAC和GAR指标上的表现。
AI.conclusion: 强调了动作的组合结构对于世界模型的正确性至关重要，提出的潜空间正则化与结构性指标为视频世界模型的评估和提升提供了更有原则的方法。

title: Investigating the Interplay between Contextual and Parametric Chain-of-Thought Faithfulness under Optimization
comment: The first two authors contributed equally and share first-authorship
summary: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) faithfulness, i.e., whether CoTs genuinely reflect large language models' (LLM) underlying behavior, is typically evaluated under two disjoint paradigms: contextual faithfulness, measured by perturbing the input or CoT trace, and parametric faithfulness, assessed by intervening on a model's parametric knowledge. Yet prior work compares them only descriptively. We fill this gap by proposing FaithMate, a unified preference-alignment interface for optimizing models towards either faithfulness paradigm. It enables us to investigate the interplay between the two paradigms, examining whether and to what extent faithfulness gains generalize within and across paradigms. Across three models, two datasets, and six faithfulness metrics, we find that the two paradigms are positively coupled, yet asymmetric: optimizing towards parametric faithfulness yields consistent gains across both paradigms, whereas the contextual counterpart delivers more variable gains. Within the contextual paradigm, faithfulness gains on one metric do not consistently transfer to others, implying that existing contextual metrics capture disjoint facets of faithfulness and exposing inherent trade-offs. These findings imply that CoT faithfulness is not a monolithic objective and therefore requires multifaceted optimization and evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FaithMate，一种用于优化和对齐大模型Chain-of-Thought（CoT）推理忠实性的统一界面，并系统分析了CoT忠实性两种主流范式（上下文忠实性与参数忠实性）之间的关联与差异。研究发现，参数忠实性优化能带来更为一致和广泛的提升，而上下文忠实性优化的增益具有较大差异性。不同上下文指标间的提升不可转移，说明它们捕捉到了忠实性的不同侧面，提示需多维评估与优化。
AI.motivation: 目前CoT忠实性研究分为上下文忠实性和参数忠实性两个互不相交的范式，二者虽然常被描述性比较，但缺乏系统性的联系和优化研究。该论文旨在填补这一空白，明确它们的内在联系，并探索最佳的优化方向。
AI.method: 作者提出FaithMate，一个能够统一调优模型以适配这两类忠实性的接口，并通过实验在三个模型、两个数据集和六个忠实性指标下评估优化效果，对比交叉优化的增益与一致性。
AI.result: 实验表明，两种范式间存在正向耦合但非对称：优化参数忠实性时，两种范式的表现都能提升；而仅优化上下文忠实性时，提升效果不稳定。同时，不同上下文指标之间的优化增益不能相互转移，表明它们反映了忠实性的不同维度。
AI.conclusion: CoT忠实性不是单一指标，需要多维度的优化和评价方法。参数忠实性的优化策略在整体提升模型忠实性方面更具普适性。

title: Physen-Noise2Noise: Physics-Guided Self-Supervised Defocus Deblurring with Bias Correction under Low-Light Conditions
summary: Low-light, long-exposure defocus deblurring remains a challenging problem due to the simultaneous presence of severe blur and complex biased noise. Existing methods typically rely on simplified noise assumptions, which limits their effectiveness under realistic imaging conditions. In this work, we propose Physen-Noise2Noise, a self-supervised deblurring framework guided by the physical model of defocus imaging, which leverages noisy multi-frame observations without requiring clean reference images. Unlike conventional Noise2Noise-based approaches that assume zero-mean noise, we derive a frequency-domain constraint inherent to the defocus imaging process and incorporate it into the learning framework via a learnable noise bias parameter. In addition, a multi-frame noisy initialization strategy is introduced to suppress complex biased noise prior to deblurring, providing a more stable starting point for reconstruction. This formulation explicitly models biased noise and enables joint bias correction and high-frequency detail recovery during training. Furthermore, we develop a pretrain-finetune variant to enhance robustness and generalization under challenging noise conditions. Extensive experiments on both simulation and real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art self-supervised approaches for defocus deblurring in the presence of complex biased noise.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Physen-Noise2Noise的自监督去模糊方法，针对低光、长曝光下受偏置噪声影响的散焦去模糊任务，能不依赖于干净参考图像，显著优于现有自监督方法。
AI.motivation: 现有去模糊方法在低光、长曝光图像中无法应对复杂偏置噪声，普遍假设零均值噪声，导致方法在真实场景中效果大打折扣。本研究关注在更真实复杂条件下提升去模糊表现。
AI.method: 1. 以物理散焦成像模型为指导，实现仅依赖多帧有噪观测的自监督训练，无需干净参考。2. 引入可学习噪声偏置参数，将频域约束嵌入学习过程，显式建模非零均值的噪声。3. 多帧噪声初始化策略，先抑制偏置噪声，为去模糊提供更稳定起点。4. 预训练-微调范式，增强模型在极端噪声下鲁棒性和泛化性。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实数据集上，所提Physen-Noise2Noise方法在复杂偏置噪声情景下，去模糊效果优于现有各类自监督方法，表现更稳定，精细结构恢复更好。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过物理建模和显式噪声偏置校正，实现了低光、长曝光下更高质量的自监督去模糊，具备较强实用性和推广前景。

title: Large Language Model Selection with Limited Annotations
summary: Choosing a Large Language Model (LLM) for a given task requires comparing many strong candidates, yet standard evaluation relies on costly annotations over fixed evaluation sets. To address this challenge, we develop SELECT-LLM, the first framework for active model selection of LLMs. SELECT-LLM aims to find a small set of queries whose annotations are most informative for identifying the best LLM for a given task. To this end, we introduce a query selection rule based on expected information gain, computed from pairwise similarities between candidate model outputs. Because this rule only uses generated model responses, SELECT-LLM can be applied across candidate models without assumptions about their architecture or access to model weights. This makes it suitable for both open-weight and black-box LLMs. We evaluate SELECT-LLM across 23 datasets, 156 evaluated models, diverse task families, and multiple text evaluation metrics. Across all experiments, SELECT-LLM improves over the strongest baseline in every setting, with annotation cost reductions up to 81.8% for best model selection and up to 84.78% for near-best model selection.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了SELECT-LLM框架，通过主动选择查询，大幅降低了在多个LLM模型中选优所需的标注成本。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM模型的选优流程需要在固定测试集上大量人工标注，成本高昂且效率低。研究者急需更高效的方法来筛选最佳LLM。
AI.method: 作者提出SELECT-LLM，基于预期信息增益规则，利用模型输出的相似性对查询进行选择。该框架只依赖候选模型的生成响应，无需访问模型权重或架构，因此适用于开放权重和黑盒模型的对比。
AI.result: 作者在23个数据集、156个模型和多个任务与评测指标上验证了方法有效性。SELECT-LLM在所有实验中都优于最强的基线方法，标注成本最高可减少81.8%（最佳模型选取）和84.78%（近最佳模型选取）。
AI.conclusion: SELECT-LLM显著提升了LLM选型过程的效率和经济性，是面向不同模型和任务的高效、广适用性模型优选工具。

title: Understanding the Impact of Geometric Foundation Models on Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Recent work explores new opportunities at the intersection of vision-language-action models (VLAs) and geometric foundation models (GFMs) for 3D reconstruction, such as VGGT. While the resulting geometric VLAs often show improved performance, it remains unclear (i) if modern VLAs already have sufficient geometric understanding to start with, (ii) what is the best architecture to inject geometric understanding into a VLA, and (iii) what is the effect of other design choices that affect geometric VLAs. In this paper we provide a rigorous experimental analysis to shed light on these questions, for a specific choice of VLA (GR00T-N1.5) and GFM (VGGT). Our first contribution is to formalize prior work's intuition that current VLAs lack geometric understanding, by providing a rigorous analysis based on linear probing. The analysis quantifies, for the first time, the "geometric gap" between VLAs and GFMs. Our second contribution is to identify and compare different strategies to bridge GFMs with VLAs. We implement three different architectures, which differ in the way they inject geometry in the VLA, while keeping low-level implementation details as similar as possible, to ensure a fair comparison. Finally, we analyze the impact of non-architectural choices (e.g., training data, number of cameras, reconstruction quality) on the performance of the geometric VLAs.

AI.tldr: 本文对视觉-语言-动作模型（VLA）与几何基础模型（GFM）结合用于三维重建的现状进行分析，量化了VLA几何能力的缺口，并探索了不同的结构和设计选择对几何VLA表现的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究显示结合VLA和GFM有助于提升三维重建能力，但VLA本身几何理解能力如何、最佳融合方式及相关设计细节尚不明确。
AI.method: 作者选用GR00T-N1.5（VLA）和VGGT（GFM），通过线性探测定量分析VLA与GFM的几何能力差距，并设计三种不同的融合架构，比较不同结构及非架构因素（如训练数据、摄像头数量、重建质量）对性能的影响。
AI.result: 首次量化了VLA与GFM之间的“几何能力差距”；比较了三种几何注入策略对性能的影响，揭示了架构和训练等因素均对性能有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 现有VLA几何能力有限，适当与GFM结合及优化架构和设计选择能显著提升三维重建表现，为今后几何VLA的改进方向提供了实验依据。

title: Self-supervised Dynamic Heterogeneous Degradation Modeling for Unified Zero-Shot Image Restoration
summary: Zero-shot image restoration provides a flexible way to handle diverse degradations without task-specific training. However, existing methods typically rely on stacked layers or pre-trained features to enhance degradation expression, while overlooking physically consistent priors. The insufficient degradation prompts impose the heavy training burden and high sampling costs during zero-shot diffusion. Moreover, the fixed inference trajectory often collapses to suboptimal solutions under complex corruptions. We observe that heterogeneous degradations can be reparameterized into a minimal set of physically coherent parameters for compact representation. Based on this insight, we first propose a unified physical zero-shot image restoration (UP-ZeroIR) framework that explicitly models heterogeneous degradations into a homogeneous all-in-one distribution. The distribution can be optimized directly in the latent space, enabling principled solution exploration and effective prompt adaptation. Besides, we introduce a dynamic quality-refinement strategy that adaptively adjusts the diffusion trajectory for robust globally optimal convergence. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance across both single and mixed degradations. Our code is available at https://github.com/yangjinglyy/UP-ZeroIR

AI.tldr: 提出了一种统一物理零样本图像复原方法（UP-ZeroIR），通过物理一致参数对复杂退化进行紧凑表达，并在潜空间内优化分布与自适应推理，提高复原效果，超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本图像复原方法忽视物理先验，依赖堆叠网络层或预训练特征，不仅训练与采样开销大，还容易在复杂退化下失效。本工作旨在弥补物理一致性缺失，提高零样本复原的表现和效率。
AI.method: 作者提出将异构退化重新参数化为最小的物理一致参数集合，并基于此构建UP-ZeroIR框架，将所有退化统一建模为同一分布，在潜空间内直接优化，实现有效自适应。同时设计划质动态微调机制，调整扩散推理轨迹，提升收敛能力。
AI.result: 实验证明，无论是单一退化还是混合退化，UP-ZeroIR都优于主流的零样本图像复原方法，达到了最新水平。
AI.conclusion: 引入物理一致参数与动态推理策略，UP-ZeroIR提升了零样本图像复原在多类退化下的泛化和恢复能力，为无监督、高效图像复原开辟新方向。

title: Exploring Profiles of Cognitive Distortions Associated with Mental Health Disorders
summary: Cognitive distortions, distorted patterns of thinking, have been increasingly studied in computational mental health research. Although they are related to many, if not all, mental health disorders, most existing studies focus primarily on depression. In this work, we explore distortion profiles across multiple mental health conditions. We analyzed a large Reddit-based dataset containing posts from nine self-reported mental health groups as well as a control group using both an n-gram-based method and a fine-tuned transformer model for detecting cognitive distortions. Mental health groups, both when pooled together and when examined individually, showed higher prevalence of cognitive distortions compared to the control group, with the effect sizes ranging from small to moderate. When comparing distortion profiles across conditions, we observed largely similar patterns, although some groups exhibited overall higher levels of distortions than others. These findings suggest that relatively simple lexical approaches can be useful for exploratory analyses of group-level trends in large-scale mental health text data.

AI.tldr: 本研究分析了Reddit上多个心理健康群体认知扭曲的特征，发现相比对照组，心理健康群体普遍表现出更高的认知扭曲水平。
AI.motivation: 当前对认知扭曲的研究多集中于抑郁症，尽管认知扭曲与多种心理健康障碍相关。因此，研究者希望探索不同精神障碍之间的认知扭曲特征差异。
AI.method: 研究基于Reddit自述心理健康群体和对照组的大型语料库，采用n-gram方法和微调的transformer模型检测认知扭曲，并对九个心理健康群体及对照组进行了比较分析。
AI.result: 无论将心理健康群体合并还是分别分析，都发现其认知扭曲的发生率高于对照组，效应量从小到中等不等。各群体间的具体扭曲特征总体相似，但部分群体表现出更高的扭曲水平。
AI.conclusion: 简单的词汇方法可有效用于大规模心理健康文本数据中群体认知扭曲趋势的探索性分析。

title: Drift-Resistant Navigation World Model with Anchored Epipolar Guidance
summary: We propose Drift-Resistant Navigation World Model, a generative model that mitigates both perceptual drift and geometric drift in conventional rollout-based navigation world models. Existing methods recursively feed generated content into subsequent steps, causing noise accumulation and degraded predictions, i.e., perceptual drift. Meanwhile, their predictions often deviate from the agent's motion, resulting in geometry drift. We address both types of drift by redesigning world-model prediction as an anchor-guided rollout. Instead of rolling out every frame sequentially, we first predict sparse future anchors that serve as stable long-range targets, and then generate intermediate frames within each chunk conditioned on both past context and future anchors. Importantly, these sparse anchors also provide geometric constraints, supported by bidirectional epipolar geometry, to localize where corresponding content should appear in the intermediate frames. Experiments on four benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements over strong baselines in long-horizon visual quality, geometric consistency, and multi-view coherence. These gains further translate into improved downstream planning performance under the same planners, highlighting the importance of drift-resistant, geometry-aware prediction for reliable navigation world models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种抗漂移的导航世界模型，通过锚点引导和几何约束，有效缓解了传统生成式世界模型中感知漂移和几何漂移问题。实验显示，方法在视觉质量、几何一致性以及下游规划任务中均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 传统基于回滚的导航世界模型存在两个主要问题：1）递归生成内容导致噪音累积和感知漂移；2）预测结果与实际运动轨迹偏离，导致几何漂移。从而影响长期预测的可靠性及导航质量。
AI.method: 通过引入“锚点引导回滚”机制，先预测稀疏的未来锚点，这些锚点作为稳定的长程目标，并在每个区块内结合历史上下文和未来锚点生成中间帧。同时，利用双向极线几何为中间帧内容提供几何约束，确保空间一致性，提高结果的几何准确性。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上，提出的方法在长时视觉质量、几何一致性和多视角协同上均取得显著提升，并进一步在相同的下游规划器下展现更优的规划性能。
AI.conclusion: 锚点引导及几何约束有效提升了世界模型对漂移的抵抗力和对导航几何的感知能力，对于实现高可靠性的导航推理尤为重要。

title: Correcting Visual Blur Induced by Attention Distraction to Reduce Hallucinations: Algorithm and Theory
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) frequently suffer from object hallucinations, yet the visual perceptual mechanism underlying this failure remains poorly understood. In this work, we reveal that hallucinations are strongly associated with a human-like attention distraction phenomenon, where humans under divided focus experience degraded visual clarity and produce inaccurate descriptions, while in models the same mechanism manifests as spatial inconsistency in multi-head attention and temporal fading of attention to image tokens during decoding. We further provide theoretical insights that attention dispersion increases model complexity and degrades classification generalization. Motivated by these findings, we propose an Attention-Focused Approach for Improved Image Perception (AFIP), which corrects attention distraction via cross-head attention enrichment and reinforces visual grounding through dynamic historical attention enhancement. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks and models validate the effectiveness of AFIP without additional training.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了多模态大模型在图像理解中出现物体幻觉的成因，提出了一种新的注意力聚焦方法，有效改善了图像感知表现。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在处理图像任务时常常会产生物体幻觉，但这种故障背后的视觉感知机制尚不明确。理解其根本原因有助于提升模型的感知能力和实际应用可靠性。
AI.method: 作者发现物体幻觉与类似人类注意力分散现象相关，并通过理论和实验揭示了一种注意力机制缺陷。基于此，提出了注意力聚焦提升方法（AFIP），通过跨头注意力增强和动态历史注意力强化来修正模型注意力分散和视觉定位不准的问题，无需额外训练过程。
AI.result: 大量基准数据集和多种模型上的实验证明，该注意力聚焦方法能够在不增加训练成本的情况下，有效减少模型幻觉、提升图像感知与理解能力。
AI.conclusion: 作者的方法针对多模态大模型视觉幻觉问题提出了有效修正机制，为提升多模态模型图像理解表现提供了新思路。

title: Better, Faster: Harnessing Self-Improvement in Large Reasoning Models
summary: Self-improvement training enables the large reasoning models (LRMs) to improve themselves by self-generating reasoning trajectories as training data without external supervision. However, we find that this method often falls short in complex reasoning tasks and even leads to model collapse. Through a series of preliminary analyses, we reveal two problems: (1) data imbalance, where most training samples are simple, but the challenging yet crucial samples are scarce; (2) overthinking, where many undesired samples with redundant reasoning steps are used for self-training. To this end, we propose HSIR, which effectively Harnesses Self-Improvement in large Reasoning models via two simple-yet-effective approaches. Specifically, HSIR introduces a verify-then-exit sampling strategy to mitigate data imbalance by efficiently collecting more accurate solutions for difficult queries, and designs an Intrinsic Diversity score to quantify overthinking and filter out the undesired solutions. We apply HSIR to various post-training paradigms, among which we further propose H-GRPO, an enhanced GRPO algorithm that leverages the intrinsic diversity as an external reward to encourage concise and diverse reasoning via reinforcement learning.
