Extensive results show that HSIR not only effectively enhances the reasoning performance, i.e., bringing up to +10.9% average performance gains, but also significantly improves the reasoning efficiency by reducing up to 42.4% relative inference overhead.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的自我改进训练方法HSIR，用于提升大型推理模型在复杂推理任务中的性能和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有自我改进训练方法在复杂推理任务中效果不佳，甚至导致模型退化。经过分析，主要问题有数据不平衡（难样本过少）和推理冗余（过度思考），需要新方法解决。
AI.method: 作者提出HSIR，包括两大策略：（1）'验证后退出'采样策略，减少数据不平衡，提高困难问题的准确样本比例；（2）固有多样性得分，量化并过滤推理冗余。同时在不同微调范式下应用HSIR，并提出结合固有多样性奖励的H-GRPO算法，通过强化学习鼓励简洁多样的推理。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，HSIR可提升平均推理性能高达10.9%，推理效率提升显著，推理开销最多降低42.4%。
AI.conclusion: HSIR方法可有效提升大型推理模型的性能与效率，缓解自我改进训练流程中的关键问题。

title: Multi-view Consistent 3D Gaussian Head Avatars 'without' Multi-view Generation
summary: High-fidelity 3D Gaussian head avatar generation is critical for applications such as AR/VR, telepresence, and digital humans. Existing methods depend on multi-view datasets, 3D captures, or intermediate 2D view synthesis. In contrast, we learn both conditional and unconditional 3D head models from randomly sampled 2D images alone, without using multi-view data, 3D supervision, or intermediate view generation. We introduce MVCHead, a single-shot state space model that enforces multi-view consistency (MVC) directly in the 3D representation while regressing 3D Gaussians under these constraints. At its core, we propose a Hierarchical State Space (HiSS) block that progressively refines Gaussians from coarse to fine, while capturing long-range dependencies. Within each HiSS block, we modify Mamba's standard unidirectional scan with the proposed Hierarchical Bi-directional State Scan (HiBiSS) that aligns recurrence with the axes along which multi-view inconsistencies are strongest. Finally, we design an SE(3) Multi-view Critic that judges whether a set of self-renders arises from a single underlying 3D configuration, rewarding cross-view pixel alignment without observing real multi-view pairs. MVCHead achieves state-of-the-art perceptual quality, surpasses prior methods in both texture and geometric consistency, and maintains comparable shape consistency. To demonstrate scalability, we release FaceGS-10K, the first large-scale dataset of ready-to-use 3D Gaussian head assets for training and evaluation of 3D head models. Project Page and code: https://humansensinglab.github.io/MVCHead/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MVCHead，一种无需多视角或3D监督，仅用2D随机图片即可生成高保真3D高斯头像的新方法，并且还发布了大规模3D头部高斯数据集FaceGS-10K。
AI.motivation: 现有3D头像生成方法依赖多视角或3D数据，实际应用中难以获取。为降低数据采集难度、提升适用性，作者希望实现仅利用单张2D图片学习高质量3D模型。
AI.method: 提出单步状态空间模型MVCHead，通过多视角一致性直接在3D表示中约束并回归高斯分布。核心创新包括分层状态空间结构（HiSS），逐步细化高斯并建模长距离依赖；以及分层双向状态扫描（HiBiSS），对抗多视图不一致性。此外设计SE(3)多视角鉴别器，通过自渲染判断像素对齐，促进一致性，无需真实多视对。
AI.result: MVCHead在头像3D建模感知质量上优于现有方法，在纹理和几何一致性上均有提升，同时形状一致性保持可比。并发布FaceGS-10K大规模3D高斯头像数据集，验证方法的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: MVCHead实现了无多视/3D监督下高保真3D头像生成，推动3D人脸建模迈向更轻量、高效和可规模化发展，适用于大量实际AR/VR等任务。

title: LC-Flow: Learning Local Continuous Optical Flow and Confidence from events
summary:
Event cameras capture brightness changes asynchronously with microsecond resolution, yet existing optical flow methods fail to fully exploit this temporal continuity. Frame-based approaches impose artificial accumulation latency and suffer from domain overfitting, while model-based local methods operate statelessly, discarding temporal history between predictions and yielding inaccurate flows.
  We propose \textbf{LC-Flow}, the first temporally continuous, learning-based optical flow estimator that operates purely from local events. At its core, a Continuous Local Recurrent Network maintains persistent hidden states per spatial grid, incrementally accumulating temporal context as events arrive. Unlike frame-based methods constrained to fixed accumulation windows, and unlike stateless model-based methods that recompute motion from scratch at each step, LC-Flow produces sparse local flow estimates at arbitrary timestamps with full motion history.
  To address the inherent ambiguity of local observations, we jointly learn a confidence score that quantifies the reliability of each prediction, explicitly handling event sparsity and the aperture problem. This confidence serves a dual role: filtering unreliable estimates for downstream tasks such as visual odometry, and providing principled weights for a multi-scale confidence-guided aggregation that reconstructs globally consistent flow from the sparse local outputs. LC-Flow achieves state-of-the-art performance among local methods on both MVSEC and DSEC, while the confidence-guided aggregation establishes a new overall state-of-the-art on the MVSEC benchmark, surpassing heavy frame-based networks that rely on global spatial priors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LC-Flow，一种基于事件相机的、时序连续的局部学习型光流估计算法，并通过学习置信度实现全局一致的光流重建，在MVSEC和DSEC数据集表现优异。
AI.motivation: 传统的事件相机光流估计算法无法充分利用其高时序分辨率：帧方法引入了不必要的延迟且易过拟合，局部无状态模型又丢失了历史信息，导致结果不准确。需要一种既能保持时间连续性又充分利用局部信息的新方法。
AI.method: 提出LC-Flow，使用连续的局部循环网络（Continuous Local Recurrent Network），为每个空间格维持持久隐藏状态，实时积累历史。区别于基于帧的固定窗口和无状态模型，LC-Flow可在任意时刻输出稀疏的局部光流，并联合学习置信度分数，用于过滤不可靠结果及实现多尺度、置信度引导的全局一致光流重建。
AI.result: LC-Flow在MVSEC和DSEC数据集上，本地方法排名第一。置信度引导的全局一致聚合方法在MVSEC基准上实现了新SOTA，超过了依赖全局空间先验的大型帧网络。
AI.conclusion: LC-Flow不仅有效利用了事件数据的时间连续性和局部特征，还通过置信度机制提升了整体鲁棒性和全局光流一致性，推动了事件相机光流估计领域的性能极限。

title: Language Bias in LVLMs: From In-Depth Analysis to Simple and Effective Mitigation
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) extend large language models with visual understanding, but remain vulnerable to hallucination, where outputs are fluent yet inconsistent with images. Recent studies link this issue to language bias-the tendency of LVLMs to over-rely on text while neglecting visual inputs. Yet most analyses remain empirical without uncovering its underlying cause. In this paper, we provide a systematic study of language bias and identify its root in modality misalignment during training. Our analysis shows that both Visual Instruction Tuning (VIT) and Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) often prioritize textual improvements, which may cause LVLMs to overly lean toward language modeling rather than balanced multimodal understanding. To address this, we propose two simple yet effective methods: Language Bias Regularization (LBR) which mitigates language bias through regularization during instruction tuning, and Language Bias Penalty (LBP), which penalizes language bias in the DPO training process. Extensive experiments across diverse models and benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. LBR consistently improves performance on over ten general benchmarks, while LBP significantly reduces hallucination and improves trustworthiness. Together, these methods not only mitigate language bias but also advance the overall alignment of LVLMs, all without introducing any additional data or auxiliary models. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/lab-klc/LVLM-Language-Bias.

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了LVLMs（大型视觉-语言模型）存在的语言偏置及其导致的幻觉问题，并提出了两种有效的缓解方法：语言偏置正则化（LBR）和语言偏置惩罚（LBP），显著提升了模型的多模态对齐与真实可信度。
AI.motivation: 当前LVLMs容易产生输出与图像内容不符的幻觉现象，研究发现其根源是模型训练时对文本的过度依赖，但大多分析停留在经验层面，缺乏对导致该现象的机制研究。
AI.method: 作者通过系统实验发现，现有如视觉指令微调（VIT）和直接偏好优化（DPO）过程表面上提升了整体效果，但实际更偏重文本端，导致多模态理解失衡。为此，提出在指令微调中加入语言偏置正则化（LBR），以及在DPO训练中引入语言偏置惩罚（LBP）两种方法，以限制过度依赖文字。
AI.result: 在多个模型和十余项主流基准测试上，LBR方法稳定性提升，LBP方法有效降低幻觉比例，提高输出可信度。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法在不增加额外数据或模型的前提下，显著缓解了LVLMs的语言偏置，不仅提升了多模态对齐能力，还增强了模型的实用性和可靠性。

title: Neuromorphic LiDAR-based Bird's Eye View Object Detection using Energy-efficient Spiking Neural Networks
summary: Autonomous driving perception demands accurate and efficient processing of three-dimensional sensor data under strict power constraints. Traditional convolutional neural networks achieve strong detection accuracy but are computationally intensive, limiting their suitability for deployment on resource-constrained neuromorphic platforms. Spiking neural networks offer a compelling alternative through event-driven sparse computation, yet their application to complex real-world perception tasks such as three-dimensional object detection remains limited. In this work, we propose an end-to-end spiking encoder-decoder network for object detection in bird's eye view representations of LiDAR point clouds, trained using surrogate gradient backpropagation. We train two variants: a membrane potential variant that reads continuous neuron state at the output stage for maximum accuracy, achieving $92.05$/$87.04$/$86.51$ AP at $\mathrm{IoU}\!=\!0.5$ (Easy/Moderate/Hard), and, a fully binary spiking variant that operates exclusively on spike trains at every layer for direct neuromorphic deployment. We evaluate four input spike encoding strategies and demonstrate that allowing the network to learn spike representations directly from data outperforms hand-crafted Poisson, latency, and z-axis encoding schemes on the KITTI benchmark, where sequential frames are unavailable and the BEV input is presented repeatedly across timesteps as a proxy for temporal streaming. A block-wise energy analysis demonstrates a $3.33\times$ reduction in synaptic operation energy over an equivalent CNN under conservative loop-based operation. Together, these results demonstrate the viability of spiking neural networks for accurate and energy-efficient neuromorphic perception in autonomous driving.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的脉冲编码器-解码器网络，用于自动驾驶中的鸟瞰视角三维目标检测，在精度和能耗方面均优于传统卷积神经网络。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶感知任务需要在有限算力和能耗下高效、准确地处理三维传感器数据。传统卷积神经网络虽准确但资源消耗大，不适合部署于低功耗神经拟态硬件。利用脉冲神经网络的稀疏事件驱动计算，有望实现高效能耗的感知系统，但其在复杂三维目标检测上的应用尚不成熟。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种端到端的脉冲式编码器-解码器网络，针对鸟瞰视角的LiDAR点云进行三维目标检测。训练时采用代理梯度反向传播，并分别实现了读取连续神经状态与全二值脉冲两种模型。还系统比较了四种输入脉冲编码方式，验证了由神经网络直接学习脉冲编码效果优于手工设计方法。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集不同难度下，连续状态版本最高检测精度分别为92.05/87.04/86.51（IoU=0.5）。能耗分析显示，与等效CNN相比，突触运算能耗降低了3.33倍。神经网络自学习脉冲编码优于其它手工编码策略。
AI.conclusion: 脉冲神经网络在三维目标检测领域具有实现高精度和低能耗感知的潜力，适用于自动驾驶场景的神经拟态硬件。

title: Phase-Aware Wavelet-Based-Scattering Encoder-Decoder for Dense Predictions
summary: Scattering transforms achieve Lipschitz stability and translation invariance, but dense prediction tasks require preserving spatial structure lost in global averaging. We propose Phase-Aware Scattering Encoder-Decoder, which restores this information by explicitly preserving phase in skip connections. On image denoising (BSD68), breaking translation invariance improves PSNR by $+2.17$~dB; phase preservation adds $+1.03$~dB. A novel spatial shuffling ablation ($-1.26$~dB penalty) demonstrates phase encodes location-dependent structure. We conduct a preliminary extensibility study on a second dense prediction task (ISIC skin lesion segmentation), with full cross-validation as ongoing work. This work advances principled wavelet-deep learning integration, showing how phase information complements scattering's stability-expressiveness trade-off in pixel-level prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的Phase-Aware Scattering Encoder-Decoder结构，通过在跳连中显式保持phase信息，改善了波动变换在密集预测任务中的空间信息损失问题，显著提升了图像去噪与分割任务的表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管scattering变换提供了Lipschitz稳定性和平移不变性，但其全局池化导致空间结构信息丢失，不适合需要像素级空间感知的密集预测任务。如何保留空间结构信息成为挑战。
AI.method: 提出Phase-Aware Scattering Encoder-Decoder，将phase信息通过跳连显式保留，从而在解码端恢复空间信息，并通过空间洗牌消融实验验证phase的重要性。
AI.result: 在BSD68图像去噪任务中，打破平移不变性提升PSNR 2.17 dB，保留phase信息再提升1.03 dB；空间洗牌导致1.26 dB下降，证明phase带有空间位置结构。在ISIC皮肤病变分割任务进行了可扩展性初步实验。
AI.conclusion: 将phase信息引入scattering和深度学习的集成，有效弥补了传统scattering在密集预测上的空间表达能力，提升了像素级任务表现，为波动变换与深度学习结合开辟了新途径。

title: TRACE: A taxonomy-grounded synthetic dataset for teaching-program generation and session interpretation in Applied Behavior Analysis
summary: Applied Behavior Analysis (ABA) is a clinical discipline whose documentation, teaching programs and multi-session behavioral logs, is formulaic and high-volume, yet real session data is HIPAA-protected and bound by professional confidentiality rules, blocking the release of a training corpus. We present TRACE (Taxonomy-Referenced ABA Clinical Examples), a 2,999-example synthetic instruction-tuning dataset covering two ABA tasks: teaching-program generation across Discrete Trial Training, Natural Environment Teaching, and Task Analysis; and multi-session behavioral interpretation across twelve trajectory patterns and thirteen target behaviors. Every example is produced by a deterministic taxonomy-driven generator grounded in the canonical ABA literature, and every example carries complete sampling provenance, the exact taxonomy cells that produced it. The dataset is released under CC BY-NC 4.0 for data and MIT for code, with stratified train (2,549), validation (149), test (281), and sanity (20) splits. TRACE is a research artifact and has not been clinically validated.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TRACE——首个人工合成的ABA（应用行为分析）领域高质量教学与行为解释数据集，解决了真实受保护数据无法获取的问题。
AI.motivation: ABA实际应用中需要大量标准化文档与教学案例，但因隐私与保密限制，难以获得用于AI训练的真实数据集。这限制了AI等新技术在ABA领域的创新与发展。
AI.method: 通过查阅权威ABA文献，构建系统的行为和教学法分类体系，然后用确定性生成器，依据分类体系大量合成覆盖不同教学场景和行为模式的3,000个案例，涵盖离散试验教学、自然环境教学、任务分析及不同行为轨迹与目标。每条数据都可追溯具体生成的分类依据。数据集分为训练、验证、测试等子集，并开放共享（非商业用途）。
AI.result: TRACE数据集包含2,999个完全人工合成并具备详细溯源的ABA案例，覆盖教学方案生成与多次行为观察解释两大任务。数据集已正式发布，并严格分配为训练、验证、测试和完备性检查集。
AI.conclusion: TRACE为ABA领域AI等新方法研究提供了可公开使用的标准化合成数据集，突破了隐私障碍，但数据集未经过临床验证，需谨慎用于实际应用。

title: ComPose: A Unified Completion-Pose Framework for Robust Category-Level Object Pose Estimation
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2026 (Oral, Best Paper Award Candidate). Project page is available at renhuan1999.github.io/ComPose
summary: Category-level object pose estimation aims to predict the pose and size of arbitrary objects in specific categories. Existing methods struggle with the inherent incompleteness of observed point clouds, which limits their ability to capture complete object shapes for robust pose reasoning. While point cloud completion offers a promising solution, naively treating it as a separate preprocessing step for partial observations introduces compounding errors and additional computational overhead, ultimately hindering both accuracy and efficiency. To address these challenges, we propose ComPose, a novel unified framework that tightly integrates shape completion to provide complete geometric cues for enhanced pose estimation. At the core of ComPose is a keypoint-based progressive completion module, which recovers full shape representations by progressively predicting a sparse set of keypoints and their surrounding dense point sets, empowering the keypoints to capture holistic object geometries. A geometric relation encoding module further enriches keypoint features with both local and global geometric context. In addition, we introduce a novel geometric relation consistency loss to enforce structural alignment between observed keypoints and their predicted NOCS coordinates, ensuring globally coherent coordinate transformations. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches without relying on category-level shape priors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ComPose的统一框架，通过集成点云补全提升了类别级物体位姿估计算法的准确性与效率，实验表明其优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理部分点云时效果有限，点云补全虽能缓解但引入额外误差及计算成本，因此急需一种更高效且鲁棒的整合型策略。
AI.method: 作者提出ComPose框架，核心为基于关键点的渐进式补全模块，逐步预测关键点及其周围的稠密点集。同时设计了几何关系编码模块，增强关键点的几何表达，并引入几何关系一致性损失，提升结构对齐与坐标变换的一致性。
AI.result: 在标准基准数据集上的大量实验显示，ComPose在不依赖类别级形状先验的情况下，性能超越多个主流先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 作者的方法能有效融合点云补全与位姿估计，显著提升了类别级物体位姿估计的准确度和鲁棒性，在无需额外形状先验的前提下应用前景广阔。

title: Vision-Language Binding in In-Context Image Generation
summary: In-context image generation models such as FLUX.2 take a text prompt and an optional reference image as visual conditioning for the output. Internally, all three inputs -- text, reference image, and the noise tokens -- are concatenated and processed through a single attention stream, where all tokens can attend to one another. This leaves open how reference information flows through the model to produce the output image. We show that an implicit cross-modal binding emerges between the text tokens and the reference image: the text tokens absorb visual reference content during the forward pass, and that absorbed content causally influences the generated output. We surface this binding with three causal interventions on FLUX.2: T2I Lens, which decodes intermediate text-token activations through a text-to-image path; Attention Knockout, which severs specific attention edges; and I2I-to-I2I Patching, which copies text token activations between editing runs. Across 2,875 editing tasks on various images, including SUN397 and DreamBench++ datasets and images collected online, we observe a consistent division of labor: properties of the reference image, like color, style, and scene setting, are first written into the text tokens, which carry them to the generated image; pixel-exact properties like a specific face or instance identity bypass the text tokens and flow directly from reference to image through image-to-image attention. We further localize the reference-text binding to the padding tokens of the text sequence. These results show that text tokens in a multimodal DiT are not just prompt holders, but a structured channel for reference image content. More broadly, they suggest that even in unified-attention multimodal generative models, token modality structures how conditioning information is represented and routed across the network.

AI.tldr: 该论文分析了可实现以文本和参考图像为条件生成新图像的FLUX.2模型，揭示了参考图像信息在模型内部如何通过文本token介导流动，对生成结果产生影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管多模态图像生成模型将文本、参考图像及噪声token通过统一注意力机制处理，但尚不清楚参考图像内容究竟如何影响最终输出。论文旨在揭示视觉参考内容在模型内部的流动和作用方式。
AI.method: 作者通过对FLUX.2模型进行三种因果干预实验：（1）T2I Lens——分析中间文本token的激活对图像生成的影响；（2）Attention Knockout——切断特定注意力连接；（3）I2I-to-I2I Patching——在编辑任务间复制文本token激活状态。实验覆盖了2,875个编辑任务，数据包括多个公开数据集和网络收集图片。
AI.result: 结果发现参考图像的颜色、风格和场景等属性会首先被文本token吸收，并携带到生成图像中；而像具体人脸或实例身份等像素级属性，则通过图像到图像的注意力机制直接传递，绕过文本token。参考-文本绑定主要位于文本序列的填充token。
AI.conclusion: 多模态扩散模型中的文本token不仅仅是提示词，还承担了视觉参考内容传递的结构化通道作用。即便在统一注意力机制下，不同模态的token对条件信息的表达与传递方式仍有所区分。

title: Faithfulness Metrics Don't Measure Faithfulness: A Meta-Evaluation with Ground Truth
summary: Chains of thought (CoTs) have become central in interpreting and auditing behaviors of large language models. Yet growing evidence suggests that these traces often fail to faithfully represent the computations behind a model's predictions. Several faithfulness metrics have been proposed, but whether they indeed measure faithfulness remains unknown. Answering this requires ground-truth labels, which are hard to obtain since internal computations are not directly observable. Consequently, most works proposing metrics report only absolute scores or comparisons to prior metrics, and the few existing benchmarks rely on proxies like plausibility or importance, properties orthogonal to faithfulness that can mislead about whether a CoT can be trusted. We address this challenge by constructing tasks whose outputs reveal which intermediate computations must have produced them, and developing an automated labeling pipeline that yields ground-truth faithfulness labels at both the step and CoT level. Building on this methodology, we present BonaFide, a benchmark of 3,066 labeled CoTs across 13 tasks and 10 models, and use it to conduct the first systematic evaluation of prominent faithfulness metrics. Our experiments show that most metrics perform near chance, exhibit strong prediction biases and degrade on longer CoTs. The best metric reaches only 0.70 AUROC at the CoT level while another reaches 0.59 at the step level, with neither transferring across settings, while entailing prohibitively high computational cost. Our results expose fundamental gaps in current faithfulness evaluation and call for the development of more reliable and efficient metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套新的基准和自动标注方法，用于系统性评估大语言模型链式思考（CoT）解释的忠实度，并发现现有主流指标在这方面表现极差。
AI.motivation: 现有的链式思考解释方法常被用于分析大语言模型的决策过程，但这些解释未必真实反映了模型的内部推理。当前对“忠实度”的评价指标是否真能衡量这一点却未经验证，主要因为缺少可获得的真实标签。
AI.method: 作者设计了一组可揭示必经中间推理步骤的特殊任务，并开发了自动化标注流程，以生成步骤级和整体推理链级的忠实度真实标签，并据此构建了包含3066条标注CoT、涵盖13个任务和10个模型的基准集BonaFide，全面评测流行的忠实度指标。
AI.result: 实验发现：大多数指标实际表现接近随机，存在明显偏置且性能随推理链长度增加而下降。最佳指标CoT级AUC仅0.70，步骤级0.59，且指标间泛化能力差、计算开销高。
AI.conclusion: 当前对链式思考忠实度的评估方法存在根本性不足，需要发展更为高效、可靠的评价指标。

title: AgentGrounder: Zero-Shot 3D Visual Pointcloud Grounding using Multimodal Language Models
summary: 3D Visual Grounding (3DVG) is an essential capability for embodied AI, requiring agents to localize objects in 3D scenes based on natural language descriptions. Recent zero-shot methods leverage 2D vision-language models (LVLMs). However, they often rely on existing sets of multi-view images and struggle with the limited semantic and spatial details provided by standard 3D segmentation tools. We present $\textbf{AgentGrounder}$, a zero-shot 3D visual grounding framework that operates directly on colored point clouds without task-specific 3D training. Our approach follows a two-stage design: (1) an offline stage that applies 3D model to build an Object Lookup Table (OLT) with instance IDs, semantic labels, 3D bounding boxes; and (2) an online tool-driven agent that decomposes each query, retrieves only relevant candidates from the OLT, performs geometric scoring, and triggers image rendering on demand when additional visual evidence (e.g., color, material, or viewpoint-sensitive cues) is required. Compared with fixed anchor-target matching pipelines, this design reduces cascading matching errors and improves context-window efficiency by avoiding prompts overloaded with irrelevant objects. We evaluate on ScanRefer and Nr3D under a zero-shot setting and observe consistent improvements over SeeGround in our setup, including +2.5% Acc@0.5 on ScanRefer and +6.3% on Nr3D, with a notable +6.3% gain on Nr3D view-independent queries. These results show that combining selective retrieval, geometric reasoning, and adaptive visual inspection yields a practical and robust foundation for open-vocabulary 3D grounding. Our code is available at https://github.com/be2rlab/AgentGrounder.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的零样本3D视觉指代（3DVG）方法AgentGrounder，直接对彩色点云进行3D指代，无需专门的3D训练，显著提升了定位性能。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本3D视觉指代主要依赖2D视觉语言模型，并且受限于多视图图像和3D分割工具，存在语义和空间信息不足的问题。因此，需要一种能够直接高效地在3D点云上进行视觉理解并指代目标的新方法。
AI.method: AgentGrounder采用两阶段流程：（1）离线通过3D模型构建对象查找表，包含实例ID、语义标签和3D包围盒；（2）在线阶段智能体分解查询，只检索相关候选目标，基于几何进行打分，并按需渲染图片获取更多视觉证据（如颜色、材质等），避免无关信息干扰。
AI.result: 在ScanRefer和Nr3D数据集的零样本设定下，AgentGrounder对比SeeGround获得一致提升：在ScanRefer上Acc@0.5提升2.5%，在Nr3D上提升6.3%，对于无视角依赖的Nr3D查询提升6.3%。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合高效候选检索、几何推理和自适应渲染，AgentGrounder为开放词汇的3D视觉指代任务建立了更实用、强健的基础，解决了现有方法中的匹配误差和效率瓶颈。

title: ULF-Synth: Physics-Guided Ultra-Low-Field MRI Enhancement for Pediatric Neuroimaging
summary: Ultra-low-field (ULF) MRI offers portable and accessible neuroimaging but suffers from reduced signal-to-noise ratio and limited spatial resolution compared to high-field (HF) systems. Acquiring paired ULF-HF data for supervised enhancement is often difficult, particularly in resource-limited settings. We introduce ULF-Synth, a framework that combines: (i) acquisition-based synthesis of realistic ULF images from HF volumes to create large-scale paired training data, (ii) a spatial-frequency domain objective that prioritizes recovery of high-frequency anatomical detail. This formulation is architecture-agnostic, consistently improving structural similarity and perceptual fidelity across encoder-decoder, adversarial, and diffusion-based translation models. When trained exclusively on synthetic data, the resulting models generalize effectively to real 64mT ULF acquisitions, improving downstream multiclass brain segmentation and achieving higher radiologist preference and diagnostic acceptability in a blinded reader study. These findings demonstrate that synthetic paired supervision provides a practical and scalable pathway for enhancing ULF MRI without requiring real paired acquisitions. Code, Models and Dataset: https://github.com/toufiqmusah/ULF-Synth

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ULF-Synth框架，通过合成数据促进超低场MRI（ULF MRI）图像增强，无需依赖真实成对数据即可提升ULF图像的结构和感知质量。
AI.motivation: 超低场MRI具有便携和可及优势，但其信噪比低、空间分辨率有限，而获取ULF与高场MRI（HF MRI）的成对数据很难，尤其是在资源有限的地区。因此需要一种无需真实成对数据也能提升ULF MRI图像质量的新方法。
AI.method: 1）从高场MRI体积数据生成模拟ULF图像，构建大量成对训练数据；2）使用空间-频率域损失函数，重点强化高频解剖结构信息恢复。该框架适用于多种生成模型（编码-解码器、对抗式、扩散模型），架构无关。
AI.result: 在仅用合成数据训练下，各模型均能较好泛化到真实64mT ULF MRI数据，显著提升结构相似度和感知质量，并在多分类脑部分割、盲评放射科医生偏好与诊断接受性方面表现更佳。
AI.conclusion: 合成成对监督为增强ULF MRI提供了实用、可扩展的解决方案，无需依赖真实成对ULF-HF数据。

title: Evidence-Linked Radiology Reporting: A Human-Supervised Reference Architecture for Structured Imaging Intelligence
comment: Technical report, 27 pages, 2 figures, 12 tables, 1 listing; reference architecture paper; does not report clinical outcomes or validated diagnostic performance
summary: Radiology reports remain the primary mechanism by which imaging findings are communicated to clinical teams. However, much of the structured information behind these reports, including measurements, image evidence, prior comparisons, lesion identity, uncertainty, and terminology, often remains trapped in free text or fragmented across picture archiving and communication systems, radiology information systems, reporting workstations, worksheets, advanced visualization tools, and electronic health records. This paper proposes a human-supervised, evidence-linked reference architecture for structured radiology reporting. The framework combines exam-specific templates, speech-to-structure processing, measurement and segmentation capture, controlled AI-assisted drafting, and standards-based interoperability using DICOM, DICOM Structured Reporting, DICOM Segmentation, HL7 FHIR, RadLex, SNOMED CT, LOINC, and UCUM. The system is positioned not as an autonomous report generator, but as a structured intelligence layer for enterprise imaging that supports reviewed reporting, longitudinal comparison, clinical data reuse, governance, and integration with PACS, RIS, EHR, analytics, and registry workflows. The paper also discusses modality-specific deployment considerations, clinical safety risks, validation requirements, cybersecurity, privacy, quality management, and regulatory boundaries for AI-assisted radiology reporting systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向结构化影像报告的人类监督、证据关联的参考架构，以打通目前临床影像报告中结构化信息割裂的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前影像报告多为自由文本，结构化信息如测量、影像证据、历史对比、病变身份、术语等内容难以有效提取与共享，且分散于不同系统中，无法形成规范统一的信息流，对临床决策和大数据应用造成阻碍。
AI.method: 提出了基于人类监督和证据关联的结构化放射学报告体系，结合检查特定模板、语音转结构、测量和分割捕捉、AI辅助起草，以及DICOM、HL7 FHIR、RadLex等标准，实现多系统之间的互操作。
AI.result: 系统可以集成PACS、RIS、EHR等多类临床与影像信息系统，支持结构化报表复核、纵向对比、数据复用及后续分析，强化了治理、临床工作流和注册登记流程。
AI.conclusion: 该架构不是自动生成报告，而是为医疗影像构建一个可结构化智能层，支持报告质量管理、临床安全、网络安全与隐私，助力AI辅助报告合规落地，具有较强实际应用与推广价值。

title: LRDDv3: High-Resolution Long-Range Drone Detection Dataset with Range Information and Thermal Data
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures. Accepted to the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
summary: Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) have quickly become common in various airspaces, representing a wide range of applications from recreation flying to commercial photography and package delivery. With the increasing prevalence of UAVs, it becomes critical that both manned and unmanned aircraft can detect UAVs and other flying objects from long range to effectively track movement and ensure safe operation in shared spaces. While several datasets have been introduced for drone detection, the need for expanded high-quality data persists, especially in the area of high-resolution long-range drone data. To address this, we introduce a high-resolution dataset of 102,532 long-range RGB images of drones, sampled at 5 FPS from 128 distinct video clips taken mid flight during 17 different data collection days spread over 8 months to ensure a wide variety of lighting scenarios, flight locations, and background elements. The dataset boasts comprehensive drone range information across the dataset, as well as 29,630 IR images, all paired with RGB counterparts from the base dataset. As one of the first drone detection datasets to leverage 4K image resolution and paired 640x512 IR images, our work represents a significant advancement to enable the detection of drones at long range. For access to the complete dataset, please visit https://research.coe.drexel.edu/ece/imaple/lrddv3/

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个高分辨率远距离无人机检测数据集，旨在促进无人机在空域中安全监测与识别。
AI.motivation: 随着无人机应用的普及，亟需提升有人机与无人机对远距离无人机及其它飞行物体的检测能力，以保障空中安全。目前高分辨率、远距离无人机检测数据仍匮乏，现有数据集难以支持相关研究和实际需求。
AI.method: 作者采集了102,532张高分辨率（4K）远距离RGB无人机图片，以及29630份与之配对的红外（IR）图像，这些数据来自128个视频片段，横跨17天、8个月采集，覆盖多样的光照、地点与背景，用于扩充和提升无人机检测数据集的适用性。
AI.result: 数据集实现了高分辨率、远距离、RGB与IR双模态的图片配对，为无人机检测算法的研究与开发提供了坚实数据基础，推动了相关领域进步。
AI.conclusion: 该高分辨率远距离无人机检测数据集的发布显著提升了无人机检测领域的数据质量与适用范围，有助于未来提升无人机检测的准确性和应用的安全性。

title: DexSIM: Real-time Dexterous Simulation with Unified Causal Video Diffusion
summary: Recent progress of video diffusion models have enabled extensive simulation of the physical world. While simulation with hand object interaction has been less explored. We propose DexSIM, a dexterous simulation framework for simulating dexterous manipulation in real-time. While previous works utilizing video diffusion and 3D reconstruction focus on navigation, dexterous manipulation has been limited while it has extensive applications for creating interactive experiences with the simulated world and for generating synthetic data for robotics. Existing methods lack real-time interactivity and long-term spatial consistency and memory. We propose a 2-stage training framework for DexSIM. First we train a bi-directional video diffusion model by jointly embedding the hand action trajectory and video in a unified feature space. We utilize gaussian heatmap hand encoding for more accurate hand representation. Then we conduct a roll-out based autoregressive training with updated spatial cache as attention sink for spatial memory, which improves long-term consistency and 3D aware dexterous manipulation simulation. DexSIM outperforms the baseline on pixel and semantic similarity, motion fidelity, and hand projection accuracy. It also allows new applications such as hand motion transfer and runs at 15.24 FPS real-time interactivity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DexSIM，一个面向灵巧手操作实时仿真的视频扩散模型框架，突破了现有方法在交互性和空间一致性上的限制。DexSIM通过双向视频扩散和自回归训练实现了更高准确度和实时性，为机器人工业合成数据生成及手部动作迁移等应用提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 现有视频扩散模型在模拟物理世界和导航方面取得进展，但在模拟手部物体交互和灵巧操作方面较为薄弱。特别是这些仿真在机器人合成数据和交互体验中有广泛应用。现有方法缺乏实时交互能力和持久空间记忆，因此亟需更有效模拟手部精细操作的实时系统。
AI.method: DexSIM提出了两阶段训练框架。第一阶段，采用双向视频扩散模型，将手部动作轨迹和视频通过联合嵌入编码到统一特征空间，并用高斯热力图手编码提升手部表示准确度。第二阶段，通过自回归roll-out训练，并引入带空间缓存的注意力机制，提升模型的空间记忆能力，实现更持续且具有三维感知的灵巧操作仿真。
AI.result: DexSIM在像素及语义相似性、动作细节还原和手部投影准确度方面均优于基线方法，并支持手部动作迁移等新应用，实时交互性可达到15.24 FPS。
AI.conclusion: DexSIM突破了现有视频扩散和三维重建方法在灵巧手部操作场景下的局限，实现了高质量、实时的虚拟手部交互仿真，对交互式体验和机器人合成数据生成具有重要意义。

title: LLM Agent Based Renewable Energy Forecasting Using Edge and IoT Data A Review of Solar Wind Weather and Grid Aware Decision Support
summary: Reliable forecasting of renewable energy generation is a foundational requirement for grid stability energy trading battery scheduling and carbon aware operational planning Solar and wind resources are inherently intermittent their output fluctuates with cloud cover wind speed atmospheric turbulence seasonal patterns and local terrain The proliferation of IoT and edge devices spanning smart meters inverters anemometers pyranometers weather stations and grid interface sensors has created an unprecedented volume of real time operational data that conventional forecasting pipelines are ill equipped to exploit fully This review investigates how large language model LLM agents can enhance renewable energy forecasting by integrating heterogeneous sensor streams weather API data historical generation records grid constraints and contextual reasoning into unified decision support workflows We survey classical forecasting methods statistical time series models deep learning architectures physics hybrid approaches and emerging LLM agent frameworks for explanation uncertainty communication and operator guidance A six layer taxonomy is proposed covering data acquisition preprocessing feature engineering model inference uncertainty estimation and natural language reporting The review identifies twelve open challenges spanning real time deployment model drift under distribution shift uncertainty quantification hallucination control in LLM agents interoperability of edge hardware and integration with energy management systems The paper concludes by recommending a research agenda centred on open benchmarks physics informed LLM grounding and federated forecasting architectures

AI.tldr: 本文评述了如何利用大语言模型（LLM）代理通过整合多源传感器数据、API气象数据、历史发电记录和上下文推理，提升可再生能源发电预测的能力。提出六层次分类体系，梳理了当前主要技术路径与十二大挑战，并提出后续研究方向。
AI.motivation: 可再生能源（如太阳能、风能）发电具有间歇性和不可预测性，造成电网运行及调度困难。数据源日趋多元，但传统方法难以充分利用实时、异构的运维数据。
AI.method: 综述了传统和先进的预测方法，包括统计时序模型、深度学习、物理-混合模型及LLM代理等。提出六层次（数据采集、预处理、特征工程、模型推理、不确定性估计与自然语言报告）系统性梳理，并针对LLM的潜力及面临的关键挑战进行讨论。
AI.result: 总结了不同预测方法的优缺点，LLM代理可增强不确定性通信和决策支持，但仍面临如模型漂移、实时部署、分布转变、边缘设备兼容等十二项挑战。
AI.conclusion: 建议未来研究关注开放基准、物理知识融入LLM、联邦预测体系架构等方向，以提升可再生能源发电预测的可靠性和实用性。

title: MIND: Multi-Scale Intent Diffusion for Text-Driven Physics-Based Humanoid Control
summary: Enabling physics-based humanoids to execute diverse behaviors from high-level textual commands remains a significant challenge. Existing methods typically follow either a two-stage paradigm that combines kinematic motion generation with physics-based tracking, or an end-to-end imitation-learning paradigm that directly generates actions from text. However, the former suffers from the inherent domain shift between kinematic generation and physics-based tracking, while the latter struggles with the substantial modality gap between textual commands and low-level actions, limiting effective semantic alignment. Notably, humanoid states encode rich motion dynamics that are more semantically aligned with textual descriptions than low-level actions, making them a natural basis for deriving behavioral intent. Building upon this insight, we propose MIND, a novel end-to-end diffusion framework for text-driven physics-based humanoid control that leverages behavioral intent as a semantic bridge between textual commands and low-level actions. At its core, MIND introduces a multi-scale intent diffusion mechanism, where a holistic intent predictor captures global behavioral dynamics to guide overall behavior synthesis, while an immediate intent predictor provides step-wise, fine-grained signals for local behavior refinement at each diffusion step. This hierarchical intent formulation imposes a structured inductive bias for humanoid control, improving semantic alignment and behavioral naturalness. Furthermore, MIND encodes humanoid states into a latent space to enable more effective semantic intent modeling. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MIND outperforms existing methods and synthesizes coherent, physically plausible, and semantically aligned humanoid behaviors from text commands. Our code will be released to facilitate future research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的端到端扩散模型MIND，实现基于文本指令的物理人形体控制，能够合成更自然、连贯的动作，优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 过去的方法在实现文本到物理人形体行为控制时，要么采用两阶段流程（运动学生成+物理跟踪），存在领域转移问题；要么直接用模仿学习从文本到低级动作，但语义对齐有限。作者观察到人形体状态比低级动作能更好表达文本语义，遂基于此切入。
AI.method: 作者提出MIND，一个端到端的扩散框架，用“行为意图”作为文本与动作间的语义桥梁。设计了多尺度意图扩散机制：全局意图预测器把控整体行为，局部意图预测器细化每一步，分层引导动作生成。同时用潜空间编码人形体状态，以实现更有效的意图建模。
AI.result: 实验显示，MIND在物理可行性、语义一致性以及生成动作的自然性方面，均优于当前主流方法。
AI.conclusion: MIND有助于实现自动化、语义对齐的人形体控制，对基于文本驱动的机器人研究有推动作用，相关代码将开源，便于后续研究。

title: Resolving Ambiguity in Composed Image Retrieval via Calibrated Interaction
summary: Composed image retrieval (CIR) searches a corpus with a reference image and a text describing how to modify it. Despite rapid progress from triplet-trained compositors to zero-shot and generative methods, essentially all systems share one assumption: that a query maps to a single target, scored by Recall@K against one annotation. We argue this is fundamentally at odds with the task. A query such as make it more formal does not name an image but a region of the corpus, and which member the user intends is genuinely underdetermined. This underspecification is the root of the well-known false-negative problem and leaves current models unable to tell a precise query from an ambiguous one. We reframe CIR as calibrated intent resolution under uncertainty: a retriever is wrapped in a conformal prediction layer that returns a candidate set with a coverage guarantee and whose size is a principled measure of ambiguity; when the set is large, an expected-information-gain policy asks the single most useful clarifying question, drawn from interpretable ambiguity axes, and the set contracts. We introduce AmbiCIR, a benchmark and human-validated user simulator that revive the dormant auxiliary and dialogue annotations of CIRR and extend the multiple-positive setting of CIRCO. Across open-domain and fashion benchmarks our method matches single-turn state of the art, confirming calibrated resolution is cost-free on precise queries, while reaching the intended target in a fraction of the interaction budget required by naive conversational baselines, and it is the first to report valid coverage and calibration for the task.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的框架，将复合图像检索（CIR）任务视为在不确定性下的校准意图解析，而不是传统的一对一映射模式。引入了AmbiCIR基准与用户模拟器，实现更合理的查询和对歧义的处理。
AI.motivation: 目前CIR模型普遍假设每个查询都对应单一目标图像，并以Recall@K等指标评估，这与实际任务需求不符。因为查询常常是模糊的（如“使其更正式”）并不对应唯一图像，导致模型难以处理歧义和假阴性问题。
AI.method: 在传统CIR检索器基础上，增加了共形预测（conformal prediction）层，输出有覆盖保证的候选图像集合，并据此量化查询歧义。当候选集合较大时，通过预设歧义轴自动生成澄清问题，缩小候选范围。并提出AmbiCIR基准与人类验证的用户模拟器，支持多正例等情景。
AI.result: 该方法在开放域和时尚领域基准上，精确查询时性能与SOTA单轮方法持平、无额外损耗；对于歧义较大的查询，比传统多轮对话方法更快达到目标，并首次给出该任务下有效的候选覆盖率和校准性指标。
AI.conclusion: 论文提出的以意图校准为核心的CIR新范式，能更好解决查询歧义和假阴性难题，同时不影响精确信息检索性能，有望成为更符合实际的CIR研究与评测标准。

title: STREAM: A Data-Centric Framework for Mining High-Value Task-Oriented Dialogues from Streaming Media
summary: Large language models for vertical domains are bottlenecked by the scarcity of complex, domain-specific task-oriented dialogues. Existing data acquisition pipelines face a persistent trilemma: expert annotation is expensive, real-world service conversations are constrained by privacy and commercial restrictions, and static corpora quickly become temporally stale. We propose Stream, a data-centric framework that leverages publicly available streaming media (live streams and short videos) to synthesize high-value service dialogues at scale. Stream mines authentic interaction signals from noisy streams and synthesizes conversations by integrating role-grounded persona construction with Conversational Blueprint construction; it further adopts retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) to support knowledge-aware responses. Based on Stream, we release StreamDial, a large-scale multi-domain dataset covering Automotive, Restaurant, and Hotel. StreamDial contains 87,498 dialogue sessions and 1,497,320 turns in total, with an average of 17.11 turns per session and a comparable scale across domains. Each session is organized as a structured quadruplet $\langle P_u, P_a, B, H \rangle$ that pairs dialogue history with explicit user/agent personas and a Conversational Blueprint, capturing realistic service behaviors such as requirement mining, constraint conflicts, negotiation, and recovery. Evaluations with automatic judges and downstream tasks show that StreamDial improves intrinsic dialogue quality over strong baselines, and models trained with StreamDial improve Dialogue State Tracking across backbones; we further report a completed human-evaluation set and encouraging multilingual transfer on Qwen3-8B under a controlled training budget. The data is released in https://github.com/hitxueliang/DialogDataSetBySTREAM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出用公开流媒体数据合成面向任务的多领域对话数据，并释放了大规模数据集StreamDial，用以支持大语言模型在垂直领域的研究与应用。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型在垂直领域发展受限于复杂、高质量领域对话数据稀缺。专家注释成本高，真实任务对话受限于隐私和商业因素，已有语料更新慢且容易过时。因此，亟需新的数据获取机制以大量生成高价值服务对话。
AI.method: 作者提出Stream框架，挖掘公开直播和短视频流中的真实交互信号，通过扮演角色设定和对话蓝图构建完成对话合成，同时引入检索增强生成（RAG）实现知识支持。最终生成的StreamDial数据集多领域涵盖汽车、餐饮、酒店，并结构化每组对话信息。
AI.result: StreamDial数据集包含87,498段对话、1,497,320轮次。自动评价和下游任务测试表明，基于StreamDial训练的模型对话质量和对话状态追踪效果均优于强基线，在受控训练预算下多语种迁移亦取得积极成果。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明利用流媒体数据合成大规模真实感服务对话是可行且有效的。StreamDial为多领域任务型对话系统、对话状态追踪等研究提供了宝贵资源。

title: DisDop: Distillation with Domain Priors for Open-Vocabulary Aerial Object Detection
summary: With the widespread application of drones in recent years, object detection of aerial images has attracted increasing attention, especially open-vocabulary aerial detection which is not restricted to predefined categories. Due to the scarcity of drone's viewpoint images and their significant differences from natural images, it is difficult to achieve satisfying results by directly applying vanilla open-vocabulary detection methods designed for natural scenarios. Some studies propose to transfer knowledge from pre-trained models by using lightweight networks or generating pseudo labels, but they tend to rely on models trained on natural images, neglecting the potential of foundation models specifically tailored for remote sensing and aerial imagery. To address this limitation, we propose DisDop, a unified framework that systematically distills multi-level domain priors from remote sensing foundation models (e.g., RemoteCLIP and DINOv3) into a lightweight detector. Specifically, we first distill visual priors through a teacher fusion strategy that combines RemoteCLIP's cross-modal alignment capability with DINOv3's fine-grained local feature extraction ability, transferring their complementary strengths to the detector's backbone. Second, we distill textual priors embedded in RemoteCLIP's text encoder by explicitly modeling inter-category semantic relationships, while incorporating global contextual priors to enhance local feature representation for small objects. Through this multi-level prior distillation framework, our DisDop achieves new state-of-the-art performance on open-vocabulary aerial detection benchmarks. Extensive ablation analysis also demonstrates the rationality and effectiveness of our proposed modules.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种结合遥感基础模型知识提炼的无人机航拍图像开放词汇目标检测新框架DisDop，显著提升了检测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有开放词汇目标检测方法多基于自然图像模型，直接迁移到航拍图像效果较差，且对遥感专用基础模型利用不足。
AI.method: 设计了DisDop框架，从遥感领域基础模型（如RemoteCLIP和DINOv3）多层次提炼视觉与文本先验，并通过教师融合策略结合两者优势，将知识转移到轻量化检测器中，提升小目标检测和语义理解能力。
AI.result: 在开放词汇航拍检测基准上取得了新的最先进性能，通过消融实验验证了各模块设计的合理性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多层次领域先验知识提炼方案能提升航拍图像开放词汇目标检测表现，为遥感领域目标检测提供了新思路。

title: Re-defining Humor Data Objects for AI Humor Research
summary: In most existing AI humor research, humor was treated as either "present" or "not present." We explore the concept of humor as a social interaction with context and explanations. During this project, we defined a humor reasoning data object and developed a way to prompt LLMs to generate an explanation of humor effective for general population. We iterated from an earlier prompt to an improved prompt, found that the later version reduced important errors, and then scaled generation to a large number of data objects which have the potential to enable data synthesis and data augmentation for AI humor research. Our main takeaway is that better prompting of an LLM improves humor explanation quality, especially by handling missing context, multi-modality, and transcript issues more carefully. These results establish a strong foundation for future work on AI understanding of humor as social behavior.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种新的AI幽默理解方法，不再将幽默简单分为有或无，而是关注其社会互动及解释，并通过优化大语言模型（LLM）提示词提升幽默解释质量，为后续相关研究打下基础。
AI.motivation: 目前AI幽默研究多只关注幽默的存在与否，忽视了幽默作为一种复杂的社会互动行为。研究动机是希望AI系统能够更深入地理解和解释幽默的本质，提升AI对幽默语境和细节的把握能力。
AI.method: 研究团队首先定义了幽默推理数据对象，并探索如何通过提示词（prompting）使LLMs能生成对普通人有效的幽默解释。采用迭代优化的方式改进提示词设计，并对不同版本的效果进行对比实验，最终用优化后的提示大规模生成数据。
AI.result: 改进提示词显著减少了幽默解释中的重要错误，尤其是在处理上下文缺失、多模态内容和转录问题上有明显提升。新方法生成了大量高质量数据，有助于AI幽默研究的数据增广和合成。
AI.conclusion: 更科学合理的LLM提示词设计可显著提升AI对幽默的理解和解释能力，尤其是在复杂语境下的表现。研究为将来深入探索幽默作为社会行为的AI理解提供了坚实基础。

title: Locality Matters for Training-Free Audio Token Compression in Audio-Language Models
comment: Preprint. 8 pages main text, 10 pages total
summary: Audio-language models (ALMs) are increasingly used for audio captioning, question answering, and open-ended audio understanding, but their inference cost remains high when audio inputs are represented as long prefix-token sequences. These audio prefixes consume context budget, increase memory usage, and make deployment harder in resource-constrained or latency-sensitive settings. Existing training-free audio-token reduction methods mainly rely on fixed pooling or score-based pruning. Fixed pooling is content-agnostic, while score-based pruning can preserve isolated salient tokens but discard nearby acoustic context. We propose Local Temporal Bipartite Merging (LTBM), a training-free encoder-space compression method that merges similar nearby audio tokens under an explicit temporal window constraint. Beyond introducing LTBM, we use a controlled Global Merge variant to isolate whether temporal locality itself is a useful inductive bias for audio-token compression. Experiments on AudioCaps, Clotho, and MMAU with Qwen2-Audio show evidence of a task-dependent locality effect: locality-aware merging is more favorable for captioning at several compression settings, especially under stronger compression, while global matching is more competitive for multiple-choice audio understanding. A cross-backbone validation on Audio Flamingo 3 further supports the captioning-side advantage of locality-aware merging under moderate and aggressive compression.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LTBM的训练自由音频压缩方法，通过在特定时间窗口内合并相似音频token，降低音频-语言模型（ALM）的推理开销。实验表明，该方法在音频描述任务下表现优越，尤其在较高压缩率下，其效果优于现有办法。
AI.motivation: 音频-语言模型在音频生成描述、问答及理解方面应用广泛，但音频前缀token过长导致推理耗时高，内存占用大，不利于部署在算力有限或低延迟场景。现有无训练压缩方法（如池化、评分剪枝）存在语境或局部信息损失的问题，亟需更有效的压缩方案。
AI.method: 作者提出 Local Temporal Bipartite Merging（LTBM）方法，在不用训练的前提下，在编码器空间、指定时间窗内合并相似的本地token，同时还设计了Global Merge变体用于研究时间局部性对压缩的影响。
AI.result: 在AudioCaps、Clotho和MMAU等数据集及Qwen2-Audio模型上，实验发现局部合并方法在音频描述（captioning）任务下更优，尤其在高压缩率下，而全局合并在多选题理解任务表现更具竞争力。进一步在Audio Flamingo 3交叉验证，证实了中高压缩率下局部合并在描述任务中的优势。
AI.conclusion: LTBM方法充分利用音频token的局部相似性，在保证性能的同时显著降低推理成本，尤其适用于音频描述相关任务。不同任务对压缩方法的鲁棒性表现出依赖关系，为后续模型设计提供新见解。

title: Reasoning to Align: Implicit Reasoning in Diffusion Transformers for Video Editing
summary: Instruction-based video editing requires transforming a source video according to a natural-language instruction while preserving irrelevant content and remaining temporally coherent. We argue that existing Diffusion Transformer (DiT) editors struggle with this task for two structural reasons. First, conditioning signals are fed undifferentiated into all transformer blocks, forcing a single token stream to encode both global editing intent and fine-grained visual evidence. Second, the cross-attention patterns that govern the edit are supervised only indirectly through pixel-level reconstruction, leaving the model's internal reasoning process under-constrained. To address both limitations, we propose RVEDiT, an implicit Reasoning Video Editing DiT framework built around two complementary components. The first, Granularity-Routed Token Conditioning, introduces learnable editing tokens distilled from a multimodal LLM and routes them to shallow blocks, while reserving native visual and textual tokens for deeper blocks, thereby inducing a coarse-to-fine editing process inside the backbone. The second, Reference-Anchored Attention Alignment, employs a parameter-sharing reference branch during training and maximizes the mutual information between the attention features of the editing and reference branches, regularizing the model's internal reasoning without incurring any additional inference cost. Experiments on standard instruction-based video editing benchmarks show that RVEDiT consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, with particularly strong gains on localized and compositional edits.

AI.tldr: RVEDiT是一种新的视频编辑模型，通过引入粗到细粒度的编辑和参考分支对注意力机制进行对齐，在基准数据集上显著超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Diffusion Transformer（DiT）的视频编辑器在结构上存在问题：1）条件信息未区分地输入所有transformer层，导致编辑意图和视觉细节难以兼顾；2）cross-attention仅由像素级重建间接监督，模型推理过程缺乏约束。
AI.method: 提出RVEDiT模型，包括两个核心组件：1）Granularity-Routed Token Conditioning（粒度路由token调节），利用从多模态LLM提取的可学习编辑token路由到浅层，视觉和文本token用于深层，实现内部粗到细编辑；2）Reference-Anchored Attention Alignment（参考锚定注意力对齐），在训练中引入参考分支，通过共享参数并最大化编辑和参考分支注意力特征的互信息，提升模型内部推理一致性，且不增加推理成本。
AI.result: 在标准指令驱动视频编辑基准上，RVEDiT在整体性能上优于最先进的对比方法，特别是在局部和组合编辑任务中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: RVEDiT模型通过结构创新在指令视频编辑领域取得新的SOTA，特别适用于需要精细和复杂编辑的场景。

title: Knowledge Graph-Driven Expert-Level Reasoning for Neuroscience
summary: Knowledge graph (KG) is an abstraction that can be extracted from text corpora and used for in-depth reasoning. Prior work has leveraged KGs to fine-tune language models (LMs), enabling domain-specific superintelligence. In this work, we explore whether KG-driven in-depth reasoning capabilities can emerge in neuroscience using only information contained within a single authoritative textbook. The central hypothesis is that structured knowledge, when distilled into a high-quality KG and converted into KG-grounded question-answer (QA) supervision, is sufficient to produce expert-level reasoning through a fine-tuned LM that surpasses large language models (LLMs) in accuracy, while employing orders of magnitude fewer parameters. We construct a textbook-derived KG via a dual-LLM validation pipeline, expand it with a masked LM trained on the KG topology, generate multi-hop QA items, which include QA pairs and reasoning traces, to fine-tune an LM exclusively on KG-derived supervision, and apply reinforcement learning using path-derived KG signals as implicit reward models. Our results demonstrate that deep, mechanistic neuroscience understanding can be induced in the model without reliance on large, heterogeneous web-scale corpora. The KG-based synthetic neuroscience curriculum that readers can quiz themselves on, and the fine-tuned LM, are available at the following GitHub location: https://kg-bottom-up-superintelligence.github.io/neuro-bench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用仅来源于神经科学权威教材的信息，构建知识图谱（KG）并结合问答监督，显著提升小规模语言模型（LM）的推理能力，达到并超越大型语言模型（LLM）在专业领域的表现。
AI.motivation: 随着领域知识精深化，单靠大规模异构网络语料的LLM存在知识泛化但专业性不足难题。作者关注如何仅用高质量权威教材，将知识结构化后高效迁移到轻量级模型中，实现专家级推理。
AI.method: （1）从教材提取知识图谱，采用双重LLM校验流程保障结构和事实准确；（2）利用掩码语言模型扩展KG结构；（3）基于KG自动生成多跳问题、问题对及推理链，用于训练目标模型；（4）通过KG路径信号进行强化学习；全过程不依赖大规模网络语料。
AI.result: 实验证明，基于KG的微调模型在神经科学专业知识推理任务中，参数量远小于LLM但准确率显著优于主流LLM，实现了深度机制性理解。
AI.conclusion: 高质量、结构化知识源（如教材）提炼出的KG，可大幅提升垂直领域LM推理深度与专业准确率，推动小模型专家化，不必依赖大数据体量。部分资源已开源，便于复现和实用推广。

title: VaaWIT: Visual-Aware Adaptation of Large Language Models for Multilingual Web Image Translation
summary: Translating text embedded in Web images is crucial for improving content accessibility and cross-lingual information retrieval, particularly within social media and e-commerce domains. Although Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have advanced multimodal understanding, applying them to Web image translation remains challenging due to the visual representation gap: standard encoders often prioritize high-level semantics over the fine-grained visual details required for recognizing diverse character morphologies. To address this challenge, we propose VaaWIT, an end-to-end framework that adapts Large Language Models for multilingual Web image translation. The framework introduces two key technical contributions: (1) a Dual-Stream Attention Module (DSAM), which facilitates bidirectional interaction between multilingual semantic features and detailed visual representations, thereby synthesizing unified features robust to textual variations; and (2) a Visual-Aware Adapter (VAA), a parameter-efficient fine-tuning strategy that dynamically injects these fused visual cues into the frozen LLM backbone. This design enables the model to align the visual context with linguistic reasoning effectively while minimizing computational costs. Extensive experiments on eight tasks on three public benchmarks demonstrate that VaaWIT significantly outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) open-source baselines and achieves competitive performance against proprietary models. These results validate the efficacy of integrating fine-grained visual perception into LLMs for complex Web content analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VaaWIT框架，针对大型视觉-语言模型在Web图片文本翻译中的细粒度视觉表征难题，实现多语言Web图片文本翻译，在多个公开基准大幅优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: Web图片文本翻译对于内容可访问性和跨语言信息检索至关重要。然而，现有大型视觉-语言模型在处理Web图片时，编码器多关注高级语义，忽视识别字符形态等细粒度视觉信息，影响多语言翻译效果。
AI.method: 提出VaaWIT端到端框架，包含两个关键创新：(1) 双流注意力模块(DSAM)，实现多语言语义与详细视觉特征的双向融合；(2)视觉感知适配器(VAA)，以高效参数微调方式，将融合后的视觉信息动态注入冻结的LLM主干中，兼顾性能和计算效率。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集的八项任务上，VaaWIT显著优于最先进的开源方法，并在性能上可比拟封闭源专有系统，显示出综合优势。
AI.conclusion: 将细粒度视觉感知能力有效整合到LLM中，可大大提升复杂Web图片内容的多语言理解与翻译效果。

title: MindAdapter: Few-Shot Parameter-Efficient Residual Calibration of Cross-Subject Brain-to-Visual Decoding Models
comment: Accepted to KDD 2026 (AI4Sciences Track). 15 pages, 7 figures
summary: Cross-subject brain-to-visual decoding remains a core challenge in brain-computer interfaces due to severe inter-individual variability that induces systematic subject-specific functional misalignment. To address this issue, we propose MindAdapter, a parameter-efficient few-shot calibration framework for pretrained brain-to-visual decoding models. MindAdapter adopts a decoupled linear-residual cascade alignment paradigm by freezing a pretrained explicit brain functional alignment backbone (coarse) and introducing a lightweight nonlinear residual adapter (fine), thereby disentangling global cross-subject correspondence from subject-specific residual corrections for fine-grained spatial and semantic calibration. To further preserve global representational stability, we design a topology-anchored dual-stream manifold constraint, where a small set of shared stimuli serves as topological pins with voxel-level paired supervision, while a semantic stream enforces consistency through a frozen vision-language decoder on unpaired brain data. Together, MindAdapter efficiently injects subject-specific corrections while maintaining the global representational geometry learned during pretraining. Experiments on the Natural Scenes Dataset (NSD) demonstrate that MindAdapter substantially improves cross-subject visual reconstruction and retrieval accuracy using only a few shared stimuli, offering a practical and data-efficient solution for personalized brain-to-visual decoding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MindAdapter，一种高效参数和少样本校准框架，用于提高跨主体脑-视觉解码模型的准确性，能够在只需极少共享刺激的情况下显著提升解码效果。
AI.motivation: 跨主体脑-视觉解码长期受困于个体间脑功能差异带来的解码性能下降，需要有效的新方法来解决这一功能错位问题，实现高精度个性化BCI。
AI.method: MindAdapter通过冻结预训练的功能对齐骨干网络（粗对齐）并引入轻量级非线性残差适配器（细校正）实现级联对齐，将跨主体全局信息和个体特异性残差校正解耦。同时，采用拓扑锚定双流流形约束，利用少量共享刺激作为拓扑锚点进行配对监督，非配对脑数据用冻结的视觉-语言解码器保证语义流一致性。
AI.result: 在Natural Scenes Dataset (NSD)上实验表明，MindAdapter仅用极少量共享刺激即可显著提升跨主体视觉重建和检索准确率。
AI.conclusion: MindAdapter为跨主体脑-视觉解码提供了一种实用且高效的数据利用方案，实现了个性化解码性能与全局表征稳定性的兼得。

title: GroupTravelBench: Benchmarking LLM Agents on Multi-Person Travel Planning
summary: Travel planning is a realistic task for evaluating the planning and tool-use abilities of LLM agents. However, existing benchmarks typically assume only a single user, thereby avoiding one of the most challenging aspects of real-world scenarios: an agent's ability to identify and resolve conflicts among multiple users. To address this gap, we introduce \textbf{GroupTravelBench}, the first benchmark for \textbf{multi-user, multi-turn} travel planning. Based on real user profiles, POI data, and ticket price data, we synthesize 650 tasks and divide them into three difficulty levels. Beyond standard abilities in single-user itinerary planning, such as multi-step reasoning and tool use, our benchmark further evaluates three key capabilities required for travel agents: \emph{(i) elicitation} -- proactively engaging in multi-turn dialogue to gather preferences from each user; \emph{(ii) coordination} -- resolving conflicts among users through compromise or subgrouping strategies; and \emph{(iii) planning} -- searching for travel plans that maximize overall group utility while maintaining fairness and feasibility. To simulate real-world conversational itinerary planning while enabling reliable tool use and offline evaluation, we build an interactive sandbox environment with cached real-world tool data. We evaluate a wide range of LLMs and find that even frontier models still show substantial weaknesses in preference coverage and group fairness. \textit{GroupTravelBench} provides a practical and reproducible benchmark for advancing research on LLM agents for real-world travel planning.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了GroupTravelBench，这是首个面向多用户、多轮次旅行规划的基准，用于评估大语言模型（LLM）代理的能力，着重考察用户偏好收集、协调冲突和整体规划等现实需求。实验发现现有模型在偏好覆盖和群体公平性方面存在明显不足。
AI.motivation: 目前的旅行规划基准多以单一用户为对象，避开了真实场景中多用户之间偏好冲突和协调的难点。因此，作者旨在构建能更好反映现实挑战的多用户旅行规划基准。
AI.method: 作者合成了650个基于真实用户画像、兴趣点（POI）和票价数据的多用户旅行规划任务，并设计了三种难度等级。构建具有真实工具缓存数据的交互式沙盒环境，支持多轮对话和可靠的工具使用。该基准评估三方面能力：用户偏好收集、用户间协调与冲突解决、整体旅行规划。
AI.result: 使用多种LLM进行测试，结果显示即使是领先的大模型，在用户偏好涵盖和群体公平性上仍有明显不足。
AI.conclusion: GroupTravelBench为研究现实多用户旅行规划LLM代理提供了可操作、可复现的基准，并揭示了当前模型在偏好收集和公平协调方面的弱点，对改进和发展具备实际价值的智能旅行助手具有指导意义。

title: HoloFair: Unified T2I Fairness Evaluation and Fair-GRPO Debiasing
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/1059684669/HoloFair
summary: Text-to-Image (T2I) models have made significant strides in visual realism and semantic consistency, yet they often perpetuate and amplify societal biases. Existing evaluation methods typically address only single-dimensional biases, lacking perspectives to uncover model biases at social-related deeper semantic levels. We introduce HoloFair, a comprehensive benchmark framework for multidimensional demographic bias analysis. Built upon our large-scale fairness-oriented dataset and the SpaFreq (Spatial-Frequency) attribute classifier, this framework proposes the Multi-attribute, Group-wise Bias Index (MGBI) metric, designed to assess both intrinsic diversity and conditional biases. Beyond evaluation, we further introduce Fair-GRPO, a reinforcement-learning-based debiasing method that alters the distribution of generative models through a designed multi-objective reward function. E.g., experiments on the SD3.5-Medium model demonstrate that Fair-GRPO significantly improves multidimensional fairness while maintaining high image quality. We also analyze potential reward hacking phenomena and provide corresponding mitigation strategies. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/1059684669/HoloFair

AI.tldr: 提出HoloFair框架，系统化、多维度评测T2I模型的人口统计学偏见，同时提出Fair-GRPO去偏方法，在保证高图像质量的同时提升公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有文本生成图像（T2I）模型在实现高视觉真实感与语义一致性的同时，普遍存在加剧社会偏见的问题。而且主流评测方法多只关注单一维度偏见，忽略了更深层次、多维度的社会相关偏见，缺乏有力的多维评测工具和改进方法。
AI.method: 作者提出HoloFair评测框架，构建以公平性为导向的大规模数据集，结合SpaFreq属性分类器，用于支持多维度人口统计学偏见分析。框架中创新性地提出MGBI评估指标，可度量模型的内在多样性与条件偏见。此外，作者提出基于强化学习的Fair-GRPO去偏方法（多目标奖励），对生成模型分布进行调整以提高公平性。
AI.result: 在Stable Diffusion 3.5-Medium等主流T2I模型上的实验显示，Fair-GRPO能在保证生成高质量图像的基础上，显著提升模型在人群多维度上的公平性。此外，论文还对奖励劫持现象进行了分析，并提出相应解决策略。
AI.conclusion: HoloFair为T2I模型带来了全面、细致的多维人口统计学偏见评测手段，以及可行的去偏方向，对推动生成模型的公平性研究具有现实意义。工具与数据集已开源，有助于社区进一步研究和改进。

title: Clarification Is Not Enough: Post-Clarification Answering Remains the Bottleneck in Multi-Turn QA
summary: Pluralistic alignment requires systems to adapt to diverse user values, communication styles, and contextual assumptions. We believe that a foundational prerequisite for such alignment enabling accurate preference elicitation from people when their intent is under-specified or ambiguous. We study the problem of preference elicitation in multi-turn question answering by decomposing the problem into two components: a \textbf{clarification policy}, which decides whether to ask a clarifying question or answer directly, and \textbf{post-clarification answering}, which produces the correct final answer once the missing information is provided. We show, using the PACIFIC benchmark, that supervised fine-tuning rapidly improves the clarification policy, however, final answer accuracy remains substantially lower even when the model takes the correct action. This gap indicates that understanding and correctly interpreting the user's response is the critical gap in multi-turn question-answering systems.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了多回合问答中如何更好地挖掘用户偏好，发现澄清用户意图远不如理解并解析用户回应困难。
AI.motivation: 当前问答系统需要适应不同用户的价值观、交流风格和上下文前提。用户的表达往往不明确，如何准确了解其真实意图和偏好是多元化对齐（pluralistic alignment）的基础性难题。
AI.method: 作者将偏好挖掘问题分解为两个环节：一是澄清策略（clarification policy），即系统判断是否需要追问澄清问题；二是后澄清回答（post-clarification answering），即缺失信息补全后的最终回答。并用PACIFIC基准数据集，通过监督微调提升模型表现。
AI.result: 结果显示：澄清策略经过监督微调后可快速提升，但即使澄清决策正确，最终回答的准确率仍显著偏低。
AI.conclusion: 最大的问题在于系统对用户回应的理解和正确解析，未来需要加强模型对用户反馈和表达的理解能力以提升多回合问答表现。

title: AdaFuse-Det: Adaptive Cross-Modal Fusion of Event Cameras for Robust Object Detection in Low-Light RGB Imagery
summary: Detecting objects reliably under extreme low-light conditions is an open problem in computer vision, with practical urgency in applications ranging from nighttime surveillance to search-and-rescue robotics. Conventional RGB cameras degrade sharply at low photon flux, while event cameras which record asynchronous per-pixel brightness changes at microsecond resolution and high dynamic range provide complementary structural cues that are largely illumination-invariant. We present AdaFuse-Det, a dual-stream framework that fuses CLAHE-enhanced RGB frames with voxelized event tensors through an Adaptive Cross-Modal Fusion (ACMF) module grounded in minimum-variance linear estimation theory. We formally show that the learned attention map asymptotically recovers the Gauss-Markov optimal fusion weights, and establish event conservation and temporal resolution bounds for the voxelization stage. On the LLE-VOS benchmark, AdaFuse-Det achieves a Recall of $65.54\%$, Precision of $53.85\%$, and F1-Score of $59.12\%$ under severe illumination degradation, outperforming single-modality detectors in recall by a margin that reflects the theoretically predicted illumination-adaptation behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AdaFuse-Det，一个利用RGB图像与事件相机信息自适应融合的新型低照度目标检测框架，显著提升极低光照下的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 在极端低照度环境下，传统RGB相机效果大幅下降，而事件相机能提供对照度不敏感的结构化信息。如何融合二者优势，提高夜间等极端环境中的目标检测能力是亟需解决的问题。
AI.method: 设计了AdaFuse-Det双流检测框架，将CLAHE增强的RGB帧与体素化的事件张量输入到自适应跨模态融合(ACMF)模块，融合机制以线性最小方差估计理论为基础，并通过注意力图实现最优融合权重。此外，论证了在体素化阶段的事件守恒与时间分辨率界限。
AI.result: 在LLE-VOS基准上，AdaFuse-Det在严重光照退化下达到Recall 65.54%，Precision 53.85%，F1-Score 59.12%，在Recall指标上明显优于单一模态的检测器。
AI.conclusion: 自适应融合RGB和事件相机信息可有效提升极端低照环境下的目标检测能力，新方法具有理论保障，并在实际基准测试中展现出优异性能。

title: They Are Not the Same: Direct Causes Are Not Grounded Emotion Explanations
summary: Emotion-Cause Pair Extraction (ECPE) was introduced to explain why an emotion occurs, but this goal is now often reduced to binary pair/non-pair prediction. This proxy is useful for direct-cause extraction, yet easy to over-read as evidence grounded emotion explanation. We show that this interpretation is only partially valid. In IEMO-MECP, 90.9% of original positives remain emo-cause and 95.0% of original negatives remain non-pair, confirming that the binary ECPE task is largely preserved. The problem is that direct triggers alone do not constitute a grounded explanation. Emo-context, an utterance that helps interpret a target emotion without directly causing it, appears on both sides of the original boundary and is enriched near binary uncertainty, showing that the binary boundary has no stable place for such discourse evidence. Across evaluated ECPE models, direct triggers are recovered more reliably than contextual support. Under shortcut pressure, this imbalance becomes consequential. Binary-trained models assign higher pair scores to nearby lexically similar non-pair candidates than to evidence supported but structurally harder emo-cause and emo-context pairs. Thus, pair scores can reward convenient attributions over grounded explanations. High binary ECPE performance indicates that a model can identify direct triggers; it does not indicate that the model has explained the emotion. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/panzhzh/ECPExsame.

AI.tldr: 本文批判了目前情感-原因对抽取（ECPE）任务仅关注二元配对预测（是否为情感-原因对），指出这种做法不足以真正解释情感的成因。尽管二元任务本身大多被保持（如数据分布未变），但模型更容易捕捉直接诱因，而忽视了间接语境（emo-context）的解释性作用。
AI.motivation: 提出ECPE任务本意是解释情感原因，但社区现有实现多流于简单的二元配对分类，即事件间是否是情感-原因对，未能体现对情感解释的复杂性和充分性。作者希望揭示这一不足，推动更合理的情感解释研究。
AI.method: 作者通过分析IEMO-MECP数据集，对现有ECPE模型在直接诱因和语境解释上的表现进行对比，探究二元决策边界对emo-context的容纳能力，并评估词汇相似性、结构复杂性等对模型预测的影响。
AI.result: 实验发现，现有ECPE模型能够较好地识别直接诱因, 但对于依靠语境、结构复杂的emo-cause和emo-context对识别能力较弱；在模型偏向策略下，模型更喜欢简单、表面类似的无关对，而不是结构复杂但有证据支持的解释。
AI.conclusion: 高性能的二元ECPE模型虽能发现直接诱因，但不能保证对情感成因真正解释，模型配对分数更可能反应便利性而非真实解释。呼吁未来研究更加重视对解释性和复杂语境的处理。

title: SRUG: Shadow-Guided Relightable Urban Scene with Generation Model
summary: Creating relightable urban scenes from images or videos is widely useful but highly ill-posed. Urban environments are typically unbounded and extend beyond the visible regions. As a result, many portions of the scene remain unobserved, yet these invisible regions can cast shadows onto visible areas. Reasonably modeling shadows cast by such invisible regions is challenging and poses a significant obstacle to creating relightable urban scenes. At the same time, sparse input views and complex illumination conditions further complicate relighting, as they introduce severe ambiguities in material decomposition. In this paper, we propose Shadow-guided Relightable Urban Scene with Generation model (SRUG), a novel framework designed to address relighting challenges in urban scenes. SRUG leverages shadows to guide a 3D completion model for recovering the geometry of invisible regions, promoting the synthesis of physically reasonable shadows. In addition, SRUG employs an iterative material decomposition scheme that applies the large material model (LMM) to provide material supervision and iteratively decompose the scene's material properties, enabling robust material decomposition. Building upon these components, we introduce a physically-based lighting model that captures the complex illumination of urban scenes and supports reliable relighting. Extensive quantitative evaluations and visual comparisons demonstrate that our method outperforms existing approaches in both novel view synthesis and relighting tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于城市场景重光照的SRUG方法，通过引入阴影指导和完整的三维重建及材质分解，实现了更自然的重光照和新视角合成。
AI.motivation: 在城市场景重光照中，因都市空间广阔且部分区域不可见、输入视角稀疏以及复杂的光照条件，导致阴影建模困难及材质分解高度不确定。这些问题极大阻碍了逼真的重光照场景合成。
AI.method: 提出了SRUG框架：利用阴影信息引导三维场景的不可见部分几何补全，从而生成物理合理的阴影；采用迭代式材质分解方案结合大规模材质模型（LMM）进行材质监督，实现鲁棒性强的材质分解；并基于这两者引入物理基础的光照建模，能够处理复杂城市照明。
AI.result: 在新视角合成和重光照任务上，通过大量定量评估和视觉对比实验，结果表明SRUG在精度和视觉效果上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SRUG能够有效建模城市场景中不可见区域对阴影和材质分解的影响，极大提升了城市场景的重光照与新视角合成质量。

title: From Automation to Collaboration: Human-in-the-Loop Methods for Safe and Trustworthy NLP
summary: Large language models are widely deployed in high-stakes NLP tasks, yet risks such as bias, hallucination, adversarial vulnerability and unreliable generalization remain. Probe-based auditing reveals inconsistencies in model behavior. Adversarial text generation uncovers robustness gaps, especially in lower-resourced languages with limited benchmarks. Enterprise text-to-SQL settings expose the difficulty of validating outputs over private and large-scale databases. Human supervision is essential for probe validation, adversarial verification and domain-specific annotation, but it is costly and hard to scale. This survey examines recent human-in-the-loop methods that shift NLP from automation toward collaboration for safety and trustworthiness. We review how human expertise supports auditing, robustness evaluation, data construction and model steering. Our findings highlight gaps in scalable probing, sustainable robustness benchmarks, low-resource settings and governance of private systems. We outline practical research directions for adaptive auditing, collaborative evaluation and accountable deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了在NLP重大任务中，为提高大模型安全性与可信度，近年来将人工监督引入模型审计、对抗评测、数据构建及模型引导的研究进展。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在高风险NLP任务中的部署越来越广泛，但模存在如偏见、幻觉、对抗脆弱性和泛化不可靠等问题，亟需审计与提升其安全与可信能力。
AI.method: 本文作为综述，系统梳理了“人类-模型协作”模式下，如何利用人类专家参与模型审计、鲁棒性评测、数据构建与模型引导，以及各类具体方法和应用场景。
AI.result: 总结指出当前在可扩展、可持续的审计和鲁棒性基准、低资源场景、以及私有系统治理方面还存在明显短板，现有方法成本高、难以大规模推广。
AI.conclusion: 通过回顾现有人机协作方法，本文为自适应审计、协同评测与可问责部署等方向提出了切实可行的研究建议，以推动更安全可靠的大模型应用。

title: Do Image-Text Metrics Respect Semantic Invariances?
summary: Reference-free image-to-text evaluators are now standard for scoring image-caption alignment, yet it is unclear whether they respect semantic invariances. We present an invariance probe on five popular evaluators (CLIPScore, PAC-S, UMIC, FLEUR, and a deterministic LLM judge) under semantics-preserving perturbations along three axes -- spatial (flips, context-preserving repositioning, light rotations), object (scale, category), and socio-linguistic framing (cultural/economic adjectives with neutral and length-matched controls). Across curated slices of three detection datasets and three caption evaluation suites, we find consistent non-semantic sensitivities, where benign spatial edits and simple phrasing changes shift scores by $\approx$6--9\% on average, and for systems separated by just 0.7\%, these shifts can cause ranking flips in up to $\sim$37\% of cases, particularly under spatial changes. A small human study also supports this finding and confirms that annotators generally judge perturbed pairs as equally correct, so these shifts reflect metric behavior rather than semantic change. We further propose invariance-calibrated scoring, a post-hoc adjustment that roughly halves median absolute sensitivity while retaining correlation with learned caption evaluators.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了主流图像转文本评价指标对语义不变性的敏感度，发现其对空间、对象和社会语言框架的无害扰动存在非语义的敏感表现，并提出了一种后处理校准方法以提升鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 当前的无参考图像-文本评价器被广泛用于衡量图像与描述的对应关系，但这些指标是否具有对于语义等价扰动的鲁棒性尚未明确。作者希望揭示这些评价器在语义不变条件下的可靠性问题，从而提升其实际应用中的可信度。
AI.method: 作者设计了三类语义等价的扰动（空间调整、对象属性变化、社会语言修饰），对五种流行评价器进行探查，统计扰动前后评分的变化，并结合三类检测数据集与三套自动评价任务，此外通过小规模人为标注验证评价器的评分变化是否真的反映了语义变动。最后，提出一种名为'invariance-calibrated scoring'的后处理方法减少对扰动的敏感性。
AI.result: 实验证明，所有测试的评价器均对无害的空间与表述扰动敏感，评分平均变动达到6-9%，且系统间的微小评分差异在扰动后会导致近37%的排名翻转。同时，人工标注表明多数扰动并未导致语义判定变化，证明当前评价器的变动源自指标本身。提出的后处理方法可降低一半的指标敏感性，同时保持与原指标的相关性。
AI.conclusion: 常用无参考图像-文本评价器对许多非语义扰动缺乏鲁棒性，可能影响公平有效的系统比对。所提校准后处理方法能有效缓解该问题，对未来指标设计有启发意义。

title: JudgmentBench: Comparing Rubric and Preference Evaluation for Quality Assessment
summary: Two methodologies dominate current practices of benchmarking: rubric-based scoring evaluates items against predefined criteria, whereas comparative judgment elicits pairwise preferences between outputs. Although both methodologies are widely used, the choice between them is rarely justified. We release JudgmentBench, a benchmark of 30 real-world legal tasks, paired with 1,539 rubric scores and 1,530 pairwise preference judgments collected from practicing attorneys--including at major U.S. law firms--with substantial experience. The annotations constitute the first publicly available dataset in a high-expertise domain in which both supervision signals are elicited from the same experts on the same items. Using LLM-generated outputs at three constructed quality levels, we provide an initial empirical comparison: comparative judgments recover the intended quality ordering substantially better than rubrics (mean Spearman's rank correlation of 0.908 vs. 0.150, estimated difference = 0.758 [0.494, 1.021]) while requiring less than half the annotation time. The patterns hold for human annotators and LLM autograders. Beyond this initial comparison, the paired structure of the dataset supports a broader research agenda on how expert judgment should be elicited, aggregated, and used as supervision in domains without verifiable ground truth.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并公开了JudgmentBench数据集，比较了rubric打分与成对比较两种常见评测方法，并发现后者更准确且更高效。
AI.motivation: 当前主流的两种评测方式（rubric评分和成对比较）在实际应用中都很广泛，但选择依据不明且缺少高专业领域的公开数据集进行定量对比分析。
AI.method: 构建了高专业度法律任务数据集JudgmentBench，涵盖30个真实法律任务，由有丰富经验的律师给出rubric评分和成对偏好判断，并利用LLM生成不同质量水平的输出进行评测。
AI.result: 成对比较在复现预设质量排序方面远优于rubric打分（Spearman秩相关0.908对比0.150），且标注时间仅为rubric的一半多一点，人类标注员与LLM自动标注者结果一致。
AI.conclusion: 在高专业领域，成对比较相较于rubric评分更准确、高效，并对未来如何获得与利用专家监督信号（特别是在无明确客观真值的领域）提出了研究前景。

title: Physics-Guided Self-Supervised Statistical Residual Learning for Sonar Despeckling with Improved Generalization
summary: This letter introduces a physics-informed self-supervised framework for sonar image despeckling that reformulates despeckling as residual consistency in the homomorphic log domain. By constraining the log-ratio residual to obey multiplicative speckle statistics, the proposed method eliminates the need for clean supervision while preventing degenerate identity solutions. A variance-targeted statistical loss combined with edge-aware structural regularization and median-guided curriculum stabilization enables effective speckle suppression with preserved structural fidelity. This formulation along with a lightweight neural network achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple real sonar datasets and demonstrates excellent cross-dataset robustness, while remaining suitable for real-time deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种物理知识引导的自监督声呐图像去斑点方法，在对数域中通过残差一致性约束，实现了无需干净监督、高效去斑且结构保持的方法，并在多个真实数据集上取得了先进表现。
AI.motivation: 传统声呐图像去斑往往依赖干净标签，并面临结构损失或过拟合等问题。为减少对人工标注的依赖，并提升去斑效果和泛化能力，作者采用物理统计信息与自监督方法。
AI.method: 该方法在对数同态域中，将去斑建模为残差一致性问题，通过约束对数比值的残差符合乘性斑点统计分布，结合方差约束损失、基于边缘的结构正则以及中值引导的课程学习策略，实现了在无需干净标签情况下的高效去斑。神经网络结构轻量，适合实时应用。
AI.result: 在多个真实声呐数据集上，方法取得了领先的去斑性能，消除了过度平滑且保持了结构信息，并展现出良好的跨数据集泛化与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 物理知识驱动的自监督去斑策略可在无干净监督的情况下实现高效、结构保持的声呐图像去斑，兼具先进性能和实际应用价值。

title: Inference Time Optimization with Confidence Dynamics
summary: Inference time optimization techniques, such as repeated sampling, have significantly advanced the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). However, the critical role of model uncertainty remains largely underexplored in these optimization strategies. In this paper, we investigate the dynamics of confidence along reasoning trajectories and for first time reveal a surprising and unique pattern: correct answer traces tend to exhibit confidence improvement over time (positive confidence gain), while incorrect traces show attenuated or declining confidence as reasoning proceeds. Based on this observation, we propose Confidence Dynamic Gain (CDG) based voting, which incorporates how the confidence trajectory of the response evolves along the reasoning chain. Experiments across four open-source architectures (DeepSeek-R1, gpt-oss, Gemma-3, Qwen-QwQ) on the AIME24/25, HMMT25, and BRUMO25 benchmarks demonstrate that CDG yields a significant performance boost over baselines. These results demonstrate that our method provides a robust discriminative signal for improving answer selection in LLM reasoning. We also provide theoretical insights for this phenomenon. Code will be released at https://github.com/Accenture/CDG.git.

AI.tldr: 论文发现，在大语言模型（LLM）推理过程中，正确推理路径的置信度随时间增加，而错误路径则下降。基于此提出了置信度动态增益(CDG)投票方法，有效提升LLM的推理表现。
AI.motivation: 虽然推理优化技术提升了大语言模型的推理能力，但如何利用模型不确定性尚未被深入探讨。作者注意到置信度在推理过程中的动态变化可能包含有价值的信息，因此希望探索这一现象及其应用潜力。
AI.method: 系统地分析四种开源LLM在多个推理任务基准上的推理路径置信度变化，发现正确与错误路径的置信度变化趋势显著不同。基于此，提出了一种新的基于置信度动态变化（CDG）的投票机制来辅助答案选择。
AI.result: 在DeepSeek-R1、gpt-oss、Gemma-3、Qwen-QwQ等架构，以及AIME24/25、HMMT25和BRUMO25等基准上，CDG方法明显优于现有基线方法，显著提升了推理准确率和答案选择的能力。
AI.conclusion: 推理链中置信度动态是一项有用的判别信号，CDG方法能够有效提升大模型推理表现，为未来LLM优化提供了新的方向，并给出了理论解释。

title: Calibrating Probabilistic Object Detectors with Annotator Disagreement
summary: High degrees of disagreement among annotators can exist for ambiguous objects, e.g. in medical images, underscoring the challenges of establishing ground truth annotations in object detection tasks. Despite this, all existing object detectors implicitly require access to ground truth annotations for either training or evaluation. The fundamental questions we target are: How can we learn an object detector with multiple annotators' annotations but without objective ground truth annotations due to object ambiguity, and how can we enable the learned detector to express meaningful model predictive uncertainties in detecting ambiguous objects? To answer these questions, we present an interpretable approach to calibrate probabilistic object detectors, where the calibration goal is to align the class confidence and bounding box variance estimates to the annotators' annotation distribution. We introduce an efficient yet effective framework to calibrate probabilistic object detectors by designing four evaluation metrics to measure calibration errors regarding classification and localization, and proposing a train-time calibration and post-hoc calibrator, all without the need to access any ground truth. This framework is generalizable to many existing probabilistic object detectors, such as the YOLO families and two-stage detectors. Empirical results with real-world and synthetic datasets of medical and natural images demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed framework with three popular object detectors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需客观真实标签，能处理多标注者不一致标注，同时输出不确定性预测的概率目标检测校准方法。
AI.motivation: 在如医学影像等存在模糊、不确定对象时，多标注者之间标注差异很大，导致难以确定标准‘真值’，而现有目标检测方法往往假设有唯一无误的‘真值’标注。如何在没有公认真值的情况下有效利用多标注数据，并准确反映模型预测的不确定性，成为亟需解决的难题。
AI.method: 提出了一套概率目标检测器的可解释校准方法，通过设计四种用于分类和定位校准误差的评估指标，及训练阶段和后处理阶段的校正方案，实现模型输出的置信度和边界框方差与标注分布对齐。该方法无需访问真实标签。此外，该框架可应用于YOLO系列和两阶段检测器等多种主流目标检测模型。
AI.result: 在医疗和自然图像的真实与合成数据集上，所提方法与三种主流检测器结合后表现出优异的性能，优于未校准的基线。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在无真实标签场景下实现了目标检测模型输出的有效校准，提升了对不确定对象检测的可靠性和预测解释性，有望推广到广泛概率目标检测任务中。

title: Mimir: Large-scale Multilingual Concept Modeling
summary: Current language modeling approaches are built around tokens. Text corpora are split into tokens, and models are trained by performing computations on these tokens, such as predicting the next token given the preceding ones as context. This paradigm has become the standard in modern language modeling, especially given the outstanding performance obtained by token-based architectures. However, recent works have not only begun to question how language models process and understand meaning from tokens, but also to question whether using higher levels of granularity could advance the research field. This led to the idea of Concept Modeling, that is, to directly train models for next-concept prediction rather than next-token prediction. The goal is to change the input from tokens to concepts, forcing the underlying language model to shift its granularity from fine-grained tokens to broad concepts. In this work, we introduce Mimir, a 1.6B Large Concept Model trained for multilingual concept understanding and generation. We leverage a large-scale multilingual pre-training corpus (38,883,987,240 sentences) spanning 46 languages and a large-scale multi-turn and multilingual instruction-tuning dataset (66,816,428 sentences) covering a total of 35 languages. We extensively evaluate model performance against a language model with a comparable number of parameters.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的概念建模方法（Concept Modeling），代替传统的基于token的语言建模方式，开发了Mimir模型，专注多语言环境下的概念级理解与生成。
AI.motivation: 传统的语言建模偏重于token级处理，忽略了更高层次语义的理解。因此，作者提出以概念为单位进行建模，期望提升模型理解能力，为自然语言处理带来突破。
AI.method: 作者开发了Mimir，一种拥有16亿参数的多语言大模型，利用超大规模、多语言的训练语料库（3.89亿句，46种语言）和指令微调数据集（6681万句，35种语言），以概念为单位进行模型训练和调优。
AI.result: 作者对Mimir模型和参数量相近的传统token级语言模型进行了对比与评价，全面分析了Mimir在多语言概念理解与生成上的性能。
AI.conclusion: 结果显示，以概念为单位的建模方式在多语言理解与生成任务中具有明显优势，为新一代语言模型的研究开辟了方向。

title: From Full Boards to Tiny Defects: Scale-Aware Tile Inference with Topology-Aware Merging for High-Resolution PCB Defect Detection
summary: High-resolution printed circuit board (PCB) inspection suffers from resolution collapse when full-board images are resized to standard detector inputs: micro-scale defects shrink to a few pixels and are missed. Tile-based inference preserves local detail but introduces boundary artefacts at tile edges, causing split detections and false negatives. We present a systematic comparison of five inference strategies evaluated on two high-resolution PCB defect datasets, PCB-Defect (230 images, 1704 annotations) and HRIPCB (693 images, 2 953 annotations), spanning six defect classes.
