We show that training-inference scale consistency is critical: a detector trained on full images collapses to mAP@50 = 0.01 under tile inference, while the same architecture trained on 640*640 tile crops achieves 0.72 and 0.94 on the two datasets respectively. We further exploited Topology-Aware Tile Merging (TA-TM), a training-free post-processing method that builds a tile-adjacency graph and adjusts boundary-sensitive detection scores using neighbour-tile agreement before global NMS. Across both datasets, adding 128 px tile overlap raises boundary-zone recall from ~26-63% to ~70-100%, TA-TM achieves the best mAP@50 on both benchmarks, and tile inference recovers 46-100% of small defects missed entirely by full-image methods. Results are consistent across datasets, confirming the generalizability of the proposed strategy. TA-TM requires no retraining and is architecture-agnostic, making it directly applicable to existing PCB inspection pipelines.

AI.tldr: 本论文系统对比了五种高分辨率PCB缺陷检测的推理策略，并提出了一种无需重新训练的拓扑感知瓷砖融合（TA-TM）方法，有效解决了瓷砖边界伪影和漏检小缺陷的问题。
AI.motivation: 在高分辨率PCB检测中，把整板图像缩小到通用检测器输入会导致微小缺陷信息丢失，使用切片（tile-based）推理虽保留了细节，但造成边界伪影和检测分裂，影响检测准确性。亟需研究更优的推理与后处理策略。
AI.method: 作者系统对比全图缩放、瓷砖推理等五种推理策略，指出训练-推理分辨率一致非常重要。同时提出TA-TM方法，基于瓷砖邻接图，结合邻近瓷砖检测一致性调整边界敏感区域的检测分数，并在全局NMS前应用。
AI.result: 在PCB-Defect与HRIPCB两个真实数据集上，训练-推理分辨率一致明显提升mAP@50，TA-TM极大提升边界区域召回率和整体检测mAP@50，瓷砖法能找回大批全图法遗漏的小缺陷。TA-TM方法在无需重新训练下，对不同骨干网络和数据集表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑感知瓷砖融合TA-TM方法高效解决高分辨率PCB检测中的瓷砖边界伪影和漏检问题，提升小缺陷检测能力，且对现有检测架构和流程零改动、直接适用。

title: READER: Reasoning-Enhanced AI-Generated Text Detection
summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have made it increasingly difficult to distinguish human-written text from AI-generated content. Many existing detectors train supervised neural classifiers that achieve strong in-distribution performance but are often opaque and can degrade substantially under distribution shift. We present READER, a reasoning-enhanced AI text detector that outputs both a human/AI label and a structured rationale describing the evidence for its decision. A key component of our approach is READ, a curated supervision set of rationales and verdicts. We fine-tune an LLM on READ to build READER, which reasons before detecting at inference time. Despite having only 1.5B parameters, READER consistently outperforms existing detectors as well as prompted, high-capacity LLM baselines (GPT-5.2, Gemini-3-Pro, and DeepSeek-V3.2), which are 100 to 1000 times larger in scale.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种增强推理能力的AI文本检测器READER，不仅能区分人类和AI生成内容，还能给出结构化的判据，且检测性能优于现有检测器和大型LLM基线模型。
AI.motivation: 现有AI文本检测器往往是训练有监督神经分类器，对分布内数据表现好，但在分布外性能显著下降且判决过程不透明。随着大语言模型生成文本水平提升，准确、可解释的检测方法变得尤为重要。
AI.method: 提出READER系统，该系统基于READ数据集（包含AI/人类判决及其理由）对参数量仅1.5B的LLM进行微调，使模型在推理基础上输出AI/人类标签和解释证据。
AI.result: READER性能超过现有检测器及几乎所有当前主流prompt工程下的大模型基线（如GPT-5.2、Gemini-3-Pro、DeepSeek-V3.2），而这些基线规模比READER大100到1000倍。
AI.conclusion: READER显著提升了AI文本检测的准确性和可解释性，同时具备小模型高效优势，有望应用于实际AI内容监管场景。

title: Ghosts in the Point Clouds: De-glaring LiDAR in the Transient Domain
summary: Modern LiDARs are rapidly transitioning from bulky, mechanically scanned systems to ultra-compact, low-cost, solid-state arrays. This miniaturization-while enabling scalability, affordability, and camera-like data structures-introduces a new and severe failure mode: internal-multipath glare. When light from a bright or retroreflective surface reflects and scatters within the LiDAR, light that should reach a single pixel spreads across the pixel array. The resulting artifacts create phantom objects, obscure real ones, and produce safety-critical "ghosts in the point clouds." This paper introduces a physically grounded sensing model and algorithmic techniques for addressing this effect. We show that internal glare can be represented as a linear, scene-independent operator-the Transient Glare Spread Function (TGSF)-acting on the transient measurements. Building on this model, we develop a training-free approach that operates on low-level LiDAR detections (or echoes) prior to point-cloud formation, leveraging knowledge of the glare spread function to reason about the likelihood of each detection arising from glare. The resulting approach is compatible with existing LiDAR signal-processing pipelines, and deployable on unmodified commercial sensors. Using experiments with real single-photon LiDAR hardware, we demonstrate substantial suppression of severe glare artifacts while preserving true scene structure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于解决固态LiDAR内部多路径眩光的新模型与方法，在不修改硬件的情况下，有效抑制伪影并保留真实场景结构。
AI.motivation: 固态LiDAR因其小型化和低成本，已逐渐取代传统机械式LiDAR，但随之出现了内部多路径眩光问题，导致虚假物体、遮挡和安全隐患，亟需有效应对方法。
AI.method: 作者提出了基于物理原理的感知模型，将内部眩光表示为场景无关的线性算子——瞬态眩光扩散函数（TGSF），并以此为基础，给出一种无须训练的处理方法，直接作用于LiDAR的底层回波信号，利用已知的眩光扩散特性评估每个检测信号可能来源于眩光的概率。该方法完全兼容现有固态LiDAR的信号处理流程，无需更改商用硬件。
AI.result: 通过实验，作者在实际单光子LiDAR硬件上验证了方法有效性，结果表明新方法能大幅削弱场景中的严重眩光伪影，同时真实场景结构得以保留。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为当前和未来固态LiDAR提供了一种无需硬件改造、可集成于现有流程的眩光消除方案，有助于提升LiDAR测距和环境感知的可靠性和安全性。

title: Knowing but Not Showing: LLMs Recognize Ambiguity but Rarely Ask Clarifying Questions
summary: User queries are often underspecified and may admit multiple valid interpretations. Rather than silently making assumptions about the user's intent, a helpful assistant should surface such ambiguity by asking a clarifying question. Doing so requires two abilities: recognizing that a query is ambiguous, and acting on that recognition by seeking clarification instead of answering directly. To study these abilities, we evaluate models on ambiguous, unambiguous, and disambiguated questions in three settings: standard question answering, explicit ambiguity judgment, and behavioral analysis, where a judge model classifies responses as direct answers, refusals, or clarifying questions. We find a clear gap between recognition and behavior: models often identify ambiguity when explicitly asked to judge it, yet in the QA setting they overwhelmingly default to direct answers. Retrieved context further widens this gap by improving answerability while making models even less likely to ask clarifying questions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在查询存在歧义时，模型是否具有识别和通过澄清问题解决歧义的能力，并在不同设置下测试了模型的表现。
AI.motivation: 用户查询常常表达不清或有多重理解，如助手未能揭示并询问歧义，可能导致提供错误答案，因此需要研究如何让系统识别和应对歧义。
AI.method: 评估了模型在三种情况下的表现：1）标准问答任务；2）显式要求判断歧义性；3）行为分析——另外一个judge模型对回答类型进行分类（直接回答/拒绝/澄清问题），并考查了外部检索到的上下文对模型行为的影响。
AI.result: 实验发现，模型在被明确要求判断时能识别歧义，但在标准问答任务中基本都直接给出答案，很少主动提出澄清问题。检索到的上下文增强了模型的直接回答倾向，使其更不愿进行澄清。
AI.conclusion: 当前的问答模型虽能感知歧义，但在实际交互中很难主动提出澄清问题，系统需设计更好的机制让模型在面对歧义时能积极寻求澄清。

title: Motion-Compensated Weight Compression
summary: Neural network weights are increasingly a bottleneck for deployment, yet most compression pipelines treat layers independently and overlook cross-layer redundancy induced by function-preserving symmetries. We propose Motion-Compensated Weight Compression (MCWC), a weight-only codec that aligns permutation-symmetric blocks (e.g., hidden units and attention heads) to maximize cross-layer correspondence, turning depth into a predictable sequence. In the aligned coordinate system, MCWC uses a lightweight layer-sequential predictor with periodic keyframes and encodes only quantized prediction residuals using a learned entropy model trained under a rate distortion objective. A simple decoder reconstructs deployable weights by entropy decoding, dequantization, predictor-driven reconstruction, and inverse alignment, enabling fast weight materialization for inference. Across Transformer language modeling and vision classification, MCWC improves the rate accuracy Pareto frontier over strong quantization and learned weight-codec baselines, while maintaining competitive decode time. Ablations confirm that alignment, prediction, entropy modeling, and keyframe scheduling are each necessary for the full gains. Our code is available via https://github.com/Ism-ail11/MCWC.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的神经网络权重量化压缩方法——MCWC，通过跨层对齐和残差熵编码实现更高效的权重压缩，在Transformer等模型中优于现有主流方法。
AI.motivation: 神经网络权重大小已成为模型部署的瓶颈。大多数压缩方法只独立处理单层，未能利用跨层间由功能对称性带来的冗余，从而未达到最优压缩效果。
AI.method: MCWC从对称性出发，对Permutation-symmetric Block（如隐藏单元、注意力头）进行跨层对齐，将权重序列化后用轻量化的层间序列预测器进行预测，采用周期Keyframe机制，只编码预测残差并结合学习型熵模型，以率失真目标优化。解码器则通过熵解码、反量化、基于预测器的重建及逆对齐实现权重恢复。
AI.result: MCWC方法在Transformer语言模型和视觉分类任务上展现了相较于现有量化与学习型压缩方法更优的压缩率-精度折中（Pareto前沿），同时保持了较快的解码速度。消融实验也验证了各组成部分（对齐、预测、熵建模、关键帧调度）对性能提升均有贡献。
AI.conclusion: MCWC为神经网络权重压缩提供了一个更高效的解决方案，有效利用了跨层对齐和序列预测优势。在压缩效率及解码速度间实现更好平衡，适用于实际部署场景。

title: Eureka: Intelligent Feature Engineering for Enterprise AI Cloud Resource Demand Prediction
comment: 13 pages, accepted at DASFAA 2026 (International Conference on Database Systems for Advanced Applications)
summary: Effective features are crucial for predictive model performance, but creating them often requires domain expertise, limiting scalability across applications. We define feature engineering as an agentic code generation problem: features are not static data transformations, but executable programs that can be generated, evaluated, and iteratively improved. We present Eureka, an LLM-driven framework with three stages. (1) An Expert Agent, fine-tuned via SFT on domain knowledge, produces structured feature design plans in JSON format. (2) An LLM Feature Factory translates each plan into executable Python code through chain-of-thought reasoning, turning feature hypotheses into runnable programs. (3) A Self-Evolving Alignment Engine uses Reinforcement Learning (GRPO) with dual-channel reward (metric-based utility + semantic alignment) to enhance code quality. By expressing features as programs, the learned generation patterns can transfer across domains. Evaluated on 7 public benchmarks in healthcare, finance, and social domains, Eureka consistently outperforms both traditional AutoFE and LLM-based baselines. We further demonstrate Eureka's effectiveness on cloud GPU resource demand prediction at Alibaba Cloud, where Eureka improves demand fulfillment rate by 16% and lowers computing resource migration rates by 33%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Eureka框架，利用大语言模型（LLM）自动化代码生成，实现跨领域更高效的特征工程，在多个实际数据集和真实业务场景中优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 特征工程对预测模型性能至关重要，但手工构建特征需专业领域知识，难以大规模推广到不同应用。本研究旨在用自动化方法降低特征设计门槛，提升跨领域应用能力。
AI.method: 作者将特征工程视为智能体式代码生成任务，提出Eureka三阶段流程：1）专家智能体结合领域知识输出结构化特征方案；2）LLM转化成可执行Python代码，将特征假说变程序；3）强化学习驱动自迭代优化，采用GRPO算法与双通道奖励机制（指标与语义对齐）。
AI.result: 在健康、金融和社交等7个公开基准数据集上，Eureka表现均优于传统自动特征工程及现有LLM基线方法。在阿里云GPU资源需求预测等实际场景，Eureka提升16%的需求满足率，并将资源迁移率降低33%。
AI.conclusion: Eureka框架通过将特征表达为可迭代优化的程序，实现了特征生成方式从静态到动态的进化，提高了特征工程的自动化和可迁移性，并在实际应用中展现出显著优势。

title: Tool-Call Dependency Structure is Linearly Decodable in LLM Agent Residual Streams
summary: Tool-using LLM agents produce trajectories whose calls form a directed dependency graph: earlier tool outputs supply arguments to later calls. Whether this execution structure is represented inside the model is unknown; prior structural probes have targeted static code or chain-of-thought text, not an agent's run-time call graph. A low-capacity edge probe on the residual stream of Qwen3-32B decodes the tool-call dependency graph well above both a Hewitt--Liang random-label control and a positional baseline. A counterfactual contrast between value corruption and structural perturbation indicates the signal tracks abstract topology rather than identifier values, and replicates under an independent, non-substring oracle. The non-positional component replicates on three further interactive multi-hop benchmarks and attenuates as call order alone becomes a sufficient proxy for dependency, vanishing in single-shot planning. Per-layer activation patching shifts the probe at a later, non-patched boundary, evidence that the representation propagates rather than passively reads out, though the realised tool call does not move. To our knowledge this is the first structural probe of an LLM agent's runtime tool-call dependency graph. Our claims concern representation, not behavioural control, and span two model families and one primary domain.

AI.tldr: 本文首次对大型语言模型（LLM）在运行过程中调用外部工具所形成的依赖关系图进行了结构性分析，发现模型内部能够表示这种依赖拓扑结构。
AI.motivation: 当前不知道LLM在使用工具时，是否在内部表征了整个工具调用依赖图。已有结构性探针研究只分析静态代码或思维链文本，而未关注实际运行时的工具调用图。
AI.method: 作者设计了一种低容量的边缘探针，通过检测Qwen3-32B模型残差流信息来解码工具调用依赖关系，并与随机标签和位置基线进行对比。还采用对比实验区分模型是否表征的是结构拓扑而非表面标识符。同时在多项多跳交互任务基准上进行重复实验证明稳健性，并通过层激活修补实验追踪表征传播机制。
AI.result: 探针能准确解码依赖拓扑，显著超过随机和位置基线。信号对应抽象依赖结构，不仅仅是标识符值；这种能力在任务复杂时更明显，单步任务时消失。层激活修补表明表征在网络中传播，不仅仅是静态输出。
AI.conclusion: LLM在运行时能内部表征复杂的工具调用依赖关系，不只是顺序关系。这为理解模型如何处理复杂多步任务提供了新视角。本文研究跨模型家族和主要任务域，首次展示了运行时依赖图结构探针效果。

title: 4KLSDB: A Large-Scale Dataset for 4K Image Restoration and Generation
comment: Accepted to the DataCV Workshop at CVPR 2026; 10 pages, 4 figures, 7 tables; Our project page is available at: https://4klsdb.github.io/
summary: High-resolution datasets are essential for advancing super-resolution (SR) and text-to-image (T2I) diffusion research. However, current publicly available datasets lack both the native 4K resolution and the extensive scale necessary for training state-of-the-art models. To address this gap, we introduce a 4K Large Scale Dataset and Benchmark (4KLSDB), a large-scale, diverse dataset consisting of 129,484 carefully curated 4K resolution images spanning multiple categories such as nature, urban scenes, people, food, artwork, and CGI, alongside distinct validation and test sets containing 2,000 and 1,984 images respectively. Images were sourced from established open datasets including Photo Concept Bucket, Laion2B, and PD12M. 4KLSDB underwent rigorous multi-stage automated filtering and annotation pipelines involving both human annotators and Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) to ensure high aesthetic quality and dataset consistency. We demonstrate 4KLSDB's effectiveness by training representative super-resolution and diffusion models, observing significant improvements in performance on native 4K benchmarks. Comprehensive experiments illustrate a positive correlation between training on true 4K resolution data and improved fidelity in image restoration task, especially on 4K resolution. We provide the research community a valuable resource to drive progress toward genuinely high-fidelity image synthesis and restoration by providing 4KLSDB. Our project page is available at: https://4klsdb.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个大规模、原生4K分辨率的图像数据集4KLSDB，弥补了现有公开数据集中缺少高分辨率和大规模数据的问题，为超分辨率和文本生成图像研究提供支持。
AI.motivation: 现有公开数据集缺乏足够规模和原生4K分辨率，无法有效支撑顶尖超分辨率和文本生成图像模型的训练和评测。
AI.method: 构建了包含129,484张4K分辨率的多类别高质量图像大数据集（4KLSDB），图像来源涵盖多个公开数据集，通过多阶段自动筛选与标注流程，结合人工和多模态大模型确保数据高质量；并用于训练代表性的超分辨与扩散模型。
AI.result: 在4K原生分辨率图像上训练的模型，在相关基准测试中获得显著性能提升。系统实验表明，4K训练数据明显提升了图像重建和生成质量。
AI.conclusion: 4KLSDB为研究社区提供了宝贵的资源，将推动高保真的超分辨率图像合成与恢复方向的发展。

title: P1SCO: Social Dimensions from a Perspectivist Lens
summary: We introduce P1SCO, a dataset of social media comments collected from three distinct platforms, annotated according to ten social dimensions to capture the diversity of social interactions and perceptions. The dataset is carefully disaggregated to allow analysis at the level of individual comments, annotators, and platforms. In addition to the social dimension labels, we include rich metadata on the annotators, including demographics, Big Five personality profiles, and political affiliation. This combination of comment-level annotations and annotator-level features enables nuanced analyses of how social perception varies across platforms, individual differences, and demographic factors. By preserving the diversity of annotator perspectives, our dataset supports studies of inter- and intra-annotator agreement, the influence of personality and political orientation on social interpretation, and the cross-platform dynamics of social discourse.

AI.tldr: P1SCO是一个聚合自三个社交媒体平台的评论数据集，涵盖10种社会维度标签，并包含详细注释者元数据，便于从多角度分析社交互动和认知。
AI.motivation: 现有社交媒体数据往往缺乏丰富的社会维度标签和注释者背景信息，无法充分分析社交互动多样性及其个体差异影响。因此，作者创建P1SCO，以深入研究社交认知和跨平台差异。
AI.method: 作者从三个主流社交媒体平台收集评论，针对10种社会维度进行人工标注，并收集注释者人口统计信息、五大人格特质和政治倾向，确保数据涵盖注释者个体差异。数据整理支持按评论、注释者和平台多层次分析。
AI.result: P1SCO数据集公开，能够用于分析社会感知的跨平台差异、个体差异（如人格、政治倾向）对交流解读的影响，以及注释者之间的一致性和分歧。
AI.conclusion: P1SCO为研究社交互动的多样性和社交感知的个体与平台差异提供了高质量的数据基础，有助于促进跨学科社交媒体研究并推动更加细致深入的分析。

title: Leveraging pretrained RGB denoisers for hyperspectral image restoration
summary: Hyperspectral image restoration faces several challenges, including limited training data, strong sensor specificity, and high spectral dimensionality. These limitations hinder the learning of robust hyperspectral priors, motivating the reuse of priors learned from large-scale RGB data. In this work, we propose a minimally trained, lightweight adapter that repurposes frozen pretrained RGB denoisers for hyperspectral restoration through a projection mapping. The method denoises low-dimensional spectral projections and reconstructs the hyperspectral cube through constrained linear aggregation, while preserving plug-and-play compatibility and the stability properties of the underlying RGB denoiser. Experiments on denoising, deblurring, and super-resolution across multiple datasets demonstrate consistent improvements over hyperspectral-specific baselines, showing the strong transferability of large-scale RGB priors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种只需极少训练的数据轻量级适配器，将已预训练的RGB图像去噪模型用于高光谱图像复原任务，并在多个任务和数据集上优于特定高光谱的基线方法。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像复原受限于训练数据稀缺、传感器特异性强和光谱维度高，导致学习鲁棒的高光谱先验较难。因此，希望借用大规模RGB数据训练得到的先验，提升高光谱图像复原性能。
AI.method: 设计了一种轻量适配器，对预训练的RGB去噪器进行冻结，仅训练适配器部分。具体地，方法将高光谱图像投影到低维空间进行去噪，再通过受限线性重建恢复高光谱数据，整个流程保持可插拔和原有RGB去噪器的稳定性。
AI.result: 在去噪、去模糊和超分辨等多种高光谱图像复原任务以及多个数据集上，方法均在性能上超过了多种高光谱专用基线模型，证明了大规模RGB先验的迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过最小化的训练和结构设计，预训练RGB去噪模型的知识能够以轻量方式迁移到高光谱领域，既提升了复原性能，也显示了大规模RGB先验对小样本高光谱任务的高适应性和实用价值。

title: MATO: Multi-objective Personalized Alignment with Test-time Optimization for Large Language Models
summary: Aligning large language models (LLMs) with diverse and multifaceted user preferences is a fundamental challenge in personalized AI systems. Existing multi-objective alignment methods either rely on costly training or require pre-trained reward models for each preference, making it difficult for them to adapt to evolving preferences. Prompt-based personalization offers a training-free alternative, but prompting alone often provides limited steerability, as LLMs may overemphasize or overlook certain preferences and fail to give users reliable control over the relative importance of different objectives when conflicts arise, leading to suboptimal alignment. In this paper, we introduce MATO, a training-free framework for Multi-objective personalized Alignment with Test-time Optimization. MATO formulates personalization as a test-time optimization problem that steers the relative importance of multiple objectives through controllable weights during decoding, without modifying model parameters or requiring external reward models. Specifically, a reward discovery module recovers preference rewards directly from the backbone LLM for diverse objectives specified in natural language, while a weight optimization module dynamically adjusts objective weights based on the user's initial preferences and the partially generated response to balance competing objectives during generation. The resulting rewards and weights jointly guide an online optimization procedure over the token distribution, enabling better alignment with the target objectives. Extensive experiments across multiple datasets and backbone LLMs show that MATO consistently outperforms strong baselines, achieving Pareto-improving multi-objective alignment and stronger steerability. These results highlight test-time optimization as a promising direction for scalable, controllable, and model-agnostic personalized alignment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需额外训练即可实现多目标个性化对齐的新方法MATO，在用户交互生成过程中动态调整各目标权重，实现对用户多元并可能冲突偏好的精细控制。
AI.motivation: 当前大模型多目标个性化对齐难以平衡多样化用户偏好，要么需要高昂训练成本，要么对每个目标依赖独立的奖励模型，且很难及时适应用户需求变化。仅依赖提示词个性化操作灵活性有限，不能精准调控目标间优先级。
AI.method: MATO将个性化对齐视为一次测试时优化问题。在生成过程中，自动发现和恢复用户用自然语言描述的多个目标的奖励，同时通过权重优化模块结合用户初始偏好和当前生成内容，动态调整各目标权重。最终通过在线优化过程，将奖励与权重综合作用于生成模型输出分布，实现细致可控对齐。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和大模型后端上的实验表明，MATO较现有强基线有明显优势，在多目标对齐表现更优、更可控，并能取得帕累托改进。
AI.conclusion: MATO的测试时优化方案为个性化大模型对齐提供了高效、可扩展、模型无关的技术路径，未来有望广泛应用于更复杂的个性化智能系统。

title: From Theory to Decision Rule: Calibrating the Noisy-Label Crossover for Vision-Language Model Weak Supervision Across Three Medical-Imaging Benchmarks
summary: Classical noisy-label theory predicts that downstream performance under weak supervision is bounded above by the labeler's accuracy, implying a sharp crossover: once a gold-trained classifier matches the labeler, weak labels stop helping and start hurting. The prediction is theoretical; what is missing is a benchmark calibration that turns it into an instance-level statement for modern foundation-model labelers. We provide such a calibration for BiomedCLIP-generated weak labels on three medical-imaging benchmarks (PCAM, ISIC, NIH-CXR) and six downstream architectures spanning an 11x parameter range. The crossover predicted by theory appears at ng~100 on PCAM, 20-50 on ISIC, and 250-500 on NIH-CXR; weak labels above the crossover degrade AUC by up to -0.10. The location is architecture-invariant for four of five pretrained architectures, and a within-family DenseNet sweep (2.5x parameters, identical pretraining) supports the view that the labeler, not the student, is the dominant constraint. The calibration in turn produces a decision rule operable from 10-20 gold labels: compare gold-only AUC to VLM accuracy on the user's gold set. A structured-vs-random noise sign flip on NIH-CXR shows that the rate-only formulation of the bound is incomplete and identifies a concrete refinement (label-space projection) that future benchmarks can be designed to test.

AI.tldr: 本文研究弱监督（noisy-label）下的下游模型性能与标注器准确率之间的关系，并首次在现代医学影像基准和大模型背景下做了实例级校准。
AI.motivation: 传统理论认为弱标记训练的模型性能不会超过标注器本身，找到理论预言的“交叉点”对实际应用有重要参考与指导价值，尤其是在大模型自动生成标签越来越常见时。
AI.method: 以BiomedCLIP大模型生成的弱标签，在PCAM、ISIC、NIH-CXR三个医学影像任务上，测试不同下游模型（参数量跨度11倍）在弱标签数量从少到多的不同阶段的表现，并以金标少量数据进行基准对比与校准。
AI.result: 实验证明理论预言的性能交叉点确实存在：在PCAM、ISIC、NIH-CXR数据集上大致分别为100、20-50、250-500张弱标签。超过该点继续用弱标签会让AUC最多下降0.1。交叉点与模型架构基本无关，主要由弱标签质量主导。还提出只需10-20份金标就可用作判别依据。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立了弱标签效果评估的实用决策规则，并指出理论中仅依赖准确率（rate-only）的界限并不充分，必须考虑标签空间结构，为后续基准和理论研究提供了校准与改进方向。

title: A general tensor-structured compression scheme for efficient large language models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are dominated by dense linear transformations, whose storage, memory and computational overheads hinder efficient adaptation and deployment while masking the functional impacts of structural simplification. Here we present Tensor Mixture (MixT), a general tensor-structured compression scheme that replaces targeted dense linear layers with natively executable mixtures of tensor operators. Operating directly on generic linear projections instead of model-specific components, MixT is potentially applicable across Transformer-based LLMs and other dense neural mappings. We evaluate MixT on Qwen3-8B and LLaMA2-7B under a unified recovery protocol, identifying a broad compressible regime in which MMLU accuracy is largely preserved before an abrupt transition at model-specific boundaries. This transition coincides with coordinated shifts in output entropy, prediction entropy and inter-layer geometry. At the LLaMA2-7B transition boundary, MixT reduces full-model parameters by 47.5\%, inference FLOPs by 37.1\%, training FLOPs by 52.1\% and peak inference memory by 60.4\%, demonstrating its practical potential for lower-cost LLM compression.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用的张量结构压缩方法MixT，可以在大语言模型（LLM）中用张量操作混合物替换密集线性层，实现模型压缩和加速，同时在大部分压缩区间内基本不损失性能。
AI.motivation: LLMs中的密集线性变换导致存储、内存和计算开销大，阻碍了模型高效使用和部署。现有结构简化方法功能效果不明确，因此需要新方法降低模型复杂度并保留性能。
AI.method: 提出Tensor Mixture（MixT），将目标密集线性层换成原生可执行的张量操作混合物。其直接作用于通用线性投影，适用于Transformer等多种模型。实验在Qwen3-8B和LLaMA2-7B上统一评测模型性能与压缩效果。
AI.result: 发现MixT能将LLaMA2-7B模型的参数减少47.5%、推理FLOPs减少37.1%、训练FLOPs减少52.1%、推理峰值内存减少60.4%，在大范围压缩区间内MMLU准确率几乎不变，在特定压缩边界出现性能迅速下降。
AI.conclusion: MixT是一种通用高效的LLM压缩方案，能显著减少参数量和资源消耗，同时保持任务性能，在实际部署中具有较大应用潜力。

title: How Noisy Poses Break Inverse Dynamics: Analysis and Mitigation for Video-Based Joint Torque Estimation
summary: Recent advances in monocular 3D human pose estimation enable accurate body tracking from video. However, translating these kinematic estimates into physical quantities, such as joint torques, remains challenging due to noise amplification through inverse dynamics. In this work, we provide a systematic analysis of how pose estimation noise propagates through the inverse dynamics pipeline. We present three key findings: (1) pose noise is amplified by approximately 1,000x when computing joint torques via numerical differentiation, (2) proximal joints (spine, hips) are up to 10x more sensitive to noise than distal joints (wrists, hands), and (3) low-pass filtering before differentiation substantially reduces this amplification. To enable this analysis, we develop SMPL-Dynamics, a fully differentiable inverse dynamics module for the SMPL body model that requires no external physics simulators. Our module supports end-to-end gradient computation, and we demonstrate this through differentiable pose refinement, which reduces torque error by 93% with negligible change in pose.

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了单目3D人体姿态估计的噪声在逆动力学中的传播问题，并提出了一种可微分逆动力学模块，有效降低了误差放大。
AI.motivation: 单目3D姿态估计虽可追踪人体动作，但要通过逆动力学（如数值微分）从姿态估计推算物理量（如关节力矩）时，噪声会被极大放大，影响实用性。作者希望分析这一问题，并寻求解决途径。
AI.method: 作者开发了SMPL-Dynamics，这是一个无需外部物理仿真器、可端到端可微分的逆动力学模块，基于SMPL人体模型。通过该模块，作者系统评估了姿态噪声在数值微分计算力矩环节的放大情况，同时探索了低通滤波等缓解策略，并展示了可微分的姿态细化减少力矩误差的优越性。
AI.result: 主要发现包括：(1) 姿态噪声在通过数值微分计算关节力矩时约被放大1000倍；(2) 躯干部位（如脊柱、髋部）对噪声敏感性比远端关节高达10倍；(3) 在微分前使用低通滤波能大幅减少误差放大。此外，通过可微分姿态细化模块，关节力矩误差可下降93%，基本不影响原始姿态估计。
AI.conclusion: 尽管单目3D姿态估计日趋准确，逆动力学中的噪声放大问题不可忽视。通过可微分逆动力学与姿态细化，可显著提升力矩估计的可靠性，为基于视觉的人体动力学分析提供了一种有效的工程实践路径。

title: AI-Associated Lexical Shifts Across 34 Languages: Cross-Lingual Convergence and Diachronic Uptake in News Writing
comment: 19 pages (9-page main body, plus references and appendices), 3 figures; ACL ARR reviewed, committed to EMNLP 2026
summary: AI-associated lexical shifts have been documented mainly in Scientific English. We extend this work to 34 languages in the WMT News Crawl corpus, refining a split-halves continuation diagnostic that compares GPT-4.1 continuations with matched human gold-standard text. For each language, we derive ranked AI-overused lemmas using log prevalence ratios. We find substantial cross-lingual semantic convergence: semantically related concepts recur across typologically diverse languages, with 'emphasize'-type verbs appearing in 24 of 34 languages. Embedding-based and manual analyses support this pattern. We also examine diachronic uptake in news writing before and after ChatGPT's release. Tracking each language's top 20 AI-overused items, we find prevalence increases in 26 of 34 languages from 2020-2021 to 2023-2024, with a mean change of +15.1%, whilst matched baseline words show no comparable increase (-4.5%). In 10 languages with longer historical coverage, longitudinal analyses show post-2022 increases that exceed the modest shifts observed in earlier periods, though with smaller effect sizes than in Scientific English. We validate our approach extensively, including across seeds, model variants, data sizes, model families, and more. Our findings are consistent with the view that AI-associated lexical preferences extend beyond English and may exert cross-lingual homogenising pressure on global language use.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了AI相关的词汇变化现象在英语以外的34种语言中的表现，发现这些变化具有跨语言的趋同现象，并在新闻写作中呈现出随时间增长的趋势。
AI.motivation: 此前关于AI相关词汇变化主要关注于科学英语，作者希望扩展至更多自然语言领域，探究AI产生的文本在全球范围内对不同语言的影响。
AI.method: 作者基于WMT News Crawl语料，对34种语言采用split-halves continuation方法，将GPT-4.1的文本与对应人工文本进行匹配对比。通过log比值统计AI高频用词（AI-overused lemmas），并结合词嵌入与人工分析验证语义聚合。此外追踪了新闻文本在ChatGPT发布前后的词汇使用变化，对多语种和各历史时期进行了纵向比较，并采用多种设置验证方法稳健性。
AI.result: 在34种语言中发现大量语义趋同现象，比如“强调”类动词在24种语言中被AI高频使用。新闻文本自2023-2024年起，AI高频用词的使用率在26种语言中较2020-2021有明显提升（平均+15.1%），而基线词汇并无此变化。在10种长期追踪语言中，AI相关词汇2022年后显著增加，尽管效应低于科学英语领域。
AI.conclusion: AI相关的词汇偏好多语言存在，且正在影响全球新闻文本，呈现出跨语种的语言同质化趋势，这种影响已超越英语领域。作者所提方法具备良好可复现性，为跨语种语言演变研究提供了新视角。

title: Self-Supervised Contrastive Learning for Cardiac MR Sequence Classification
summary: Vision Transformer (ViT) models, utilizing self-attention mechanisms, have demonstrated robust generalization capabilities across various vision tasks, including image classification. However, these models, typically pretrained on general public datasets, often lack the specialized domain knowledge necessary for medical imaging applications. In this study, we investigate the adaptation of ViT models, specifically for cardiac magnetic resonance (MR) images, using an in-house dataset. We found that pretrained ViT features do not effectively transfer to the cardiac MR domain. To overcome this limitation, we introduce an adaptation strategy that utilizes image-based self-supervised contrastive learning, demonstrating superior performance compared to traditional supervised training approaches. Moreover, our adapted ViT model exhibits strong generalization to external MR datasets such as BraTS and ADNI. Through ablation studies, we further investigate the impact of batch size and dataset scale on performance. Ultimately, our adapted model achieves classification AUC exceeding 0.75 across the four most common cardiac MR sequences.

AI.tldr: 本研究针对心脏磁共振（MR）图像，探索了Vision Transformer (ViT) 模型的适应方法，并提出基于自监督对比学习的新策略，有效提升了分类性能。
AI.motivation: 虽然ViT在多种视觉任务上表现优异，但其在医学影像领域，尤其是心脏MR图像上的迁移能力有限，缺乏特定领域知识。因此需要专门的适应方法，以提升ViT在医学影像分类中的效果。
AI.method: 作者利用自主收集的心脏MR图像数据集，分析了ViT预训练特征的迁移效果，发现效果较差。为此，提出了一种基于图像自监督对比学习的ViT模型适配策略，并与传统有监督训练方法进行了对比。此外，通过消融实验研究了批量大小和数据规模对模型效果的影响。
AI.result: 新提出的ViT自监督对比学习适配策略，在心脏MR分类任务中，AUC突破0.75，显著优于常规监督学习。同时，该模型对BraTS和ADNI等外部MR数据集具有很强的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 自监督对比学习能有效提升ViT模型在心脏MR图像及其他医学影像中的表现，适配后的模型兼具优异的分类性能与良好的泛化能力，对医学影像分析具有实际应用价值。

title: Learning to Route Languages for Multilingual Policy Optimization
summary: Large language models~(LLMs) are trained on heterogeneous multilingual corpora, yet existing policy optimization methods often implicitly restrict each training question to a single response language or rely on a fixed dominant language for supervision. We propose language-routed policy optimization (LRPO), an online policy optimization framework that treats language as a selectable variable. LRPO elicits multilingual rollouts for each training question and integrates their relative quality into preference-based policy updates, increasing the diversity and informativeness of training signals under the fixed rollout budget. To adaptively determine which languages to explore during reinforcement learning, we introduce a trainable language router formulated as a multi-armed bandit, balancing exploration of underutilized languages with exploitation of more informative ones. Extensive experiments show that LRPO consistently improves multilingual performance, demonstrating that adaptive language routing enables effective cross-lingual knowledge exploitation for training. We release all the resources at https://github.com/Guochry/LRPO.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的多语言大模型训练方法LRPO，可以通过自适应选择多种语言作为优化信号，有效增强多语言模型性能。
AI.motivation: 目前大模型训练即使用多语种数据，但每次优化通常只用一种语言的回答，或者用某个主导语言进行监督，这限制了多语言能力提升。
AI.method: 作者提出LRPO方法，把"语言"作为可选择变量，每个问题生成多语种回答，并比较其质量用作优化信号。此外设计了可训练的语言路由器，以多臂赌博机方式自适应决定探索哪些语言，动态平衡不同语种间的探索与利用。
AI.result: 实验显示，LRPO能显著提高多语言任务表现，训练过程中能利用不同语言的知识提升整体效果。
AI.conclusion: 自适应多语言优化（LRPO）能更有效开发和利用多语种知识，提升语言模型的多语言能力，并为相关研究提供了新的方向。

title: Parameter-Efficient VLMs for Gastrointestinal Endoscopy: Medical Image Generation and Clinical Visual Question Answering
summary: The major limitations of gastrointestinal (GI) endoscopy AI systems arise from a shortage of annotated data, strict privacy policies, and significant bottlenecks in conventional model fine-tuning. Such limitations impede the successful application of sophisticated AI models in clinical practice, particularly affecting the reliability and scalability of diagnosis. In this paper, we present a dual-pipeline PEFT model that addresses two fundamental problems: medical Visual Question Answering (VQA) and the generation of privacy-preserving synthetic data. For clinical VQA, we adopt the Florence-2 vision-language model. Leveraging PEFT enhances model interpretability while substantially reducing the computational cost of training. Simultaneously, we employ Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) with Stable Diffusion 2.1 to generate high-quality GI images that enhance training databases without violating patient privacy. This research utilized the Kvasir-VQA dataset. Our Florence-2 VQA model achieved ROUGE-1 of 0.92, ROUGE-L of 0.91, and BLEU score improvements from 0.08 to 0.24. Fine-tuning on private datasets consistently showed better results than fine-tuning on public datasets. The rank-4 LoRA synthesis achieved optimal performance with a fidelity score of 0.290, an agreement score of 0.730, and a Frechet BiomedCLIP Distance (FBD) of 1450, reducing computational costs by almost 90 percent. This framework improves the clinical potential of AI in GI endoscopy. Compared to FLUX, MSDM, and Kandinsky 2.2, our model demonstrates superior FBD and strong semantic alignment. While other models lead in Fidelity or Agreement, our lower FBD indicates better image-text coherence. These results establish our approach as a robust solution for enhancing VQA and synthetic data generation in clinical AI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双流程PEFT模型，针对消化道内镜领域的视觉问答（VQA）和隐私保护合成数据生成两大难题，显著提升了VQA性能并降低了数据训练成本。
AI.motivation: 当前GI内镜AI系统面临注释数据缺乏、隐私限制及模型微调瓶颈，严重影响临床诊断AI的可靠性及可扩展性，因此急需创新方法提升模型性能与数据利用效率。
AI.method: 作者提出采用Florence-2视觉-语言模型加参数高效微调（PEFT）处理医疗VQA，同时结合LoRA方法与Stable Diffusion 2.1进行高质量、隐私保护的GI图片合成。针对VQA使用Kvasir-VQA数据集，评估模型表现；针对数据生成，通过FBD等指标比较与其他合成模型。
AI.result: Florence-2 VQA模型在ROUGE-1（0.92）、ROUGE-L（0.91）以及BLEU（从0.08到0.24）上均有较好表现；在私有数据上微调效果优于公有数据。Rank-4 LoRA图像合成在节省约90%计算成本的同时，达到较优的FBD（1450）、忠实度（0.290）和一致性（0.730）。整体上模型在FBD和语义一致性上优于FLUX、MSDM、Kandinsky 2.2等主流方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的双流程PEFT框架可有效提升内镜AI在临床中的应用潜力，在保障数据隐私的同时，提高视觉问答准确率及合成数据质量、效率，为医疗AI数据稀缺及模型适应性提供了有力支撑。

title: EfficientGraph-RAG: Structured Retrieval-State Management for Cross-Task Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) has become the standard way to ground large language models in external knowledge, but many systems still organize evidence as flat chunks and retrieve it through largely unstructured search. This weak structure becomes a bottleneck for complex retrieval: the system must decide where to search, how to move from coarse topics to entity-relation evidence, which evidence has been verified, and which intermediate artifacts can be reused. We define these intermediate variables as a retrieval state and study RAG as structured state management. EfficientGraph-RAG makes this state explicit through three coupled mechanisms: TAM defines a typed hierarchical state space over evidence, MARS updates and verifies the state through role-specialized agents, and SMP stores reusable state under hierarchy-aware access control. Using one shared framework configuration, EfficientGraph-RAG ranks first on the reported answer-quality metrics averaged over the three evaluated LongBench retrieval-style subsets, matches the strongest agentic baseline on HotpotQA EM while reducing large-model token usage by $3.51\times$, and provides a low-token DocVQA result among retrieval-organizing cross-modal methods. Component analysis shows role-specific mechanisms: MARS is the main answer-quality driver, TAM supplies the typed traversal state and Adaptive Routing signal, and SMP enables corpus-dependent reuse, with cross-query cache hit rates ranging from 3.77% to 23.18%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EfficientGraph-RAG，通过结构化检索状态显著提升了RAG系统的复杂检索效率和准确性，在多个benchmark上取得了优异成绩，并显著节省了大模型的token消耗。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG系统普遍将外部知识以扁平片段形式存储与检索，难以高效应对多跳或复杂证据整合场景。传统无结构的检索方案在证据筛选路径、变量管理与中间状态复用等方面存在瓶颈。为提升RAG检索复杂性与效率，有必要结构化管理检索状态。
AI.method: 提出EfficientGraph-RAG框架，将RAG视作结构化状态管理，主要包括三大机制：TAM用于定义有类型的层次化状态空间，MARS用具备不同角色的智能体更新和验证状态，SMP根据层级结构实现状态的复用和访问控制。三者相互配合，显式管理和复用检索中间状态。
AI.result: EfficientGraph-RAG在LongBench三个检索子集的答案质量指标上均排名第一，在HotpotQA上达到与最强agent式方法相当的准确率的同时，token消耗降低3.51倍，并在DocVQA检索方法中表现出低token消耗优势。各组件分析显示MARS主导答案质量提升，TAM赋能检索状态遍历与路由，SMP实现跨查询复用，cache命中率3.77%~23.18%。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构化管理RAG检索状态，EfficientGraph-RAG不仅显著提高了复杂检索场景下的效率与准确性，也有效节省了模型计算资源。多项指标验证该方法在实际场景的实用价值。

title: DUEL: Adversarial Self-Play for Multimodal Reasoning
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as an effective paradigm for improving the reasoning capability of vision-language models (VLMs). However, RL-based optimization typically depends on costly high-quality annotations that are difficult to scale. Existing unsupervised alternatives may drift toward biased solutions due to weak visual grounding and the lack of reliable verification signals. We propose a self-evolving post-training framework, DUEL, where supervision emerges from adversarial interactions between two policies initialized from the same pretrained VLM. A Challenger generates an image-grounded true claim together with a minimally perturbed hard-negative counterpart, while a Solver verifies both claims against the image, encouraging fine-grained visual discrimination under near-neighbor semantics. To stabilize optimization, we introduce a length-normalized log-likelihood reward that preserves informative optimization signals beyond binary outcome supervision and improves learning stability under sparse feedback. Experiments show that DUEL consistently improves visual reasoning and robust discrimination without additional human annotations, external reward models, or image editing tools.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种无需人工标签的自进化视觉-语言模型训练框架DUEL，通过两个策略的对抗交互来提升模型的视觉推理和区分能力。
AI.motivation: 用强化学习提升视觉-语言模型的推理能力往往需要大量高质量标注，代价高且难以扩展。无监督方法则易受偏见或缺乏有效监督信号影响。因此，设计一种可扩展且无需人工标注的训练方法很有必要。
AI.method: DUEL框架中，两个由同一个预训练VLM初始化的策略相互对抗。Challenger 生成一对真假主张（一条真实陈述和一条微调后的困难负例），Solver 针对图片验证这两条主张，以促进对细粒度视觉语义的识别；并提出长度归一化的对数似然奖励函数来增强优化信号的稳定性。
AI.result: 实验表明，DUEL在无需额外人工标注、外部奖励模型或图像编辑工具的情况下，能稳定提升模型的视觉推理能力和区分鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DUEL框架有效实现无监督下的视觉-语言推理和鲁棒性提升，具有良好的泛化能力和扩展性。

title: AuthTrace: Diagnosing Evidence Construction in Thematically Dense Single-Author Corpora
summary: Evidence construction systems--chunk retrieval, agent memory, knowledge-graph traversal, and thematic indexing--are evaluated on separate benchmarks with incompatible corpora and metrics, making cross-paradigm diagnosis impossible. We introduce AuthTrace, the first diagnostic benchmark that places all major paradigms on a single corpus and query set by exploiting the dual nature of single-author collections. Built on thematically dense corpora where all texts share style, topic, and vocabulary, AuthTrace provides 2,099 instances with exhaustive gold evidence and a fan-in gradient as the primary diagnostic axis. Comparing eight systems across two QA models, we find that (1) evidence recall--not precision--is the dominant predictor of answer quality (r = 0.96); (2) fan-in exposes paradigm-specific collapse patterns, with flat retrieval degrading 3x faster than structured-evidence systems; and (3) full-context prompting fails uniformly, establishing evidence construction as a necessary capacity beyond raw corpus exposure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AuthTrace，一个统一现有主流证据构建系统（如块检索、代理记忆、知识图谱遍历、主题索引）在同一语料库与问题集上的诊断基准，填补了以往各方法评测兼容性不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 目前证据构建系统各自为政，评测所用语料库、指标不统一，导致不同范式下方法无法有效横向比较和诊断。因此有必要创建一个统一的诊断基准来促进方法对比和进步。
AI.method: 作者提出了AuthTrace基准，利用单一作者作品集中主题高度密集、文本风格与词汇一致的特点，在统一的2,099个实例和金标准证据下，构建了不同系统（八种系统+两种问答模型）的横向对比框架，以fan-in梯度作为主要诊断维度。
AI.result: （1）证据召回率（而非精度）是答案质量的主要预测指标（r=0.96）；（2）fan-in诊断揭示了平面检索系统相比结构化证据系统性能下降速度快3倍等不同范式的崩溃模式；（3）全上下文提示方法全部失效，证据构建能力比单纯暴露语料库更为必要。
AI.conclusion: AuthTrace有效实现了不同证据构建方法的横向诊断比较，揭示了召回率和fan-in梯度对系统表现和鲁棒性的核心影响，并推动了对证据构建能力的深入关注。

title: HCL-FF: Hierarchical and Contrastive Learning for Forward-Forward Algorithm
summary: Deep neural networks trained with backpropagation have achieved outstanding performance in vision tasks but remain biologically implausible, computationally demanding, and difficult to interpret. The Forward-Forward (FF) algorithm offers a promising alternative by training each layer independently through local goodness objectives. However, its purely local optimization lacks hierarchical coordination across layers, and the decoupling of goodness from features leaves the representations unconstrained and semantically ambiguous. We propose a Hierarchical and Contrastive Learning FF framework (HCL-FF) to address these limitations. HCL-FF introduces (1) a coarse-to-fine hierarchical learning strategy that guides representations from low-level cues to high-level semantics, and (2) a supervised contrastive objective that enforces class-discriminative alignment after goodness decoupling. Experiments on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and Tiny-ImageNet demonstrate that HCL-FF achieves new state-of-the-art performance among FF-based methods, with notable accuracy gains of +5.46%, +17.00%, and +12.51%, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的Forward-Forward（FF）算法框架——HCL-FF，通过引入层次化及对比学习目标，改进了原有FF方法，仅局部优化导致的语义和层级协同不足问题，并在多个视觉任务数据集上取得显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 传统基于反向传播的深度神经网络在视觉任务上表现优异，但在生物可解释性、计算需求和可解释性方面存在局限。FF算法虽然更生物学合理、可高效并能独立训练各层，但其局部优化机制忽略了跨层次协同，且拆分后表示未受语义约束，难以解释。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种层次化与对比学习结合的FF框架（HCL-FF）：一方面通过“粗到细”的分级学习，实现特征从低级到高级的有序表征提升；另一方面引入有监督对比目标，在善恶分离后进一步强化类别判别性。
AI.result: 在 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 Tiny-ImageNet数据集上，HCL-FF框架分别比以往FF方法提高了5.46%、17.00%、12.51%的准确率，达到了当前FF方法中的最优表现。
AI.conclusion: 引入层次化与对比学习目标的HCL-FF，有效解决了传统FF方法局部最优带来的表征模糊和缺少层次协作问题，大幅提升视觉任务表现，为FF系列算法的发展提供了新途径。

title: GeoMathCode: Understanding Interleaved Math-Code Reasoning for Geometry Problem Solving
summary: Mathematical reasoning is a hallmark of human intelligence, requiring logical deduction, symbolic manipulation, and abstract thinking. Recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have demonstrated strong performance on geometry problems through multi-step reasoning. To better emulate human problem-solving, intermediate steps can incorporate auxiliary visual constructions, such as additional lines or points, which improve geometric interpretation and educational clarity. In this work, we introduce the GeoMathCode, where programmatic representations serve as intermediate visual outputs. We further conduct an in-depth analysis of the underlying reasoning geometry. Experimental results show that reasoning and code generation steps can be disentangled in the latent space, while supervised fine-tuning (SFT) makes the reasoning manifold more structured and informative. Moreover, hierarchical syntactic code structures emerge as disentangled latent subspaces, and contain more mathematical symbolic information than visual representations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了GeoMathCode，通过程序化中间视觉输出提升多模态大语言模型在几何推理任务上的表现，并揭示了推理与代码生成在潜空间的分离及结构化特点。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大模型在几何题推理上虽有进步，但缺乏可解释性与人类类比，特别是在中间视觉辅助及表征方面，因此需要新的方法提升几何推理的清晰度与教育价值。
AI.method: 提出GeoMathCode框架，用程序代码生成中间视觉输出，引入额外辅助线、点等几何构造，并分析推理和代码生成在潜空间中的关系。通过实验和潜空间可视化，研究结构化表现及信息含量。
AI.result: 实验发现推理与代码生成步骤在潜空间中可以清晰分离，经过监督微调后，推理流形更具结构性与信息性。代码的分层语法结构在潜空间中独立并比视觉表征包含更多数学符号信息。
AI.conclusion: GeoMathCode通过程序化的中间视觉表征提升了大模型几何推理的解释性和结构化，促进了对模型内部推理过程和表征方式的理解，对数学智能体研究有积极意义。

title: Divide-and-Conquer Inference for Large-Scale Visual Recognition with Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities across a wide range of vision language tasks. However, when applied to large scale image classification, their performance degrades significantly as the label space expands a phenomenon we define as Performance Collapse in Long Sequence Recognition. Through an information theoretic analysis, we reveal that this collapse stems from a fundamental conflict between the escalating information entropy and the prominent attention dilution and decay within attention mechanisms, which impairs the model's ability to maintain a sufficient signal-to-noise ratio when processing extremely long prompts. To mitigate this, we propose Divide-and-Conquer Inference (DCI), a novel test-time scaling strategy for visual recognition with MLLMs. DCI recursively decomposes complex global classification tasks into multiple simpler, localized subproblems and employs a dynamic pruning mechanism to compress the search space. This method effectively improves the local signal to noise ratio and model accuracy by mitigating the inherent weight dilution issues in long-sequence inference. Moreover, while traditional self-attention incurs a prohibitive quadratic computational complexity, DCI achieves more favorable scaling behavior and substantially accelerates inference in large scale classification scenarios. Extensive experiments on benchmarks such as ImageNet-1K and ImageNet-21K demonstrate that DCI consistently improves classification accuracy. This enables lightweight open-source models to rival or even surpass frontier closed-source giants without any additional training or fine-tuning. As a model-agnostic, plug-and-play paradigm, DCI offers an efficient approach for scaling the inferential precision of MLLMs in large-scale scenarios.

AI.tldr: 该论文分析并解决了多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在大规模图像分类任务中表现下降的问题，并提出了Divide-and-Conquer Inference（DCI）策略，有效提升了长标签序列下的分类精度和推理效率。
AI.motivation: 随着应用场景的扩大，MLLMs被用于大规模图像分类，但当类别数激增时，模型推理准确率会急剧下降，现有Attention机制难以胜任极长序列信息处理。论文旨在找出这一现象的根本原因并提出有效解决方案。
AI.method: 作者通过信息论视角分析了性能下降的原因，即注意力机制中信息熵上升与注意力稀释带来的信噪比降低。针对这一问题，提出了Divide-and-Conquer Inference（DCI）：在测试阶段将复杂的全局分类任务递归拆解为局部子问题，并动态剪枝减小搜索空间，提高本地信噪比，从而缓解长序列推理中的权重稀释，并提升推理效率。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K与ImageNet-21K等主流基准测试上，DCI策略显著提升了MLLMs在大规模分类中的准确率，并加速模型推理。无需重新训练即可显著提升轻量级开源模型性能，使其接近甚至超过性能领先的闭源模型。
AI.conclusion: DCI作为一种模型无关、开箱即用的推理范式，为MLLMs在大规模场景下实现高精度、低成本推理提供了新途径，具有较强的实际应用价值。

title: Proactive for Uncertainty: Cause-Aware Error Diagnosis and Interactive Clarification for Spoken Dialogue Systems
summary: Cascaded Automatic Speech Recognition -- Large Language Model (ASR-LLM) pipelines remain popular for industrial Spoken Dialogue Systems (SDS), primarily because their decoupled design ensures perceptual verifiability. However, cascaded systems suffer from error propagation, as transcription failures inevitably cascade to subsequent components, thereby degrading the final interaction quality. Although ASR confidence scores offer a simple filter for unreliable inputs, this approach is fundamentally limited because it typically fails to detect deletion errors or to distinguish between acoustic (inability to hear clearly) and linguistic (inability to understand) mismatches, both of which require targeted recovery strategies. In this paper, we propose a cause-aware error recovery paradigm that fundamentally rethinks robustness in SDS. Unlike traditional confidence filtering, we introduce a suite of small precision-focused detectors that exploit deep ASR latent representations to disentangle token-level errors into perception, comprehension, and deletion failures. This fine-grained diagnostic intelligence empowers the LLM to orchestrate targeted, multi-turn clarification strategies, effectively transforming ambiguous signals into seamless user interactions. Experimental results validate the precision of our approach, which more than doubles the recall on domain-shift errors (57.96% vs. 23.66%) compared to baselines. Crucially, this diagnostic precision yields up to a 30% reduction in WER and a 17% improvement on the downstream task across diverse accents, distortions, and domains.

AI.tldr: 提出了基于因果诊断的错误恢复机制，显著提升了语音对话系统的鲁棒性和下游任务表现。
AI.motivation: 传统级联式ASR-LLM系统因结构解耦保障可验证性，但容易因ASR转写错误导致错误传播，对下游交互造成严重影响。现有ASR置信度方法难以检测删除类错误，无法区分感知与理解失配，难以实现有针对性的恢复。
AI.method: 创新性地提出‘基于错误因果诊断的恢复机制’，利用小型、高精度检测器，基于ASR深层表征，将token级的错误细分为感知、理解及删除三类，赋能LLM制定针对性的多轮澄清和恢复策略。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，该方法在领域迁移下的错误召回率远超基线（57.96%对23.66%），并带来高达30%的词错误率（WER）下降和17%的下游任务性能提升，对不同口音、失真和多领域表现出强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 因果诊断驱动的错误检测和恢复机制能精准分离不同类型转写错误，并有效引导下游的澄清与交互流程，大幅提升了级联系统的整体表现和用户体验。

title: Fishbone: From One 3D Asset to a Million Controllable Edits
summary: Large-scale controllable 3D assets are critical for computer graphics, embodied AI, robotics, and interactive content creation, yet creating diverse 3D assets remains challenging due to the high cost of manual modeling and rigging. Shape deformation offers a natural way to generate variations from existing meshes, but existing data-driven methods often rely on sparse user inputs, while parametric editing frameworks require manually designed control structures and category-specific configurations. Inspired by natural creatures, where a central spine governs global shape and cross-sectional ribs control local variation, we introduce Fishbone, a unified rib-spine representation for general shapes that supports controllable parametric mesh deformation, reduced-space dynamics, and animation. Given an input mesh, Fishbone computes a geodesic scalar field with an adaptive heat method, extracts iso-contours as cross-sectional ribs, constructs a smooth geometry-aware spine through rib centers, and associates surface vertices with nearby rib and spine structures using Gaussian-weighted skinning. The resulting representation enables real-time and predictable deformation: ribs control local profiles such as thickness, orientation, and cross-sectional variation, while the spine controls global bending, twisting, and stretching. The same structure also supports reduced-space simulation and keyframe animation. We further construct Fishbone-136K by augmenting Hunyuan3D with rib-spine structures, and demonstrate applications in controllable 3D generation, deformation-based data augmentation for robot learning, interactive mesh editing, and agentic generation. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness, efficiency, and versatility of the proposed framework.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的Fishbone骨架结构方法，用于实现大规模、可控的3D资产生成和变形。通过仿生设计，在网格中自动提取脊骨和肋骨，提升3D网格的可编辑性、动画控制性和仿真能力，并通过Fishbone-136K数据集验证了其实用价值。
AI.motivation: 现有3D资产的建模和绑定成本极高，数据驱动的变形方法对用户输入高度依赖，参数化编辑框架则需繁琐的手工设计，限制了3D资产的可扩展性和灵活性。论文受自然界脊骨肋骨结构启发，旨在实现自动化、通用并易于控制的3D网格变形和生成机制。
AI.method: 方法以输入网格为基础，应用自适应热方法计算测地标量场，自动提取等高线作为肋骨，并根据肋骨中心拟合生成平滑、感知几何的脊骨。然后利用高斯加权蒙皮，将网格顶点与脊骨、肋骨进行关联，从而形成Fishbone统一结构，实现局部（肋骨）及全局（脊骨）形变可控。该结构还支持降维动态仿真、关键帧动画与交互编辑。
AI.result: Fishbone结构可支持实时、高度可预期的3D网格变形，提升操作便利性与动画表现力。作者还搭建了Fishbone-136K数据集，并在3D生成、机器人学习的数据增强、交互编辑和生成式智能体等任务中展示上述方法的优越性和多功能性。实验验证了该方法的高效性、精确性和通用性。
AI.conclusion: Fishbone为3D资产生成和操作提供了一种仿生、自动化、可控且通用的表示，兼顾变形、动画、仿真等需求，可大幅简化3D内容创作流程，并为机器人学习及智能体生成等应用开拓新可能。

title: LLM-as-a-Reviewer: Benchmarking Their Ability, Divergence, and Prompt Injection Resistance as Paper Reviewers
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used in academic peer review, yet their reliability, alignment with human judgment, and robustness to adversarial attacks remain poorly understood. We present a systematic benchmark of LLM-as-a-Reviewer on 898 papers stratified from NeurIPS and ICLR, evaluating 12 LLMs along three axes: rating calibration, divergence from human reviewers, and resistance to prompt injection embedded via an invisible font-mapping attack. We find that LLMs systematically overrate weaker submissions and diverge from humans in topical emphasis, under-flagging Clarity and over-flagging Reproducibility, while producing reviews two to three times longer with lower lexical diversity and a more standardized vocabulary. Prompt injection remains highly effective. Simple hidden instructions can promote low-scoring papers to acceptance-level ratings in a substantial fraction of cases, with effectiveness varying sharply across model families. While LLMs offer utility in structuring evaluations, their integration into peer review requires safeguards against both intrinsic biases and adversarial risks.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了12种大语言模型（LLM）作为学术论文审稿人的表现，发现其评分偏高、与人类意见存在偏差且易受攻击，警示其应用需防范风险。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型在学术审稿中的使用日益增多，其与人类判断的一致性、可靠性和对攻击的鲁棒性还未深入探索。作者旨在全面分析LLM在这三方面的表现和潜在风险。
AI.method: 作者从NeurIPS和ICLR挑选分层的898篇论文，设计基准测试，从评分校准、与人类审稿人分歧及对隐形字体指令注入攻击的抗性三个维度，评估12种LLM审稿能力及脆弱性。
AI.result: LLM普遍对弱稿评分偏高，在主题侧重点上与人类意见分歧（如对清晰度关注不足、对可复现性关注过多），审稿意见冗长且词汇多样性较低。针对隐形指令的注入攻击极其有效，可以让模型大幅提升低分论文评分。不同模型对攻击的敏感性差异显著。
AI.conclusion: LLM在帮助结构化评审中有一定价值，但存在内在偏差和易受攻击的风险。将其纳入学术审稿流程需配套防护措施控制偏差和对抗攻击。

title: CLIP-Guided SAM: Parameter-Efficient Semantic Conditioning for Promptable Segmentation
summary:
Promptable foundation models such as the Segment Anything Model (SAM) produce high-quality masks but remain semantically blind, relying on external prompts to specify categories. Existing vision-language approaches address this limitation by using external prompt coupling, where a vision-language model generates spatial prompts for SAM as a separate stage.
  We propose CLIP-Guided SAM, a parameter-efficient segmentation framework built on internal semantic conditioning. Instead of using semantic signals only to generate prompts, we inject CLIP-derived text, vision, and similarity features directly into SAM's image encoder through lightweight multi-modal semantic adapters. These adapters condition SAM's internal feature representations, allowing semantic information to influence mask prediction while preserving SAM's original promptable interface.
  Our framework is designed for low labeled-data settings and applies to both general-domain benchmarks and specialized downstream tasks. It supports two operating modes: Manual mode, for interactive segmentation with both text and spatial prompts, and Semi-Automatic text-only mode, for applications that require concept-specific segmentation using only textual input. We show that robustness depends on aligning training with the type of prompts used at inference, making train-test prompt consistency an important design principle.
  Through extensive experiments and ablations, we evaluate our method against SAM+PEFT baselines without semantic conditioning, vision-language + SAM pipelines, SAM 3, and strong semi-supervised segmentation methods that rely on large amounts of unlabeled data. Across these settings, CLIP-Guided SAM consistently achieves superior or competitive performance while remaining parameter-efficient in both training and deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CLIP-Guided SAM的新型高效分割框架，将语义特征直接注入SAM，提升了模型的语义感知能力，实现了更好的分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的基础分割模型如SAM虽能生成高质量分割掩码，但无法理解语义，必须依赖外部提示来指定类别。尽管一些视觉-语言结合方法尝试通过外部提示进行补充，仍然将语义引入作为独立阶段，且效率和集成度有限。因此，亟需一种能在内部直接进行语义建模的方法。
AI.method: 作者提出利用CLIP模型提取的文本、视觉和相似性特征，设计轻量级多模态适配器，将其直接注入SAM的图像编码器内部。通过这种方式，语义信息可以影响掩码预测，并保持SAM原有的可提示交互接口。框架支持手动双模态交互和仅文本半自动两种工作模式，适用于低标注数据环境，兼容通用和特定领域任务。
AI.result: 实验证明，该方法在对比无语义条件的SAM+PEFT基线、视觉-语言+SAM管线、SAM 3以及同类半监督分割方法下，取得了一致的优越或有竞争力的表现，并在参数效率上具备优势。
AI.conclusion: CLIP-Guided SAM实现了参数高效的高性能分割，在低标注和多种场景下表现出色。研究还强调了训练与推理阶段提示方式的一致性对于模型稳健性的重要性。

title: SomaliBench Eval: Measuring English-to-Somali Refusal Gaps in Open-Weight Language Models
summary: Large language model safety evaluation remains heavily English-centered, leaving low-resource languages under-measured even when models are deployed globally. We evaluate four open-weight instruction-tuned models on SomaliBench v0, a native-author-verified benchmark of 100 harmful-intent prompts paired across English and Somali. Each of Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, Gemma-2-9B-Instruct, Qwen-2.5-7B-Instruct, and Aya-23-8B is run locally with temperature 0 and the same English "helpful, harmless, and honest" (HHH) system prompt. A pinned Claude Sonnet snapshot (claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929) classifies each response as refused, complied, or unclear; the native author spot-checks a stratified 80-row sample. We find large English-to-Somali refusal gaps for all four models: Llama-3.1-8B (0.90; 95% bootstrap CI [0.85, 0.96]), Aya-23-8B (0.75 [0.67, 0.83]), Qwen-2.5-7B (0.69 [0.59, 0.78]), and Gemma-2-9B (0.38 [0.27, 0.49]). For three models, the dominant Somali non-refusal mode is not fluent harmful compliance but unclear output: empty, wrong-language, or incoherent generations. The native verification spot-check achieves 100% agreement with the judge (Cohen's kappa = 1.00) on the 80 sampled rows. We report aggregate refusal rates, category gaps, and reliability statistics only; raw model generations are retained locally and are not released.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了大语言模型在低资源语言下的安全性表现，发现拒绝率在英语和索马里语之间存在较大差异。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型的安全性评估主要集中在英语等高资源语言，全球部署时对低资源语言（如索马里语）的有害内容识别能力缺乏了解。因此需要衡量现有主流模型在低资源语言下的表现差距。
AI.method: 作者基于SomaliBench v0基准（含英语-索马里语100对有害意图提示），分别对四个主流大模型设定相同安全提示词，使用温度为0的本地推理输出。采用Claude Sonnet作为自动判别器，将生成内容标记为拒绝、接受或不清楚。人工进行分层抽样抽查，验证自动标注的准确性。
AI.result: 四个模型在英语与索马里语的有害内容拒绝率差异明显：Llama-3.1-8B (0.90), Aya-23-8B (0.75), Qwen-2.5-7B (0.69), Gemma-2-9B (0.38)。大多数情况下，索马里语不是“流畅的有害同意”，而是生成空白、错误语言或语无伦次等“输出不明”。人工抽查与系统判别一致率达100%。
AI.conclusion: 主流大语言模型在低资源语言（如索马里语）场景下安全性较高资源语言不足，体系化评测能揭示此类不足。建议未来模型应加强低资源语言的有害内容抵御机制和测试。

title: AOEPT: Breaking the Implicit Modality-Reduction Bottleneck in Modality-Missing Prompt Tuning
comment: 20 pages, Accepted by ICML 2026, Code is available from https://github.com/Jian-Lang/AOEPT
summary: Deploying multimodal systems in real-world environments often entails handling modality-missing scenarios, where one or more modalities are unavailable. While recent studies address this challenge for the general Multimodal Transformer (MT) architecture via prompt tuning, we identify a fundamental limitation in these methods: the Implicit Modality-Reduction bottleneck. By conditioning prompts solely on the observed modalities, they inadvertently restrict the reasoning scope of MTs to the modality-reduced subspace, cutting off access to the latent information sources of the missing modalities. To overcome this limitation, we propose AOEPT, which pioneers a novel modal-contextualized prompting fashion. Specifically, we introduce lightweight Modal-Contextualized Prompts (MCPs) that distill global modality-wise priors from training data, serving as latent repositories of the information sources for missing modalities. Conditioned on the remaining modalities, these MCPs are instantiated into instance-aware prompts that selectively augment missing-modality information for each sample, thereby restoring the reasoning scope of MTs beyond the observed-modality-only subspace. Experiments across various multimodal benchmarks and backbones confirm the strong performance of AOEPT, with minimal computational overhead.

AI.tldr: 本文解决多模态系统在现实环境中遇到的模态缺失问题，提出一种创新的模态上下文化提示方法（AOEPT），能充分利用缺失模态的潜在信息，提高推理效果。
AI.motivation: 多模态系统部署到实际应用时，常常会遇到部分模态信息缺失的情况。现有方法通过调整提示（prompt）应对，但这些方法只考虑观测到的模态，导致模型无法利用缺失模态的潜在信息。
AI.method: 作者提出AOEPT方法，通过模态上下文化的提示（MCPs）注入，MCPs由全局模态先验信息蒸馏而成，能关联清楚各模态之间的潜在连接。针对具体样本，模型根据现有模态生成个性化提示，从而补充缺失模态的信息。
AI.result: 在多个多模态数据集与模型骨干上实验，AOEPT展现出优良性能，并且几乎不增加计算开销。
AI.conclusion: AOEPT有效突破了传统多模态模型在模态缺失场景下的信息瓶颈问题，可高效恢复和增强模型对缺失信息的推理能力。

title: HyLaT: Efficient Multi-Agent Communication via Hybrid Latent-Text Protocol
summary: Communication protocol design is a central challenge in large language model-based multi-agent systems. Existing single-channel approaches face an inherent communication trilemma: text-based methods are interpretable but verbose, while latent-space methods are efficient but opaque and limited to unidirectional workflows. Inspired by multi-channel communication theory, we propose HyLaT, a hybrid latent-text communication protocol that transmits elaborate cognitive signals through a latent channel for efficiency, while expressing concise critical signals in natural language to preserve interpretability and precision. We introduce a two-stage training framework combining single-agent hybrid generation learning and multi-agent interactive co-training, enabling agents to generate and interpret hybrid messages across multiple rounds of interaction. Experiments demonstrate that HyLaT reduces communication overhead significantly while maintaining competitive task performance, with strong generalization and robustness across diverse settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型混合通信协议HyLaT，结合潜在信号高效传输和自然语言可解释表达，显著降低多智能体系统通信负担并保持任务性能。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型多智能体通信协议设计面临困境：纯文本可解释但冗长，潜在空间高效却不透明且局限于单向。缺乏兼具效率、可解释性和互操作性的方案。
AI.method: 受多通道通信理论启发，作者提出HyLaT：在潜在通道高效传递复杂认知信号，关键内容用自然语言简明表达，并设计了包括单智能体混合生成学习和多智能体交互协同训练的两阶段训练框架。
AI.result: 实验表明HyLaT在多种场景下大幅减少通信开销，同时保持或提升任务性能，具备良好的泛化性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: HyLaT有效突破通信三难困境，为多智能体系统提供了高效又可解释的通信新范式。

title: Multiscale Real-Time Object Detection in the NMS-Free Era: A Comparative Performance Evaluation of YOLOv8 and YOLO26
summary: Non-Maximum Suppression (NMS) remains a key post-processing step in many real-time object detection pipelines, but it can introduce latency variation and deployment complexity in resource-constrained settings. Recent NMS-free designs such as YOLO26 aim to reduce this dependence through end-to-end detection, yet their performance relative to established NMS-based models such as YOLOv8 remains underexplored beyond standard benchmarks. This paper compares YOLOv8 and YOLO26 on Pascal VOC and VisDrone, representing general object detection and dense aerial small-object detection, respectively. Both model families are evaluated across five scales using accuracy, localization, model size, GFLOPs, and CPU/GPU latency. Results show that YOLO26 achieves stronger detection performance and lower model complexity on Pascal VOC across most scales, while the performance gap narrows on VisDrone, where both models struggle with dense small targets. YOLOv8 remains competitive in GPU latency, showing that NMS-free design does not guarantee universal deployment superiority. Overall, the study shows that detector selection depends on dataset characteristics, object scale, model capacity, and hardware constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了无NMS的YOLO26与传统NMS基础的YOLOv8在Pascal VOC与VisDrone数据集上的表现，探讨了各自的优缺点及适用场景。
AI.motivation: 由于NMS步骤可能带来推理延迟和部署复杂度，许多实时目标检测工作期望绕开NMS实现端到端检测。随着新型NMS-free模型的出现，如何科学评价其与传统NMS模型（如YOLOv8）在不同任务下的性能差异成为研究动机。
AI.method: 作者采用YOLOv8和YOLO26两种模型，分别在Pascal VOC（常规目标检测）和VisDrone（密集小目标航拍检测）数据集上进行对比，衡量指标包括检测精度、定位能力、模型大小、GFLOPs及CPU/GPU推理延迟，并覆盖模型的五种规模。
AI.result: 在Pascal VOC上，YOLO26在大多数规模下表现出更优的检测性能和更低的模型复杂度；在VisDrone上，两者在处理密集小目标时均存在困难，性能差距缩小。YOLOv8在GPU延迟方面依然有竞争力，说明NMS-free设计未必在所有部署场景下占优。
AI.conclusion: 模型的选择应根据数据集特征、目标尺寸、模型容量及硬件约束综合权衡，NMS-free设计并非适用于所有情况。

title: A Multi-Agent LLM Framework for Rating the Quality of Surgical Feedback
summary: Verbal feedback delivered by attending surgeons in the operating room plays a critical formative role in resident trainee skill acquisition. Yet, assessing the quality of trainer feedback and its effectiveness in influencing trainee behavior during live surgery remains a challenge. Prior studies assessed feedback content relying on extensive manual annotation by expert human raters and focused on developing broad taxonomies that overlook the qualitative aspects of feedback delivery such as clarity or urgency. Limited existing automated methods, including keyword analysis and topic modeling, also fail to capture these nuanced aspects. We introduce a two-stage LLM-based framework that discovers interpretable feedback quality criteria grounded in the context of surgical training. Our method uses multi-agent prompting and surgical domain knowledge injection to discover a small set of human interpretable scoring criteria (e.g., Encouraging, Urgent, Clear). These criteria are then used to automatically score live surgical feedback via an LLM-as-a-judge approach. Evaluation on 4.2k trainer feedback instances demonstrates that our AI-discovered criteria outperform prior content-based frameworks in predicting feedback effectiveness, including observed trainee behavioral adjustments and trainer approval. This work advances scalable, human-aligned assessment of communication quality in the operating room and provides a foundation for improving surgical teaching practices.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的双阶段反馈质量评估框架，有效提升了外科手术实景教学中的语音反馈质量分析与预测效果。
AI.motivation: 目前外科手术教学中，导师对学员的语言反馈对技能提升非常关键，但如何有效量化和评估这些反馈的质量以及它们对学员行为的实际影响依然困难。此外，现有方法多依靠费时的人工注释，且通常忽略了反馈的表达清晰度、紧急性等定性维度，现有自动化技术（如关键词分析、主题建模）也难以捕捉这些细节。
AI.method: 作者提出采用两阶段基于LLM的分析框架。首先结合多智能体提示（multi-agent prompting）与手术领域知识，自动发现符合实际的、可解释的反馈质量评价标准（如：鼓励性、紧迫性、清晰度）。然后，在这些标准指导下用LLM对实际手术过程中的语音反馈打分，从而自动化评价反馈质量。
AI.result: 在4200条手术导师反馈样本上的评测显示，所提出的AI发现的评价标准在预测反馈有效性（包括学员实际行为调整和导师认可）方面，优于现有基于内容的框架。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为手术室内师生沟通质量实现了可扩展、对齐人类判断的新型自动化评估手段，也为改进手术教学实践提供了坚实基础。

title: Adversarial Error Correction for Visual Autoregressive Generation
summary: Visual Autoregressive (VAR) models have emerged as a powerful paradigm for image synthesis by performing hierarchical next-scale prediction. However, VAR models are inherently prone to cascading error propagation, where subtle coarse-scale mispredictions are amplified across the hierarchy, ultimately distorting the final synthesis. To mitigate this, we propose AID-VAR, a plug-and-play framework that enhances pre-trained VARs through Adversarially Injected Diagnosis. Instead of a standard passive generation, AID-VAR introduces a proactive error-correction mechanism inspired by the adversarial feedback in GANs. We deploy a discriminator to diagnose fidelity gaps at each scale transition, coupled with a lightweight guidance injector. This module operates as a non-invasive adapter that refines the feature manifold of a frozen VAR backbone, effectively steering the generation toward the distribution of real images without destabilizing the pre-trained latent space. Furthermore, to rigorously evaluate this cross-scale progression, we introduce the Inter-Scale Consistency Score (ISCS), a novel metric that quantifies the fidelity and structural alignment between consecutive resolution scales. Experimental results across various backbones demonstrate that AID-VAR delivers sharper textural details and fewer structural distortions with negligible overhead. For instance, AID-VAR-d20 achieves a 16% improvement in FID with only a 3% increase in parameters. These results establish AID-VAR as a highly efficient and scalable pathway for upgrading large-scale VAR generators, enhancing global coherence and local detail without altering training data, base architectures, or sampling schedules. Code is available at https://github.com/bijiw515/AID-VAR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种AID-VAR框架，通过引入对抗式诊断机制，有效提高VAR图像生成模型质量，同时带来更细致纹理和更好的结构一致性，且参数增加极小。
AI.motivation: VAR模型因其分层预测特性在图像生成领域表现出色，但变量错位会沿层级逐步放大，导致合成效果失真。当前缺乏有效手段应对这一层级间误差积累。
AI.method: AID-VAR在预训练VAR模型基础上，融合了类似GAN的对抗式反馈：在每个分辨率过渡阶段用鉴别器诊断模型与真实图像分布的偏差，再用轻量级引导模块对冻结主干进行特征修正。新引入的ISCS指标用于评价多层级间的一致性和保真度。
AI.result: 多种VAR主干实验证明AID-VAR能显著提升图像细节和结构一致性。例如AID-VAR-d20 FID提升16%，参数仅增加3%。
AI.conclusion: AID-VAR为大规模VAR生成模型提供高效、可扩展的升级路径，无需更改数据、主干或采样流程，显著增强全局与局部表现。

title: Harmony in Diversity: Multi-domain Contrastive Policy Optimization for Large Reasoning Models
summary: Post-training has significantly enhanced the reasoning capability of Large Reasoning Models (LRMs), especially with Reinforcement Learning (RL) like Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). However, GRPO-style RL methods in multi-domain settings often fail to achieve consistent improvements across all domains due to inherent interference in policy optimization. Prior studies on multi-domain RL primarily focus on alleviating cross-domain interference, while often neglecting the pivotal role of knowledge sharing, which we argue is the key to transforming cross-domain interactions from harmful competition into beneficial transfer. To address this limitation, we propose Multi-domain Contrastive Policy Optimization (MCPO), which analyzes the structural relationships among rollouts and promotes cross-domain knowledge sharing and in-domain knowledge consolidation in a contrastive manner. Specifically, for a given prompt, MCPO identifies transferable reasoning trajectories from other domains as positive examples, while treating incorrect rollouts as negative ones. It then encourages consistent representations for positive pairs and pushes negative pairs apart, thereby facilitating knowledge transfer and reducing interference. Moreover, MCPO aligns intra-domain correct rollouts to build a consolidated representation space. In this way, MCPO contrastively learns a harmonious representation space that can accommodate diverse multi-domain knowledge. Empirical results show that MCPO improves the reasoning capabilities of LRMs across multiple domains and even outperforms single-domain training in some cases. Code is available at https://github.com/Maricalce/MCPO.

AI.tldr: 论文提出一种多领域对比式策略优化（MCPO）方法，有效提升大规模推理模型（LRMs）在多领域任务中的推理能力，优于现有多领域RL方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于GRPO的多领域强化学习（RL）在推理模型训练中，因领域间策略优化干扰，难以在所有领域取得一致提升。此前更多关注如何减少这种干扰，较少挖掘跨领域知识共享的潜力。
AI.method: MCPO通过分析不同领域推理轨迹（rollouts）的结构关系，将其他领域可迁移的正确推理轨迹作为正样本、不正确推理轨迹为负样本，利用对比学习促使正样本表现一致，并区分负样本。同时，MCPO还对齐同一领域内的正确推理轨迹，打造统一的表示空间，从而兼容多样化的多领域知识。
AI.result: MCPO在多领域上提升了LRMs的推理能力，并在部分情况下超过单领域训练方法。实验证明其优越性，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: MCPO有效缓解了多领域RL训练中的干扰问题，实现了跨领域知识有益迁移及领域内知识巩固，拓展了多领域推理模型训练的新思路。

title: Trajectory-Consistent Calibration for Cache-Accelerated Diffusion Models
comment: 23 pages, 8 figures, 8 tables. Code is available at https://github.com/NJUDeepEngine/TCC
summary: Diffusion Transformers require repeated denoiser evaluations during iterative sampling, making inference computationally expensive. Cache-based acceleration reduces this cost by reusing intermediate representations across denoising steps, but can introduce representation deviations and degrade generation quality. In this paper, we analyze these deviations and show that effective calibration should consider both the direct mismatch caused by reuse and the subsequent trajectory shift induced by earlier corrections. To address this challenge, we propose Trajectory-Consistent Calibration (TCC), a training-free method that calibrates cached representations toward their full-computation counterparts. Specifically, rather than estimating all calibration priors from a single uncorrected cache trajectory, TCC uses an offline iterative procedure so that each prior accounts for the trajectory shift induced by preceding calibrations. Experiments on PixArt-alpha and DiT-XL/2 show that TCC consistently improves FID across representative cache-based acceleration methods while preserving their underlying reuse policies. Notably, in a representative PixArt-alpha cache-acceleration setting based on FORA, TCC reduces FID from 29.83 to 27.35, slightly surpassing the full-computation baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的校准方法（TCC），能够提升缓存加速的扩散Transformer在推理时的生成质量。
AI.motivation: 扩散Transformer因反复多次噪声去除（denoiser）导致推理计算量大，缓存加速虽然有效降低了计算，但带来了表征偏差，降低生成质量。需要有方法化解因缓存复用带来的偏差。
AI.method: 作者分析了缓存加速带来的偏差，发现应兼顾直接偏差和因补偿校正导致的轨迹变化。提出无训练的新方法TCC：通过离线迭代校准，每次校准都考虑已产生的轨迹偏移，使校准更加准确还原完整计算下的表现。
AI.result: 在PixArt-alpha和DiT-XL/2等模型、多个缓存加速方法下，TCC稳定提升了FID分数。在PixArt-alpha的FORA缓存加速场景下，TCC将FID由29.83降至27.35，甚至略优于全计算基线。
AI.conclusion: TCC方法能在不改变缓存加速策略的前提下，有效提升扩散Transformer的生成质量，为缓存加速带来的偏差提供了高效校正方案。

title: GeoSVG-RL: Geometry-Aware Reinforcement Learning for Layout-Constrained Text-to-SVG Diagram Generation
summary: Generating structured, editable diagrams remains a significant challenge for contemporary large language models, despite their proficiency in general-purpose vector code generation. The primary difficulty lies in the structural fragility of the output; minor errors such as misaligned connector endpoints, text labels overlapping borders, or complex layouts drifting beyond the canvas boundaries render the resulting SVG files functionally unusable for professional applications. To address these issues, we introduce GeoSVG-RL, a specialized reinforcement learning framework designed for layout-constrained text-to-SVG generation. Unlike standard training objectives that rely solely on maximizing token-level likelihood, our approach optimizes the policy against explicit, executable geometric feedback. The model first produces a structured layout plan that serves as a geometric contract for the subsequent generation of the SVG code. This code is then rendered through a browser-backed verifier, enabling the calculation of fine-grained rewards across six critical dimensions: rendering validity, canvas fitting, precise anchor placement, text containment, graph consistency, and code cleanliness. We utilize Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to refine the model, sampling multiple candidates per prompt to facilitate updates based on relative quality. Starting from a supervised warm-start phase on synthetic data, GeoSVG-RL achieves substantial gains in structural reliability, particularly in arrow-anchor accuracy and text-in-box rates. Quantitative evaluations demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms current state-of-the-art systems in local geometric precision and the preservation of graph connectivity, providing a robust pathway toward automated yet reliable technical illustration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了GeoSVG-RL，一种专门用于受布局约束的文本到SVG生成的强化学习框架，显著提升了自动生成技术图示的结构可靠性。
AI.motivation: 当代大语言模型虽然擅长生成向量代码，但在生成结构化、可编辑的专业图示时常出现布局或细节失误（如锚点偏离、标签重叠、元素越界等），导致SVG图形无法满足实际应用需求。该工作旨在解决这些结构脆弱性问题。
AI.method: GeoSVG-RL采用强化学习优化SVG生成过程。模型首先生成结构布局作为几何约束，然后输出SVG代码，由浏览器渲染器验证并在六个维度（渲染有效性、画布适配、锚点精度、文本包容性、图结构一致性、代码整洁度）给予奖励。通过Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）方式，用多样性采样和相对质量更新模型参数，结合有监督预训练提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: GeoSVG-RL在箭头锚点准确率、文本框包含率等结构可靠性指标上取得大幅度提升，在局部几何精度和图结构连通性上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: GeoSVG-RL提供了一种值得信赖的自动化SVG图示生成方案，大幅减少结构错误，为高质量技术插图自动化创造了坚实基础。

title: QuoVLA: Quotient Space for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models commonly adapt pretrained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to robot control by mapping visual observations and language instructions to continuous actions. Existing approaches typically take an action-insufficiency view, assuming that pretrained VLM latents either lack directly usable action information or should be shielded from action-learning signals. Against this view, our \textit{Quotient Theory for VLA} shows that pretrained VLM latents are not action-insufficient but action-sufficient: they already contain the information needed for control, yet remain overcomplete by distinguishing prompt-level variations that induce the same optimal action behavior. To operationalize this theory, we propose QuoVLA, a quotient-space framework for VLA that compresses pretrained VLM latents into action-sufficient representations. Specifically, QuoVLA instantiates this principle with a quantization module and a dual-branch design with relative temporal-complexity regularization, preserving action-relevant information while removing prompt-level redundancy. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that QuoVLA achieves strong performance, with particularly notable improvements in generalization under visual, linguistic, and environmental distribution shifts. Our code will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 提出Quotient Theory for VLA，认为预训练视觉-语言模型（VLM）的特征对于机器人动作决策来说信息是足够的，并非缺乏。基于此，提出QuoVLA方法对VLM特征进行压缩，去除冗余，实验证明在多种基准上具有优异表现，尤其在泛化能力方面提升明显。
AI.motivation: 目前VLM用于机器人控制任务时，普遍认为VLM的特征对动作决策是不足够的，或应避免融合动作学习信号。作者质疑这种看法，提出应重新分析VLM特征与动作决策的信息关系。
AI.method: 提出Quotient Theory for VLA，理论上论证VLM特征是动作充足而非动作不足。基于此，设计QuoVLA方法：通过量化模块和双分支结构，结合时序复杂性正则化，将VLM特征压缩成只保留和动作相关的部分，去除与prompt相关但不影响动作的冗余信息。
AI.result: 在多个视觉、语言、环境分布变化的基准下，QuoVLA方法显示出优异的性能，显著提升了模型的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: VLM的预训练特征本身包含足够的动作信息，通过合理的特征压缩与冗余去除，可以大幅提升机器人控制中的泛化能力。QuoVLA为VLA领域提供了一条高效利用VLM特征的新途径。

title: A Lightweight Hybrid Transformer-CRF Architecture for Multi-Type Bangla Medical Entity Recognition
summary: MedER refers to the identification of medical entities. It is crucial for extracting structured clinical information from unstructured medical text. Many existing systems rely on transformer-based models, which are computationally expensive and difficult to deploy in resource-constrained environments. Furthermore, earlier works often use relaxed evaluation metrics that artificially inflate performance by rewarding correct prediction of dominant "Outside" (O) tokens. In this paper, we propose a lightweight Medical Entity Recognition (MedER) framework for the Bangla language. We establish a rigorous baseline using a 12-layer BanglaBERT model combined with a Conditional Random Field (CRF) layer for exact-boundary entity detection. To address deployment constraints, we compress this teacher model into a 4-layer student network through Knowledge Distillation (KD), where the student learns from the teacher's pre-CRF soft emission logits. Finally, we apply INT8 dynamic quantization to further reduce model size and inference cost. Our final quantized student achieves an 8.6x CPU speedup while requiring nearly 48 percent less storage than the CRF teacher model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于孟加拉语医学实体识别（MedER）的轻量级框架，通过知识蒸馏和量化实现高效部署，显著提升速度和减少存储需求。
AI.motivation: 现有医学实体识别系统多借助基于 Transformer 的大型模型，计算开销大，难以在资源受限环境中部署。同时，之前的评测方法对模型效果有夸大，未能真实反映实际性能。
AI.method: 采用12层BanglaBERT+CRF作为基线教师模型进行严格实体识别。通过知识蒸馏将教师模型的知识压缩到4层学生模型，使学生模型学习教师模型的soft emission logits。之后对学生模型进行INT8动态量化，进一步减小模型体积和提升推理速度。
AI.result: 最终量化后的学生模型在CPU上推理速度提升8.6倍，存储需求比CRF教师模型减少近48%。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的轻量级框架，不仅实现了对孟加拉语医学实体的精确识别，还大幅提升了模型在受限环境下的部署效率，具有良好的实用性和推广价值。

title: X-Foresight: A Joint Vision-Action Causal Forecasting Network via Predictive World Modeling
summary:
Physical world knowledge resides mainly in videos. Equipping Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models with such knowledge is fundamental for safe and generalizable planning. Predictive world modeling enables VLA to internalize physical dynamics and long-term causality by predicting future video from past observations. However, naive next-frame prediction faces two challenges: 1) unlike semantically distinct text tokens, video tokens are low-entropy and redundant, causing prediction to degenerate into trivial extrapolation. 2) world modeling poses a temporal dilemma: dense prediction captures instantaneous dynamics, but cannot efficiently model long-horizon causality.
  To learn world knowledge effectively, we introduce X-Foresight, a predictive world model integrated directly into the VLA architecture to jointly learn world modeling and real-time action control. At its core lies a long-horizon chunk-wise auto-regressive strategy that addresses both challenges: by predicting semantically distant chunks rather than adjacent frames, it escapes trivial extrapolation, while preserving dense intra-chunk frames for instantaneous dynamics and sparse inter-chunk transitions for long-term causality. A curriculum learning schedule progressively extends prediction horizons and stabilizes long-horizon training. To capture long-term causality effectively, we present temporal importance sampling, which concentrates supervision on safety-critical chunks identified by ego-motion and behavioral signals. We further delegate photorealistic synthesis to a diffusion-based multi-view renderer, improving photorealistic appearance.
  Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that X-Foresight significantly outperforms VLA baselines in planning performance while maintaining strong generative fidelity, establishing a robust paradigm for world-knowledge-driven autonomous systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的世界建模方法X-Foresight，将预测性世界模型直接集成到视觉-语言-动作（VLA）架构中，提升模型对物理世界规律的理解和自动驾驶规划能力。
AI.motivation: 物理世界知识大多存在于视频中，而现有VLA模型难以有效吸收物理动态与因果知识。传统的逐帧预测因视频的低熵和冗余，很容易陷入无意义的简单外推，且难以同时捕捉瞬时动态和长期因果关系，因此亟需更有效的世界建模方法。
AI.method: X-Foresight采用块状自回归预测策略，预测语义距离较远的视频块而非相邻帧，从而避免简单外推。同时，块内密集帧保留瞬时动态信息，块间稀疏过渡捕捉长期因果。通过课程学习逐步加长预测时域，配合基于自运动和行为信号的时间重要性采样，聚焦关键片段。此外，采用多视角扩散渲染器生成高保真画面。
AI.result: 大量实验证实，X-Foresight在自动规划任务中的表现显著优于基线VLA模型，同时保持了优异的生成逼真度。
AI.conclusion: X-Foresight为基于世界知识的自主系统提供了强大范式，通过高效融合世界建模与动作控制，实现了更安全、泛化性更强的规划能力，对未来VLA发展具有重要意义。

title: TypedCSIP: Typed Counterfactual Pretraining for Chinese Legislative Conflict Classification
summary:
TypedCSIP is a typed counterfactual pretraining method for the conflict-classification task of the LCR-CN benchmark (Zhao et al.,
  2026): given a (superior, subordinate) provision pair, predict whether the pair conflicts and which of four legal-doctrine types
  (Responsibility, Condition, Sanction, Definition) describes the inconsistency. We exploit LCR-CN's expert-written minimal revisions
  as training-time counterfactual supervision; at test time the classifier reads only the original pair.
  Stage 1 pretrains a shared encoder with a typed Counterfactual Selective Intervention Pretraining objective on (superior,
