AI.motivation: 尽管原生多模态架构具有巨大潜力，但该领域的架构设计空间尚未明确，有必要规范相关定义并整理已有工作，推动多模态向世界建模迈进。
AI.method: 作者正式定义了“原生度”概念，区分了中期融合（mid-fusion）、早期融合（early-fusion）与非原生范式；并从输入输出角度，将原生模型分为三类：1）多模到文本（Multi-to-Text），2）多模到目标（Multi-to-Target），3）多模到多模（Multi-to-Multi）。此外，论文对工业级的核心流程——架构协作、大规模数据处理、训练、推理与部署和评测等——进行了系统梳理。
AI.result: 作者提出了规范的原生多模态架构定义，并系统总结了现有相关模型，明确了NMM未来的发展难点及方向，并提出了一套工业级迁移和实践框架。
AI.conclusion: 本论文为NMM领域提供了结构性、规范性的范式和路线图，有助于行业和学术界统一认知并高效推动多模态世界建模的发展。

title: AI-Assisted Systematization for Evaluating GenAI Systems
summary: Evaluating generative AI (GenAI) systems is challenging because many targets of evaluation are broad, contested concepts, such as "reasoning," "fairness," or "creativity." When these concepts are left underspecified, it becomes unclear what should be measured or how evaluation results should be interpreted. This problem reflects a missing step: systematization, that is, moving from a broad background concept to an explicit, structured account of the concept in measurable terms. To help address the fact that systematization is cognitively demanding and resource-intensive, we investigate whether AI assistance can support this process. To enable AI-assisted systematization and assess its quality, we introduce a structured representation of a systematized concept, a concept spec, and a validation worksheet. We then develop two AI-assisted systematizers: a direct, zero-shot approach and a multi-agent approach that more closely mirrors manual systematization approaches from existing literature. We use these systematizers to produce concept specs for two concepts -- hate-based rhetoric and digital empathy -- and evaluate resulting concept specs on content validity and information recoverability.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了如何通过AI辅助系统化，提高对生成式AI系统中广泛、抽象评估目标（如推理、公平、创造力）的可测量性。提出了“概念说明书”和验证工具，并开发了两种AI辅助系统化方法，对“仇恨言论”和“数字同理心”进行了案例研究。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI系统的评估常依赖于宽泛和争议性的概念，若这些概念定义不明，将导致评估难以进行和结果难以解释。系统化这些概念虽重要，但过程复杂且消耗大量认知与资源，因此需要新的辅助工具。
AI.method: 作者引入“概念说明书”及验证表格，从宽泛概念到结构化、可测量的定义。开发了两种AI辅助系统化工具：一种直接零样本推断实现，另一种多智能体协作，更贴合人工系统化做法。以“仇恨言论”和“数字同理心”为例，比较不同方法的结果，并基于内容效度、信息可恢复性进行评估。
AI.result: 通过AI辅助方法，可以较高效地系统化抽象评估目标，并获得结构化可测量的定义。对两种目标概念的系统化结果采用内容效度和信息可恢复性指标进行分析，证明了AI辅助方法的可靠性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: AI系统可以有效辅助抽象概念的系统化过程，提升对生成式AI系统评估目标的明确定义与可操作性。提出的方法有助于评估工作的标准化和效率提升。

title: ERNIE-Image Technical Report
summary: We introduce ERNIE-Image, an open-source text-to-image generation model built upon an 8B single-stream DiT architecture. ERNIE-Image aims to bridge the gap between current open-source models and leading closed-source systems through more effective mining of large-scale pre-training data and improved supervision quality throughout training. During pre-training, we adopt a bottom-up data construction pipeline that combines fine-grained image categorization, rich caption annotation, aesthetic assessment, and hierarchical sampling. This strategy reduces data noise while preserving long-tail concepts and detailed real-world knowledge, providing a stronger foundation for complex generation tasks. In the post-training stage, we use a top-down data construction pipeline for high-demand scenarios, diversify prompt annotations to better match real user inputs, and apply a stabilized DPO strategy to align the model with human aesthetic preferences. We further train ERNIE-Image-Turbo for efficient 8-NFE generation and propose MT-DMD to mitigate capability drift during distillation. To make the model easier to use in practical scenarios, we equip it with a lightweight Prompt Enhancer that expands concise user intents into structured visual descriptions. In addition, we develop ERNIE-Image-Aes, an industrial-grade aesthetic model, together with ERNIE-Image-Aes-1K, a human-annotated benchmark for realistic aesthetic evaluation. Extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments show that ERNIE-Image achieves leading performance among open-source models and approaches top-tier commercial models in instruction following, text rendering, and aesthetic quality. We release the trained models and aesthetic resources to facilitate further academic research and technical progress in the AIGC community.

AI.tldr: ERNIE-Image是一个开源的文生图生成模型，通过系统性地优化大规模预训练数据和监督质量，实现了接近商业闭源系统的生成效果，并公开了模型及相关美学资源。
AI.motivation: 当前开源文生图模型与领先闭源系统在生成质量和实用性上存在差距，该工作旨在通过改进数据构建与训练过程，提升开源模型性能，推动AIGC领域的发展。
AI.method: 1. 采用8B参数的单流DiT架构，结合自下而上的精细化数据构建（图像细分类、丰富标注、美学评价、分层采样）降低数据噪声并保留长尾知识。2. 训练后阶段用自上而下的数据构建针对高需求场景，多样化提示注释并采用稳定的DPO策略优化美学偏好。3. 引入Turbo版本提升生成效率，并通过MT-DMD缓解模型蒸馏时的能力漂移。4. 配备Prompt Enhancer扩展用户意图，开发ERNIE-Image-Aes与Aes-1K美学评测体系。
AI.result: ERNIE-Image在跟随指令、文本渲染、美学质量等方面，显著优于现有开源模型，并接近顶级商业模型水平。
AI.conclusion: ERNIE-Image显著缩小了开源与闭源文生图系统的差距，并通过开放模型与资源，促进AIGC社区的学术与技术进步。

title: Forgotten Words: Benchmarking NeoBERT for Dementia Detection in Low-Resource Conversational Filipino and English Speech
summary: Dementia detection from spontaneous speech offers a scalable approach to cognitive screening, yet NLP systems remain predominantly English-centric. This limitation is especially acute in the Philippines, where Filipino-English code-switching is pervasive and no prior work has addressed NLP-based dementia detection. We present the first systematic evaluation of transformer-based dementia detection in Filipino speech and the first assessment of NeoBERT in a clinical NLP setting. To separate language from domain effects, we construct a parallel bilingual dataset of 4,000 DementiaBank-derived transcripts, with Filipino translations produced manually to preserve discourse-level markers of cognitive decline. We evaluate five model families, TF-IDF + LogReg, BERT, NeoBERT, XLM-R, and RoBERTa-Tagalog, under monolingual, zero-shot cross-lingual, and bilingual fine-tuning settings. We find that in-domain performance does not transfer across languages, with English-trained BERT dropping to Macro-F1 = 0.455 on Filipino, and that architectural modernization alone does not improve robustness. Bilingual fine-tuning, however, eliminates cross-lingual degradation across all transformer models, converging to Macro-F1 = 0.969-0.973. These results suggest that multilingual clinical NLP performance is driven primarily by linguistic coverage during training rather than model scale or architecture.

AI.tldr: 本论文首次系统性评估了变换器（Transformer）模型在菲律宾语失智症检测中的表现，并构建了平行双语数据集，发现双语微调能显著提升跨语种检测效果。
AI.motivation: 失智症检测依靠自然语言处理（NLP）技术在非英语语境（特别是菲律宾这种普遍代码切换的语言环境）中尚无相关工作，而合理扩展NLP工具至多语种市场可以提升临床筛查的可扩展性和公平性。
AI.method: 手动翻译并整理了 DementiaBank 英语语料的 4000 条转录，确保认知衰退的语篇特征保留。系统对比了 TF-IDF+LogReg、BERT、NeoBERT、XLM-R 及 RoBERTa-Tagalog 等五种模型，考察它们在单语、零样本跨语种、以及双语微调三种场景下的表现。
AI.result: 直接将英语训练的模型迁移到菲律宾语表现明显下降（如 BERT Macro-F1 降至 0.455），而先进模型架构本身并不能提升鲁棒性。双语微调能消除全部跨语种性能衰减，所有 Transformer 模型 Macro-F1 可达 0.969-0.973。
AI.conclusion: 多语种临床 NLP 性能主要由训练时的语言覆盖度驱动，模型规模或架构进步并非提升跨语种泛化的关键；针对目标语言实现双语训练是实现高效与鲁棒检测的有效策略。

title: Towards Reliable Fetal Ultrasound Interpretation with Multi-Agent Collaboration
summary: Automated fetal ultrasound interpretation requires a workflow from visual perception, including plane recognition and anatomical segmentation, to clinical understanding, including biometric measurement and diagnostic reporting. However, the prevailing "one-task, one-model" paradigm limits systematic integration of evidence across this multi-step process. Although multimodal large language models (MLLMs) show promising visual understanding, their limited domain-specific grounding and hallucination risks restrict reliability in fetal ultrasound analysis. To address these limitations, we propose FetUSAgents, a tool-augmented multi-agent system for comprehensive fetal ultrasound interpretation, supporting visual question answering (VQA), report generation, image captioning, and video summarization. FetUSAgents coordinates task-specific visual tools through collaborative LLM agents and decomposes clinical queries into subtasks that progress from anatomical recognition to quantitative measurement. We further introduce Dual-Path Evidence Arbitration (DPEA), which integrates LLM-based deliberative reasoning with structured computational evidence from specialized visual tools. A retrieval-enhanced evidence bank consolidates intermediate findings to support traceable and clinically grounded conclusions. In addition, we construct FetUS-VQA, a dedicated VQA benchmark for fetal ultrasound, comprising 1,892 images and 3,205 question-answer pairs across 10 clinical tasks. Extensive out-of-distribution experiments show that FetUSAgents outperforms general and medical MLLMs, exceeding the strongest baseline by more than 25 percent in VQA accuracy. These results suggest a scalable route toward evidence-driven clinical assistants for prenatal imaging. Code is available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FetUSAgents的多智能体辅助工具系统，实现了全面的胎儿超声自动化解读，大幅提升了任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的“单任务单模型”模式无法有效整合胎儿超声分析流程的多步证据，而现有多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在专业领域存在泛化及幻觉风险，限制了其临床可靠性。
AI.method: 作者设计了FetUSAgents框架，采用多智能体和工具增强方法，协同处理可视化任务和临床问题，并通过Dual-Path Evidence Arbitration（DPEA）方法将大模型推理和视觉工具结构化证据结合。同时构建了FetUS-VQA数据集，支持相关任务和评测。
AI.result: FetUSAgents在广泛的分布外实验中，VQA准确率超越最强基线模型25%以上，且在报告生成、视频摘要等多任务具有突出表现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为产前成像领域的证据驱动型临床辅助系统提供了可扩展的新途径，代码已开源，具有重要推广价值。

title: Peak-Then-Collapse and the Four Interface Channels of Knowledge-Graph Tool Use
summary: We test the standard RLVR tool-use recipe -- GRPO on Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct -- on a deliberately minimal knowledge-graph tool API: four Freebase navigation verbs over Complex WebQuestions. Under a self-verifiable retrieval reward, the policy's tool-grounded answer rate climbs from $3.8\%$ to $9.6\%$ over 250 steps, then collapses to $0\%$ within a single 50-step window -- a \emph{peak-then-collapse} pattern replicated across four seeds. Across seven reward designs, we find four recurring failure modes: adding denser or more targeted proxy rewards shifts the failure mode rather than eliminating it. We argue that a key difference from Python interpreters, web search, and JSON APIs is interface feedback: their failures often leak natural-language signal the model saw in pretraining. A Python traceback names the failing line; an empty Freebase result \texttt{[]} does not. Stripping away that surface exposes a degradation regime that same-family reward redesigns do not fix. A direct oracle ablation rules out relation selection: injecting gold relations at every retrieval call lifts exact-match accuracy by only $+0.20$~pp, and $95.4\%$ of retrieval-dependent errors are retrieval-composition failures rather than answer-extraction failures. As a mitigation, one-iteration self-distillation reaches $40.0\%$ EM at 7B and is capacity-invariant: doubling capacity to 14B improves EM by only $0.25$~pp, and initialization barely matters -- the ceiling appears interface-bound within the 7B--14B range tested.

AI.tldr: 本文测试了RLVR（Reward Learning via Verifiable Retrieval）工具使用模式在Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct模型上的效果，发现其回答率出现先上升后迅速崩溃的现象，并分析了各种失败模式及其原因。
AI.motivation: 现有大模型在工具使用时，常依赖Python等接口获得英文自然语言反馈。但在类似Freebase的API中，接口反馈极简，缺失预训练中的语言信号，导致模型难以纠错和学习。作者试图验证这一界面反馈差异对RLVR方法有效性的影响。
AI.method: 作者将Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct模型应用于一个极简知识图谱API，使用四种导航动词，在Complex WebQuestions数据集上测试。在自验证检索奖励下，分析七种奖励设计对表现的影响，并重复实验以发现和对比失败模式。此外，通过oracle消融实验和自蒸馏方法做对比。
AI.result: 模型的工具依赖回答正确率从3.8%上升到9.6%后，在短时间内跌至0%，并在不同随机种子间复现这一峰值—崩溃现象。各种奖励调整仅导致失败模式转移而非消除。oracle消融发现错误多来自检索组合失败。单步自蒸馏可显著提升准确率（到40%），且模型容量扩大提升非常有限（+0.25pp）。
AI.conclusion: 接口反馈的贫乏导致RLVR方法在知识图谱API工具使用上的性能瓶颈，传统的奖励修改难以根本解决该问题，自蒸馏虽能提高表现，但整体上界面反馈缺陷成为主要限制。

title: MARVEL: Universal Murray's Law-informed Vessel Tree Segmentation and Topology Estimation
summary: Vascular circulation follows fundamental biophysical principles that optimize mass transport and metabolic energy expenditure, which can be effectively modeled by Murray's law. However, contemporary deep learning methods for vascular segmentation often neglect these biophysical constraints. This leads to physiologically implausible branching and misclassification vascular trees, rendering. These automated segmentation results are unreliable unreliable for downstream clinical tasks such as blood flow simulation or disease quantification. In this paper, we introduce MARVEL (Universal MurrAy's law-infoRmed Vessel sEgmentation and topoLogy estimation), a backbone-agnostic framework that integrates biophysical priors into vascular tree extraction. MARVEL combines per-pixel supervision with explicit radius predictions to enforce local bifurcation constraints derived from an empirical width-exponent mapping. We implement these constraints as differentiable regularizers during training to guide models toward physiologically consistent reconstructions. We evaluate MARVEL on eight public datasets across multiple vascular modalities and segmentation backbones. Results demonstrate MARVEL's superior performance in segmentation accuracy, topological consistency, and physiological plausibility. By converting segmented masks into graph-based hemodynamic simulations, we demonstrate that MARVEL preserves the subtle pathological narrowing and topological connectivity required to distinguish hypertensive from normotensive eyes. Results show that MARVEL significantly improves the classification of hypertension via arteriovenous pressure differences in the eye (p < 0.001), outperforming baseline models in both topological consistency and clinical predictive value.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MARVEL的新型血管分割和拓扑结构估计框架，结合了生物物理先验（如Murray定律），显著提升了分割准确性、拓扑一致性和生理可信度，有助于临床下游任务。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习血管分割方法忽视了血管生物物理约束，导致分割结果在生理上不合理，影响如血流模拟、疾病定量等临床应用的可靠性。因此亟需引入生物物理先验改进自动分割与血管树结构重建。
AI.method: MARVEL是一种与主干网络无关的分割框架，将Murray定律相关生物物理先验整合到血管树提取中。该方法结合像素级监督和显式半径预测，将基于经验宽度指数映射的分叉约束实现为可微正则项，在训练过程中引导模型生成生理一致的血管结构。
AI.result: 在八个公共数据集和多种血管模态下实验，MARVEL在分割准确性、血管拓扑一致性和生理可信性方面优于对照方法。尤其在基于图的血流动力学模拟中，能更精准地区分高血压与正常眼，通过眼动脉静脉压差显著提升高血压分类（p<0.001）。
AI.conclusion: MARVEL通过整合生物物理先验和差分正则化，有效提升自动血管分割的临床可用性和信赖度，为血管相关疾病的诊断和研究提供了更强有力的工具。

title: Confidence and Calibration of Activation Oracles for Reliable Interpretation of Language Model Internals
summary:
Activation oracles aim to make the activations of other models legible to humans and yield promising results compared to white-box interpretability techniques. However, uncertainty quantification (UQ) for the natural-language outputs of such activation oracles is so far understudied. Here, we investigate 6 different methods for estimating the confidence of activation oracles and evaluate how well-calibrated their confidence scores are. Our experiments on 6,000 samples per oracle (varying verbalizer and context prompts) reveal that bootstrap mode frequency is the best-calibrated method among those tested (ECE 5.7% vs. 25.5% for the answer-word log-probability on Qwen3-8B; 10.3% vs. 13.1% on Qwen3.6-27B), and that the log-prob baseline can serve as a fast triage signal at a fraction of the cost.
  Code and the patched trainer are available at https://github.com/federicotorrielli/probabilistic_activation_oracles.

AI.tldr: 本文关注激活Oracle的不确定性量化（UQ）问题，系统评估了六种对oracle输出信心分数进行估计的方法，并验证了最佳方案。
AI.motivation: 尽管激活Oracle对于让模型激活对人类更可解释意义重大，但目前其自然语言输出的不确定性量化尚不充分，限制了实际应用的可靠性和可信度。因此，研究准确、可校准的UQ方法成为必要。
AI.method: 作者设计了六种不同的信心分数估算方法，并在6,000个不同配置样本（涉及不同的verbalizer和context prompt）上进行了实证评估，主要关注不同方法的置信度校准度。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，在被测试方法中，bootstrap模式频率法的校准效果最佳（Qwen3-8B上ECE低至5.7%，比传统log-prob方法降低许多），log-prob基线方法则能以极低成本起到初筛作用。
AI.conclusion: bootstrap模式频率法是当前针对激活Oracle输出信心分数校准的最佳选择，提升了mysql可解释性UQ评估的准确性和实际适用性。

title: Can MLLMs Reason Beyond Language? VisReason: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Vision-Centric Reasoning
comment: Accepted by ACL 2026 Findings, resources released at https://github.com/CASIA-IVA-Lab/VisReason
summary: Recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) achieve strong performance on visual reasoning benchmarks, yet it remains unclear to what extent such performance reflects reasoning directly grounded in visual evidence. We introduce VisReason, a benchmark for vision-centric reasoning in everyday scenarios where perception and inference are tightly coupled. VisReason contains 1,505 questions across 10 categories spanning perceptual, structural, and conceptual reasoning. Our evaluation shows that VisReason poses a qualitatively different challenge from existing benchmarks, exposing substantial gaps between humans and current MLLMs and revealing limited benefits from test-time reasoning strategies. VisReason offers a focused diagnostic for evaluating vision-centric reasoning beyond language.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了VisReason基准，用于评估多模态大模型（MLLM）的视觉推理能力，发现当前模型在视觉推理上与人类仍有较大差距。
AI.motivation: 虽然MLLMs在视觉推理基准上表现强劲，但其推理能力是否真正基于视觉证据仍不清楚，因此需要更专注的评测工具。
AI.method: 作者提出了VisReason基准，包括涵盖感知、结构和概念推理的1,505个问题，分属于10个类别，并用VisReason评估了现有MLLM的表现。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，VisReason与已有基准存在质的区别，并揭示了现有MLLMs与人类之间在视觉推理上的巨大差距，同时测试时的推理策略提升有限。
AI.conclusion: VisReason能够作为诊断视觉推理能力的有效工具，有助于推动对语言之外视觉推理能力的深入评估。

title: When Gradients Collide: Failure Modes of Multi-Objective Prompt Optimization for LLM Judges
comment: Accepted at ACL 2026 CustomNLP4U Workshop. Code, prompts and data available at https://github.com/ARDivekar/PromptMOO
summary: Customizing an LLM judge to a specific task or domain often involves optimizing its prompt across multiple evaluation criteria simultaneously. Textual gradient methods automate this for a single judge criterion, however they produce natural-language critiques, not numerical vectors. Thus, the conflict-resolution toolkit of multi-task learning (PCGrad, MGDA) doesn't apply to the multi-objective textual gradient setting. We test five decomposition modes of textual gradient optimizers by varying how much cross-task information the loss, gradient and optimizer LLMs share. In 6 of 10 configurations, we observe that optimization never improves over the initial prompt. Gradient specificity drops by 59% (from 9.0 to 3.7) when the gradient LLM processes multiple criteria jointly. Separately, we observe that naively combining per-task instructions into a single prompt degrades Spearman's rho by -5.3%. These results identify two separable failure modes: optimization-time gradient dilution and inference-time instruction interference, which together constrain the design space for multi-objective judge customization using textual feedback.

AI.tldr: 本论文研究了将大语言模型（LLM）定制为针对特定任务或领域的评判者时，如何在多评估标准下优化其prompt，并指出现有的多任务学习方法难以直接应用于文本梯度方法。实验分析了不同信息共享方式下的文本梯度优化器，并揭示了主要的失败模式。
AI.motivation: 当需要让LLM判官适应具体任务或领域时，通常要在多种评价标准之间权衡，同时优化prompt。虽然文本梯度方法可以自动针对单一标准优化，但缺少数值梯度，导致现有的多任务冲突解决方法（如PCGrad、MGDA）无法使用。因此，研究如何让文本梯度方法适用于多目标优化成为迫切需求。
AI.method: 作者设计了五种文本梯度优化器，通过调整损失、梯度和优化器LLM之间的跨任务信息共享程度，实验分析各方式的表现。同时检测了简单合并多任务指令的方法，并以优化结果和梯度特异性等指标评估效果。
AI.result: 在10种配置中的6种下，优化后的结果未超过初始prompt，显示出优化未带来实际提升。若让梯度LLM联合处理多标准，梯度特异性下降59%。简单聚合各任务指令反而使Spearman's rho降低5.3%。
AI.conclusion: 论文揭示了多目标文本梯度优化的两类失败模式：优化过程中的梯度稀释和推理过程中的指令干扰。这限制了基于文本反馈实现多目标LLM评判者定制的设计空间。

title: Physics-Aware 3D Gaussian Editing for Driving Scene Generation
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has shown great potential in autonomous driving simulation and data generation, enabling photorealistic reconstruction and flexible scene manipulation. However, existing 3DGS scene editing methods have limited support for road geometry editing (e.g., inserting speed humps or sunken roads), and generally do not couple such edits with plausible vehicle-road interaction dynamics. Such editing is essential for generating training data under extreme driving scenarios or evaluating system reliability under these road irregularities. Moreover, many optimization-based methods require minutes of per-edit refinement, while existing efficient alternatives mainly focus on appearance-level or object-level manipulation rather than physics-aware road irregularity editing. To address these limitations, we propose RoVES, a Road-and-Vehicle Editing System for physics-aware 3D Gaussian editing in driving scenes. RoVES enables single-image-driven road geometry insertion and couples the edited road profile with a 4-DOF half-car vehicle dynamics model to achieve physics-aware vehicle pose correction in vertical displacement and pitch. RoVES inserts road elements in a one-shot, optimization-free pipeline (1.84s), and the full pipeline (including color transfer and vehicle-dynamics-based pose correction) completes in 6.24s; it edits dynamic vehicles via pose editing and corrects poses frame-by-frame to approximate dynamics-consistent vertical displacement and pitch responses. Experiments on the Waymo dataset show that RoVES provides practical efficiency and competitive visual consistency for physics-aware driving scene generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RoVES系统，实现了对自动驾驶场景三维高斯表示(3DGS)中道路几何结构和车辆姿态的物理一致性编辑，填补了现有方法在极端路况数据生成上的不足。
AI.motivation: 当前3DGS场景编辑较难直接编辑道路几何（如减速带、下陷），且车辆与路面的物理交互动态往往被忽略，影响用于极端驾驶情况场景和系统鲁棒性测试的数据生成，还面临效率低的问题。
AI.method: 提出RoVES系统，可以通过单张图片插入道路几何要素，并结合4自由度半车车辆动力学模型，实现道路编辑与车辆姿态的一体化、物理一致性修正。整个编辑流程无需逐次优化，插入道路和物理姿态修正仅需几秒，支持批量高效处理。
AI.result: 在Waymo数据集上的实验显示，RoVES实现了一键道路编辑、车辆姿态校正，相比以往方法在效率和物理一致性上均有显著提升，同时保证了视觉上的自然合理。
AI.conclusion: RoVES为3D驾驶场景生成与编辑提供了一种快速、物理感知的高效工具，可用于极端路况下的训练数据自动生成和自动驾驶系统的可靠性测试。

title: WhoSaidIt: Human-LLM Collaborative Annotation for Text-Based Multilingual Speaker-Attribute Classification
summary: Annotating speaker attributes from text is inherently ambiguous, particularly in multilingual settings where demographic and social cues are implicit and culturally variable. We propose a human-large language model (LLM) collaborative re-annotation framework for stabilizing multilingual speaker-attribute labels under practical resource constraints. Starting from a noisy corpus, we use LLMs to surface recurring annotation rationales through iterative interaction with experts, and apply disagreement-focused sampling for targeted re-annotation. Using this framework, we construct WhoSaidIt, a multilingual dataset covering nine speaker-attribute labels. We quantify divergence between original and revised annotations, benchmark recent LLMs, and analyze the effect of explicit rationales on model behavior. Our results reveal substantial cross-lingual differences in annotation decisions and demonstrate both the strengths and limitations of LLMs in speaker-attribute classification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个结合人类专家和大型语言模型（LLM）的协作重标注框架，以优化多语种语者属性的标注质量。作者构建了WhoSaidIt数据集，评估了LLM在相关任务上的表现，并分析了标注合理性对模型行为的影响。
AI.motivation: 文本中语者属性的标注在多语种环境下具有极大歧义和难度，现有标注容易因文化及语言差异而产生噪音。为解决高质量标注难以大规模获得的问题，作者希望利用LLM辅助标注，提高一致性和效率。
AI.method: 作者设计了一个人类专家与LLM协作的标注框架，从一个噪声较大的原始语料库出发，通过LLM与专家的多轮交互，挖掘并总结常见的标注理由，并针对存在分歧的样本进行有针对性的重标注。最终整理出带有9类语者属性标签的多语种WhoSaidIt数据集。
AI.result: 作者分析了原始标注与重标注之间的差异，基准测试了最新的LLM在该任务上的表现，并探讨了显式标注理由对模型输出和行为的影响。结果显示不同语言间标注决策存在较大差异，LLM在语者属性分类任务上表现出一定优势，但也有局限性。
AI.conclusion: 人员与LLM协作的标注框架能提升多语种语者属性标注的质量和可解释性。虽然LLM表现优秀，但跨语种歧义和文化差异依然是难以完全解决的问题。

title: Adversarial Orthogonal Disentanglement for LVLM Hallucination Mitigation
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have advanced multimodal understanding, yet their reliability is limited by hallucination, where generated content conflicts with visual facts. Existing mitigation methods either rely on costly external interventions, such as instruction tuning and retrieval, or use internal mechanisms that remain limited by flawed attention weights and entangled hidden representations. We propose Adversarial Orthogonal Disentanglement (AOD), a latent geometric framework for mitigating LVLM hallucinations. AOD learns a hallucination-related direction through a minimax objective: a classifier concentrates hallucination signals into the projected component, while an adversary removes them from the orthogonal residual space via a Gradient Reversal Layer. The learned direction enables a training-free dual-forward-pass contrastive decoding strategy that suppresses hallucinations while preserving general capabilities. Experiments on three LVLMs across four hallucination and four utility benchmarks show that AOD consistently outperforms strong baselines. It improves POPE accuracy by over 6\% on average, boosts AMBER by 6\%, and maintains strong performance on utility tasks such as MMMU. Further analysis shows robust transfer across datasets, suggesting that AOD captures general hallucination-related biases rather than dataset-specific artifacts. Our source code and datasets are available at https://github.com/Hunter-Wrynn/AOD.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新方法AOD，有效减缓了大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）中的幻觉现象，效果优于其他主流方法，并具有良好的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: LVLMs 在图文理解上表现优秀，但生成内容常出现与视觉事实不符的“幻觉”问题，影响了模型的可靠性。现有方法要么成本高，要么效果有限，因此迫切需要新颖有效的幻觉抑制技术。
AI.method: 设计了一种对抗正交解缠（AOD）方法，在潜在空间中通过最小极大目标学习识别幻觉信号的方向。具体做法是用分类器将幻觉信号聚合到投影分量，用对抗网络结合梯度反转层将幻觉信号从正交残差空间移除。该方法还支持零额外训练，在推理时用对比解码策略抑制幻觉。
AI.result: 在三个主流LVLM、四个幻觉以及四个通用性基准上评测，AOD相较于强大基线方法平均提升POPE准确率6%以上，AMBER提升6%，同时在实用任务如MMMU上保持良好性能。还验证了AOD可在不同数据集间鲁棒迁移，显示其抑制的是通用偏差。
AI.conclusion: AOD为抑制LVLM幻觉提供了一种训练开销低、效果优秀且具备泛化能力的新范式，有望大幅提升多模态大模型的可信度与实用性。

title: StakeBench: Evaluating Language Understanding Grounded in Market Commitment
comment: 21 pages, 2 figures, 20 tables. Preprint. Dataset and evaluation code included
summary: Existing financial NLP benchmarks often rely on labels supplied by outside observers, measuring how language is perceived rather than what speakers have committed to in the market. We introduce StakeBench, an evaluation framework for language understanding grounded in market commitment. StakeBench links 560,876 comments from 2,261 resolved markets to verified position, action, and market-odds records across Polymarket and Manifold. Supervision is derived from observable market behavior. Position sides, post-comment trading actions, and market-odds trajectories replace human annotation. Four diagnostic tasks test whether models detect market commitment, identify the revealed side, anticipate future action, and perform collective odds projection. Three commitment-aware metrics measure alignment with revealed preferences rather than perceived sentiment. Validity audits and explicit interpretation boundaries help distinguish observable commitment signals from latent belief and causal market-odds impact. Across 15 LLMs and 18 topics and platform settings, models partially recover position-side signals, with Directed Accuracy from 0.506 to 0.599, but show structural failures on later tasks. Ten of the fifteen models collapse to one or two action labels in future action anticipation, and no model consistently improves on the naive odds-direction baseline in collective odds projection. Model scale is not correlated with performance, finance-domain tuning does not improve revealed-side identification, and platform incentives strongly shape higher-order results. StakeBench is packaged with evaluation code and dataset under CC-BY 4.0.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个基于市场承诺的金融NLP评测框架StakeBench，强调用市场实际行为替代传统人工标注，测试现有模型对市场承诺等任务的理解和推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有金融NLP基准多依赖外部观察者的人为标签，只评估语言感知效果，而无法反映说话人在市场中的实际承诺和操作。为更好捕捉和评价基于市场行为的语言理解，提出新的评测规范。
AI.method: 收集了Polymarket和Manifold两大平台上2261个已结算市场共560,876条评论，自动跟踪评论对应的市场持仓、实际操作和盘口变化，设置四项诊断任务测评模型：检测市场承诺、识别立场、预测未来操作、集体盘口走势推断。应用三项创新指标专门评估模型对真实市场偏好的把握，而非表面情感。并进行有效性审查和解释边界澄清。
AI.result: 在15个大模型、18个主题和平台设定中，模型能部分识别立场（Directed Accuracy最高仅0.599），但在未来行为预测和盘口总体走势任务上均未优于简单基准。模型规模、金融领域微调均不提升效果，平台激励机制对复杂任务有重大影响。
AI.conclusion: StakeBench为金融NLP提供了更贴合真实市场行为的评测标准；当前主流大模型在市场承诺理解和推理方面仍有限，未来需针对真实偏好和行动的场景加强建模。

title: CollectionLoRA: Collecting 50 Effects in 1 LoRA via Multi-Teacher On-Policy Distillation
summary: Customized image editing aims to equip pre-trained diffusion models with specific visual effects using limited paired data, typically via Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA). As the number of desired effects grows, storing and dynamically loading numerous these effect LoRAs significantly increases deployment overhead. Furthermore, current pipelines typically cascade these effect LoRAs with acceleration modules for fast generation, which triggers severe parameter interference and results in concept bleeding and style degradation. We propose CollectionLoRA, a multi-teacher on-policy distillation framework capable of distilling the concepts of up to 50 different effect LoRAs along with few-step generation capabilities into a single LoRA. This fundamentally resolves the feature interference issue and significantly reduces deployment costs. Specifically, the method introduces (i) a Probabilistic Dual-Stream Routing mechanism that enables the model to randomly switch between data sources during training, effectively enhancing its generalization in unseen scenarios; (ii) an Asymmetric Orthogonal Prompting strategy to achieve concept isolation within the prompt space; (iii) a Coarse-to-Fine Distillation Objective to mitigate the distribution gap between the teacher and student models. Extensive evaluations show that CollectionLoRA distills all customized effects and few-step generation into a single LoRA, reducing deployment overhead while achieving concept fidelity comparable to or better than independently trained teacher models.

AI.tldr: 提出了CollectionLoRA框架，可将多种定制效果的LoRA及快速生成能力蒸馏进单一LoRA，显著降低部署开销并保持高质量效果。
AI.motivation: 现有定制图片编辑需为不同视觉效果训练多个LoRA，效果多时部署成本高且组合应用易导致参数干扰与风格损失。
AI.method: 提出CollectionLoRA多教师在策略蒸馏框架，创新性地引入概率双通路路由机制（增强泛化），非对称正交提示策略（提升概念隔离），粗到细蒸馏目标（缩小师生模型分布差异），将最多50种效果的LoRA统一蒸馏到单一LoRA。
AI.result: CollectionLoRA能在单个LoRA中实现全部效果和快速生成，部署开销大减，且在概念保真度上与单独训练的LoRA媲美甚至更优。
AI.conclusion: CollectionLoRA有效解决多效果LoRA部署及参数干扰难题，大幅简化部署流程，为多效果定制图像编辑提供可行技术路线。

title: Automated Benchmark Auditing for AI Agents and Large Language Models
summary: Modern AI benchmarks operate at a complexity that outpaces traditional verification methods. Tasks authored by domain experts often contain implicit assumptions, incomplete environment specifications, and brittle evaluation logic that human annotation cannot reliably catch. We introduce Auto Benchmark Audit (ABA), an agentic framework that systematically audits individual benchmark tasks, uncovering issues such as hidden environment dependencies, specification gaps, and limited grading logic. We run ABA on a collection of frontier LLM benchmarks and previous NeurIPS publications, totaling 168 benchmarks across nine domains. Across this corpus, ABA identifies critical issues including ambiguous task design, execution environment conflicts, and incorrect ground truths in over 25.7% of the evaluated tasks. The precision of these automated audits is validated by expert review and independent third-party reports such as upstream PRs. Crucially, we demonstrate that these problematic tasks severely distorts capability assessments for agents and LLMs: filtering out these tasks with issues shifts model rankings and increases average performance on SWE-bench Verified and Terminal-Bench 2 by 9.9% and 9.6%, respectively. We release the agentic tool and all task annotations to support the future development of frontier benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Auto Benchmark Audit (ABA)的自动化审核框架，用于系统性检测AI基准任务中的隐性问题，发现约四分之一任务存在关键错误，并且这些问题会扭曲模型评估结果。
AI.motivation: 目前AI基准的复杂度高，传统验证方式难以发现任务描述不全、环境依赖或评测逻辑不严谨等缺陷，导致评测结果不可靠。缺乏自动化、可扩展的基准审核工具，加剧了这一问题。
AI.method: 介绍ABA框架：自动代理系统化审查每个基准任务细节，检测隐藏依赖、规范缺失和评分缺陷。在168个跨9领域的任务集中运行ABA，自动标出问题任务，并由专家和三方报告验证其准确性。
AI.result: ABA检测出25.7%基准任务存在歧义设计、环境冲突或错误答案。剔除问题任务后，模型排名发生显著变化，SWE-bench Verified和Terminal-Bench 2测试集的平均得分分别提高了9.9%和9.6%。
AI.conclusion: 自动化审核工具有助于发现并降低基准评测中的关键错误，提高AI评测的公正性和可靠性。论文公布了工具和注释集，推动基准质量持续提升。

title: Weakly Supervised Camouflaged Object Detection Based on the SAM Model and Mask Guidance
summary: Camouflaged object detection (COD) from a single image is a challenging task due to the high similarity between objects and their surroundings. Existing fully supervised methods require labor-intensive pixel-level annotations, making weakly supervised methods a viable compromise that balances accuracy and annotation efficiency. However, weakly supervised methods often experience performance degradation due to the use of coarse annotations. In this paper, we introduce a new weakly supervised approach for camouflaged object detection to overcome these limitations. Specifically, we propose a novel network, MGNet, which tackles edge ambiguity and missed detections by utilizing initial masks generated by our custom-designed Cascaded Mask Decoder (CMD) to guide the segmentation process and enhance edge predictions. We introduce a Context Enhancement Module(CEM) to reduce the missing detection, and a Mask-guided Feature Aggregation Module (MFAM) for effective feature aggregation. For the weak supervision challenge, we propose BoxSAM, which leverages the Segment Anything Model (SAM) with bounding-box prompts to generate pseudo-labels. By employing a redundant processing strategy, high quality pixel-level pseudo-labels are provided for training MGNet. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method delivers competitive performance against current state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MGNet，一种新的弱监督伪装目标检测方法，结合自定义模块和新颖的伪标签生成策略，在弱监督条件下达到了与现有最优方法相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统的COD方法依赖像素级标注，标注成本高昂。而现有弱监督方法由于注释粗糙，表现差。本研究旨在借助更高质量的伪标签与结构设计，提升弱监督下的检测性能。
AI.method: 1）提出了MGNet网络，利用自定义级联掩码解码器（CMD）生成初始掩码，辅助分割、优化边界；2）设计了上下文增强模块（CEM）减少漏检，掩码引导特征聚合模块（MFAM）提升特征融合；3）提出BoxSAM方法，用SAM模型结合框提示生成高质量伪标签，采用多余处理策略提升伪标签性能。
AI.result: 采用大量实验证明，MGNet在弱监督条件下的COD任务上，性能优于当前多种先进方法，尤其在细节与边界部分取得了更优的检测效果。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法有效平衡了精度与弱监督训练的高效性，为后续伪装目标检测研究提供了新思路和有价值的参考。

title: Language Models Need Sleep
summary: Transformer-based large language models are increasingly used for long-horizon tasks; however, their attention mechanism scales poorly with context length. To handle this, we study a sleep-like consolidation mechanism in which a model periodically converts recent context into persistent fast weights before clearing its key-value cache. During sleep, the model performs $N$ offline recurrent passes over the accumulated context and updates the fast weights in its state-space model (SSM) blocks through a learned local rule. During inference, this shifts extra computation to sleep while preserving the latency of wake-time prediction. We test our method on controlled synthetic tasks, including cellular automata and multi-hop graph retrieval, as well as a realistic math reasoning task, on which a regular transformer as well as SSM-attention hybrid models fail. We then show that increasing sleep duration $N$ for our models improves performance, with the largest gains on examples that require deeper reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种借鉴睡眠巩固机制的方法，通过在推理过程中定期将上下文信息转换为持久的快权重（fast weights），以改善Transformer模型处理长序列任务时注意力机制的伸缩性问题。
AI.motivation: 标准Transformer随着上下文长度增长，注意力计算成本呈平方增长，导致处理长序列任务时效率低下。作者受生物睡眠巩固知识的启发，试图通过引入类似睡眠的机制来减轻这一问题。
AI.method: 模型在推理过程中周期性地将近期上下文通过多次离线循环（sleep）转换到快权重中，并清除原有的key-value缓存，采用SSM块内的局部学习规则更新权重。推理时依赖已巩固权重，推理延迟不变。
AI.result: 方法在合成任务（如元胞自动机和多跳图检索）以及实际的数学推理任务上，显著优于普通的Transformer及SSM-attention混合模型，尤其是在需要深度推理的样本上，随着“睡眠”步数N增加，性能提升明显。
AI.conclusion: 引入睡眠式离线巩固机制有助于Transformer高效处理长序列任务，尤其提高了模型复杂推理能力，为设计高效长上下文模型提供了新思路。

title: Subspace-Guided Semantic and Topological Invariant Registration for Annotation-Free Ultrasound Plane Quality Control
comment: MICCAI 2026 Accepted Paper; Subspace-Guided Registration for Ultrasound Quality Control
summary: Reliable quality control (QC) of ultrasound images is essential for both real-time acquisition guidance and retrospective clinical audit, yet existing approaches rely heavily on per-plane annotations, or employ pseudo-labeling prone to systematic bias under spatial deformations inherent in clinical acquisition. We present STRIQ, a registration-driven framework that recasts annotation-free US plane quality control as a subspace-guided consistency measurement problem. Specifically, STRIQ introduces a Latent Registration Aligner (LRA) to establish hierarchical feature space correspondences between query images and variance-driven anchors, which are autonomously distilled from unlabeled data via a variance spectrum criterion to serve as structurally stable prototypes. To further disambiguate anatomical planes and mitigate negative knowledge transfer, we propose an Orthogonal Knowledge Subspace (OKS) module. The OKS decomposes plane-specific representations into mutually orthogonal subspaces, enabling fine-grained expert collaboration while preventing inter-plane interference, ensuring that the quality metric is grounded in principled subspace proximity. Extensive experiments on the in-house US4QA and public CAMUS datasets demonstrate that STRIQ achieves state-of-the-art correlation with clinical quality scores, establishing a new paradigm for annotation-free, real-time reliable ultrasound quality control. Our code is available at https://github.com/zhcz328/STRIQ.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需标注的新型超声图像质量控制方法STRIQ，通过特征空间一致性度量提升质量控制的自动化和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有超声图像质量控制依赖逐切面标注或伪标签，但这在临床采集变形等情况下容易出现系统性偏差，缺乏通用、无标注且鲁棒的方法。
AI.method: STRIQ方法包含两个核心模块：一是Latent Registration Aligner（LRA），用于在特征空间内，自动从无标注数据中提取具有代表性的结构稳定锚点，并进行层级特征对齐；二是Orthogonal Knowledge Subspace（OKS），将不同切面的特征解耦为正交子空间，提升区分度并防止知识迁移干扰。质量评估基于与这些锚点的特征距离。
AI.result: 在自建US4QA和公开CAMUS数据集上，STRIQ与临床质量评分高度相关，达到了当前最优水平，有效实现了实时、无标注的超声质量控制。
AI.conclusion: STRIQ为超声图像质量控制树立了新的无标注、实时、鲁棒的技术范式，突破了传统方法的瓶颈。

title: Anatomy-Anchored Self-Supervision: Distilling Vision Foundation Models for Invariant Ultrasound Representation
comment: MICCAI 2026 Accepted Paper; Anatomy-Anchored Ultrasound Self-Supervision
summary: Self-supervised pre-training paradigm has gained increasing prominence for learning transferable representations in medical imaging, yet existing methods for ultrasound (US) images operate at the image or frame level, overlooking the anatomical context for clinical-aligned representation learning. In this work, we propose an anatomy-anchored ultrasound self-supervision framework ANAUS that shifts representation learning from generic visual regions to clinically meaningful anatomical structures. Utilizing a learnable latent prompt engine alongside a one-time domain adaptation on existing public image--mask pairs, we empower the LP-SAM module to achieve annotation-free anatomy delineation at scale. Building upon this anatomical grounding, we propose a dual-policy self-supervised learning paradigm consisting of inter-view semantics-aware anatomy-separating alignment and contextual core-region prediction to enhance representation learning. Specifically, the former enforces feature invariance within identical anatomical regions while promoting discriminability across distinct structures; the latter compels the model to reconstruct corrupted regions, thereby capturing fine-grained structural details. Extensive evaluations on six public datasets demonstrate that \ours{} consistently outstrips current state-of-the-art methods while maintaining the computational efficiency essential for clinical deployment. Code is available at https://github.com/zhcz328/ANAUS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于解剖学的超声自监督学习框架（ANAUS），通过针对解剖结构进行表征学习，大幅提升了医学超声图像分析的迁移能力和准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有的超声自监督方法大多在图像或帧级别进行，忽略了与实际临床应用紧密相关的解剖结构上下文，导致学习到的特征表征泛化性和可解释性欠佳，难以满足临床需求。
AI.method: 作者提出ANAUS框架，利用可学习的隐空间提示引擎和一次性领域自适应，对公开图像-掩膜对进行处理，使LP-SAM模块能够实现无注释条件下大规模的解剖结构分割。在此基础上，提出双策略自监督范式，包括：1）跨视角语义感知的解剖分离特征对齐，保障同一结构内特征不变性和跨结构判别性；2）核心区域上下文预测，通过重构损坏区域捕捉细粒度结构信息。
AI.result: 在6个公开数据集上的实验表明，ANAUS在各种评估任务下均超越了现有最先进方法，同时保持了适合临床部署的高计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 基于解剖结构的自监督框架ANAUS显著提升了超声图像的表征学习能力，为医学超声分析的临床转化和广泛应用提供了新的思路和有效工具。

title: Towards Active Real-to-Twin Inspection: A New Paradigm for Zero-Shot Anomaly Detection
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures, accepted to IEEE-CYBER 2026, Florence, Italy
summary: The deployment of zero-shot anomaly detection (AD) in embodied industrial inspection is severely bottlenecked by its reliance on passive, fixed-viewpoint 2D imagery. Such formulations inherently fail to accommodate the active, dynamic observations required in real-world environments. To break this limitation, we introduce Real-to-Twin Anomaly Detection, a novel task that evaluates physical observations directly against geometrically matched CAD Digital Twins. To tackle this new task, we propose AVATAR, a framework designed to learn robust semantic alignment between Real and Digital Twins. By bridging benign Sim2Real domain gaps using only defect-free pairs, AVATAR effectively transforms CAD priors into dynamic, anomaly-free references. This elegant formulation enables the model to localize diverse anomalies in a zero-shot manner as unalignable deviations, eliminating the need for defect annotations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AVATAR substantially outperforms adapted state-of-the-art baselines, exhibiting exceptional robustness to severe viewpoint variations. The code and dataset will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 现有零样本异常检测受限于固定视角2D图像，难以应对真实场景下的动态观测。为此，作者提出了Real-to-Twin异常检测任务，通过与CAD数字孪生进行几何匹配实现物理观测直接比对，并设计了AVATAR框架实现鲁棒的语义对齐，实现无缺陷注释的零样本异常检测。实验显示该方法优于主流方法，且对视角变化非常鲁棒。
AI.motivation: 工业检测中的异常检测通常仅依赖静止的2D图像，这在实际动态环境下表现不佳，因此亟需能处理主动、多视角观测的方法。
AI.method: 作者提出Real-to-Twin异常检测任务，引入将真实观测与CAD数字孪生几何匹配进行比对。为解决该任务，设计了AVATAR框架，通过学习真实物体与数字孪生的鲁棒语义对齐，并仅需无缺陷样本对消除Domain Gap，将CAD先验转化为动态、无异常参考，从而检测异常为不可对齐的偏差，实现零样本检测。
AI.result: 实验表明，AVATAR在大量基准数据集上相较于目前最先进的方法显著提升异常检测效果，尤其在视角变化严重的场景表现尤为突出。
AI.conclusion: AVATAR方法突破了传统静态2D异常检测的局限，实现了动态、主动场景下对多种异常的零样本检测，且对视角变化具有很强的鲁棒性，具有广泛应用前景。

title: MTLLFM: Multimodal-Temporal Laughter Localization: UR-FUNNY-Temporal and SMILE-Temporal Benchmarks with an Adaptive Multimodal Fusion Model
comment: Accepted to the Workshop on Affective & Behavior Analysis in-the-wild, CVPR 2026
summary:
Detecting laughter in video is essential for affective computing and narrative understanding, yet existing approaches treat it as coarse clip-level classification, failing to capture precise temporal boundaries of brief, transient laughter events. We address this gap with two complementary contributions.
  First, we introduce UR-FUNNY-Temporal and SMILE-Temporal, fully annotated temporal laughter datasets extending two widely-used humor benchmarks. Our annotations cover over 11,053 videos (78.8 hours) and provide precise onset/offset boundaries for each laughter event, along with rich metadata distinguishing speaker vs. audience laughter, modality dominance (acoustic, visual, or both), and intensity levels.
  Second, we propose a lightweight weakly-supervised framework for temporal laughter localization. Our architecture combines fixed HuBERT and MAE encoders with temporal softmax pooling and adaptive modality gating, learning fine-grained temporal grounding from clip-level labels without requiring frame-level annotations during training. Experiments across three datasets demonstrate that our approach substantially outperforms multimodal foundation models including Gemini 3 Flash, achieving 99% F1 and 68.1% localization precision on sports broadcast data. Ablations validate each architectural component. Furthermore, our precise temporal tags improve downstream laughter reasoning by 227% on CIDEr, enabling GPT-3.5 to outperform GPT-4o. The code, UR-FUNNY-Temporal and SMILE-Temporal datasets are publicly available at https://github.com/WSCSports/MTLLFM-temporal-laughter-localization.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出两项创新工作：一是发布两个大规模精准标注的笑声时序数据集，二是提出无需帧级标注的轻量化弱监督笑声定位框架，方法在多个数据集上大幅优于现有多模态基础模型。
AI.motivation: 现有视频笑声检测仅为粗略的片段级分类，无法捕捉短暂、精细的笑声发生的准确时间，本研究旨在实现更精确的笑声事件识别与定位。
AI.method:
1) 构建并发布了UR-FUNNY-Temporal和SMILE-Temporal两个全新带精确起止时序、元数据（如发声人、模态占优、强度）的笑声数据集。
2) 提出一种结合HuBERT和MAE编码器、时间softmax池化和自适应模态门控的弱监督时序笑声定位模型，仅需片段级标签，无需帧级标注。
AI.result: 模型在三个数据集上显著超越包括Gemini 3 Flash等多模态基础模型，在体育转播数据上获得99% F1值、68.1%的定位精度，每个结构组分的消融实验均验证有效性。精确的时序标注还使GPT-3.5在后续推理任务表现超越GPT-4o。
AI.conclusion: 本文实现了对笑声精细时序定位的突破，提供了高质量数据集与高效弱监督方法，为情感计算和叙事理解等任务奠定了坚实基础，并能提升下游智能推理表现。

title: Generating 3D models from sketches of human faces using a combined approach of Convolutional Neural Networks, Procedural Modeling, and Contour Mapping
comment: A thesis submitted in conformity with the requirements for the degree of Master of Science in Computer Science Graduate Department of Computer Science University of Toronto
summary: Generating 3D models from face sketches is an active topic of research in Computer Graphics due to its potential to tremendously facilitate the modeling of faces for both professional 3D arists and novices. Motivated by the observation that facial expressions are responsible for significantly altering and shaping the contours in our faces, we combine both expression detection and 3D model generation in our approach. The result is a novel approach to generating 3D models from sketches which relies on three components: Convolutional Neural Networks, a parametric 3D face model (Valley Girl), and Active Snake Contours. For the first time in the literature, CNNs are trained (using our own generated dataset) to detect the expression in the given sketch through detecting the active FACS Action Units. The expression is then duplicated on Valley Girl to obtain a 3D model with a similar expression. Active Snake Contours are then used to find the transforms needed to close the gaps between that model and the given sketch.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合表情检测和3D模型生成的新方法，可以将人脸素描高效转换为带有类似表情的3D人脸模型。
AI.motivation: 生成带有表情的3D人脸模型对专业艺术家和普通用户都非常有用，但现有方法很难凭借素描还原真实表情。本研究旨在解决素描到3D带表达情的高质量人脸建模难题。
AI.method: 方法融合了卷积神经网络（CNNs）、参数化3D人脸模型（Valley Girl）与主动轮廓蛇（Active Snake Contours）。首先，作者自建数据集并训练CNN，根据素描里的FACS动作单元检测出表情。随后，在Valley Girl模型上复制该表情得到初步3D模型，最后用主动蛇轮廓算法将该3D模型细调，使之与输入素描更加贴合。
AI.result: 首次实现了利用CNN从人脸素描中自动检测表情动作单元，并可将这种表情自然迁移到参数化3D模型上，通过主动蛇进一步优化模型与素描的匹配度。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法能够更好还原素描中的人脸表情特征，极大提高了素描转3D模型表达一致性，对于基于草图的3D人脸建模具有实际应用价值。

title: CMAP: Cross-Modal Adaptive Prompting for Multi-Domain Task-Incremental Learning
summary: Multi-domain task-incremental learning requires a model to sequentially acquire knowledge across visually diverse domains without forgetting prior tasks, and without access to task identity at inference. Parameter-efficient methods built on frozen vision-language models have made strong progress, yet all existing approaches rely exclusively on visual features for task routing, confidence estimation, and encoder adaptation, leaving CLIP's cross-modal text embedding space entirely unexploited. We address this gap through three contributions. Text-space task routing replaces visual Gaussian matching with cosine similarity to frozen CLIP text prototypes, giving order-independent routing robust to data scarcity at zero parameter cost. Multi-prototype visual-textual confidence replaces single-Gaussian class modeling with K-means visual prototypes and cross-modal alignment scores under task-calibrated thresholds. Symmetric cross-modal gating extends per-layer Gumbel gates to the text encoder conditioned on batch image features, preserving cross-modal alignment on out-of-distribution inputs. On the MTIL benchmark spanning 11 datasets and 1201 classes, our method achieves 74.2% Transfer, 80.5% Average, and 88.7% Last under Order-I, surpassing the prior state of the art by 5.0, 3.7, and 3.0 percentage points with only 2.5M trainable parameters and no external data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在多领域任务增量学习中充分利用CLIP跨模态文本空间的新方法，在多个公开基准上大幅提升了性能，且仅需极少参数。
AI.motivation: 现有多领域任务增量学习方法只关注视觉特征，未利用CLIP模型的文本特征，导致任务路由和置信估计等方面未实现潜力。作者认为结合CLIP的文本空间将进一步提升表现并提升参数效率。
AI.method: 1）文本空间任务路由：用冻结CLIP文本原型的余弦相似度替代视觉高斯匹配，实现无序、健壮且零参数代价的任务分配；2）多原型视觉-文本置信：用K-means视觉原型和跨模态对齐得分实现多高斯类建模；3）对称跨模态门控：将每层Gumbel门控扩展到文本编码器，并由图像特征调节，以提升分布外输入的跨模态对齐。
AI.result: 在涵盖11个数据集、1201类别的MTIL基准测试中，该方法在Transfer、Average和Last三个指标上分别取得74.2%、80.5%和88.7%的成绩，各项指标相比SOTA提升3-5个百分点，参数仅2.5M，无需外部数据。
AI.conclusion: 通过充分利用CLIP的文本空间，本文提出的新方法实现了参数高效、健壮且性能领先的多领域任务增量学习，展示了跨模态特征融合的巨大潜力。

title: Binding Visual Features Point by Point
summary: Despite success on standard benchmarks, vision language models display persistent failures on tasks involving processing of multi-object scenes, including many tasks that are relatively easy for humans. Recent work has found that these failures may stem from a basic inability to accurately bind object features in-context, a challenge that is referred to as the "binding problem" in cognitive science and neuroscience. The human visual system is thought to solve this binding problem via serial processing, attending to individual objects one at a time so as to avoid interference from other objects. Recent work has proposed "pointing" -- the use of explicit spatial coordinates to refer to objects -- as an analogous solution for vision language models, and found that it improves performance on challenging multi-object tasks. However, it is unclear $\textit{why}$ (i.e., on a mechanistic or representational level) this approach improves performance, and how directly this relates to serial processing in human vision. Here, we investigate this question. We find that learning to point-via-text induces an internal visual search routine, and we characterize the mechanisms that support this procedure. We also find that pointing behavior can be generalized to new tasks via fine-tuning, and that doing so eliminates binding errors and enables compositional generalization. These results provide a proof-of-principle that serial processing can solve the binding problem for vision language models just as it does for biological vision.

AI.tldr: 视觉-语言模型在多目标场景任务中存在失效，本文提出通过“指向”机制（使用空间坐标定位物体）引入类似人类视觉的序列处理策略，有效解决该模型的绑定问题，促进组合泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉-语言模型在多目标复杂场景任务表现不佳，很多任务人类容易完成，但模型仍常犯绑定错误。结合认知科学关于人类视觉通过序列化处理解决绑定问题的启发，亟需探索能否引入类似机制改进模型性能，并理解其改进的机理。
AI.method: 研究采用“指向”策略，即通过文本学习到对目标的空间定位机制来引导模型关注单一目标进行视觉搜索。通过分析模型内部机制和微调实验，系统评估了该策略对模型绑定能力和泛化能力的提升。
AI.result: 结果显示，经过“指向”机制训练后，模型内部确实学会了“视觉搜索”流程，显著减少了绑定错误。此外，该策略可通过微调迁移到新任务，实现了更强的组合泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 序列处理机制（如“指向”）不仅能提升视觉-语言模型对多目标场景的感知和推理能力，也在原理上与人类视觉的绑定问题解决方式一致，为后续模型设计和类人认知研究提供了理论和实践依据。

title: Does Seeing More Mean Knowing More? Mono-Anchored Advantage Normalization for Multi-Source Visual Reasoning
summary: Visual reasoning through reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has achieved remarkable progress. However, when dealing with multi-source inputs, existing approaches tend to treat them as a mere accumulation of information, lacking explicit mechanisms to distinguish whether integrating additional sources yields information gain or introduces interference. Therefore, they struggle to effectively model dynamic interaction when integrating multiple sources, particularly when they differ significantly in physical properties and semantics, e.g., infrared and depth, leading to inferior performance to mono-source reasoning when a certain source holds the dominant signal. To address this issue, we propose MARS, a novel mono-anchored multi-source reasoning framework that models each visual modality as an independent information source. Specifically, by treating mono-source rewards as dynamic anchors, our method explicitly incorporates the information gain introduced by multi-source fusion into advantage normalization and adaptively emphasizes mutual promotion between sources while suppressing potential noise or conflicts during RLVR. From theoretical analysis, our method effectively quantifies information gain introduced by multi-source integration in gradient estimation, enabling consistent modality regulation. Empirical results also show impressive 3.2% and 4.9% performance gains on GRPO and DAPO across diverse datasets, confirming effectiveness of our method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MARS框架，利用单源奖励作为锚点，有效提升多源视觉推理的性能。
AI.motivation: 多源视觉信息融合常被简单累加，难以区分有益与有害信息，不同物理与语义属性的源易引入干扰，影响推理效果。
AI.method: 将每个视觉模态建模为独立信息源，以单源奖励为动态锚点，把信息增益纳入归一化，动态调节和融合，有效识别并利用多源间的信息提升，抑制噪声或冲突。
AI.result: 在GRPO和DAPO任务上，MARS分别带来3.2%和4.9%的显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: MARS能有效衡量和利用多源融合过程中的信息增益，实现源间自适应调控，显著提升多源视觉推理性能。

title: MAGIC: Multimodal Alignment & Grounding-aware Instruction Coreset for Vision-Language Models
summary: Instruction tuning of large vision-language models (LVLMs) increasingly depends on massive multimodal corpora, yet these datasets contain samples with substantial redundancy, low visual dependency, and highly imbalanced coverage of multimodal reasoning behaviors. As a result, uniform subsampling or naive score-based selection often yields suboptimal training subsets. We introduce MAGIC, a training-free, forward-only coreset selection method designed to construct compact yet behaviorally faithful subsets for multimodal instruction tuning. MAGIC is built on three intrinsic signals extracted from a pretrained VLM: Multimodal Gain, which measures the likelihood improvement obtained from visual input; Bridging Relevance, which captures the sharpness of answer-token grounding over visual tokens; and Skill-Neuron Signatures, which characterize the functional computation elicited by each sample via top-activated feed-forward neurons. MAGIC combines these signals in a three-stage pipeline: filtering low-gain examples, ranking candidates by a normalized quality objective, and performing bucket-wise budget allocation over discrete neuron signatures to preserve latent multimodal skill coverage. This formulation avoids backpropagation, auxiliary selector training, and expensive clustering in continuous activation spaces, while remaining efficient and easily deployable in existing VLMs. Across LLaVA-665K and Vision-Flan datasets, and transfer settings to large target models, LLaVA-1.5-7B and -13B, MAGIC consistently improves over strong baselines under matched 20% budgets: it achieves 100.3% relative performance to full finetuning on LLaVA-665K and 101.6% relative performance on Vision-Flan-186K, while yielding a 73.7% reduction in wall-clock run time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAGIC方法，训练前在多模态指令微调数据中选出高质量子集，无需回传和额外训练，显著提升了大规模视觉-语言模型（LVLMs）微调效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 当前LVLMs指令微调需要庞大的多模态数据集，但这些数据存在冗余、视觉依赖低、多模态推理覆盖不均，简单采样或基于分数选择难以获得高效训练集合。因此亟需一种高效且能保留多模态能力的数据子集选择方法。
AI.method: MAGIC是一种无训练的、仅前向的核心集选择方法。基于预训练VLM模型，提取三类内在信号：（1）Multimodal Gain(多模态增益)——视觉输入对结果概率提升；（2）Bridging Relevance(结合相关性)——视觉与文本的答复关联性；（3）Skill-Neuron Signatures(技能神经元签名)——样本激活神经元反映潜在计算。三步流程：先过滤低增益样本，再按归一化质量打分排序，最后在神经元签名分桶内分配选择预算，确保技能多样性。
AI.result: 在LLaVA-665K和Vision-Flan等数据集与跨模型场景下，MAGIC在仅用20%数据量情况下，性能分别达原全集微调的100.3%、101.6%。同时训练耗时缩减73.7%。整体优于均匀采样和以往基线。
AI.conclusion: MAGIC无需回传、额外训练和复杂聚类，可直接应用于现有LVLMs，显著提高数据效率，减少计算成本，助力多模态模型快速高效微调。

title: Enhancing Single-Image Facial Demorphing using Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Face recognition systems are increasingly vulnerable to morphing attacks, where a composite image is crafted to match multiple identities, enabling unauthorized access and identity fraud. Existing detection methods identify morphed images but cannot recover constituent images or identities, limiting their forensic utility. This paper presents a novel reference-free facial demorphing framework that leverages Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to guide a coupled diffusion-based reconstruction process. Our key innovation lies in extracting semantic embeddings from intermediate MLLM layers to condition the demorphing, providing high-level reasoning about facial attributes and identity cues that complement low-level pixel information. We formulate demorphing as a coupled conditional generation problem, where both constituent faces are synthesized jointly through a denoising diffusion model operating directly in the RGB domain, ensuring inter-identity consistency while preserving fine-grained perceptual details. Unlike prior approaches that rely on compressed latent representations or assume identity overlap between training and testing sets, our method bypasses lossy text generation-reencoding cycles by directly utilizing MLLM hidden states as conditioning signals, enabling the denoising network to attend to subtle visual cues such as hair, background, and facial textures. Ablation studies further reveal that middle MLLM layers encode more identity-discriminative representations, RGB-domain demorphing outperforms latent-space approaches by 30--40\% at strict operating points, and full MLLM embeddings provide substantial advantages over raw ViT features through enhanced semantic structuring from multimodal pretraining.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需参考图像的新型人脸解混合方法，可以从变换（morphing）攻击生成的合成脸中恢复出原始多个人脸。
AI.motivation: 变换攻击日益流行，现有检测方法只能识别合成脸，无法还原出原始身份，限制了其取证应用。
AI.method: 基于多模态大模型（MLLM），从中间层抽取语义嵌入指导耦合扩散模型，直接在RGB域中联合生成多个人脸，以保留身份一致性及细节。该方法跳过文本中转，利用MLLM隐藏状态提升条件生成效果。
AI.result: 中间MLLM层能捕获更多身份区分特征，在RGB域直接重建人脸比在潜空间中重建提升30-40%，MLLM全嵌入优于ViT特征，能更好地解析像发型、背景、皮肤纹理等视觉细节。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效提升了人脸解混合的性能，为身份取证提供了新工具，尤其在多身份一致性与细节恢复上显著优于现有方法。

title: STORM: Internalized Modeling for Spatial-Temporal Reasoning in Video-Language Models
summary: Many video reasoning tasks require tracking motion, temporal order, and evolving visual states across frames. Existing methods built on large vision-language models (LVLMs) often address this challenge by externalizing reasoning through textual chain-of-thought (CoT), keyframe selection, repeated frame reinsertion, or external tool use. While effective, such pipelines increase inference-time latency and engineering complexity, and they force temporal-visual evidence to be serialized into text or repeatedly re-encoded from frames. Inspired by the intuition that visual reasoning can occur implicitly before verbalization, we propose STORMS (Spatial-Temporal reasOning via inteRnalized Modeling), a two-stage framework that teaches LVLMs to reason through bounded continuous latent trajectories instead of explicit textual CoT. In Stage I, STORMS aligns latent tokens with thought-video representations derived from generated videos, grounding the latent states in dynamic visual evidence. In Stage II, the model is further trained with answer-only supervision, encouraging the reasoning process to be internalized without step-by-step annotations. Generated thought videos are used only during training; at inference, STORMS performs a bounded latent rollout without regenerating videos, reinserting frames, or invoking external visual tools. Experiments on VideoMME, MVBench, TempCompass, and MMVU show that STORMS improves video reasoning accuracy while substantially reducing inference overhead compared with tool or video-generation-based reasoning pipelines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的视频推理方法STORMS，能提高推理准确率并显著降低推理时延，无需在推理阶段生成文字推理链或重复处理视频帧。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）在视频推理任务中，常需将视觉-时序信息转化为文字推理链或多次处理视频帧，引入工程复杂度和延迟。作者旨在减少推理延迟和处理复杂性。
AI.method: STORMS框架分两阶段训练：第一阶段通过与生成视频的表示对齐，将隐状态和动态视觉证据绑定；第二阶段仅用答案监督，促使模型在无逐步标注下内化推理过程。训练阶段使用生成的视频思维过程，推理时则只做隐状态的连续展开，无需外部工具和视频帧插入。
AI.result: 在VideoMME、MVBench、TempCompass和MMVU等数据集上，STORMS在视频推理准确率上优于基于工具或生成视频的方案，且推理负担大幅降低。
AI.conclusion: STORMS实现了高效、低延迟的视频推理，降低了工程复杂度，为LVLMs处理复杂视频任务提供了新思路。

title: Pantheon360: Taming Digital Twin Generation via 3D-Aware 360° Video Diffusion
summary: Generating complete digital twins from videos requires precise camera control, global scene coverage, and strict spatial-temporal consistency constraints that remain challenging for perspective video generators due to their limited field of view (FoV). Their narrow FoV forces long or multi-view trajectories, amplifying cross-view inconsistency and temporal drift. We argue that 360° video generation offers a natural solution: panoramic coverage simplifies trajectory design and provides a strong global context for maintaining coherence. We introduce Pantheon360: Taming Digital Twin Generation via 3D-Aware 360° Video Diffusion, a controllable 360° video generation framework that synthesizes high-fidelity videos from sparse 360° inputs. The key idea is an explicit 3D Cache, reconstructed from the input, which serves as a geometric scaffold for any user-defined camera path. This allows the diffusion model to focus on photorealistic texture refinement while the 3D Cache enforces global geometric consistency. Experiments show that Pantheon360 achieves superior visual quality and unmatched geometric coherence, enabling reliable and flexible 360° scene generation for downstream simulation and digital-twin applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于3D感知的360°视频扩散生成框架Pantheon360，能够从稀疏的360°输入合成高保真、全景一致的数字孪生视频。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成方法因视场角有限，需要繁琐的多视角运动轨迹，容易导致跨视角不一致和时间漂移，难以满足高精度数字孪生的需求。为解决上述问题，作者提出通过360°全景视频简化路径设计，并提升全局一致性。
AI.method: Pantheon360框架以稀疏的360°视频为输入，显式重建3D Cache，作为所有用户定义相机路径的几何支撑。扩散模型负责真实感纹理细化，3D Cache强约束全局几何一致性，从而实现可控、高质量的360°视频生成。
AI.result: 实验表明，Pantheon360在视觉质量和几何一致性方面均优于现有方法，可支撑更可靠灵活的360°场景数字孪生。
AI.conclusion: Pantheon360显著提升了数字孪生场景的全景视频生成质量，为后续仿真和数字孪生应用提供了高效可靠的技术手段。

title: MetaphorVU: Towards Metaphorical Video Understanding
summary: Metaphorical videos are prevalent across various real-world scenarios to convey complex ideas, and understanding them typically requires high-order cognitive capabilities. The lack of systematic studies on metaphorical video understanding not only constrains the real-world applicability of MLLMs but also impedes the thorough assessment of their high-order cognitive capabilities. To bridge this gap, we propose MetaphorVU-Bench, the first systematic and comprehensive benchmark dedicated to metaphorical video understanding. Through experiments, we find current MLLMs struggle with accurate metaphorical video understanding, lagging far behind human level, primarily due to defective cross-domain mapping. Motivated by this finding, we construct a metaphor knowledge graph as mapping augmentation and propose MetaphorBoost, an inference-time enhancement framework achieving consistent performance improvement. Our benchmark, analysis, and method provide useful insights and a foundation for future research on advancing MLLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个系统性隐喻类视频理解基准MetaphorVU-Bench，并提出MetaphorBoost提升大模型在隐喻视频理解任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大模型（MLLMs）在理解隐喻类视频方面缺乏系统性评测，阻碍其高级认知能力的体现及应用，亟需相关基准和解决方案。
AI.method: 作者构建了MetaphorVU-Bench，用于评测MLLMs对隐喻视频的理解，还基于隐喻知识图谱提出了MetaphorBoost推理增强方法。
AI.result: 实验发现现有MLLMs在隐喻视频理解任务上远不及人类表现，主要因为跨领域映射能力薄弱。引入MetaphorBoost后，模型性能有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: MetaphorVU-Bench与MetaphorBoost为隐喻视频理解及高级认知能力评测提供了重要基础，推动相关领域进一步发展。

title: MAIL++: Multi-Modal Bi-directional Agent Layer for Vision-Language Models
summary:
Adapting large vision-language models (VLMs) such as CLIP to downstream tasks remains challenging, as full fine-tuning is computationally prohibitive and prone to overfitting in low-data regimes. Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) alleviates these issues with lightweight prompt- or adapter-based modules, and cross-modal coupling has proven especially effective by strengthening interactions between vision and language. However, existing coupling mechanisms predominantly rely on external auxiliary modules, leading to indirect, coarse-grained interactions that are structurally decoupled from the original VLM and thus limit representational expressiveness.
  In this paper, we propose Multi-Modal Interactive Agent Layer (MAIL), a PEFT paradigm that embeds cross-modal coupling directly into the intrinsic computation modules of VLMs. MAIL freezes the backbone and inserts lightweight agent layers after core modules, such as LayerNorm, to approximate the parameter updates induced by full fine-tuning. To couple visual and textual streams at this level, we introduce a bottleneck-based text-to-image bridge that jointly optimizes paired agent layers across modalities, coordinating the adaptation of corresponding computation modules. We further present MAIL++, which enables bidirectional cross-modal exchange through a meta agent layer, a meta-text bridge, and a meta-image bridge. At inference time, all agent layers are re-parameterized into the frozen backbone, preserving the original computational efficiency. Extensive experiments on few-shot image classification and few-shot universal cross-domain retrieval demonstrate that MAIL and MAIL++ consistently outperform state-of-the-art PEFT methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新颖、高效的参数高效微调（PEFT）方法MAIL，通过在视觉-语言模型核心模块内部实现多模态耦合，大幅提升下游任务表现，且推理效率不变。
AI.motivation: 全量微调大规模视觉-语言模型计算开销大、易过拟合，现有参数高效微调方法多通过外挂模块实现跨模态耦合，与模型本身结构解耦，限制了表达能力。
AI.method: 提出MAIL方法，将代理层嵌入到模型核心模块如LayerNorm后，在冻结主干的前提下通过精巧耦合文字与图像流，近似全量微调的参数更新；MAIL++在此基础上引入meta代理层及双向跨模态桥。推理阶段将全部代理层重参数化至主干，保持效率。
AI.result: 在小样本图像分类和通用跨域检索等任务上，MAIL与MAIL++均优于现有最先进的PEFT方法。
AI.conclusion: MAIL系列方法有效提升了视觉-语言模型下游任务性能，实现了结构紧凑、高效的多模态耦合微调。

title: Test-Time Self-Adaptive Conditioning for Stable Audio-Driven Talking-Head Generation
summary: Audio-driven talking-head generation has achieved remarkable progress with recent models such as AniTalker, FLOAT, and Sonic. Despite their success, most existing approaches rely on a single static reference image to condition the entire video generation process at inference stage. This static conditioning paradigm often creates a mismatch between fixed identity features and dynamically evolving facial motion, leading to identity drift, temporal inconsistency, and degraded perceptual quality. We introduce Test-Time Self-Adaptive Conditioning (TT-SAC), a parameter-free inference framework that enables pretrained talking-head generators to adapt their conditioning representations during inference without retraining, gradient updates, or additional supervision. Instead of treating the reference portrait as immutable, TT-SAC composes the generator with its encoder in a feedback loop: the generator's own outputs are re-encoded to construct a refined conditioning representation that better aligns with the temporal dynamics of the synthesized sequence. A single adaptation step approximates a self-consistent equilibrium of the generative process, stabilizing identity and motion across time. We further provide theoretical analysis showing that test-time conditioning adaptation reduces feature variance and improves generative stability under mild Lipschitz assumptions, while exhibiting a principled bias-variance tradeoff that governs the optimal strength of adaptation. Extensive experiments on state-of-the-art talking-head generators and benchmark datasets demonstrate consistent improvements in lip-sync accuracy, temporal coherence, identity preservation, and perceptual fidelity. TT-SAC offers a model-agnostic and training-free strategy for enhancing generative video models, establishing test-time conditioning adaptation as an effective mechanism for stabilizing audio-driven portrait animation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的推理框架TT-SAC，实现了在无需重新训练或额外监督下提升音频驱动人脸动画生成的时序一致性、身份保持和感知质量。
AI.motivation: 现有音频驱动人脸动画方法大多仅用一张静态参考图像来指导整个视频生成，导致生成过程中身份特征与动态面部表情存在失配，引发身份漂移与时序不一致等问题。
AI.method: 提出TT-SAC推理框架，核心做法是：将生成器输出的图像通过编码器重新编码，循环反馈修正参考特征，从而动态自适应优化参考特征与生成序列的时序动态一致，仅需一次适应，无须模型参数更新、重新训练或额外监督。
AI.result: TT-SAC可用于多种先进的人脸动画生成器，在多个基准数据集上均取得了口型同步、时序连贯性、身份保持与感知保真度等指标的显著提升。
AI.conclusion: TT-SAC是一种无需训练、模型无关的推理级适应方法，可有效提升音频驱动人像动画的稳定性和质量，未来可作为通用增强手段应用于此类生成模型。

title: Full-4D: Generating Full-Scope 4D Scenes from a Single-View Video
summary: Generating 4D scenes from a single-view video is inherently ill-posed: a single viewpoint lacks the information needed to recover a complete, dynamic scene with full coverage. Existing methods are typically limited to monocular videos, simple 3D effects, or only small viewpoint perturbations around the original viewpoint, falling short of true 4D generation. Meanwhile, the lack of large-scale datasets capturing full-scope 4D scenes with synchronized multi-view videos further hinders progress in this direction. We propose a novel single-view video-to-4D framework that casts full-scope 4D generation as a multi-view video synthesis followed by optimization-based 4D reconstruction from the generated views. To instantiate this formulation end-to-end, we make three key contributions. First, we introduce Real-MV-4D, a large-scale dataset of synchronized multi-view videos captured in diverse real-world environments to provide the 4D supervision. Second, we train a multi-view video diffusion model driven by a novel fused time(T)-view(V) attention mechanism that directly embeds geometric reprojection priors and explicit camera conditioning into its view-time interactions. Unlike basic feature fusion, this direct binding strictly aligns the generation process with physical 3D priors to produce a dense, synchronized T$\times $V video grid. Third, rather than relying on non-interactive and inconsistent 2D video interpolations, we lift the synthesized multi-view videos into an explicit 4D representation (i.e. 4DGS), regularized by a Flow Matching Distillation loss that exploits the multi-view prior to improve novel-view rendering. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms existing approaches in both visual fidelity and geometric consistency, enabling full-scope 4D scene generation from single-view videos.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从单视角视频生成完整4D场景的新框架，突破了以往只能小范围视角变化的限制，通过多视角合成与优化重建，实现高质量4D场景生成。
AI.motivation: 从单视角视频生成完整、动态、可自由视角观察的4D场景是一个极具挑战的任务，因为单一视频缺乏完整的几何和动态信息，现有数据集和方法均有限制，急需突破性的解决方案。
AI.method: 1）提出Real-MV-4D大规模多视角4D视频数据集。2）设计类Diffusion的多视角视频生成模型，利用融合的时-视（T-V）注意力机制，把几何重投影先验和相机信息显式植入时视联合建模。3）将合成的多视角视频通过优化提升为显式4D表示，利用Flow Matching蒸馏损失增强多视角一致性和新视角渲染效果。
AI.result: 本方法在视觉质量和几何一致性方面均超越已有方法，实现了基于单视角视频的高保真、完备4D场景生成。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为单视频输入生成完整4D场景提供了新思路，并借助创新机制和新数据集显著提升了生成效果，为相关领域研究带来重要推动。

title: Metric--Phase Fields: Decoupling Distance and Sign for Thin-Structure Reconstruction from Unoriented Point Clouds
summary: Neural Signed Distance Functions (SDFs) excel at reconstructing watertight manifolds but fail on thin structures and open boundaries due to strict inside--outside constraints. Conversely, Unsigned Distance Fields (UDFs) accommodate general geometries but suffer from gradient singularities at the zero-level set, hindering optimization and extraction. We introduce Metric--Phase Fields (MPFs), a decoupled implicit representation that separates metric proximity from topological phase. Given an unoriented point cloud, MPFs learn (i) an unsigned metric field $r$ and (ii) a smooth phase field $θ$, for which we derive a bounded phase indicator $P=\tanh(βθ)$ that provides soft inside--outside cues where they are meaningful. We couple the two fields via a gated-metric formulation with a residual phase injection to obtain a signed implicit function with stable near-surface gradients. The phase coefficient $β$ is learnable, allowing MPFs to adaptively control the sharpness of the phase transition and the degree of saturation of the soft sign indicator. Experiments on both synthetic and scanned thin-shell and thin-plate shapes demonstrate that MPFs preserve thin and layered structures more faithfully than recent SDF-based methods, while also enabling more robust training and more reliable surface extraction than UDF-based approaches. Check out \href{https://github.com/JIAYI-Scarlett/ICML2026-MPF}{MPFs-GitHub} for source code and test models.

AI.tldr: 提出了度量-相位场（MPF）这一新隐式表达方法，用于更好地重建点云的薄层和开边界结构，兼具SDF和UDF的优点。
AI.motivation: 传统神经签名距离函数（SDF）擅长还原封闭流形，但对于薄层或开边界表现不佳；无符号距离函数（UDF）虽然适应更广泛的几何体，但在零水平面出现梯度奇异性，影响优化和提取。作者需要寻求一种新方法，克服现有方法在重建复杂或纤薄几何时的局限。
AI.method: 作者提出了度量-相位场（MPF）表示，将距离的度量和拓扑相位解耦：(1) 学习一个无符号度量场r和一个平滑的相位场θ；(2) 导出有界相位指标P=tanh(βθ)，作为软性inside-outside判据；(3) 二者通过门控-度量形式耦合，并采用残差相位注入，使所得有符号隐式函数在表面附近具有稳定梯度；(4) 相位系数β可学习，实现自适应相位过渡控制。
AI.result: 在合成和实测的薄壳、薄板形状上，MPF方法比最新SDF方法更好地保持薄层和层状结构，也比UDF方法训练更稳健、表面提取更可靠。
AI.conclusion: MPF为复杂几何体的点云重建提供了一种更鲁棒、表达能力更强的新型隐式表示，特别适合薄层和开边界形状，在视觉重建领域有重要应用价值。

title: Cross-Stage Attention Multi-Expert Network for Radiologist-Inspired Breast Ultrasound Diagnosis
summary: Breast ultrasound imaging is an important noninvasive method for early breast cancer diagnosis, but automatic benign/malignant classification remains challenging due to tumor heterogeneity, blurred boundaries, and data imbalance. To improve feature representation and classification accuracy, this paper proposes the Cross-Stage Attention Mixture-of-Experts Network (CSA-MoE-Net). It adopts a Cross-Stage Attention-enhanced ResNet-18 as the backbone, in which the Cross-Stage Attention module adaptively recalibrates multi-level features, thereby enhancing key tumor features and suppressing redundancy. A three-branch Mixture of Experts (MoE) Block learns complementary features from the Whole Tumor Image, Tumor Core, and Boundary, and an Adaptive Gating Network fuses them to capture morphological, textural, and contextual information. The fused features are denoted as Fused Expert Feature (FEF) in the architecture. Experiments on a balanced dataset of 2,129 breast ultrasound images show that, averaged over 20 independent runs, the model achieves an accuracy of 96.33\%, precision of 94.09\%, recall of 98.53\%, F1-score of 96.25\%, and AUC of 99.50\%. Compared to the baseline ResNet-18, these metrics improve by 3.01, 0.70, 5.37, 2.98, and 5.42 percentage points, respectively. The proposed mechanism requires no invasive modification and can be seamlessly embedded into VGG-16, DenseNet-121, etc., yielding stable performance gains, thus providing reliable support for computer-aided diagnosis.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为CSA-MoE-Net的新网络结构，用于提升乳腺超声图像良恶性自动分类的准确率，在实验中取得了显著的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 乳腺超声是乳腺癌早筛的重要无创方式，但由于肿瘤异质性、边界模糊和数据不均衡，自动良恶性识别难度大。现有方法难以充分提取和区分关键肿瘤特征。
AI.method: 作者提出了Cross-Stage Attention Mixture-of-Experts Network（CSA-MoE-Net）。该方法以ResNet-18为主干，融入跨阶段注意力模块以自适应增强多层特征，分支学习肿瘤整体、核心与边界信息，再通过门控网络自适应融合，提取融合专家特征（FEF）。
AI.result: 在2129张乳腺超声图构成的平衡数据集上，平均20次独立实验，模型准确率96.33%、精确率94.09%、召回率98.53%、F1值96.25%、AUC 99.50%，均优于ResNet-18基线3个百分点以上。
AI.conclusion: CSA-MoE-Net可无缝嵌入多种主流网络结构，在不增加侵入性的前提下稳定提升乳腺超声良恶性判别性能，为计算机辅助诊断提供可靠支持。

title: ProSR: Process-Shaped Spatial Reasoning for Reliable Chain-of-Thought in VLMs
summary: Reliable spatial reasoning remains a core bottleneck for vision-language models (VLMs). Existing mainstream training paradigms for spatial reasoning largely rely on outcome alignment or process imitation, lacking explicit constraints on the reasoning process, and therefore struggle to ensure genuine visual dependence and stable reasoning trajectories. In this paper, we construct a high-quality CoT dataset covering diverse spatial phenomena and diagnose the model's reasoning process, revealing two typical types of process degradation during reinforcement learning optimization: Spurious Grounding, which bypasses visual evidence, and Tail Instability, where uncertainty abnormally rises in the later stage of reasoning. To address these issues, we propose ProSR, a process-shaping optimization framework for spatial reasoning. Through a Counterfactual Invariance Penalty and a Tail Drift Penalty, ProSR extends the optimization objective from single answer correctness to two process-level dimensions: visual dependence and trajectory stability. Experiments on multiple complex and out-of-distribution spatial reasoning benchmarks show that ProSR improves answer accuracy while generating reasoning trajectories that are more stable and more dependent on visual evidence.

AI.tldr: 本文针对视觉-语言模型在空间推理上的局限，提出了过程优化框架ProSR，有效提升模型的视觉依赖性和推理轨迹的稳定性。
AI.motivation: 空间推理是VLMs的核心难题，现有方法缺乏对推理过程的显式约束，导致推理不稳定，且难以确保真正依赖视觉内容。
AI.method: 1. 构建高质量的CoT（Chain-of-Thought）空间推理数据集；2. 分析优化过程中的推理退化现象（虚假视觉关联与轨迹不稳定）；3. 提出ProSR框架，通过反事实不变性惩罚和尾部漂移惩罚，显式约束优化目标，促进视觉依赖和推理稳定性。
AI.result: 在多个复杂和分布外空间推理基准上，ProSR模型不仅提升了答案准确率，还能生成更稳定、更加依赖视觉证据的推理轨迹。
AI.conclusion: ProSR能够有效解决VLMs空间推理过程中存在的视觉证据利用不足和推理路径不稳定的问题，为后续空间推理任务提供了更可靠的优化思路。

title: Location Prior Generation via Multi-Source Urban Data Fusion for Low-Altitude Air Mobility
comment: 11 pages, 7 figures, submitted to IEEE Journal of Internet of Things
summary: Building height, the third dimension (3D) of urban spatial data, is absent in over 95% of structures in global geospatial databases. For the emerging low-altitude economy, this data gap forces each aerial platform to rely on real-time onboard sensing rather than pre-computed 3D scene geometry. We present the Location Prior Generation Framework (LPGF), a multi-source data fusion pipeline that integrates Sentinel-2 imagery, UAV telemetry, vehicle GPS trajectories, and OpenStreetMap footprints into structured, reusable urban location priors. LPGF assigns building heights through a three-tier priority hierarchy: (1) explicit OSM height tags where available, (2) floor count multiplied by 3.2 m per story where recorded, and (3) building-type default heights otherwise, yielding a worst-case error of approximately 5.5 m. An optional shadow-based height estimation module (SHEM) is activated only when a four-criterion quality gate is satisfied; when any criterion fails, the pipeline routes to structured fallback. On the MiTra A50 Milan dataset, the quality gate correctly identified two imaging failure modes: sub-pixel shadows at 10 m GSD and ground shadow merging at 0.93 m GSD, producing a consistent 27-building prior in both cases. Tier 3 type-default heights were validated against manual floor counts (n=15), achieving MAE=3.07 m within the 5.0 m uncertainty bound. The framework demonstrates that structured, quality-gated fusion of universally available data streams can bootstrap 3D scene coverage for low-altitude urban operations.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新方法LPGF，可融合多源数据为城市建筑生成高度信息，有效填补绝大多数地理数据库缺少建筑高度的空白。
AI.motivation: 全球绝大多数地理空间数据库缺乏建筑高度（第三维）数据，导致低空经济等场景下，在实际应用时每个平台需依赖昂贵的实时传感，缺乏预先的三维场景信息，需要新方法自动补全高度数据。
AI.method: 提出了Location Prior Generation Framework (LPGF)，整合了Sentinel-2遥感影像、无人机遥测、车辆GPS轨迹以及OpenStreetMap建筑轮廓。LPGF通过三层优先级分配建筑高度：1.优先使用OSM中的显式高度标签；2.无高度标签时用楼层数×3.2米估算；3.都无时用建筑类型默认高度。系统还可在精准性达标时启用基于影子的高度估算模块，否则采用结构化回退策略。
AI.result: 在MiTra A50米兰数据集上，质量门控机制成功识别了两种成像失效模式，始终可靠输出27个建筑物的高度。类型默认高度经人工验证，平均绝对误差3.07米，符合5米不确定度范围。
AI.conclusion: 通过多源数据的结构化融合与严谨的质量控制，可以有效补全3D城市场景信息。该框架为低空城市作业快速建立三维场景提供了实用方案。

title: Tetris: Tile-level Sampling for Efficient and High-Fidelity Video Object Tracking
summary: Track materialization converts raw video into reusable object tracks that downstream queries can run against without rerunning tracking, but extracting those tracks efficiently and with high fidelity remains expensive. Prior systems reduce cost through temporal frame sampling, erasing the inter-frame motion that fine-grained tracking requires. In stationary video, however, large portions of each frame contain no objects of interest, and the remaining regions tolerate different sampling rates. We present Tetris, a track-extraction system that decomposes videos into a tile-based polyomino data model, enabling fine-grained spatiotemporal pruning that reduces detector calls with minimal fidelity loss. Tetris runs three operators upstream of the user-provided detector: a classifier identifies relevant tiles and groups them into polyominoes, an integer linear program (ILP) prunes redundant polyominoes under a user-specified accuracy constraint, and a packer assembles the survivors into canvases that minimize detector calls. Across 7 stationary-video datasets, Tetris stays within a 5% tracking accuracy loss of a full-frame, every-frame reference pipeline, whereas prior systems exceed this bound on 3 of the 7 datasets. At this 5% bound, Tetris achieves up to 17.4x higher throughput than prior systems and up to 68.8x higher than the reference pipeline. The project page is at https://tetris-db.github.io .

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Tetris系统，通过以拼块(tile-based polyomino)的数据模型对视频进行分解，实现了高效且高保真的对象轨迹提取，大幅减少了检测器调用次数。
AI.motivation: 传统的轨迹物化方法虽能避免重复追踪，但其检测代价高，尤其是现有方法常借助帧采样优化代价，这会丢失细粒度跟踪所需的帧间物体运动信息。而在静态视频中，大部分区域实际并无关注对象，存在更细致的采样优化空间。
AI.method: Tetris利用拼块（tiles）将视频切割，通过三大算子：分类器识别感兴趣区域形成polyomino；ILP（整数线性规划）根据准确率约束裁剪冗余拼块；packer将结果拼块组合为最少数目的画布，以减少对检测器的调用。
AI.result: 在7个静态视频数据集上，Tetris在仅有5%跟踪准确率损失的条件下，所有数据集均优于全帧-全时基准和之前系统（后者有3个数据集损失超标），吞吐率相比现有方案可提升至17.4倍，对基线提升高达68.8倍。
AI.conclusion: Tetris能以最小追踪精度损失，大幅降低检测代价，对静态视频分析的效率提升显著。

title: Are We Overconfident in Models and Results for Semi-Supervised 3D Medical Image Segmentation?
summary: Semi-supervised learning has become a dominant paradigm for reducing annotation costs. However, we argue that the current progress is clouded by a twofold overconfidence problem. Algorithmically, mainstream pseudo-labeling frameworks often conflate prediction confidence with uncertainty, leading to severe confirmation bias. Strategically, since multiple benchmark datasets lack dedicated validation sets, some studies use the test set for validation as well, leading to inflated performance estimates. Subsequent methods, compelled to employ the same strategy to surpass reported SOTA, trigger an arms race of overfitting. This raises concerns that the impressive numerical gains in the community may reflect overfitting rather than genuine progress. Thus, we propose a tri-space calibrated segmentation framework founded on a principled dual-axis reliability assessment engine.
