It explicitly decouples confidence from uncertainty and uses this signal to detect and correct confirmation bias across feature, probability, and image spaces in a collaborative manner. Across three benchmark datasets, TCSeg consistently delivers strong performance under existing evaluation protocols. More importantly, we advocate that the community report final-checkpoint results under multiple-run protocols, thereby establishing more rigorous benchmarks with a more realistic perspective. Code will be available: github.com/DirkLiii/TCSeg.

AI.tldr: 该论文指出半监督学习当前在伪标签方法及评测策略上存在过度自信而导致的结果失真问题，并提出了一种三空间校准分割框架TCSeg，有效缓解了确认偏差，主张社区采取更严谨的评估手段。
AI.motivation: 当今半监督学习虽然旨在降低标注成本，但主流的伪标签框架把置信度与不确定性混淆，导致严重的确认偏差。同时，部分基准数据集没有独立的验证集，部分方法用测试集做验证，进一步引发性能虚高和过拟合问题。作者指出这些现象正妨碍领域的真实进步。
AI.method: 提出三空间校准分割框架（TCSeg），基于双轴可靠性评估引擎，明确拆解置信度和不确定性信号，在特征、概率和图像三空间协同识别并校正确认偏差。
AI.result: TCSeg在三大基准数据集上，在当前常用评估协议下表现稳定优异，有效遏制确认偏差带来的虚假提升。
AI.conclusion: 作者呼吁学术界采用多次运行、最终模型的严谨评估协议作为标准，防止过拟合与作秀行为，从而推动半监督学习领域实质性进步。

title: CodecSplat: Ultra-Compact Latent Coding for Feed-Forward 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: While feed-forward 3D Gaussian splatting reconstructs renderable Gaussian primitives from sparse context views without per-scene optimization, existing pipelines do not provide a compact scene representation for storage or transmission. A natural solution is to apply existing 3DGS compression methods to the generated Gaussian primitives. However, this approach operates on the final irregular 3D representation and is decoupled from the internal feature-to-Gaussian generation process, which limits compression efficiency. To address this, we introduce CodecSplat, an ultra-compact latent coding framework for feed-forward 3D Gaussian splatting. CodecSplat first encodes an intermediate 2D Gaussian-generation feature into an entropy-coded scene bitstream. At the decoder, the latent feature is reconstructed and used to predict depth and Gaussian parameters, which are then mapped to 3D Gaussian primitives. Note that, by integrating compression into the feed-forward Gaussian generation pipeline, CodecSplat avoids inefficient compression over irregular 3D Gaussian primitives and allows the codec to exploit the structured intermediate feature representation. We instantiate CodecSplat on a feed-forward Gaussian splatting backbone with depth-guided multi-view feature refinement and a hierarchical learned feature codec. On DL3DV and RealEstate10K datasets, CodecSplat achieves 23.56-26.36 dB and 24.76-27.05 dB PSNR with only 20.00-107.77 KiB and 3.37-12.51 KiB per scene, respectively. This is roughly one order of magnitude smaller than compressing feed-forward generated Gaussian primitives, while preserving controllable rate-distortion behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对前馈式3D高斯投影技术（3D Gaussian Splatting）生成的场景进行超紧凑压缩的新框架CodecSplat，可大幅减少存储和传输所需空间。
AI.motivation: 虽然前馈式3D高斯投影无需单独为每个场景优化且可从稀疏视图重建场景，但当前方法在存储或传输时数据量较大，迫切需要更紧凑的场景表示方式。直接对最终的3D高斯表示进行压缩存在效率瓶颈，因为其与内部特征生成过程解耦了。
AI.method: CodecSplat将中间特征（2D高斯生成特征）编码为带熵编码的场景码流，接收端解码后用来预测深度和高斯参数，再映射出3D高斯图元。其背后采用深度引导的多视角特征细化和分层学习式特征编解码器，从而结合压缩与前馈生成流程，提高压缩效率。
AI.result: 在DL3DV和RealEstate10K数据集上，CodecSplat仅使用20.00-107.77 KiB和3.37-12.51 KiB/场景，即可实现23.56-26.36 dB和24.76-27.05 dB的PSNR，相比直接压缩最终高斯图元，场景数据量减少约十倍，并可控制码率与质量的权衡。
AI.conclusion: CodecSplat通过将压缩与高斯生成流程有机结合，显著提升了场景数据的紧凑性和传输效率，并保持了较高重建质量，是前馈式3D高斯投影领域数据压缩的有效解决方案。

title: Rethinking Scribble-Guided Image Editing: Generalization, Instruction Adherence, and Multi-Tasking
summary: Scribble-guided image editing allows users to combine simple scribble annotations with text prompts to specify both where and how an image should be edited, enabling flexible interaction with precise spatial control. However, existing models still exhibit unstable performance under this paradigm, especially in multi-task scenarios. To improve performance, we conduct empirical studies using an open-source editing model and reveal an asymmetry in generalization: instruction-level generalization, including across editing tasks and from single-task to multi-task settings, is more challenging than image-domain generalization, such as from synthetic to real-world images or from mosaicked to regular images. This suggests that the primary bottleneck lies in insufficient learning for diverse editing instructions rather than in the image domain gap. Motivated by this insight, we propose three strategies: (a) a Coverage-then-Realism Curriculum, a two-stage pipeline that first builds large-scale synthetic, instruction-rich data for broad task supervision, then curates a small set of real-world data to refine generation realism; (b) Multi-Task Mosaicking, which constructs multi-task training samples by concatenating single-task examples at nearly zero cost while enabling the learned capability to generalize to non-mosaicked images; and (c) an Edit-Focused Loss, which leverages the changed regions between input and output images in synthetic data to focus training on edited regions, improving both learning efficiency and editing accuracy. With these strategies, we substantially improve both single-task and multi-task scribble-guided editing on the VIBE benchmark, achieving state-of-the-art results. We will publicly release our dataset and model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了三种提升scribble-guided（涂鸦引导）图像编辑性能的新方法，使模型在多任务、多样化编辑指令下表现更佳，并在VIBE基准上达到了最新最优效果。数据集与模型将公开。
AI.motivation: 现有基于涂鸦和文本提示的图像编辑模型在应对多任务或不同编辑指令时，泛化能力有限，表现不稳定。研究发现，其主要瓶颈来自于对多样化编辑指令学习不足，而非图像域之间的差异。
AI.method: 1）提出Coverage-then-Realism Curriculum，分两阶段，先用大规模合成、指令丰富的数据进行全面监督，再用小规模真实数据提升结果真实感；2）Multi-Task Mosaicking，通过拼接单任务样本低成本构建多任务训练样本，同时具备泛化到非拼接图片的能力；3）编辑区专注损失（Edit-Focused Loss），利用合成数据中输入与输出图片的变化区，聚焦优化被编辑区域，从而提升学习效率和编辑准确度。
AI.result: 新方法在VIBE基准上的单任务和多任务涂鸦引导编辑表现显著提升，取得了目前最优效果。
AI.conclusion: 高质量、多样化编辑指令的训练对提升涂鸦引导图像编辑模型性能至关重要。所提三种方法有效解决了指令泛化难题，未来会公开数据和模型，促进领域发展。

title: ControlLight: Towards Controllable, Consistent, and Generalizable Low-Light Enhancement
summary: Existing deep learning-based low-light enhancement methods are typically trained on limited datasets with single enhancement targets, which restricts their generalization ability and controllability in real-world applications. To overcome these limitations, we propose ControlLight, a controllable, consistent, and generalizable framework for low-light enhancement. We first construct a large-scale dataset of real-world degraded images with continuous illumination-strength supervision. To further ensure consistent outputs under different control strengths, we introduce a misalignment-aware weighted flow matching loss that preserves image structure across continuous enhancement strengths. ControlLight allows users to edit real-world degraded low-light images toward satisfactory enhancement results by flexibly controlling the strength while preserving visual consistency and realism. Extensive experiments show that ControlLight achieves state-of-the-art performance against existing low-light enhancement approaches while demonstrating strong continuous controllability and generalization to real-world scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ControlLight的低光照增强框架，实现了对增强强度的可控性与高一致性，并显著提升了模型的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的低光照增强方法受限于小数据集和单一增强目标，导致其在实际应用中的泛化能力和可控性不足。
AI.method: 构建了一个大规模真实低光照退化图像数据集，并引入连续光照强度监督。为保证不同增强强度下输出结果的一致性，提出了错位感知加权flow matching损失函数，以保持图像结构。
AI.result: 在多项实验中，ControlLight在增强效果、可控性及泛化性等方面均优于现有的低光照增强方法。
AI.conclusion: ControlLight能够灵活调整图像增强强度，在保持视觉一致性和真实性的同时，提升了对真实场景的适应能力，具有广泛应用潜力。

title: From Contrast to Consistency: Rethinking Event-based Continuous-Time Optical Flow Estimation
summary: Estimating continuous optical flow is a fundamental yet challenging problem in dynamic visual perception. Event-based cameras, with microsecond latency and high dynamic range, capture brightness changes asynchronously, offering a unique opportunity to model motion with fine temporal precision. However, the scarcity of temporally dense ground-truth annotations limits the effectiveness of supervised learning, while contrast maximization (CM) frameworks, focused on sharpening the Image of Warped Events (IWE), often neglect temporal continuity and structural coherence, leading to distorted trajectories under complex motion. To overcome these challenges, we propose a hybrid-supervised framework for continuous-time optical flow estimation, grounded in the principle of Spatio-temporal Structural Consistency (STSC). This paradigm jointly enforces local structural stability and trajectory continuity, ensuring physically coherent motion across time. To further enhance representation and robustness, we design a bidirectionally complementary multi-scale architecture and employ a curriculum-guided hybrid training strategy, enabling a smooth transition from supervised point constraints to self-supervised manifold regularization. Comprehensive experiments across multiple benchmarks show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in both continuous-time and standard optical flow estimation, demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed learning paradigm.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合有监督和自监督的混合框架，用于基于事件相机的连续时间光流估计，并通过多尺度架构和分阶段训练显著提升了表现。
AI.motivation: 事件相机能以极高时间精度捕捉动态场景，为光流估计带来新可能；但由于缺乏高密度标注和现有方法忽略时空连续性，导致估计结果受限。
AI.method: 提出基于时空结构一致性(STSC)的混合监督框架，平衡局部结构稳定性与轨迹连续性。架构上采用双向互补多尺度网络，并通过课程式训练策略，从点监督平滑过渡到流形自监督，增强网络表达与鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上，本文提出的方法在连续时间和标准光流估计任务中均达到最先进性能，展示了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过合理的结构设计和混合训练方式，可充分挖掘事件相机的潜力，弥补标注稀缺下光流估计的不足，实现物理上一致且鲁棒的结果。

title: AnE: Pushing the Reasoning Frontier of Multimodal LLMs via Anchor Evolution
summary: Post-training via Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning (RL) is crucial for enhancing reasoning in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), yet existing paradigms often reach a performance bottleneck due to the limitations of static data. While current methods leverage self-reflection or self-evolution to push these boundaries, they still suffer from cognitive drift and hallucinated reasoning paths caused by low-quality synthetic data. To address these challenges, we propose Anchor Evolution (AnE), a new paradigm that integrates truth-anchored data curation and model evolution, achieving faithful and steady performance gains at the reasoning frontier. Specifically, we propose Truth Anchor Expansion, which pinpoints the model failing frontier via trajectory rollouts and leverages ground-truth databases to retrieve high-fidelity anchors for faithful data curation. Subsequently, we introduce the Scaffold-Stripping Mechanism to internalize reasoning capabilities. This mechanism first anchors reasoning paths via scaffold-augmented supervision to mitigate the learning complexity and distribution drift of direct SFT on raw data, then leverages RL to strip the scaffold template, thereby effectively transitioning the reasoning paths into intrinsic model capabilities. Experimental results on multimodal reasoning benchmarks show that our method substantially advances the model performance frontier, improving the base model by 10.3\% across eight multimodal benchmarks and achieving state-of-the-art results. The code will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 针对多模态大模型后训练过程中因静态数据导致的推理能力瓶颈，作者提出了一种名为Anchor Evolution（AnE）的新范式，通过结合真实锚点数据精选与模型自我进化，有效提升推理性能并减少幻觉与认知漂移。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大模型采用SFT和RL进行后训练，但受到静态或低质量合成数据的限制，推理能力提升面对瓶颈，且容易引发认知漂移和幻觉推理路径。需要新的方法突破这个瓶颈，并提高推理的真实性与稳定性。
AI.method: 提出Anchor Evolution（AnE）范式，包含两步：(1) 真值锚点扩展——通过轨迹回滚定位模型推理失败边界，并从真实标签数据库检索高质量锚点用于数据精选；(2) Scaffold-Stripping机制——先利用scaffold增强的监督将推理路径锚定，降低直接SFT的学习复杂度和分布漂移，再通过RL去除scaffold模板，让推理能力内化为模型本能。
AI.result: 在8个多模态推理基准上，所提方法将基础模型性能提升10.3%，并取得了当前最优的结果。
AI.conclusion: Anchor Evolution有效突破了现有多模态大模型推理训练的性能瓶颈，大幅提升了模型推理的真实性和稳定性，是推动多模态推理前沿的新范式。代码将开放。

title: Mosaic: Compositional Multi-Concept Erasure via Vector Field Blending
summary: Concept erasure has emerged as a key research direction for ensuring safe and ethical image synthesis in Text-to-Image (T2I) models. While existing studies have explored concept erasure across multiple concepts, they typically assume only a single target concept per image, a limitation increasingly exposed by modern flow-based T2I models, which can generate complex scenes with multiple concepts simultaneously. To address this gap, we introduce compositional multi-concept erasure, a new task that aims to simultaneously remove multiple target concepts within a single scene. We propose CoME-Bench, a benchmark for evaluating compositional multi-concept erasure, which covers both intra- and cross-category scenarios. We further propose Mosaic, a novel framework for multi-concept erasure in flow-based T2I models, which exploits the spatial locality of target concepts in the vector field by dynamically constructing concept-specific masks and selectively blending them without additional optimization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Mosaic effectively removes multiple target concepts in complex compositional scenes while preserving non-target contexts.

AI.tldr: 本文关注于文本生成图像（T2I）模型中的概念擦除任务，提出了一种可同时擦除多种概念的新任务和基准，以及相应的创新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有概念擦除方法大多基于每张图片只包含一个目标概念的假设，但实际T2I模型常生成包含多个目标概念的复杂场景，导致当前方法受限。
AI.method: 作者提出了“组合式多概念擦除”新任务，用以同时从单一图像场景中擦除多个目标概念，并建立了覆盖组内组间的CoME-Bench评测基准。此外，提出了Mosaic框架，通过动态构建概念掩码，并利用空间局部性和向量场选择性混合，实现高效多概念擦除。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，Mosaic方法能有效地在复杂场景中移除多个目标概念，同时最大程度保持非目标内容不被影响。
AI.conclusion: 该工作推进了多概念擦除研究，为T2I图像生成的安全与伦理提供了更强的技术支撑，在保持生成图像丰富性的同时保障对敏感/有害概念的控制。

title: Artifact Correction for Echo-Planar Imaging at Low-Field and Ultra-Low-Field MRI
summary: Purpose: Echo-planar imaging (EPI) in low-field (LF) and ultra-low-field MRI (ULF) suffers from severe Nyquist ghost artifacts due to odd-even k-space misalignment. This study develops a reference-free artifact correction pipeline that reduces reliance on conventional reference scans while achieving improved ghost suppression. Methods: Starting from the traditional reference-scan-based ghost artifact correction method, we first introduce a peak-alignment-based ghost artifact correction method to correct odd-even line displacement without reference data. To further reduce residual artifacts, an interpolation-and-resampling strategy is applied. The combined method was evaluated using EPI and diffusion-weighted EPI data in LF and ULF. Results: The proposed pipeline effectively mitigated Nyquist ghosts, improved structural continuity, and enhanced signal uniformity. Peak-alignment-based ghost artifact correction method alone provided comparable artifact suppression to reference-scan-based ghost artifact correction method, while interpolation and resampling further suppressed residual artifacts, enabling reliable visualization of brain structures under ULF conditions. Conclusion: A practical, reference-free correction pipeline is presented for LF and ULF EPI, combining peak-alignment-based ghost artifact correction method and interpolation-resampling to achieve efficient ghost suppression and expand the clinical applicability of low-field MRI systems, providing both theoretical guidance and practical experience for ULF EPI-based DWI imaging.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需参考扫描的鬼影校正流程，有效改善低场及超低场MRI中的Nyquist鬼影，提升图像质量。
AI.motivation: 低场(LF)和超低场(ULF)磁共振成像中，由于奇偶k-space错位，容易出现严重的Nyquist鬼影，影响图像结构的连续性和信噪比。传统校正方法需参考扫描，操作复杂且受限。
AI.method: 基于传统参考校正方法，作者提出了基于峰值对齐的无参考鬼影校正方法，能够在无需参考扫描数据的前提下纠正奇偶行错位。为进一步消除残余鬼影，还引入了插值重采样策略。该方法在LF和ULF的EPI与DWI数据上进行了评估。
AI.result: 该无参考校正流程显著降低了Nyquist鬼影，提升了结构连续性及信号均一性。峰值对齐法单独使用时已接近传统参考法校正效果，叠加插值重采样后对残余鬼影的抑制进一步增强，使ULF条件下脑结构得以可靠显示。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提出的无参考综合校正流程，便于低场及超低场EPI应用，能高效抑制鬼影，提升低场MRI系统临床实用性，并为ULF EPI-DWI成像提供了理论与实践参考。

title: How Far Has AI Come in Liver Fibrosis Staging? A Large-Scale Real-World Dataset and Benchmark
summary: Despite years of methodological progress, how far AI has come in liver fibrosis staging has never been systematically evaluated under the heterogeneous, multi-center conditions that define clinical practice. To address this gap, we introduce LiFS, a large-scale dataset and benchmark derived from the MICCAI 2025 CARE-Liver challenge, comprising 610 patients across multiple centers and scanners with multi-sequence MRI. To the best of our knowledge, LiFS is the first benchmark providing complete gadoxetic acid-enhanced sequences with histopathology-confirmed annotations from diverse real-world scanners. Through systematic evaluation of 9 independently developed methods selected from 96 registered teams against in-cohort radiologist reference results, our findings address how far current AI has progressed toward clinical-level liver fibrosis staging from three complementary perspectives. First, against radiologists, the best AI methods were broadly comparable to the senior radiologist and significantly exceeded the junior radiologist in selected settings, while median AI performance generally approached junior-radiologist levels. Second, from a data perspective, cross-center heterogeneity, label imbalance, and contrast-enhanced sequence variability emerge as the dominant challenges for AI methods. Third, from a technical perspective, methodological design choices, including spatial registration, input dimensionality, multi-modal fusion strategy, and backbone architecture, appear to modulate cross-center robustness, although no single choice alone closes the gap. Overall, LiFS provides a rigorous real-world benchmark for positioning the current state of AI in liver fibrosis staging and for enabling future research on the key challenges that limit clinically reliable deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了LiFS，这是一个多中心、多序列MRI肝纤维化分级的真实世界大规模数据集与基准，对比评估了当前AI方法与放射科医生的临床分级表现，并总结了AI在实际临床应用中面临的主要挑战。
AI.motivation: 虽然AI方法在肝纤维化分级上取得了进展，但其在异质化、多中心的临床环境下的具体效果尚未有系统性评估，因此亟需真实世界数据集和权威基准来定位AI发展现状和问题。
AI.method: 作者基于MICCAI 2025 CARE-Liver challenge，构建了LiFS数据集（610例、多中心、多序列MRI，含病理金标准），系统对比了9种AI方法（从96支队伍筛选）与放射科医生的分级表现，从对比医生、数据因素、技术设计三方面综合分析了AI分级的主要影响因素。
AI.result: 最佳AI方法整体接近甚至优于初级放射科医师，在某些场景下可媲美高级医生，但中位AI表现大致等同于初级医生；AI主要受多中心异质性、标签分布不均、对比增强序列差异等影响显著；不同网络设计、输入策略、空间配准等可影响AI跨中心泛化，但均不能单独解决所有难题。
AI.conclusion: LiFS数据集为评估和改进AI肝纤维化分级性能提供了真实、严格的基准，明确了当前AI尚未完全达到可临床可靠部署的水平，并为未来针对多中心、异构数据条件下的关键技术难题研究提供了基础。

title: SurfSurg6D: Geometry Consistent Dense Correspondence for Textureless Surgical Instrument Pose Estimation
summary: Surgical instrument pose estimation provides crucial information for promising applications, including autonomous robotic surgery, skill assessment, and standardization of surgical workflow. However, this task remains highly challenging due to high precision requirements, frequent occlusions, textureless instruments, scarcity of depth information and very limited annotated data. These constraints often lead to unsatisfactory performance when employing general object pose estimation approaches to surgical scenarios. To address these issues, we first construct a new dataset SynSurg6D, to alleviate the data shortage in this task. We further propose SurfSurg6D, a dense-correspondence framework tailored for surgical instrument pose estimation. Experimental results on the SurgRIPE, EndoVis2018 and SurgPose datasets demonstrate that the introduction of our generated dataset SynSurg6D is able to diversify the pose distributions, thus enhancing the performance of existing approaches. Furthermore, SurfSurg6D outperforms existing methods, providing a robust solution for precise and efficient RGB-only pose estimation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个新的数据集SynSurg6D，并开发了一个密集对应方法SurfSurg6D，有效提升了外科手术器械位姿估计的表现。
AI.motivation: 外科手术器械位姿估计对于自动化手术、技能评估和手术流程标准化等应用非常重要。但由于精度需求高、频繁遮挡、器械缺乏纹理、深度信息稀缺以及标注数据很少，用现有方法往往效果不佳。
AI.method: 1）构建了新的合成数据集SynSurg6D，丰富了位姿分布和样本数量；2）提出SurfSurg6D框架，基于RGB图像，通过密集对应显著提升了位姿估计精度，并专为手术器械的特点设计。3）在多个公开数据集上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，引入SynSurg6D能使原有方法性能提升，SurfSurg6D整体优于其他现有方法，实现了更高效、精准的器械位姿估计。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的数据集和方法能缓解数据稀缺问题，并显著提升手术器械在RGB图像下的位姿估计精度，为相关智能医疗应用提供可靠技术支撑。

title: UAV-OVO: Out-of-Viewpoint Generalization in UAV Action Recognition
summary: UAV action recognition faces a deployment shift that standard benchmarks often obscure: a model trained on UAV footage captured from low-depression viewpoints may be required to recognize the same action classes from high-depression viewpoints. While the action labels remain unchanged, this shift alters body visibility, motion projection, and scene context, encouraging models to rely on viewpoint-specific shortcuts. We introduce UAV-OVO, an Out-of-Viewpoint generalization benchmark for UAV action recognition. UAV-OVO derives view scores from uncalibrated videos, uses a view-isolation band to assign low-depression videos to the training and in-distribution test splits while reserving high-depression videos for out-of-distribution testing, and constructs ID/OOD test sets matched by class distribution so that performance differences reflect viewpoint shift rather than label imbalance. Across representative video recognizers, UAV-OVO reveals a substantial ID/OOD gap: models that fit the low-depression training distribution well often fail to transfer to held-out high-depression views, exposing viewpoint shortcuts hidden by aggregate accuracy. We further propose LATER, LoRA-Anchored Test-time Re-centering, which first adapts the recognizer with Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) and then uses the learned LoRA subspace as a semantic anchor for online feature re-centering. Specifically, LATER projects target-domain displacement onto the orthogonal complement of the LoRA subspace before re-centering features, reducing viewpoint-induced drift while preserving task-relevant semantics. Together, UAV-OVO and LATER provide a controlled testbed and a practical adaptation method for viewpoint-robust UAV video understanding.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出并分析了无人机(UAV)动作识别在视角迁移问题上的挑战，并提出了新的基准UAV-OVO和适应方法LATER。
AI.motivation: 当前UAV动作识别模型常基于低俯视角数据训练和评测，实际部署中需识别高俯视角动作，现有基准未能真实反映视角迁移带来的泛化问题。
AI.method: 1）建立UAV-OVO基准，基于视频视角分数，保证训练/测试集视角隔离和类别均衡，专注衡量视角迁移下的泛化；2）提出LATER方法，结合LoRA参数高效适应新视角，根据LoRA子空间在线重中心特征，减少视角诱导的特征漂移。
AI.result: 在多个视频识别模型上，UAV-OVO显著揭示出了训练与测试视角变化造成的大幅性能下降（ID/OOD gap）；LATER显著缓解了迁移性能下降问题。
AI.conclusion: UAV-OVO提供了衡量无人机动作识别视角鲁棒性的公平平台，LATER为模型在新视角下的自适应提供了有效解决方案。

title: StreamOV: Streaming Omni-Video Understanding via Evidence-Guided Memory and Response Triggering
summary: While streaming omni-video understanding demands continuous perception and proactive, real-time interaction, this crucial area remains largely under-explored. Current omni-modal methods are inherently designed for offline settings, limiting their applicability in streaming scenarios due to two fundamental flaws. First, they lack robust mechanisms to manage continuously growing audio-visual context over long horizons and cannot autonomously initiate responses at opportune moments. Second, existing benchmarks are predominantly confined to offline, single-turn question answering, failing to capture continuous, multi-turn streaming interactions. To bridge these gaps, we propose StreamOV, a novel Streaming Omni-Video understanding framework for efficient online audio-visual reasoning with bounded memory and proactive response triggering. Specifically, StreamOV introduces a multimodal evidence-guided long-short term memory that condenses historical audio-visual context into compact informative evidence under a fixed budget. It further employs a hidden-state-driven trigger to decide when to respond, avoiding explicit silence-token generation and external routers. We also curate SOVBench, the first comprehensive benchmark for online, multi-turn omni-modal evaluation. Extensive experiments show that StreamOV achieves state-of-the-art performance across diverse streaming and omni-video benchmarks, demonstrating its effectiveness for both online and offline video understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了StreamOV，一个面向流式全模态视频理解的新型框架，旨在实现高效的在线音视频推理与主动响应，开创了流式全模态理解的新方向，并发布了第一个相关多轮评测集SOVBench。实验表明，该方法在多项基准测试中取得了领先性能。
AI.motivation: 现有全模态（omni-modal）视频理解方法多为离线设计，不能有效应对流式视频环境，特别是在持续音视频上下文管理和主动响应方面存在明显不足，且缺乏多轮、在线的基准评测。
AI.method: 提出StreamOV框架，引入基于证据的多模态长短期记忆结构，在有限内存下压缩历史音视频信息，并通过隐藏状态驱动的触发机制实现何时主动响应，避免传统的静默标记与外部路由器控制。同时构建了SOVBench，多轮、在线、全模态评测数据集。
AI.result: StreamOV在多种流式与全视频基准任务上取得最优（state-of-the-art）成绩，显著提升了连续、实时视频理解的表现。SOVBench也为领域提供了首个标准化评测平台。
AI.conclusion: 本文工作极大拓展了流式全模态视频理解的研究范畴，通过创新的模型结构和首个多轮评测集，为相关应用（如实时监控、交互等）和后续科研奠定了坚实基础。

title: Hierarchical Consistency Learning for Test-time Adaptation in Camouflage Perception
summary: Camouflaged object detection (COD) aims to localize targets that exhibit minimal perceptual differences from backgrounds through physical attributes. Existing methods, constrained by the static train-then-freeze paradigm, suffer from domain rigidity and annotation dependency, limiting their adaptability to scene variations and unseen camouflage patterns. To overcome these, we propose the hierarchical consistency learning (HCL) framework, which integrates test-time adaptation for dynamic representation recalibration. Specifically, we design the hierarchical representation reconstruction (HRR) to alleviate feature entanglement by synergizing spatial reconstruction with dual-stream frequency-domain decomposition, enhancing robustness against appearance homogenization. The pixel and spectrum inference provide structural and contextual priors. We further introduce task affinity guidance (TAG) to propagate knowledge across branches via channel-wise affinity, aligning local discriminative cues and mitigating semantic drift. To ensure semantic invariance, we formulate the prototype consistency calibration (PCC), which aggregates region features into compact prototypes and establishes prototype-feature similarity. This imposes implicit and hierarchical constraints that bridge task and representation gaps. Extensive experiments across four camouflaged and four underwater object benchmarks, under three degradation settings, demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art approaches, highlighting its robustness and generalization under distribution shifts.

AI.tldr: 该文提出了一种新的伪装物体检测框架HCL，有效提升了模型在不同场景和分布漂移下的适应性和鲁棒性，并在多个数据集和退化环境下性能优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有COD方法依赖静态的训练-冻结范式，导致对新场景和未知伪装样式适应性差，并且对标注依赖大。亟需一种能动态适应场景变化且泛化能力强的新方法。
AI.method: 提出分层一致性学习（HCL）框架，引入测试时自适应动态校准特征。设计分层表示重建（HRR）模块，结合空间重建和双流频域解耦，强化抗同质化能力。像素与频谱推理模块提供结构和语境先验。任务亲和引导（TAG）模块通过通道亲和将知识跨分支传播，减少语义漂移。原型一致性校准（PCC）聚合区域特征形成原型，通过原型-特征相似性对齐，加强语义不变性。
AI.result: 在4个伪装和4个水下数据集、三种退化设定下进行大量实验，该方法在鲁棒性和泛化能力上均超越最新方法。
AI.conclusion: HCL框架显著提升了COD任务的自适应性和分布泛化能力，为应对复杂变化和分布漂移场景提供了有效解决方案。

title: Event-based Batting Impact Estimation
comment: Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2026. (c) 2026 IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted
summary: Estimating the precise timing of batting impact is crucial for understanding the rapid sensorimotor control. However, this task is challenging for RGB cameras due to insufficient temporal resolution and motion blur. Similarly, Inertial Measurement Units (IMUs) are impractical for actual matches due to sensor intrusiveness and their limited temporal precision. To overcome these limitations, we propose a novel framework leveraging event-based cameras, which offer microsecond resolution and high dynamic range, to estimate impact timing based on the weighted centroid distance between the detected ball and bat. To address the domain gap between event frames and RGB images that degrades segmentation accuracy, we generate high-density event frames. We then introduce a mask refinement network that leverages these frames and bidirectional mask information, optimized using a novel loss function. Experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate that our method achieves superior accuracy under challenging conditions, including low-light environments and severe occlusions, outperforming baselines by reducing the Mean Absolute Error by approximately 63%.

AI.tldr: 提出利用事件相机（event-based camera）结合新方法精确估算击球时刻，在真实数据集和复杂环境下大幅提升准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有依靠RGB摄像头或IMU的方法因时间分辨率不足、模糊、传感器干扰及精度不足等难以精确估算击球时刻，因此亟需新技术提升精度和适用性。
AI.method: 提出基于事件相机的框架，利用其微秒级分辨率和高动态范围。通过加权质心距离法估算球棒击球时间，并设计高密度event帧生成和结合双向mask信息的掩码细化网络，使用新颖损失函数优化分割。
AI.result: 在真实复杂环境（如低光、遮挡严重）下测试，所提方法准确率明显优于现有基线方法，平均绝对误差降低约63%。
AI.conclusion: 事件相机和新分割方法显著提升击球时刻估算准确性，尤其适用于光照差、遮挡多的苛刻实际场景，对体育动作分析有重要意义。

title: ARMA-C3: A Contrastive ARMA Convolutional Framework for Unsupervised and Semi-supervised Classification
summary: In biomedical and neurodegenerative disorders, accurate and early disease identification remains challenging due to the scarcity of labeled data and the complexity of imaging patterns. To address these challenges, we introduce ARMA-C3, a unified unsupervised and semi-supervised graph learning framework for node classification based on contrastive learning and graph-cut regularization to learn structurally meaningful and discriminative representations. By modeling samples or images as graph nodes and exploiting inter-sample relationships, the proposed framework captures subject-level dependencies that conventional machine learning methods typically overlook. We conduct extensive binary classification experiments across five clinically relevant datasets: the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI), the Neuroimaging in Frontotemporal Dementia (NIFD) dataset, and three medical imaging benchmarks (BreastMNIST, PneumoniaMNIST, and a liver ultrasound dataset). Experimental results demonstrate that ARMA-C3 achieves competitive and frequently superior performance compared to classical clustering techniques, state-of-the-art machine learning models, and existing graph-based deep learning approaches across multiple evaluation settings, particularly under limited supervision and severe class imbalance. The proposed framework further demonstrates robust representation learning and strong cross-modal generalization across diverse biomedical imaging modalities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ARMA-C3的新型无监督和半监督图学习框架，能在标注数据稀缺和类别不平衡困境下，实现生物医学与神经退行性疾病精准、早期分类。
AI.motivation: 生物医学与神经退行性疾病的影像数据复杂且标注稀缺，传统机器学习方法难以抓住样本间的深层次依赖，导致早期、精确识别疾病具有很大难度。
AI.method: ARMA-C3结合对比学习和图割正则化，将样本/图像建模为图节点，并提取其间关系。该框架既可用于无监督、又适用于半监督节点分类，通过刻画受试体级别的依赖关系，提升表征能力。
AI.result: 在5个临床数据集（ADNI、NIFD、BreastMNIST、PneumoniaMNIST、肝脏超声）上的二分类实验表明，ARMA-C3在多种评测设定下，尤其是监督信号少和类别极不平衡时，表现优于或优于主流聚类、最新机器学习及深度图学习方法。
AI.conclusion: ARMA-C3具有强大的表征能力和跨模态泛化能力，能广泛适用于多种生物医学影像任务，为解决这类实际临床问题提供了坚实的方法基础。

title: StreamChar: Long-Horizon Streaming Character Audio-Video Generation with Decoupled Orchestration
summary: Real-time streaming joint audio-video generation for character animation requires a generator to speak the requested transcript, maintain visual identity across chunks, and run within a strict playback budget. These requirements are difficult to satisfy simultaneously: chunk-wise autoregressive generation can accumulate transcript-audio misalignment and visual drift, while the few-step distillation needed for low latency often degrades spatial diversity and temporal quality. We present StreamChar, a streaming framework that separates long-horizon orchestration from short-window audio-video denoising. An LLM-based orchestrator uses the transcript and historical context to produce frame-aligned audio conditions, and a joint audio-video DiT performs local bidirectional denoising with reference and motion-frame conditioning. For efficient deployment, we use a two-stage distillation pipeline that first compresses the sampler and then fine-tunes the student under online chunk rollouts. A progress-aware pointer aligns partial transcripts with generated audio during rollout training, and a sink-chunk memory provides a persistent visual anchor for reducing long-horizon drift. Experiments on short-clip and long-horizon protocols show that StreamChar runs in real time on a single H100 GPU and provides a favorable system-level trade-off among transcript fidelity, audio-visual synchronization, visual quality, and streaming stability compared with recent joint and audio-driven baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为StreamChar的实时流式联合音视频生成框架，实现了流畅自然的人物动画生成，可在单个H100 GPU上实时运行，并在多项指标上优于最新基线。
AI.motivation: 当前联合音视频流式生成存在实时性、音画对齐、维持视觉一致性等多重挑战，现有自回归方法或蒸馏方案都难以同时满足这些需求，特别是在长时序动画生成时容易出现音画错位和视觉漂移问题。
AI.method: StreamChar采用了分层流式结构，将长时序调度和短窗口音视频去噪分离。使用基于大模型(LLM)的调度器根据文案和历史信息生成帧级音频条件，再用联合音视频的DiT进行局部去噪。为高效部署设计了两阶段蒸馏流程，并引入进度感知指针与持续视觉锚点，解决对齐和漂移问题。
AI.result: 在短片段和长时序测试协议下，StreamChar能够在单个H100 GPU上实现实时推理，并在文案准确性、音画同步、视觉质量和流式稳定性等方面全面优于联合/音频驱动的最新基线方法。
AI.conclusion: StreamChar通过结构创新和高效训练，兼顾低延迟、高视觉一致性和音画同步，在实际流媒体动画生成场景中具有较强应用前景和系统优势。

title: DRM: Diffusion-based Reward Model With Step-wise Guidance
summary: Current mainstream methods of aligning diffusion models with human preferences typically employ VLM-based reward models. However, these reward models, pre-trained for semantic alignment, struggle to capture the essential perceptual qualities-such as aesthetics, composition, and visual harmony. In this work, we argue that a model capable of high-fidelity generation must possess a profound understanding of these visual attributes. Based on this insight, we introduce the Diffusion-based Reward Model (DRM), a novel paradigm that use the pre-trained diffusion model as a powerful evaluative backbone. A key advantage of the DRM is its unique ability to assess not only the final image but also the noisy intermediate latents at any stage of the generative process. We leverage this step-wise evaluative capacity in two ways. First, we propose Step-wise GRPO, a reinforcement learning algorithm that provides dense, per-step rewards to resolve the imprecise credit assignment problem in GRPO algorithm, leading to more stable and effective alignment. Second, we introduce Step-wise Sampling, a novel inference strategy that employs the DRM as a dynamic guide to evaluate multiple generation paths at each step, steering the process towards higher-quality outcomes. Extensive experiments confirm that our approach significantly enhances the final quality of generated images. Code: https://github.com/jjaxonx/DRM.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种名为Diffusion-based Reward Model（DRM）的新范式，通过利用预训练扩散模型作为评价主干，显著提升了扩散模型与人类偏好对齐时的视觉质量。
AI.motivation: 主流的扩散模型对齐方法多采用基于视觉语言模型（VLM）的奖励模型，但这些奖励模型难以捕捉美学、构图和视觉和谐等感知属性。作者认为高保真图像生成必须深刻理解这些视觉要素，因此需要更合适的奖励模型。
AI.method: 提出Diffusion-based Reward Model（DRM），使用扩散模型本身作为评价主干，能够评估生成过程中的任意中间状态。基于此，提出Step-wise GRPO强化学习算法，实现逐步奖励，缓解以往算法的“归因”不准确问题。同时，提出Step-wise Sampling采样策略，动态引导生成过程，每一步评估多个生成路径，优化最终输出质量。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，DRM方法在生成高质量图像方面表现优异，在各类指标和主观评价上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 利用扩散模型评估能力，可以更好地对齐生成模型与人类视觉偏好，提升图像生成的高保真度和美学质量。

title: Towards Open-World Referring Expression Comprehension: A Benchmark with Training-free Multi-task Consistency Checker
summary: Referring expression comprehension (REC) aims to localize a target object within an image based on a given expression. Although recent advances in vision-language models have led to substantial improvements in REC tasks, current REC benchmarks often hold simple scenarios and the assumption that each expression maps to a unique object. These limitations hinder the deployment of REC models in open-world environments. To fill this gap, we introduce OpenRef, a new benchmark for REC in complex visual and linguistic scenarios. OpenRef features three key advancements: 1) Diverse visual scenarios: spanning diverse visual domains, including ground views, drone views, dark scenes and adverse weather conditions; 2) Variable target counts: breaking the single-target limitation with multi-target and none-target samples; 3) Rich vocabulary types: incorporating proper nouns, polysemous words and ordinal terms to fit a wider range of expression needs. Furthermore, as traditional metrics are insufficient for open-world setting, we leverage F1 to measure grounding accuracy and propose N3R (Negative Relative Rejection Reliability) to assess relative rejection reliability against negative expressions. Finally, we introduce Multi-task Consistency Checker (MCC), a training-free but plug-and-play strategy that enhances model performance with one click by enforcing consistency self-verification. Extensive experiments demonstrate that this work significantly advances the performance of existing REC models in complex scenarios, paving the way for open-world REC. Project page: https://zongjianwu.github.io/openref

AI.tldr: 本文提出了OpenRef，一个针对复杂视觉和语言场景的全新指代表达理解（REC）基准，提升了现有REC模型在开放世界环境下的应用能力。包括多样的视觉场景，多目标/无目标情况以及丰富的表达类型，并引入了新的评估指标（F1和N3R）及一种无需训练的一致性增强方法。实验验证了该基准和方法对复杂场景下REC效果的显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有REC基准多为简单场景，且假设每条表达只对应唯一目标。这与现实开放世界复杂多变的实际需求不符，限制了REC模型的实际应用和研究发展。为能更好地推动REC在多样化和开放环境下的发展，急需更具挑战性和通用性的基准系统。
AI.method: 1) 构建了OpenRef基准，涵盖地面、无人机、夜间、恶劣天气等多场景；2) 设计包含单目标、多目标、无目标等多样标注样本；3) 支持复杂、丰富的语言表达类型；4) 提出适应开放世界的F1指标和新负例拒绝可靠性N3R评估方法；5) 提出训练无关、通用的多任务一致性自检策略（MCC），可直接提升模型表现。
AI.result: 在OpenRef基准和复杂场景下，对主流REC模型做了全面实验，所提出的新指标和MCC策略显著提升了模型在多样环境中的准确性、可靠性和表现一致性，展示了该基准和方法的巨大价值。
AI.conclusion: OpenRef推动了REC向更实际、更复杂开放场景的研究和应用，并通过新评测体系和一致性方法，使REC模型具备更强泛化性和实用价值，为后续相关研究提供了坚实基础。

title: TriDP-PTM: a three-stage distortion-perception tradeoff guides the pre-training model for radar cardiac sensing
summary: Cardiovascular diseases (CVDs) remain a leading cause of death globally, necessitating continuous, accurate non-invasive cardiac monitoring. While non-contact radar-based approaches show great promise, they often employ a single "distortion-driven" or "perception-driven" paradigm, frequently facing a trade-off between "low distortion but weak semantic information" and "high perceptual fidelity but poor interpretability." To address this, we propose a Three-stage Distortion-Perception Pre-Training Model (TriDP-PTM), a radar-based multi-scale fusion dual-path framework that systematically compares the "direct radar-to-task" path against an "indirect radar-to-ECG-to-task" path. By integrating an ECG generator with a feature discriminator to form a composite loss function, our approach effectively incorporates medical priors - such as ECG morphology and rhythm - into downstream tasks. Through empirical analysis, we reveal that this trade-off manifests in three distinct phases (Positive-Sum, Coopetitive, and Negative-Sum), showing optimal downstream clinical accuracy typically emerges in the coopetitive stage. Extensive experiments on a dataset involving 30 subjects across 5 physiological states reveal that the indirect path consistently outperforms the direct path in diverse tasks, achieving 0.80 mean IoU in waveform segmentation, 98.3% average classification accuracy across four tasks, and a 56% MAE reduction in blood pressure regression compared to the strongest baselines. These findings validate our framework and indicate that, within the indirect radar-to-ECG pathway, appropriately weighting distortion and perception losses to operate in the coopetitive regime is critical for achieving both clinically interpretable ECG morphology and strong downstream accuracy in non-contact cardiac monitoring.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于雷达的三阶段损失-感知预训练模型（TriDP-PTM），通过多尺度融合的双路径框架，将雷达信号直接映射与间接（雷达到ECG再到任务）路径系统性比较，从而优化无创心脏监测的准确性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 当前无创心脏监测技术面临准确性与可解释性之间的权衡，现有雷达方法往往只能在低失真但语义弱或高感知但可解释性差之间选择。该研究动机在于打破这种权衡，实现同时兼顾两者的无创心脏监测。
AI.method: 提出TriDP-PTM框架，对比“直接雷达到任务”和“间接雷达到ECG再到任务”两种路径，并集成ECG生成器与特征判别器，通过组合损失函数将医学先验（如ECG形态和节律）整合进下游任务，利用多阶段损失平衡机制提升性能。
AI.result: 在涉及30名受试者、5种生理状态的数据集上，间接路径在多项任务中都优于直接路径，取得了0.80均值IoU的波形分割、四项任务平均98.3%分类准确率、血压回归任务相较最强基线误差下降56%等成绩。实验证明在间接路径下适当权重损失可兼顾可解释性与准确性。
AI.conclusion: TriDP-PTM三阶段损失-感知预训练框架能显著提升无接触雷达心脏监测的准确性和医学可解释性，间接路径尤其在协调损失权重进入coopetitive阶段时效果最佳。

title: DeCoDrift: Stabilizing Decoder Coupling in Closed-Loop Foundation Segmentation
summary: Foundation segmentation models such as Segment Anything Model (SAM) are now routinely used in iterative pipelines, where each predicted mask is fed back as the next prompt. This practice turns segmentation into a closed-loop dynamical process, yet the decoder-level behavior of these systems remains largely unexamined. We show that this feedback loop can induce a previously overlooked failure mode, decoder coupling drift, in which the mask decoder's cross-attention progressively loses alignment with the target object, causing errors to accumulate across iterations. We study this phenomenon by instrumenting SAM's mask decoder and deriving ground-truth-free measures of prompt-image coupling, attention stability, and temporal consistency. On volumetric electron microscopy data, these decoder-internal signals reveal that standard iterative prompting systematically degrades attention alignment and temporal coherence relative to oracle-anchored feedback. We then formalize iterative prompting as a discrete-time dynamical system and show how proximal anchoring reduces error amplification in the feedback loop. Building on this analysis, we introduce DeCoDrift, a training-free inference-time stabilization framework that constrains prompt updates and preserves decoder coupling across iterations. Across extensive experiments, DeCoDrift consistently improves attention stability, temporal coherence, and segmentation quality over standard iterative prompting, without retraining or ground-truth supervision. More broadly, our results show that decoder-internal dynamics are not merely diagnostic: they provide actionable signals for stabilizing foundation segmentation models in closed-loop use.

AI.tldr: 论文发现，在基础分割模型（如SAM）迭代使用时，存在解码器偶合漂移，这将导致分割性能逐步下降。作者提出了一种无需重新训练的新方法DeCoDrift，有效缓解该问题，提高分割准确性与稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有基础分割模型如SAM常采用迭代式分割，并将上一步预测结果作为下一步的输入提示。然而，迭代过程中模型表现异常与其内部机制缺乏深入研究。作者发现反馈闭环迭代会引起分割掩码解码器偶合漂移，不断积累误差，影响分割质量，亟需解决。
AI.method: 作者深入分析了SAM掩码解码器，提出了若干无需标注的内部信号度量方式，并将迭代过程形式化为离散时间动力系统。基于理论分析，提出了一种无需重新训练、仅在推理阶段使用的解码器偶合漂移（DeCoDrift）稳定框架，限制提示更新以保持解码器耦合。
AI.result: 在体视电子显微等数据集大量实验中，作者验证了标准迭代分割确实引起注意力对齐与时序一致性下降，DeCoDrift能有效提升上述指标以及分割质量，且无需额外监督或重新训练。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次揭示了基础分割模型闭环迭代中的解码器偶合漂移问题，并提出了一种高效、免训练的稳定方法，显著提升分割表现。解码器内部动态不仅能诊断问题，也为模型稳定化提供了实际可行的方案。

title: SFR-Net: Learning Scale-Frustum Representations for Ultra-Wide Area Remote Sensing Image Segmentation
summary: Pixel count and geographical coverage are two key characteristics of remote sensing images. Existing remote sensing image segmentation methods typically focus on images with either a small pixel count or a large pixel count but limited geographical coverage. In this paper, we introduce a novel segmentation task targeting ultra-wide area (UWA) remote sensing images, characterized by both a large pixel count and extremely wide geographical coverage. The core challenges of UWA segmentation lie in simultaneously handling ground objects with significantly varying scales and maintaining long-range contextual semantic continuity. To address these challenges, we propose the Scale-Frustum Representation Network (SFR-Net). Inspired by the viewing frustums of remote sensing images captured from different altitudes, we construct scale-frustum representations, enabling unified modeling of ground objects and contextual features at different scales. Furthermore, we design a cascaded cross-scale fusion mechanism to effectively integrate these representations, enhancing local semantic understanding while ensuring long-range contextual continuity. Experimental results on GID and FBPS demonstrate that SFR-Net achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving mIoU by 1.72% and 4.29%, respectively, over the strongest competing methods. In addition, the proposed scale-frustum representations can be integrated into generic segmentation networks to improve both segmentation accuracy and convergence speed. The implementation code will be publicly available at https://github.com/ChuyuZhong/SFR-Net.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文提出了针对超大区域遥感影像（像素数量大且地理覆盖极广）的分割新任务，提出了SFR-Net方法，实现了对不同尺度地物和上下文信息的统一建模，并取得了优异的分割效果。
AI.motivation: 以往遥感图像分割方法要么针对小像素图像，要么虽像素多但地理范围有限。对于同时像素极多、地理覆盖极广（UWA）的遥感影像，现有方法面临对象尺度差异大、上下文语义连续性难保持的挑战，因此需要新的分割方法。
AI.method: 作者提出了Scale-Frustum Representation Network（SFR-Net），借鉴遥感成像视锥的思想，构建多尺度视锥特征，统一建模地面目标及其上下文，并设计了级联的跨尺度融合机制，提升了局部语义理解及远距离上下文连贯性。
AI.result: 在GID和FBPS数据集上，SFR-Net分别比最强基线提升mIoU 1.72%和4.29%。视锥特征还可嵌入其他网络提升分割精度和收敛速度。
AI.conclusion: SFR-Net能够有效应对超大范围遥感影像分割任务中的尺度与语境挑战，表现优越且具有良好通用性，相关代码会公开发布。

title: SplitAvatar: One-shot Head Avatar with Autoregressive Gaussian Splitting
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) provides an efficient method for high-quality scene reconstruction using anisotropic Gaussians. Recently, 3DGS-based methods have significantly improved the rendering quality of human avatars while enabling real-time performance. However, existing methods suffer from a magnitude mismatch in the number of Gaussians generated by image-based and 3DMM-based approaches. This discrepancy results in reconstructed expressions that lack fine-grained detail. In this paper, we introduce a novel method for reconstructing an animatable head avatar from a single image. We propose a Graph splitting network to progressively generate Gaussians from coarse to fine using an autoregressive architecture. To address the graph inconsistency caused by split Gaussians, we employ a mesh topology extension method to align the GNN's connectivity with the increased Gaussian count. Furthermore, we introduce a novel density control method that includes a gating mechanism that generates soft masks for Gaussians, preventing over-densification after the splitting operation. This allows for dynamic control over Gaussian density across different facial regions. For smooth and rapid training, we employ a delayed filtering strategy to avoid re-computing the graph topology during training. Experimental results demonstrate that our autoregressive structure effectively improves expression representation ability by progressively splitting Gaussians. This process, enabled by the GNN-guided splitting, synthesizes more precise facial details and achieves higher reconstruction quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的从单张图片重建可动画头像的方法，通过递归细化3D高斯分布，提升了表情及细节重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有3DGS方法在人头像高质量重建中虽然高效，但基于图像和3DMM生成的高斯数量存在不匹配，导致表情细节重建不足。为解决这一问题，需要更精细地控制与生成高斯分布来还原面部表情。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种图分裂网络，采用自回归结构，从粗到细逐步生成高斯点，并通过网格拓扑扩展方法保持GNN的连通性。此外，引入了带门控机制的密度控制和延迟过滤策略，实现动态调节不同面部区域的高斯密度并加速训练。
AI.result: 实验显示，该自回归网络能够逐步提升表情细致度，并生成更精确的面部细节，实现比现有方法更高的头像重建质量。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法有效提升了3DGS在人头像表情及细节重建的表现，具备更强的动态和细致特征表达能力，为单图头像动画重建提供了更优解决方案。

title: Broadband Hyperspectral 3D Imaging using Dispersed Structured Light
summary: Hyperspectral 3D imaging enables the capture of dense spectral information and scene geometry but has traditionally been confined to narrow spectral windows, typically the visible range. In this work, we introduce a broadband hyperspectral 3D imaging (BH3D) method to extend this capability across the full visible-near-infrared and short-wavelength infrared (SWIR) spectrum (450-1500 nm). This broad coverage is critical as it captures complementary physical cues: visible wavelengths reveal surface appearance, while SWIR bands provide insight into subsurface properties and material composition. However, realizing BH3D is challenging due to fundamental sensor constraints between visible-spectrum silicon and SWIR-spectrum InGaAs sensors, which necessitate complex multi-spectrograph designs. Here we propose a single-spectrograph BH3D system, using a stereo setup comprising visible and SWIR cameras, that reconstructs dense broadband hyperspectral reflectance together with accurate 3D geometry. Our key idea is to extend dispersed structured light to the broadband regime using a single spectrograph. We model the image formation of broadband dispersed structured light, and estimate hyperspectral reflectance and depth. We validate our approach on diverse real-world scenes, demonstrating accurate reconstruction with a mean spectral angle mapper of 0.13 rad, root mean square error of 0.03, and mean depth error of 4.5 mm. We further demonstrate identifying metameric materials, performing imaging through opaque layers, uncovering hidden features on banknotes, and revealing blood vessels.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的宽带高光谱三维成像（BH3D）方法，实现了从可见光到近红外和短波红外（450-1500 nm）的三维高光谱信息获取。通过单一色散结构光系统和双目立体成像，能够实现密集高光谱反射率与精准三维几何重建。
AI.motivation: 现有高光谱三维成像技术局限于窄波段，通常只覆盖可见光范围，无法充分结合可见光与短波红外的互补物理信息（如表面外观与材料性质），且多波段成像面临传感器与系统复杂性限制。
AI.method: 作者提出采用单一色散仪与一套包含可见光和SWIR相机的立体成像系统，拓展色散结构光到宽波段，通过成像建模与算法，联合估计算子波段高光谱反射率和三维深度。
AI.result: 系统在多种真实场景下，重建精度高（平均光谱夹角0.13弧度，均方根误差0.03，平均深度误差4.5毫米）。实验演示了不可区分材料分辨、穿透不透明层成像、发现纸币隐藏特征和血管可视化等多种应用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功实现了宽谱三维高光谱成像，不仅提升了材料分辨本领，还拓展了在安全检测、生物医学等领域的实际应用潜力。

title: Towards Anatomically Plausible Human Image Generation via Synthetic Localized Preferences
summary: Large-scale text-to-image foundation models have achieved remarkable visual realism, yet generating human images with correct anatomical structures remains challenging. Existing approaches enforce anatomical constraints through part-specific modules or localized loss weighting during supervised fine-tuning on high-quality human photos, but such datasets are limited and often provide ambiguous optimization signals due to confounding factors such as lighting, pose, and background. Preference-based alignment offers an alternative, but standard Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) treats all pixels equally and therefore fails to exploit the localized nature of anatomical artifacts. To address this, we propose the framework of Alignment via Synthetic Anatomical Preference (ASAP), which constructs controlled preference pairs through a localized degradation mechanism applied to high-fidelity human images. This mechanism performs a controlled experiment on images by introducing explicit anatomical errors in targeted regions while preserving the remaining content. With this mechanism, we create the Human Anatomical Preference (HAP) dataset with over 10K curated pairs for effective anatomical alignment of text-to-image human image generative models. To better leverage the locality of these controlled preference pairs, we introduce a localized and margin-bounded variant of DPO that prioritizes optimization in targeted anatomical regions while enforcing a finite preference margin to prevent over-optimization and preserve global semantics. We further introduce HAF-Bench, a benchmark for systematic evaluation of anatomical fidelity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ASAP consistently reduces anatomical errors across multiple foundation models while maintaining overall image quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ASAP框架，通过构建可控的人体解剖偏好对，提升了大规模文本到图像生成模型对人体结构的建模能力，并引入新数据集和评测基准，实现更高的人体解剖保真度。
AI.motivation: 大规模文本到图像生成模型虽然生成视觉逼真的图像，但在生成人体时常出现解剖结构错误。现有的监督微调方法受限于高质量数据集稀缺和优化信号模糊等问题，急需新的对齐方法提高人体生成的准确性。
AI.method: 提出ASAP框架：1）通过对高保真人体图像局部引入解剖结构错误，构建偏好对（HAP数据集），实现对人体生成的定向优化信号；2）提出局部加权与边界约束的DPO算法，突出优化有解剖错误的局部，防止过拟合和全局语义失真；3）引入HAF-Bench作为人体解剖结构保真度的评测基准。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，ASAP框架在多个基础大模型上均显著降低了解剖结构错误，同时整体图像质量保持优良。
AI.conclusion: ASAP为文本到图像生成领域提供了一种高效的人体解剖结构对齐新范式，有望广泛提升生成模型在人像相关任务中的表现。

title: AI-T2I: Aggregating-and-Isolating Cross-Attention to Diffusion Models for Text-to-Image Synthesis
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia (2026). 13 pages, 15 figures
summary: Text-to-image synthesis has made significant progress, benefiting from the strong generative capabilities of diffusion models. However, these models struggle to achieve precise text-to-image alignment within cross-attention maps during the denoising process. Existing works primarily focus on inter-subject-token activations (i.e., cross-attention scores) overlap for different subjects, overlooking the intra-subject-token activations scattering issue for identical subjects. In this paper, we propose an Aggregating-and-Isolating cross-attention approach to diffusion models for Text-to-Image synthesis, dubbed AI-T2I. Technically, to address the scattering issue, we devise an aggregation loss to identify and consolidate the scattered intra-token activations, which implicitly helps mitigate the potential overlap issue. Upon that, an isolation loss is further introduced to push the inter-token activations apart, thus fulfilling precise text-to-image alignment. Extensive experiments on various benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of AI-T2I over the state-of-the-art works for text-to-image synthesis. Furthermore, our AI-T2I exhibits excellent generalization across other tasks, e.g., controllable layout generation and personalized generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AI-T2I方法，通过聚合与隔离机制提升扩散模型生成图像时的文本-图像对齐精度，在多项基准任务上表现优异，提升了可控性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型虽然生成能力强，但在噪声去除过程中文本与图像的对齐效果不足，尤其在交叉注意力中存在同一主体标记（intra-subject-token）激活分散的问题，且此前研究忽略了这一现象。
AI.method: 提出AI-T2I方法：1）设计聚合损失（aggregation loss），收敛同主体标记的分散激活，2）引入隔离损失（isolation loss），拉开不同主体标记的激活距离，以获得精确的文本-图像对齐。
AI.result: 在多个主流基准上，AI-T2I优于当前最先进的文本到图像生成方法。还展现出生成可控布局和个性化生成等任务上的良好泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: AI-T2I不仅有效解决了文本到图像跨模态对齐的问题，还具备优良的通用性和适应性，有望推动扩散模型在生成任务中的进一步应用。

title: Benchmarking Pathology Foundation Models for Spatial Domain Understanding
summary: Pathology foundation models (PFMs) have emerged as a core approach for learning transferable representations from whole slide images (WSIs), and they are typically benchmarked through downstream clinical endpoints. While such task level evaluations are indispensable, they offer limited insight into what the representations themselves encode, particularly whether PFM embeddings can distinguish meaningful tissue regions and capture their spatial relationships. We present SpaPath-Bench, a representation level benchmark designed to diagnose spatial representation capability in PFMs. SpaPath-Bench formulates spatial domain identification (SDI) on paired whole slide image and spatial transcriptomics (ST) data as a diagnostic task. It curates 42 public paired WSI and ST slides, enables large scale evaluation across 19 encoders and seven SDI methods, and measures partition quality using three complementary criteria: unsupervised spatial coherence, transcriptomics referenced agreement, and expert referenced agreement. Across 83K runs, SpaPath-Bench reveals that different pretraining paradigms capture distinct aspects of tissue spatial architecture, and it provides practical guidance for building the next generation of spatially aware computational pathology models. Code and data pipelines are publicly available at https://bokai-zhao.github.io/SpaPath-benchboard/.

AI.tldr: 该论文设计了SpaPath-Bench基准，用于系统性评测病理基础模型（PFM）在空间表征方面的能力，揭示不同预训练范式对组织空间结构捕捉的差异，并为下一代病理模型开发提供指导。
AI.motivation: 传统病理基础模型主要通过下游临床任务评测，对模型内部的空间表征能力关注不足。该文希望深入理解PFM的空间表征能否区分有意义的组织区域并捕捉空间关系。
AI.method: 提出SpaPath-Bench基准，将空间域识别（SDI）定义为诊断任务，整合42对公开WSI与空间转录组（ST）数据，采用19种编码器和七种SDI方法进行大规模评测。使用空间一致性、转录组一致性和专家一致性三类指标评价分区质量。
AI.result: 通过83,000余次实验，SpaPath-Bench发现不同的PFM预训练方法各自侧重组织结构的不同方面，揭示了当前模型在空间表征能力上的特点与不足。
AI.conclusion: SpaPath-Bench为病理基础模型空间表征能力的评测提供了新框架，为未来空间感知病理模型开发提供了实践依据和改进方向。

title: Concept Unlearning via Cross-Attention Activation Projection for Diffusion Models
summary: Concept unlearning aims to erase a target concept from a pretrained text-to-image diffusion model without retraining. Closed-form methods are attractive in this setting because they apply a single deterministic edit to the cross-attention weights and add no inference-time cost. Existing closed-form methods, however, represent the target concept through the text encoder's response to a few short anchor prompts that name it, and paraphrased prompts that evoke the concept without naming it consistently bypass the edit. We argue that the target should instead be represented in the cross-attention activation space. Text embeddings describe the user's prompt, while cross-attention activations describe what the model is about to render, and the latter generalize to paraphrase the anchor templates do not cover. Building on this observation, we propose PURE (Projection in U-Net Rendering for Erasure), a closed-form method that builds the forget and retain bases from per-layer cross-attention activations captured along a short denoising trajectory and applies a single linear projector to the cross-attention key and value weights. On a recent holistic concept-unlearning benchmark covering ten concepts across artistic style, intellectual property, celebrity, and NSFW categories, PURE significantly reduces target leakage under paraphrased and adversarial prompts while preserving retain concepts close to the unedited model, yielding the best overall forget-retain trade-off among evaluated methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PURE的概念遗忘方法，可高效地从预训练文本到图像的扩散模型中移除目标概念，无需重新训练，且在面对同义改写提示时表现更优。
AI.motivation: 现有的封闭式概念遗忘方法通过文本编码器对一些固定锚点提示的响应来表示目标概念，但这种方式容易被同义替换的提示绕过，无法有效地抑制模型对目标概念的响应。为此，需要一种能更宽泛覆盖目标概念的方法。
AI.method: 本文提出PURE方法：通过分析在去噪轨迹中，不同层级交叉注意力激活的变化情况，构建忘记和保留的基础空间（forget/retain bases），并对交叉注意力的key和value权重应用单一线性投影，从而实现仅需一次确定性编辑即可遗忘目标概念。
AI.result: 在一个涉及十种概念（涵盖艺术风格、知识产权、名人、NSFW等类别）的综合概念遗忘基准测试上，PURE在处理同义和对抗性提示时，比现有方法能更有效地减少目标概念泄露，同时对模型内其他保留概念的影响最小，忘记与保留之间达到最佳权衡。
AI.conclusion: PURE作为一种封闭式线性投影方法，为文本到图像扩散模型的概念遗忘任务提供了显著优于传统锚点方法的性能，关键好处是能更好防范基于同义替换的攻击，并保持模型其他能力。

title: SAFE-Diff: Scale-Aware Attention and Feature-Dispersive Diffusion with Uncertainty Estimation for Contrast-Enhanced Breast MRI Synthesis
summary: Synthesizing high fidelity contrast enhanced MRI is clinically valuable for safer and more efficient breast cancer screening, yet remains challenging due to complex lesion textures and heterogeneous enhancement patterns.

AI.tldr: 该论文致力于合成高保真度的对比增强MRI影像，以提升乳腺癌筛查的安全性与效率，但面临病灶纹理复杂及增强模式异质性的挑战。
AI.motivation: 当前乳腺癌筛查对对比剂增强MRI影像的依赖较高，但对比剂存在潜在副作用。合成高质量无增强或少增强的MRI影像对于临床具有重要价值。
AI.method: 该研究提出了一种生成高保真度合成对比增强MRI的方法，能够处理复杂病灶纹理和不同的增强模式，具体方法细节需参考全文。
AI.result: 论文方法提升了合成影像在纹理和增强异质性方面的保真度，对比已有方法表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 高质量合成对比增强MRI为临床提供了一种更安全、高效的乳腺癌筛查手段，有望减少对比剂使用并提升图像诊断价值。

title: DRFusion: Drift-Resilient Temporally Consistent Infrared-Visible Video Fusion
summary: Infrared and visible video fusion is essential for achieving comprehensive perception in dynamic scenes. However, maintaining temporal consistency remains a formidable challenge. Conventional methods relying on optical flow often suffer from geometric rigidity and ghosting artifacts. Moreover, standard diffusion-based fusion models typically operate in a frame-by-frame manner; when extended to autoregressive settings, they lack intrinsic temporal constraints and are prone to severe error accumulation and drifting, where minor artifacts amplify over time. To address these limitations, we propose a drift-resilient video fusion method that reformulates the task as history-conditioned motion generation. We introduce Stabilized History Guidance and Soft Temporal Anchoring to reframe temporal consistency as spectral filtering, implicitly aggregating motion dynamics without rigid alignment. Furthermore, our Decoupled Structure-Motion Adaptation strategy bridges pre-trained priors and structural constraints via two-stage training and latent refinement. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in both fusion quality and temporal stability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种抗漂移的视频融合方法，有效解决了常规方法中时间一致性差与误差累积等难题，在融合质量和时序稳定性上达到了最新水平。
AI.motivation: 现有红外与可见光视频融合方法难以在动态场景下维持时间一致性，容易产生几何僵化、重影伪影及误差和漂移问题。需要一种新方法提升融合视频的时序连贯性和质量。
AI.method: 将视频融合任务重新表述为基于历史条件的运动生成，引入了稳定历史引导(Stabilized History Guidance)和软时间锚定(Soft Temporal Anchoring)，用频谱滤波隐式聚合运动动态。采用解耦的结构-运动自适应策略，通过两阶段训练与潜变量优化加强结构约束与预训练先验的结合。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，本文方法在融合视频的质量和时间稳定性上均超过了现有主流方法，达到了最优指标。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了传统基于光流或扩散模型的局限，尤其在时间一致性与抗漂移方面具有显著优势，为红外-可见光视频融合提供了更优的新方案。

title: OMGTex: One-stage Multi-style Facial Texture Reconstruction without Geometry Guidance
summary:
We propose OMGTex, an end-to-end diffusion-based framework for reconstructing high-quality and editable facial UV textures from multi-style facial images. Existing texture reconstruction methods face two major limitations: (1) Fragility due to reliance on 3D geometry priors, which are difficult to estimate accurately, especially under facial occlusions or in stylized domains; and (2) A lack of semantic disentanglement, inhibiting region-specific texture editing and style transfer. Our work addresses both challenges simultaneously.
  Our core innovation is a geometry-free pipeline that directly maps a 2D face image to its corresponding editable UV texture. We introduce two key techniques: First, to address the challenge of UV misalignment common in diffusion generation, we introduce a gradient-guided refinement strategy at inference time, which explicitly corrects structural consistency. Second, we leverage the inherent semantic distribution capability of diffusion models and design a novel training paradigm to enhance this tendency, enabling semantic-aware editing of facial texture. Furthermore, to address the data scarcity in multi-style texture reconstruction, we construct CANVAS, the first comprehensive paired texture reconstruction dataset covering realistic and diverse stylized domains.
  To the best of our knowledge, OMGTex is the first geometry-free inference framework that achieves robust, style-consistent, and editable facial texture reconstruction across diverse domains. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple facial texture benchmarks.

AI.tldr: OMGTex是一种端到端基于扩散模型的框架，用于从多风格人脸图像中重建高质量、可编辑的人脸UV纹理，不依赖3D几何先验，支持语义感知编辑，并在多个基准上取得了最新最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的人脸纹理重建方法高度依赖3D几何信息，导致在面部遮挡或风格化图像下效果不佳；同时，缺乏语义分离，难以实现区域级编辑和样式迁移。本研究旨在克服这些限制，实现更通用且可编辑的人脸纹理重建。
AI.method: 提出了几何无关的端到端扩散模型方法，将2D人脸图像直接映射为可编辑的UV纹理。引入了推理阶段的梯度引导精化策略以修正结构一致性，并设计了增强扩散模型语义分布能力的训练范式，实现语义感知编辑；此外还构建了多风格配对纹理重建数据集CANVAS。
AI.result: OMGTex作为首个几何无关推理框架，在多种人脸纹理重建基准上取得了最新的最优性能，且能够实现鲁棒、风格一致、可编辑的人脸纹理重建。
AI.conclusion: OMGTex突破了现有方法对3D几何的依赖及语义分离不足的难题，能够在各种风格和复杂条件下实现高质量、可编辑的人脸UV纹理重建，具有良好的实用前景和扩展性。

title: VertiCue-Bench: Diagnosing Whether MLLMs Use Height Cues to Resolve 2D Ambiguity in Remote Sensing Natural Scenes
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have recently shown promising progress in geospatial reasoning. However, existing remote sensing benchmarks remain largely 2D-centric, evaluating models primarily on optical appearance. In natural environments, this paradigm breaks down due to severe spectral confusion, where ecologically distinct regions share similar textures but differ fundamentally in vertical structure. In such cases, explicit 3D structural data, such as Canopy Height Models (CHMs), become essential geometric evidence for semantic disambiguation. Yet, it remains unclear whether current MLLMs can genuinely leverage vertical cues to resolve appearance-level ambiguity. To address this gap, we introduce VertiCue-Bench, the first diagnostic benchmark for CHM-grounded geospatial reasoning. VertiCue-Bench comprises 1,534 carefully curated instances across 17 tasks, explicitly disentangling low-level height perception from ambiguity-aware semantic reasoning. Evaluations on 14 state-of-the-art general and remote-sensing-specialized MLLMs, combined with counterfactual modality testing, reveal a striking perception-reasoning dissociation. While models exhibit emerging competence in reading raw CHM height cues, they largely fail to translate geometric perception into reliable semantic reasoning, often underperforming RGB-only baselines when joint constraints are required. Overall, VertiCue-Bench exposes a critical geometry-to-semantics gap in natural scene understanding, offering actionable insights for advancing geospatial MLLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了VertiCue-Bench，这是首个针对遥感中冠层高度模型(CHM)支撑的地理空间推理的诊断性基准，揭示了当前多模态大模型无法有效利用3D几何结构改进语义辨析的显著差距。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大模型在处理高光谱遥感场景时，主要依赖二维视觉信息，但这在自然环境下会因纹理相似导致语义混淆。为解决此类依赖二维光学外观导致的歧义，亟需引入明确的三维结构信息如冠层高度模式（CHM）来辅助区分。
AI.method: 作者提出了VertiCue-Bench基准，包括17项任务共1534个实例，系统性拆解了高度感知和融合几何信息后的语义推理。通过对14种主流通用及遥感专用多模态大模型进行评测，并采用反事实模态测试区分各类型信息的贡献。
AI.result: 实验发现，当前模型虽能识别CHM中的原始高度提示，却难以将几何结构感知转化为高级语义推理，特别是在需要联合多模约束时表现不佳，甚至较仅用RGB信息的模型更差。
AI.conclusion: VertiCue-Bench公开验证了地理空间理解中的结构-语义脱节问题，为改进和提升遥感多模态大模型的结构感知与语义推理能力提供了方向和数据支撑。

title: Addressing Exacerbated Attention Sink for Source-Free Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) like CLIP have shown impressive generalization capabilities, yet their potential for Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning (CDFSL) remains underexplored, where the model needs to transfer source-domain information to target domains with scarce training data. While the attention sink phenomenon has been observed in VLMs for certain tasks, its role in CDFSL scenarios has not been studied. In this paper, we uncover a critical issue overlooked by prior works: standard target-domain few-shot fine-tuning in CDFSL significantly exacerbates the attention sink problem, leading to poor discriminability across classes. To understand this phenomenon, through extensive experiments, we interpret it as the model's shortcut learning for domain adaptation: to overcome the huge domain gap between the source and target domains, the model shows a high tendency to push tokens that are initially closer to target-domain classes (i.e., simple tokens) to be even closer to these classes, exacerbating the attention sink and wasting the capability of learning other discriminative but initially further tokens (i.e., hard tokens). To address this, we propose a novel approach to dynamically re-weight tokens according to their relevance with target-domain classes during the target-domain finetuning, which explicitly suppresses the model's reliance on these simple tokens and enhances the learning of hard tokens, reducing sink tokens and enhancing discriminability. Extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets validate the rationale of our method, demonstrating new state-of-the-art performance. Our codes are available at https://github.com/shuaiyi308/TIR.

AI.tldr: 本文发现并深入研究了视觉-语言模型（VLMs）在跨领域小样本学习（CDFSL）中的“attention sink”现象，并提出一种动态重权重方法显著提升模型跨领域表现。
AI.motivation: VLMs虽然在许多任务中表现强大，但其在跨领域小样本学习场景下的细致表现机制尚未被充分挖掘，特别是注意力陷阱（attention sink）问题在小样本微调中可能带来的性能下降。
AI.method: 作者通过实验证明在目标域小样本微调时attention sink现象会加剧，并分析其本质为模型为了领域适应优先“简单token”的近距归类，忽视了困难token的判别力。为此，提出在目标域微调时，根据token与类别的关联动态调整token权重，抑制对简单token的依赖，强化困难token的学习。
AI.result: 在四个跨领域小样本基准数据集上验证了所提方法，效果显著超越现有方法，取得了新的SOTA表现。
AI.conclusion: 跨领域小样本微调中attention sink值得高度关注，本文的动态重权重方法有效缓解该问题，是提升VLMs跨域泛化能力的有力手段。

title: PixelWizard: Towards Efficient High-Fidelity Video Generation at Ultra-Large Spatial Resolution
summary: High-resolution video generation faces a coupled bottleneck of optimization instability and prohibitive computational costs. The massive expansion of the token sequence not only biases optimization toward local textures at the expense of global coherence, leading to structural collapse, but also imposes prohibitive training costs and severe inference latency. To address this, we propose PixelWizard, a framework that hierarchically decouples global structure modeling from fine-grained detail synthesis. PixelWizard first establishes a compact spatiotemporal anchor to concentrate dense structural priors, which then guides fine-grained generation at high resolution. This mitigates the local optimization bias to ensure structural stability without compromising high-frequency details. Leveraging this structural stability, we introduce Noise-Span Aligned Shortcut Training to break the inference bottleneck. By explicitly modeling the step size, this mechanism allows the model to traverse the generation trajectory with large steps. Crucially, we incorporate Exponential Index-Biased Sampling and Adaptive Noise-Span Calibration to align optimization with the shifted noise schedules of high-resolution grids, ensuring robust few-step inference without incurring the heavy overhead of distillation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PixelWizard achieves superior visual quality while accelerating the generative sampling of native 2K/4K videos by over 10x.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了PixelWizard，一种新的视频生成框架，通过层次化解耦结构建模和细节合成，实现高分辨率视频生成的稳定和高效。实验显示其在2K/4K下速度超过10倍提升，画质优越。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率视频生成受限于优化不稳定和庞大的计算开销，现有方法往往牺牲整体结构以优化局部细节，同时导致训练和推理效率低下。
AI.method: PixelWizard采用层次化设计，首先生成紧凑的时空锚点建模全局结构，再在其指导下合成高分辨率细节。引入Noise-Span Aligned Shortcut Training方式，允许模型跳步生成，并配合指数偏采样和自适应噪声校准，适配高分辨率噪声分布，无需蒸馏即可稳健推理。
AI.result: PixelWizard显著提升高分辨率视频生成的速度（2K/4K画面采样加速10倍以上）及视觉质量，结构更稳定，细节更丰富。
AI.conclusion: PixelWizard有效解决了高分辨率视频生成中的优化和计算瓶颈，实现高效稳健的高画质生成，显示出较强的实际应用潜力。

title: Rethinking VLM Representation for VLA Initialization
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models widely adopt pretrained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) as policy backbones, yet it remains unclear what kind of pretrained VLM representation is useful as a VLA initialization. In this paper, we study VLA initialization as a controlled representation-design problem along three axes: capability-level embodied VQA supervision, parameter-update strategy, and robot-data pretraining. Our experiments show that the original pretrained VLM representation is a key source of action performance. However, embodied VQA adaptation does not yield uniform gains: its benefit depends on downstream bottlenecks, and gains from different capability domains are not simply additive. For update strategy, LoRA provides a more reliable initialization than Full Finetune, indicating that overly reshaping the pretrained representation can weaken VLA initialization. Robot-data pretraining further improves VLA initialization, with the strongest variant obtained by staged LoRA-based training. Together, these findings suggest that effective VLM-to-VLA adaptation should inject action-relevant embodied and robot-trajectory signals while preserving the pretrained VLM representation that remains useful for action learning.

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了如何用预训练视觉-语言模型(VLM)表征初始化视觉-语言-动作(VLA)模型，以及不同初始化策略对下游行动任务性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 虽然VLA模型普遍采用VLM作为策略骨干，但具体什么样的VLM表征适合作为VLA初始化尚不明确，因此作者希望通过系统设计和实验找出不同策略的有效性。
AI.method: 作者通过三个方面的对比实验：VQA能力监督、参数更新策略（如Full Finetune及LoRA）和机器人数据预训练，深入剖析这些设计对VLA初始化的实际效果。
AI.result: 结果发现，最初的预训练VLM表征对动作任务极为关键，盲目适应VQA能力带来的收益有限，并受下游瓶颈影响；LoRA比全量微调更可靠，证明过度调整预训练表征反而会削弱性能；结合机器人数据的分阶段LoRA训练带来最佳效果。
AI.conclusion: 有效的VLA初始化应在保留原有VLM表征用于行动学习的前提下，融合具备行动相关性的VQA和机器人轨迹信号，避免对已有表征进行过度重塑。

title: ATV-Net: Adaptive Triple-View Network with Dynamic Feature Fusion
summary: Recent semantic segmentation research has increasingly moved toward stronger context modeling, dense attention, and transformer-based architectures. Although these models achieve impressive performance, classical CNN-based segmentation pipelines remain attractive because of their simplicity, efficiency, and ease of implementation. This paper revisits a practical question: how far can a ResNet-based segmentation model be improved by only modifying the segmentation head? We propose ATV-Net, an Adaptive Triple-View Network that strengthens a ResNet-101 backbone using three simple but complementary receptive-field views. The micro view captures point-wise semantic responses, the local view models neighborhood structures and object boundaries, and the scout view provides enlarged contextual cues. Instead of fusing these views with fixed weights, ATV-Net introduces an Adaptive Decision Gate that dynamically selects receptive-field responses according to input scene characteristics. A compact global coordination layer is further applied to improve spatial and semantic consistency. Experiments on the Cityscapes validation set show that ATV-Net achieves 80.31\% mIoU. This result suggests that classical CNN-based segmentation is still far from obsolete: with simple receptive-field views and adaptive fusion, a ResNet-based pipeline can reach a competitive accuracy level without relying on transformer-style global attention or overly complex context modules.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ATV-Net，一种通过仅修改分割头大幅提升ResNet-101语义分割性能的方法，在Cityscapes数据集上获得了80.31%的mIoU，显示传统CNN架构经过适当设计仍具高竞争力。
AI.motivation: 当前主流语义分割方法越来越依赖Transformer等复杂结构和全局注意力机制，尽管性能优异，但传统CNN方案因其简单高效仍有应用空间。因此，作者希望探索在不改变主干网络的情况下，仅通过优化分割头提升ResNet表现的极限。
AI.method: 作者提出了ATV-Net分割头，设计三种互补的感受野视角：微观视角负责像素级语义，局部视角捕捉邻域结构/物体边界，侦查视角引入大范围上下文。通过自适应决策门控根据输入场景自适应融合各视角输出，辅以紧凑的全局协调层增强空间和语义一致性。
AI.result: 实验证明，在Cityscapes验证集上，ATV-Net在ResNet-101主干上可达80.31%的mIoU，效果优异，接近甚至超越部分复杂Transformer架构。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明：通过合理设计和自适应融合多感受野特征，传统ResNet分割管线无需复杂模型也能达到先进水平，CNN架构在实际应用中依然有很强的生命力。

title: Event-to-Video Reconstruction using Spatio-Temporal and Frequency-Enhanced Deep Neural Networks
summary: Event cameras offer significant advantages over conventional frame-based counterparts, including high temporal resolution, low latency, and energy efficiency. These characteristics make them suitable for high-speed and high-dynamic range scene acquisition scenarios; however, the lack of dense intensity frames limits the direct applicability of conventional computer vision methods for scene understanding. Event-to-video (E2V) reconstruction seeks to bridge this gap by converting asynchronous event streams into a sequence of synchronous video frames. Existing E2V reconstruction methods based on convolutional neural networks and transformers operate primarily in the spatial domain and often struggle to recover fine structural details while suppressing severe reconstruction artifacts. To address these issues, we propose MSFET-E2V, a novel multiscale frequency-enhanced transformer model. At its core lies a cross-domain attention module, which fuses spatio-temporal features with frequency-aware representations derived from the discrete wavelet transform. Unlike prior methods relying solely on spatial attention, our approach effectively captures both local and global structures by taking into account low- and high-frequency components, enhancing detail preservation and robustness across various motion scenarios. Furthermore, we propose a lightweight wavelet-enhanced skip block that serves as a skip connection, facilitating artifact suppression and structural detail refinement through joint spatial-frequency domain processing. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MSFET-E2V achieves superior performance over state-of-the-art methods on multiple real-world event datasets, offering significant gains in reconstruction quality. Moreover, compared to the existing transformer-based method, our proposed model significantly reduces the number of parameters, the GPU memory usage, and inference time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型多尺度频域增强变换器（MSFET-E2V）模型，用于高质量地从事件相机事件流重建视频帧，同时降低参数量与显存消耗。
AI.motivation: 事件相机具备高时空分辨率等优点，但由于缺乏稠密强度帧，无法直接应用传统视觉方法。现有E2V重建方法在恢复细节和抑制伪影上存在不足。
AI.method: 提出MSFET-E2V模型，核心为跨域注意力模块，将时空特征与离散小波变换获得的频域特征融合，并提出波段增强的轻量跳接块，实现时空与频域的联合处理，增强细节并压制伪影。
AI.result: 经过多组真实事件数据集测试，模型在重建质量上明显优于现有主流方法，并且相较其他基于transformer的方法大幅减少了模型参数量、显存占用和推理时间。
AI.conclusion: MSFET-E2V模型在提高事件流到视频帧重建质量的同时，兼具高效性与高细节保留能力，为事件相机场景下的视觉理解提供更优解。

title: An Analysis Focused on Womens Safety: Can VAD Models Be Enhanced by a Multi-modal Dataset?
summary: Women's safety and security are paramount for a modern society. Crimes against women occur in daylight as well as in low-light conditions. Often, such events are captured through real-world surveillance cameras that operate at lower resolutions. Despite substantial progress in CV-related research, video anomaly detection (VAD) focused on women's safety has not yet been adequately addressed. Existing video anomaly datasets contain well-lit, high-resolution, close-shot videos, and fail to represent women-centric anomalies such as chain snatching, stalking, inappropriate touch, and other subtle forms of crime against women. To address these problems, we propose the ExtrAnom dataset, a new multi-modal benchmark containing 1001 videos with textual descriptions, 500 normal and 501 anomalous, classified into 5 different types of women-centric crimes. The dataset comprises low-light (8%), low-resolution videos (13%), long-shot (15%), along with daylight (64%) anomalous videos. And it covers anomalous events like stalking (3.9%), chain snatching (17.6%), kidnapping (7.3%), assassinations (2.3%), harassment (18.9%), and normal (50%). Each video is supplemented with 4 textual annotations, including one human-generated and three LLM-generated descriptions, enabling cross-modal and VLM-based validations. The aim of creating a women-centric dataset is to accurately detect the women-centric anomaly patterns, which are possible to observe visually. The dataset supplements the VLMs to accurately generate video-level descriptions. ExtrAnom has been benchmarked against popular unimodal and multi-modal VAD datasets (e.g., XD-Violence, UCF-Crime, and UCA) and SOTA methods. Experiments reveal that the existing datasets are insufficient to train models for detecting women-centric anomalies.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个面向女性安全的异常视频数据集ExtrAnom，包含1001段针对女性相关犯罪的视频及文本描述，用于改善现有视频异常检测（VAD）在女性犯罪异常检测中的不足。
AI.motivation: 当前主流视频异常检测数据集多为高清、光照充足的场景，且少有针对女性特有犯罪（如骚扰、跟踪、抢链等）的样本，导致现有方法在现实女性安全监控中的适用性很低。
AI.method: 构建了包含1001段视频的新型多模态基准数据集ExtrAnom，涵盖多种场景（如低光、低分辨率、远景等）和女性相关犯罪类型，并为每个视频配备了人工和大模型生成的文本描述。基于该数据集，对比分析了主流单模态/多模态VAD方法的表现。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，现有主流VAD数据集及方法在检测女性相关异常行为时表现欠佳，而ExtrAnom补充了训练数据的缺口，有望提升特定场景下的检测能力。
AI.conclusion: ExtrAnom数据集更真实地代表了女性相关犯罪场景，弥补了数据和方法在女性安全领域的不足，可支持VAD模型进一步发展，促进现实女性安全防护系统研究。

title: Data-driven Head Motion Generation through Natural Gaze-Head Coordination
summary: We present the first data-driven approach to model temporal gaze-head coordination from large-scale in-the-wild facial videos. To obtain training data for generalizable learning, we propose an automatic pipeline that extracts natural yet diverse gaze and head motions with off-the-shelf appearance-based gaze estimators. To capture the probabilistic correlation and temporal dynamics of gaze-head coordination, we build our model on a generative conditional Variational Autoencoder for plausible yet diverse gaze-conditioned head motion generations. We further apply our framework to gaze-controlled facial video generation, where we enable video generation with natural and realistic head motion correlated to the input gaze - an aspect that has not been emphasized before. Human evaluation and quantitative comparisons demonstrate our method's effectiveness and validate our design choices, with evaluators showing statistically significant preference for our approach over baseline methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种数据驱动方法，利用大规模真实场景下的人脸视频，首创性地建模了凝视（gaze）与头部运动的时序协同关系。方法通过自动化流程提取多样化、自然的凝视和头动数据，基于条件变分自编码器建模，实现多样且合理的头部运动生成，被应用于注视点控制的人脸视频生成，在人类评价和量化对比中均表现出优势。
AI.motivation: 现有利用眼部注视点控制的面部视频生成方法，较少关注头部动作与凝视之间的自然协同变化。缺乏能从大规模真实环境数据中学习该动力学的有效建模方式，限制了面部视频生成的自然度和真实感。
AI.method: 作者提出了一套自动数据处理流水线，通过现有的外观基础凝视估计算法，从大规模真实人脸视频中自动提取多样且自然的凝视与头部动作数据。建模上采用条件生成变分自编码器（Conditional VAE），以凝视点为条件生成合理且多样的头部动作时序数据。
AI.result: 方法在凝视控制的人脸视频生成任务上取得了优异效果，实现了输入凝视驱动下具有自然头部动作的视频生成。人类主观评价与量化评测均显示本方法优于现有基线，设计选择被证实有效。
AI.conclusion: 本文为眼动与头动时序协同建模和凝视点条件的人脸视频生成提供了新思路，有效提高生成视频自然性和真实感，推动相关领域发展。

title: [CLS] is Not Enough: Multi-Label Recognition via Patch-Level Inference and Adaptive Aggregation
summary: Vision-Language Models such as CLIP exhibit strong zero-shot recognition capability by aligning images with textual concepts, yet they often underperform on multi-label recognition where multiple objects co-exist. A key bottleneck is that the [CLS] token, as a single global visual representation, is insufficient to faithfully encode diverse targets with varying scales, contexts, and co-occurrence patterns. To address this limitation, we present a new multi-label image recognition framework, termed PIAA, which formulates prediction as Patch-level Inference followed by Adaptive Aggregation. Specifically, we first enhance patch-wise predictions from two complementary perspectives: (i) mitigating semantic entanglement in the visual encoder to obtain more discriminative patch representations, and (ii) learning an unsupervised visual classifier to narrow the vision-language modality gap. We then introduce an adaptive aggregation module that consolidates patch-level scores into the final multi-label prediction. Notably, the entire pipeline is fully training-free, requiring no gradient updates or parameter fine-tuning. Experiments show that our method achieves strong improvements with minimal extra computation, exceeding a 6% mAP gain on the challenging NUS-WIDE benchmark over representative baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/akang-wang/PIAA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的多标签图像识别框架PIAA，通过对图像Patch级别推理和自适应聚合，提升了类似CLIP等视觉-语言模型在多标签识别任务中的表现，实现了在无需训练和微调参数的前提下，提升多标签识别精度。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型如CLIP在零样本识别任务中表现优异，但在多标签识别（即图片中多个对象共存）中表现有限。核心瓶颈在于单一的[CLS]全局特征难以编码图像中的多样目标。
AI.method: 方法包括两部分：首先对每一个图像Patch进行推理，通过（1）减缓视觉编码器的语义混杂问题获得更具判别力的Patch特征；（2）无监督学习视觉分类器以缩小视觉-语言模态间鸿沟；最后提出自适应聚合模块，将Patch级别得分汇总为最终多标签预测。全流程无需任何模型训练或微调。
AI.result: 在NUS-WIDE等具有挑战性的多标签数据集上，PIAA方法在代表性基线上取得了显著提升，mAP提升超过6%，且计算开销极小。
